name: Netters
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Moonclan grots use throwing nets to capture Cave Squigs and entangle their foes.

name: Netters
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Moonclan grots use throwing nets to capture Cave Squigs and entangle their foes.

name: Greater Regeneration
description: Effect: Heal (D6) this unit.
legend: As it gets to eat all the best mushrooms, a Troggboss’s regenerative capacity is more pronounced than that of the average troggoth.

name: Magical Resistance
description: Effect: If this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 4+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit.
legend: The realmstone-infused mushrooms that Dankhold Troggoths consume make them naturally resistant to the effects of magic.

name: Shepherd of Destruction
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly TROGGOTH units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The Dankhold Troggboss bellows so loudly that the beasts of its herd come dangerously close to actually focusing their brutish efforts.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Deffcap Mushroom
description: Effect: Add 1 to this unit’s power level for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Fungoid Cave-Shamans claim that eating Deffcaps allows them to commune with those who have passed on to the ‘Great Green’. Though such is debatable, the mushroom’s effect on the shaman’s spellcasting abilities is beyond doubt.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Squig Rage
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Huge Fang-filled Gobs is 6.
legend: As Mangler Squigs are wounded in battle, they become even more irate and violent.

name: Ker-Splat!
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit, to a maximum of 10. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Mangler Squigs produce an impact that is nothing short of spectacular, sending severed body parts and splashes of gore skywards.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Watch Out!
description: Effect: If this unit is destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice for each enemy unit within this unit’s combat range. On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that unit.
legend: Mangler Squigs are capable of great destruction even in their wildly bouncing death throes

name: Bite Da Moon!
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and all friendly SQUIG units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made with the targets’ Fang-filled Gobs, Massive Fang-filled Gobs and Huge Fang-filled Gobs for the rest of the turn.
legend: With a manic shriek, the Loonboss drives nearby squigs into an even greater frenzy, goading them to chomp through the enemy’s lines with all haste so that they can continue their pursuit of the Bad Moon.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Let’s Get Bouncin’!
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO MOONCLAN CAVALRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: As their Giant Cave Squig leaps and bounds towards the enemy lines, the Loonboss signals the command for other squig-riders to join the fight and get stabbin’!
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>FIGHT</ky> ability for this unit

name: Gobbled Up
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: This especially bloated and gluttonous squig is known to devour enemies whole if it gets the chance.

name: Goin’ Somewhere?
description: Effect: If a friendly MOONCLAN INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6. However, friendly MOONCLAN INFANTRY units cannot use RETREAT abilities while they are within 12" of this unit.
legend: This Loonboss will not tolerate ill-timed cowardice from his underlings and will have his ravenous pet make an example of any grots who look ready to leg it.

name: Madcap Mushroom
description:
Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to this unit’s power level.
  • If 2 or more dice in a casting roll for this unit have the same value, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit after the SPELL ability has been resolved.
legend: This mushroom enhances the eater’s magical capabilities – as long as it does not turn out to be a deadly poisonous Madcap Toadstool…
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Regeneration
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Troggoths are able to regrow injured flesh almost as quickly as it is harmed.

name: Mollog’s Mob
description: Effect: This unit’s Bat Squig, Spiteshroom and Stalagsquig are tokens. After setting up this unit on the battlefield for the first time, place its tokens next to it.
legend: A strange assortment of squiggly beasts accompany Mollog to battle.

name: Bitey Distractions
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (5+) while any of its tokens are on the battlefield.
legend: The pesky beasts that flock to Mollog often prove to be an unwelcome distraction to the troggoth’s foes.

name: Unleash The Critters!
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects:

Spore Cloud: Remove this unit’s Spiteshroom. For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.

Bat Squig Attack!: Remove this unit’s Bat Squig. Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

Rock-hard Skin: Remove this unit’s Stalagsquig. Ignore all modifiers to save rolls for this unit (positive and negative) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Each of the unusual creatures that remain close to Mollog can unleash nasty surprises of their own.

name: Scuttle Away!
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat, pick this unit and up to 1 friendly Spider Riders unit that is in combat and wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: The targets can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase without any mortal damage being inflicted on them.
legend: Masters of feigned flight and other such sneaky tactics, the Scuttleboss orders his Spider Riders to flee to a more advantageous position.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Wall Crawler
description: Effect: This unit can pass across terrain features as if it had FLY.
legend: The Spiderfang’s arachnid allies can skitter up and down vertical surfaces as if they were flat ground.

name: The Loonking’s Entreaty
description: Effect: The face of the Bad Moon stays in its current position this battle round instead of moving to the next face in the sequence.
legend: The captive seers and prophets of Skragrott’s asylum can sometimes predict when the Bad Moon will accelerate or slow in its erratic orbits of the Mortal Realms. Skragrott uses this information to convince his followers that the Bad Moon listens when he entreats it to halt or move to a specific location.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘%000015359The Faces of the Bad Moon%’ ability

name: Fangz of Da Bad Moon
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the unmodified casting roll. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: As Skragrott tells it, a single shrieked invocation from him – arms raised high into the air – can compel the Bad Moon to belch a rain of fiendishly accurate loonstone fangz over the enemy.

name: Babbling Wand
description: Effect: Each time a friendly MOONCLAN unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Redeploy’ command, no command points are spent.
legend: This jabbering wand, said to be topped with the skull of the great prophet Kaloth, channels the voices of Skragrott’s imprisoned scryers through clacking teeth.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009837Redeploy%’ command for a friendly %000000543MOONCLAN% unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: Speed of the Spider God
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly SPIDERFANG unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target can use a RUN ability this turn and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: With a shriek, the shaman calls upon the Spider God to imbue its worshippers with preternatural speed.

name: Web Slingshot
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SPIDERFANG unit or terrain feature within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of the target and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Webspinner Shaman conjures a sheet of webbing that they then use to launch themselves across the battlefield.

name: Zarbag
description: Effect: While this unit’s Zarbag is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: Leading the Gitz is a powerful shaman who can call upon the powers of the Bad Moon in battle.

name: Sniffer Spite
description: Effect: If this unit’s Zarbag is on the battlefield and within 3" of a terrain feature, roll a dice. On a 4+, add 1 to this unit’s power level for the rest of the turn.
legend: Zarbag has captured and imprisoned a sniffer spite which he has ‘persuaded’ to track down potent magic fungi.

name: Let’s Get Stabbin’!
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO MOONCLAN INFANTRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Loonbosses rarely get stuck in without a big group of ladz around them to act as a distraction.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>FIGHT</ky> ability for this unit

name: I’m Da Boss
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly Moonclan Stabbas unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, pick 1 of the following effects:

Get Back ’Ere!: If the target is not in combat, you can return D6 slain models to it.

Stab ’Em Good!: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: Loonbosses are terrible bullies and braggarts with a wicked talent for coercing other grots.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Chitinous Legs is 6.

name: Wall Crawler
description: Effect: This unit can pass across terrain features as if it had FLY.
legend: The Spiderfang’s arachnid allies can skitter up and down vertical surfaces as if they were flat ground.

name: Catchweb Spidershrine
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for friendly SPIDERFANG WIZARDS while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This ramshackle altar to the Spider God shimmers with malevolent arcane energy.

name: Ensnaring Webbing
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY HERO within 1" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Arachnarok singles out a target, temporarily immobilising it with looping strands of sticky webbing.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Stuff ’Em In Me Bag
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is at least double the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: Gargants are known to grab hapless warriors and stuff them screaming into their bags ‘for later’…
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Timberrrrr!
description: Effect: When this unit is destroyed, before removing it from play, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield within 3" of this unit. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point that has a lower Health characteristic than this unit.
legend: A dying gargant is a weapon of ruin in its own right, though it is anyone’s guess where their body will fall.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Chitinous Legs is 6.

name: Wall Crawler
description: Effect: This unit can pass across terrain features as if it had FLY.
legend: The Spiderfang’s arachnid allies can skitter up and down vertical surfaces as if they were flat ground.

name: Flinger
description: Effect: If any attacks made with this unit’s Flinger score a hit, after the SHOOT ability has been resolved, roll a dice. On a 2+, halve the Move characteristic of the target unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: This crude catapult hurls a heavy ball of corded spider-silk at the enemy, engulfing victims in a mass of sticky webbing.

name: Beast-binding Webbing
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s Companion weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: As enemy beasts attempt to close the distance with an Arachnarok, they become tangled in its webbing.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Chitinous Legs is 6.

name: Wall Crawler
description: Effect: This unit can pass across terrain features as if it had FLY.
legend: The Spiderfang’s arachnid allies can skitter up and down vertical surfaces as if they were flat ground.

name: Voracious Predator
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units within 1" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Young Arachnarok Spiders are swift hunters despite their immense size, with an unquenchable hunger for living prey.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Squig Rage
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Huge Fang-filled Gobs is 6.
legend: As Mangler Squigs are wounded in battle, they become even more irate and violent.

name: Watch Out!
description: Effect: If this unit is destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice for each enemy unit within this unit’s combat range. On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that unit.
legend: Mangler Squigs are capable of great destruction even in their wildly bouncing death throes.

name: Giant Boing!
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move 3D6" but must end that move in combat.
legend: The Mangler Squigs use their momentum to spring up into the air, crashing into the enemy lines beyond.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Wall Crawler
description: Effect: This unit can pass across terrain features as if it had FLY.
legend: The Spiderfang’s arachnid allies can skitter up and down vertical surfaces as if they were flat ground.

name: Realmweb Lurker
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve skittering through tunnels in reality. It has now been deployed.
legend: Skitterstrand Arachnaroks stalk their prey through the arcane paths that connect the realms.

name: Ambush from Beyond
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is skittering through tunnels in reality.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Legs first, then bulbous body, the Skitterstrand drags itself out of a tear in reality.

name: Scuttling Terror
description:
Effect: If this unit charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move 2D6". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units and can pass through models in enemy INFANTRY units, but it must end that move in combat.

Then, pick an enemy INFANTRY unit that this unit passed across during that move. Inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.
legend: The Arachnarok uses its terrifying speed to its advantage, scuttling over and sinking its fangs into the enemy before they have a chance to react.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Boing! Smash!
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Mobs of Boingrot Bounderz smash into their enemies like toothy meteors.

name: Regeneration
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Troggoths are able to regrow injured flesh almost as quickly as it is harmed.

name: Noxious Vomit
description:
Effect: If any damage points are allocated to an enemy unit by attacks made with this unit’s Noxious Vomit, that unit is drenched in vomit until the start of your next turn.

While a unit is drenched in vomit:
  • Subtract 1 from save rolls for that unit.
  • Ignore positive modifiers to save rolls for that unit.
legend: The bilious digestive fluids chucked up by a Fellwater Troggoth can swiftly corrode even sigmarite plate.

name: Hidden Loons
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve hidden among the mobs. It has now been deployed.
legend: Gibbering and bound, Loonsmasha Fanatics are dragged or carried along by the general mass of grots until the time arrives to unrestrain them and pray to the Bad Moon that they head in the right direction.

name: Release the Fanatics!
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is hidden among the mobs. Then, pick a friendly Moonclan Shootas or Moonclan Stabbas unit that has 10 or more models to be the target.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of the target and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: As the enemy approaches, the Loonsmashas are unleashed.

name: Whirling Death
description: Effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST.
legend: One might as well try to catch a cannonball as to get the jump on a spinning Fanatic.

name: Regeneration
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Troggoths are able to regrow injured flesh almost as quickly as it is harmed.

name: Looncap Mushrooms
description:
Declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick a friendly MOONCLAN unit wholly within 12" of it and visible to it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the face of the Bad Moon is Cacklin’ this turn. On a 3+, the target has WARD (5+) until the start of your next turn. On a 6+, also add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: Looncaps that sprout beneath the Bad Moon’s glare are harvested by Sneaky Snufflers and have an intoxicating effect on any grots that ingest them. Sometimes a particularly potent fungus is found – and that’s when the real carnage starts…
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Wall Crawler
description: Effect: This unit can pass across terrain features as if it had FLY.
legend: The Spiderfang’s arachnid allies can skitter up and down vertical surfaces as if they were flat ground.

name: A Prod in the Right Direction
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: As battle begins, grots like to give the Sporesplattas a helpful prod towards the enemy.

name: Puffshroom Frenzy
description:
Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by other friendly MOONCLAN units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

Subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: Puffshroom spore-clouds send the followers of the Bad Moon into a violent frenzy while choking and blinding enemies caught within them.

name: Herding Squigs
description: Effect: Roll a dice for each Squig Herder in this unit. For each 2+, you can return D3 slain Cave Squigs to this unit. For each 1, 1 Squig Herder in this unit is slain.
legend: While they have a thankless and frankly dangerous job, Squig Herders do their best to keep their frenzied squigs together as a rough pack.

name: Squigs Gone Wild
description: Effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Squigs don’t always know when they’re dead…

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Boing! Boing! Boing!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that this unit passed across this phase to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit that passed across the target. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Squig Hoppers can cause considerable damage simply by bouncing on top of their foes as they make their way across the battlefield.

name: Hallucinogenic Fungus Brews
description: Effect: In the first battle round, this unit has WARD (4+). In the second battle round, this unit has WARD (5+). In the third and subsequent battle rounds, this unit has WARD (6+).
legend: Gobbapalooza shamans drink hallucinogenic fungus brew before the battle begins, making them almost impervious to pain. However, as the battle progresses, the effects start to wear off.

name: Gobbapalooza Know-Wotz
description:
Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick 1 of the following effects:

Glareface Dance: Pick a friendly GLOOMSPITE GITZ unit within this unit’s combat range. Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for that unit until the start of your next turn.

Nasty Poisons: Pick a friendly GLOOMSPITE GITZ unit within this unit’s combat range. Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that unit’s weapons until the start of your next turn.

Mesmerise: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit cannot use commands.
legend: From casting petty spells to scaring the other grots with bizarre performances, the Gobbapalooza is always up to something.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Lurid Light
description: Effect: While friendly GLOOMSPITE GITZ units are wholly within 12" of this MANIFESTATION they are affected by all four faces of the Bad Moon (Grinnin’, Scowlin’, Sulkin’ and Cacklin’).
legend: To the maniacal grots of the Gloomspite Gitz, one cackling lunar entity streaking through the sky is much like another.

name: Mutating Spores
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units within 6" of this MANIFESTATION to be the targets.

Effect: For each target, roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in that unit that are within 6" of this MANIFESTATION. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The spores ejected by Mork’s Mighty Mushroom cause those they touch to burst in a profusion of gruesome fungal growths.

name: Blessings of the Cauldron
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly GLOOMSPITE GITZ WIZARD within 1" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to the target’s power level until the start of your next turn.
legend: Scrapskuttle’s Arachnacauldron grants great arcane power to the one brave or mad enough to call upon its aid.

name: Wall Crawler
description: Effect: This MANIFESTATION can pass across terrain features as if it had FLY.
legend: The Spiderfang’s arachnid allies can skitter up and down vertical surfaces as if they were flat ground.

name: Endless Terrors
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (4+) while it is wholly within 12" of any friendly ARACHNAROK units.
legend: Bolstered by the presence of an Arachnarok, the arcanely blessed spiders of the Scuttletide will spill forth without cease, making them near impossible to get rid of.

name: Moonclan Lairs
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO non-MONSTER non-WAR MACHINE GLOOMSPITE GITZ unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this terrain feature and more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: The Gloomspite Gitz use Moonclan-dug tunnels to reach nearby Loonshrines. In battle, reinforcements emerge from these echoing subterranean passages.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn

name: Stormbolt Tempest
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit and that charged this turn to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Should a foe charge their position, Sacristan Engineers can loose a quick-fire volley at close range.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Stalwart Defenders
description: Effect: Add 3 to this unit’s control score while it is contesting an objective wholly within friendly territory.
legend: Liberators fiercely guard the lands brought into Sigmar’s domain.

name: Lightning Pulse
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with this unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If you picked 1 unit, inflict 3 mortal damage on the target. If you picked 2 units, inflict 2 mortal damage on each target. If you picked 3 units, inflict 1 mortal damage on each target.
legend: With electricity pulsing from her eyes, Astreia gathers the power of Azyr into herself and then releases it as a blinding, expanding dome of lightning.

name: Thunderous Pounce
description: Effect: Add 2 to charge rolls for friendly SACROSANCT CHAMBER CAVALRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: After years of commanding Dracolines, Astreia’s orders can send an entire pack sprinting into battle without hesitation, her own mount Kazra leading the charge.

name: Soul Energy of the First Host
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly SACROSANCT CHAMBER unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Astreia Solbright can enhance the soul energy of nearby Sacrosanct warriors, allowing them to perform extraordinary deeds.

name: Pyroelectric Blast
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Inflict 3 mortal damage on the target, then inflict 1 mortal damage on each other enemy unit within 3" of the target.
legend: By combining the magic of Aqshy and Azyr, Aventis can channel a blast of power that can melt even solid stone.

name: Thunderhead Crown
description: Effect: Heal (3) this unit.
legend: Aventis’s helm taps into the Anvil of Apotheosis, renewing him even in the thick of battle.

name: Comet Trail
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the phase, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks that target that enemy unit.
legend: The flight of a Tauralon is accompanied by sparkling Azyrite energies that serve as a beacon to keen-eyed Sigmarite warriors.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Retribution From On High
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is in the Celestial Realm.

Effect: Subtract the current battle round number from 10 to determine this unit’s strike zone. Set up this unit on the battlefield more than a number of inches equal to its strike zone from all enemy units.
legend: The Celestant-Prime descends from Azyr into the thickest fighting, Ghal Maraz glowing with power as it smites the foe.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: Cometstrike Sceptre
description: Effect: Each time this unit attacks with its Cometstrike Sceptre, if the attack scores a hit, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Blazing with celestial might, the Celestant-Prime raises his sceptre high before letting it fall, causing comets to rain from above.

name: Once More, for Sigmar, Charge!
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and another visible friendly WARRIOR CHAMBER unit within 3" of it to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the phase, when making charge rolls for the targets, add 1 to the number of dice rolled, then remove 1 dice of your choice and use the remaining dice as the charge roll.
legend: Gavriel’s unshakeable devotion to Sigmar sees his warriors charging straight into the front lines, no matter the dangers before them.

name: Sigmarite Thundershield
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: When struck with sufficient force, thundershields unleash stored storm energy to blast those attempting to attack.

name: Ruination Chamber
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: These veterans march where others cannot tread, fighting upon battlefields transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on their souls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: This unit was picked as the target of a non-<ky>Core</ky> ability

name: The Light of Sigmar
description:
Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
  • Heal (D3) each friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit within this unit’s combat range.
legend: With its shutters closed, the lantern of a Knight-Azyros soothes nearby allies. Opening it wide blinds the enemy with the full majesty of Sigmar's light.

name: Light in the Dark

legend: The massive brass-and-bone icons hefted by the Bloodsecrators inspire the Bloodbound to fight until their last, gore-flecked breath.

name: Rage of Khorne
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of melee weapons used by friendly BLOODBOUND units for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Bloodsecrator slams his banner into the ground, flooding the battlefield with the violent energies of Khorne’s hellish domain.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Whipped To Fury
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO BLOODBOUND unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the target can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: The ferocious bite of a Bloodstoker’s lash reminds every Khorne follower of the bloody dues their master expects.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Offering of Blood
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit within 3" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Allocate 3 damage points to the target (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). For the rest of the turn, add 1 to this unit’s power level, to a maximum of 2.
legend: A Blood Throne is a sanctified altar of Khorne.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Blood Marked
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (4+) against damage inflicted by SPELL abilities and abilities used by MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: The gore sigils on the Blood Throne protect it from enemy magics.

name: Lord of the Brass Stampede
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly BLADES OF KHORNE CAVALRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Carnage erupts as the full force of a mounted Khornate warhorde collides with the enemy.

name: Slaughterous Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The crushing mass and stamping hooves of Khorne’s Juggernauts are a threat to all in their path.

name: Lord of the Bloodbound
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for friendly BLOODBOUND INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: With bellowed commands and sworn vows of bloodshed, this mighty warlord commands their warriors to charge down the enemy.

name: ’Bring Me Their Skull!’
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly BLOODBOUND INFANTRY HERO wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Axe held aloft, this warlord orders one of his Gorechosen forward.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: Brass Collar of Khorne
description: Effect: This unit can use UNBIND abilities as if it had WIZARD (1).
legend: Like all great gifts of the Blood God, the spiked collar that encircles Scyla’s neck is anathema to magic.

name: Bestial Leap
description: Effect: If this unit charged this phase, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move 2D6" as if it had FLY but must end that move in combat.
legend: Scyla is capable of great, bounding leaps that take him over the heads of lesser foes.

name: The Slaughterborn
description:
Declare: This unit can only use this ability if it has been destroyed.

Effect: Roll 2D6. On an 8+, set up a replacement unit on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Skarr Bloodwrath has been killed on battlefields beyond count, but each time he has been reborn amidst the clash of blades and the screams of the dying.

name: Murderous Paragon
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly Wrathmongers units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: To Wrathmongers, Skarr Bloodwrath is an exemplar of mindless carnage, and like him, they fight to the death hoping to be reborn to kill again.

name: Tempered By Fury
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly BLOODBOUND HERO within 8" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1 of the target’s melee weapons. Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that weapon for the rest of the battle.
legend: Until the horns for battle are sounded, Skullgrinders are known to work on their craft ceaselessly, tempering the weapons of their fellow warriors so that they glow red-hot with the rage of Khorne.

name: Bone-crushing Strikes
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is equal to or less than the target’s Control characteristic, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: Larger beasts feel the full brunt of the Skullgrinder’s anvil as it crashes into their flank, shattering ribs and sending them sprawling.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Slaughterous Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The crushing mass and stamping hooves of Khorne’s Juggernauts are a threat to all in their path.

name: Herald of Trampling Death
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Bloodcrushers unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, weapons used by this unit and the target have Charge (+1 Damage).
legend: The earth shatters under the metal hooves of a Skullmaster and its fellow daemonic cavalry, a wave of living brass that crushes all before it.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Charge Phase

name: Heroes’ Bane
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, while the target is in combat with this unit, this unit has STRIKE-FIRST but all of its combat attacks must target that enemy HERO.
legend: Khorne’s eternal champion seeks out the worthiest of foes and demands they face him in single combat.

name: The Eternal Duel
description: Effect: If an enemy HERO had any damage points allocated to it by this unit’s combat attacks this turn and that HERO was destroyed this turn, Heal (X) this unit, where X is the number of damage points this unit has.
legend: Skulltaker relishes single combat with the strongest fighters in existence. Claiming their skulls only stokes his hunger for even greater challenges.

name: Drawn By Blood
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO unit that used a FIGHT ability this turn to be the target.

Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield in combat with the target and not in combat with any other enemy units.
legend: Skulltaker stalks the greatest heroes in the Mortal Realms, often appearing in the midst of battle to slay them before they can strike back.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Enemy Turn

name: Blood Sacrifice
description:
Declare: Pick a unit (friendly or enemy) within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
  • This unit gains 1 ritual point.
legend: A Slaughterpriest knows better than any that Khorne cares not from where the blood flows…
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: Scorn of Sorcery
description: Effect: This unit can use UNBIND abilities as if it had WIZARD (1).
legend: Slaughterpriests share their god’s hatred of sorcery and those who use it.

name: Borne On Wings Of Blood
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve soaring above the battlefield. It has now been deployed.
legend: Soaring upon the winds of war, Valkia awaits the worthiest of foes before plunging into battle.

name: The Red Angel of Slaughter
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is soaring above the battlefield.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, pick a visible enemy unit within 10" of this unit and roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
legend: Valkia swoops to the battlefield on bloodstained wings, launching her spear into the heart of the enemy lines moments before she charges in and begins the slaughter.

name: The Gaze of Khorne
description: Effect: If a friendly BLOODBOUND unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6. However, friendly BLOODBOUND units cannot use RETREAT abilities while they are within 12" of this unit.
legend: Khorne’s gaze follows Valkia; the Blood God’s warriors strive all the harder to please him when she is nearby.

name: Outrageous Carnage
description: Effect: Each time an attack made by this unit scores a critical hit, inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 8" of it after the FIGHT ability has been resolved (and continue the attack sequence).
legend: Where a Great Axe of Khorne strikes, lashes of flame erupt from the split earth to annihilate those nearby.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Great Axe of Khorne is 3.

name: Shattering Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If the target is INFANTRY, inflict an additional 3 mortal damage on it.
legend: A Bloodthirster of Insensate Rage is an avatar of supreme carnage upon the battlefield, shattering formations with the force of its descent.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Mighty Axe of Khorne is 4 .

name: Beckon The Hunt
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE BLADES OF KHORNE DAEMON unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, when making charge rolls for the target, roll l additional dice, to a maximum of 3, and discard 1 dice of your choice.
legend: The air shudders and convulses with each crack of the Bloodthirster's whip as it drives those in its shadow to bring slaughter and bloodshed in the name of Khorne.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Ensnaring Lash
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: If the target is in combat with this unit when the target is picked to use a FIGHT ability:
  • It must pick this unit to be the target of the pile-in move (Core Rules, 15.3).
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for attacks made as part of that FIGHT ability against this unit.
legend: The Lash of Khorne wraps around an enemy, stripping flesh as they try to pull away.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Skarbrand’s Rage
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, or if it did not use a FIGHT ability last turn, the effects of the ’Blood-drenched’ ability apply to this unit.
legend: Skarbrand’s infamous fury cannot be quenched. Attacking him only serves to stoke his anger.

name: Inescapable Wrath
description: Effect: Add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for this unit, to a maximum of 3.
legend: No one is safe from Skarbrand’s rampages.

name: Roar of Total Rage
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll either 3 dice or a number of dice equal to the number of damage points this unit has. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: When Skarbrand roars, heads explode and blood boils in the veins of his victims.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Mighty Axe of Khorne and Bloodflail is 4.

name: Wrathful Dominance
description: Effect: Add I to hit rolls for this unit’s attacks that target an enemy HERO.
legend: Bloodthirsters of the Third Circle establish their battlefield superiority by hunting down the enemy's strongest champions.

name: Vengeance of Khorne
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 8 dice. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Wrath of Khorne Bloodthirsters deliver destruction to those who draw the ire of the War God.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Commander Of Tyrants
description:
Declare: Pick another visible friendly non-UNIQUE BLADES OF KHORNE DAEMON unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of each target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Daemons of lesser rank are compelled to follow the orders of these bellowing greater daemons.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Sigil of Doom
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly BLADES OF KHORNE unit wholly within 8" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target. Then, pick a BLOOD TITHE ability that you have not unlocked this battle.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the the blood tithe points cost of the chosen ability, until the start of your next turn, the target can use the chosen ability as if it had been unlocked.
legend: Shedding gore as it hovers menacingly in the air, the Bleeding Icon is a fearsome portent of doom.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: Multiple Parts
description:
Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and both its parts are removed from play.

Each time this MANIFESTATION moves, both its parts must end within 8" of each other. Each part of this MANIFESTATION is armed with a Stream of Molten Blood.

name: Hexgorgers
description: Effect: For each part of this MANIFESTATION that is within 8" of a WIZARD (friendly or enemy), subtract 1 from casting rolls for that WIZARD.
legend: Hexgorger skulls exist purely to destroy magic.

name: Hatred’s Edge
description:
Declare: If this MANIFESTATION charged this turn, pick an enemy unit with a starting size greater than 1 that is in combat with this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2D6. On an 8+, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: The supernatural blade scrapes along the ground, its razor edge cutting in half those too slow to get out of the way. It then rises in the air before smashing down with deadly force upon Khorne's enemies.

name: Words of Hate
description:
Effect: While this terrain feature has an Invoker:
  • Add l to chanting rolls for the Invoker.
  • The Invoker cannot use MOVE abilities.
  • Instead of measuring range or visibility to the Invoker, measure to this terrain feature instead.
  • All attacks that would target the Invoker target this terrain feature instead.
  • If this terrain feature is destroyed, before removing it from the battlefield, inflict D3 mortal damage on the Invoker. Then, set up the Invoker on the battlefield wholly within 3" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is
legend: Curses spat from a Skull Altar gain a dark power.

name: Ascend The Altar
description:
Declare: If this terrain feature does not have an Invoker, pick a friendly BLADES OF KHORNE INFANTRY PRIEST within 3" of it and not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Place the target on this terrain feature. The target is now an Invoker (see ’Words of Hate’).
legend: Chanting, the priest mounts this fell altar.

name: Hatred of Sorcery
description:
Declare: If this terrain feature has an Invoker, pick up to D3 enemy ENDLESS SPELLS within 18" of this terrain feature to be the targets(s) and make a banishment roll of 2D6 for each target.

Effect: Resolve the effect of the ’Banish Manifestation’ ability for each target. If any ENDLESS SPELLS are banished by this ability, you gain 1 blood tithe point.
legend: No spell may spark before Khorne's altar.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: Descend The Altar
description: Effect: If this terrain feature has an Invoker that was not placed on it this turn, set up the Invoker on the battlefield wholly within 6" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer an Invoker.
legend: Sometimes, the slaughter calls too loudly...

name: First of the Pack
description: Effect: While this unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly Flesh Hounds unit, add 2 to charge rolls for this unit. In addition, while any friendly Flesh Hounds units are wholly within 12" of this unit, they can ignore the effect of the ‘Beast’ ability.
legend: Where the Hound of Vengeance hunts, his bestial kin are sure to follow in pursuit, empowered by Karanak’s single-minded fury.

name: Prey of the Blood God
description: Effect: If this unit’s quarry is on the battlefield, pick an enemy HERO to be this unit’s quarry. You can pick a HERO in reserve.
legend: Karanak hunts those who have earned the Blood God’s ire.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase

name: Stalk The Prey
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and up to 1 friendly Flesh Hounds unit to be the targets.

Effect: Remove the targets from the battleeld and set them up again on the battleeld more than 6" from this unit’s quarry and more than 9" from all other enemy units. If picked to be a target, the unit of Flesh Hounds must also be set up wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Karanak’s intended quarry is relentlessly and mercilessly run to ground.

name: Crushing Onslaught
description:
Effect: If the unmodified charge roll for this unit is 8+:
  • For the rest of the phase, this unit can pass through models in enemy units.
  • Enemy CAVALRY units passed through by this unit in this phase cannot make pile-in moves for the rest of the turn.
legend: The crushing mass and stamping hooves of Khorne's Juggernauts are a threat to all in their path.

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Hunters of Mystics
description:
Effect: If the casting roll for an enemy WIZARD within 12" of this unit contains 2 or more results of 1 or 2, the spell is miscast.

If the chanting roll for an enemy PRIEST within 12" of this unit is an unmodified 2, the prayer fails and its effect is not resolved. In addition, your opponent cannot give that PRIEST any ritual points for the rest of the phase.
legend: The terrible baying and howling of Flesh Hounds inspires an instinctive, primal fear in those attuned to the arcane or the divine, making it difficult for them to focus on their spells and rituals.

name: Horrific Predators
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: Khorgoraths are nightmarish beasts, given form only to harvest skulls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Feast Upon Their Bones
description: Effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy non-MONSTER units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: The nightmarish sight of a Khorgorath crunching upon the bones of their allies is enough to send enemy ranks into a frenzy of panic.

name: Slaughterous Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The crushing mass and stamping hooves of Khorne’s Juggernauts are a threat to all in their path.

name: Trial of Skulls
description: Effect: Add 8 to this unit’s control score while it is in combat.
legend: The looming threat of failing the Trial of Skulls lends the Skullreapers a manic determination in battle,for nothing could be worse than the horrible consequences should they appear weak in the eyes of their wrathful god.

name: Crimson Haze
description: Effect: While this unit is in combat, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly BLOODBOUND units, excluding Wrathmongers units, while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: A frenzy-inducing cloud of blood and gore fills the air wherever Wrathmongers swing their flails.

name: Bloodfury
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy model within 3" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Both players roll off. If you win the roll-off, pick a melee weapon that the target is armed with. Your opponent must pick a visible unit in their army within 3" of the target (they can pick the target’s own unit, and even if it is a single-model unit).

Your opponent must resolve combat attacks for the target using the melee weapon you picked against the unit they picked.
legend: The maddening blood-vapour that surrounds Wrathmongers can plunge their foes into a self-destructive rage.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Blood for the Blood God!
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons if it charged in the same turn.
legend: A howling mass of Bloodreavers is never more dangerous than when seized by the frenzy of the charge.

name: Grisly Trophies
description: Effect: If this unit is in a Blades of Khorne army and any enemy models were slain this turn by this unit’s attacks, you gain 1 blood tithe point.
legend: Garrek delights in brandishing grim souvenirs to stoke his warriors’ bloodlust.

name: No Respite
description: Effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll 2 dice. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Dying as they lived, Blood Warriors devote even their final moments to killing.

name: Chilling Horde
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly Chainrasps units to be the targets.

Effect: Each target can move 6" but cannot end that move in combat.
legend: Surging forward in a shrieking, wailing mass, Chainrasps are often the first wave of Nighthaunt to assail the foe.

name: Eager Death-dealers
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly Grimghast Reapers unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: The enthusiasm with which this faceless monster swings its cairnoch scythe is such that it drives nearby Grimghast Reapers into an unholy whirlwind of death.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Stolen Hours
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses a FIGHT ability, after that FIGHT ability has been resolved, Heal (X) this unit, where X is the number of damage points allocated to enemy units by combat attacks made as part of that FIGHT ability.
legend: The bearer of a Sword of Stolen Hours can steal vital energy from a foe and use it to increase their own power.

name: Infantry Overseer
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO NIGHTHAUNT INFANTRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Each Knight of Shrouds was a mighty general in mortal life and still retains the ability to spur their soldiery to great feats of arms.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Stolen Hours
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses a FIGHT ability, after that FIGHT ability has been resolved, Heal (X) this unit, where X is the number of damage points allocated to enemy units by combat attacks made as part of that FIGHT ability.
legend: The bearer of a Sword of Stolen Hours can steal vital energy from a foe and use it to increase their own power.

name: Cavalry Overseer
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO NIGHTHAUNT CAVALRY or WAR MACHINE unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: In life, the Knight of Shrouds commanded legions of devoted soldiers. In death, they turn their military genius to the command of shrieking spirits and vengeful phantasms.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Hail Kurdoss! King of Nothing!
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick a friendly Craventhrone Guard unit that is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: The target can immediately use a SHOOT ability as if it were your shooting phase, but all of its attacks must target an enemy unit in combat with this unit. The target cannot use CHARGE abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: Forever bitter at their liege for being dragged into eternal torment alongside him, the Craventhrone Guard will attempt to deny Valentian even the minuscule solace he derives from crushing foes with his mace.

name: If I Cannot Rule, None Shall Rule!
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, unless your opponent spends 1 additional command point to use that command, the command has no effect, it still counts as having been used and the command points spent to use the command are still lost.
legend: In the presence of Kurdoss Valentian’s all-consuming bitterness and the cruel malice of his heralds, the commands of enemy generals turn to dust in their mouths even as they issue them.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: Opponent declared a command for a unit within 12" of this unit

name: Mortarch of Grief
description: Effect: If the unmodified hit roll or unmodified wound roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: Those foolish enough to confront Lady Olynder soon find their will to fight faltering, replaced with an all-consuming sorrow and despair at the futility of their defiance.

name: No Rest for the Wicked
description:
Declare: Pick any number of friendly NIGHTHAUNT units on the battlefield to be the targets.

Effect: For each target, you can return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health characteristic of up to D3+3.
legend: Should the spectral forms of her minions be banished, Lady Olynder will wrench their souls back from the underworlds.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Grief-stricken
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Ignore positive modifiers to the target’s control score and to hit rolls, wound rolls and save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: Lady Olynder’s incantations can cause a pall of misery and utter desolation to descend upon her enemies.

name: Staring Death In The Face
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn. In addition, if the target is a HERO, subtract 5 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: The unwavering stare of a Lord Executioner seems to penetrate the victim's very soul.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Ghastly Descent
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY or CAVALRY HERO that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this unit’s attacks to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is a SENTENCED unit. On a 5+, the target is automatically destroyed.
legend: The axe of a Lord Executioner descends pitilessly on all foolish enough to commit the crime of standing against Nagash's dark justice.

name: Wraithstorm
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. If any models are slain as a result of this ability, inflict a further D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Reikenor tears the souls from his victims and commands them to assail their allies.

name: Corpse Candles
description:
Declare: Pick either this unit or a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: If you picked this unit, allocate 1 damage point to this unit and add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn (ward rolls cannot be made for that damage point).

If you picked an enemy unit, roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that enemy unit and for the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.
  • Add 1 to this unit’s power level.
legend: When preparing to cast a spell by snuffing out the flame of a corpse candle, Reikenor can drain his own or a victim’s essence to help fuel his sorcery.

name: Grim Justice
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for attacks made with this unit’s Fellreaper if the target is a WIZARD or a PRIEST.
legend: Through his arcane powers, Reikenor can sense those who tamper with Nagash’s designs or commit any other sacrilegious act.

name: Captured Soul Energy
description: Effect: Each time a friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ’Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.
legend: The chains and padlocks carried by Spirit Torments can capture spirits and reshape them into raw amethyst power to aid their minions.

name: Ghostly Howl
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. If any models in the target unit are slain by this ability, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: There is no describing the shrieking wail of the Banshee; it is so horrific that its sound alone can pierce the soul of any who hear it.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Cacophony of Sorrow
description: Effect: While there are any visible friendly Myrmourn Banshees units within this unit’s combat range, ignore positive modifiers to the control scores of enemy units within 12" of this unit.
legend: The piercing scream of the Tomb Banshee amplifies the discordant shrieks of Myrmourn Banshees, breaking the resolve of even the bravest of soldiers.

name: Runaway Coach
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage equal on the target equal to the roll.
legend: This nightmare‑drawn carriage crushes any who attempt to withstand its momentum.

name: Nimbus of Power
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Dark magic lends the vehicle blurring speed that allows it to disappear, only to reappear in a more advantageous position.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Evocation of Death
description:
Declare: If any damage points were allocated to an enemy unit by this unit’s combat attacks this turn and that enemy unit was destroyed this turn, pick a friendly non-UNIQUE NIGHTHAUNT HERO that has been destroyed.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit wholly within 12" of this unit. The replacement unit can only be set up in combat with enemy units that are in combat with this unit.
legend: The dormant occupant feeds upon the energies of death and uses them to bring spectral champions back from the underworlds.

name: Thrashing Desperation
description: Effect: While this unit contests an objective you control, enemy units cannot finish a charge move within ½" of a model in this unit unless the unmodified charge roll was 7 or more.
legend: Only the bravest and most determined of charges can get within striking range of the veritable wall of thrashing blades that are the Bladegheist Revenants.

name: Another Link in the Chain
description: Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if this unit is wholly within 12" of any friendly Spirit Torments. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly NIGHTHAUNT units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Chainghasts act as conduits for Spirit Torments, ensuring all nearby Nighthaunt are invigorated by deathly energies.

name: Harrowing Shrieks
description: Effect: Enemy units cannot be healed or have slain models returned to them while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: The chilling cries of the Dreadscythe Harridans drive all hope from the hearts of their foes.

name: Unerring Hunters
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, each time this unit makes a pile-in move, add 3" to the distance it can move.
legend: These spectral hunters will hound their prey until the very end of existence itself.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Reaped Like Corn
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that is within the combat ranges of 5 or more models in this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If the target unit has 20 or more models, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target for each 5+ instead.
legend: The scythes wielded by these ghostly warriors can be swung in great sweeping arcs, cutting down whole enemy ranks.

name: Spectral Hunters
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: As the Hexwraiths ride down their chosen prey, their targets are subject to the phantasmal cavalry’s life-leeching powers.

name: Spell-eaters
description: Effect: If a friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit wholly within 12" of this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, this unit can use the ’Unbind’ ability as if it had WIZARD (1). Add 1 to the unbinding roll for that ability. If the spell is unbound, inflict D3 mortal damage on the caster.
legend: These spirits were once wizards, but they failed to pay proper respect to Nagash and are now cursed to agonisingly withstand the magic of others.

name: Drawn to War
description: Effect: Friendly NIGHTHAUNT INFANTRY HEROES have WARD (4+) while they are wholly within this unit’s combat range.
legend: When the champions of the Nighthaunt muster their processions for battle, Spirit Hosts flock to join their cause, serving as useful fodder for the enemy.

name: Keeper of Mortality
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit within 3" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for target for the rest of the turn.
  • Heal (3) the target.
legend: A Mortalis Terminexus is a catalyst of deathly magic that invigorates surrounding Nighthaunt.

name: Soul Reaper
description: Effect: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this MANIFESTATION’s Almighty Reap if it charged in the same turn.
legend: A Shyish Reaper is always on the hunt for souls, sweeping through its prey to cleave flesh and rip away the spirit, sending it screaming into the underworlds.

name: Siphon Souls
description: Effect: Each time a model from a friendly or enemy unit is slain within 12" of this MANIFESTATION, give this MANIFESTATION a soul point, to a maximum of 6.
legend: This summoned chest siphons souls, filling itself to overflowing with the rich spirits of mortalkind.

name: Soul Eruption
description:
Declare: If this MANIFESTATION has 6 soul points, pick any number of enemy units within 6" of this MANIFESTATION to be the targets.

Effect: Roll 6 dice for each target. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. Then, reset this MANIFESTATION’s soul points to 0.
legend: Should a Vault of Souls glut itself too greedily, the captured spirits within will burst free, tearing at those nearby in their desperation to escape.

name: Royal Retinue
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO FYRESLAYERS INFANTRY unit within this unit’s combat range to be the royal retinue.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, while the royal retinue is wholly within 6" of this unit, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the royal retinue and this unit has Ward (4+).
legend: Auric Runefathers go to battle flanked by the most skilled warriors in the lodge, who are sworn to protect him from harm.

name: Commanding Presence
description: Effect: Add the current battle round number to the control scores of friendly FYRESLAYERS INFANTRY units wholly within 12" of this unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: The presence of a Runefather in the Fyreslayer battleline bolsters the warriors’ already considerable will, ensuring that the doughty duardin will hold their ground and slog it out with any foe.

name: High Priest of the Zharrgrim
description: Effect: Each time a PRAYER chanted by this unit is answered, this unit gains a magmic power token.
legend: The Zharrgrim order of every Fyreslayer lodge is led by an Auric Runemaster, a revered individual attuned to their deity like no other.

name: Master of the Runes
description:
Effect: Remove 3 of this unit’s magmic power tokens. If you do so, apply the effect below that corresponds to the UR-GOLD RUNE ability that was used:

Rune of Fury: For the rest of the battle round, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly FYRESLAYERS units while they have Strike-first.

Rune of Fiery Determination: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly FYRESLAYERS units for the rest of the battle round.

Rune of Relentless Zeal: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly FYRESLAYERS units for the rest of the battle round.

Rune of Searing Heat: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of mele
legend: Drawing upon the divine power released by sacred battle, Runemasters are able to awaken the full potential of their ur-gold runes.
condition: Reaction: You declared an Ur-gold Rune ability

name: Magmic Tunnelling
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and up to 1 unit in its regiment if neither unit has been deployed.

Effect: Set up those units in reserve underground. They have now been deployed.
legend: A Runesmiter standing upon stone can command the rock to allow them passage.

name: Emergence
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is underground.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, set up the other unit that was set up underground with it (if any) wholly within 6" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The ground opens up to reveal the Runesmiter and their entourage.

name: Dauntless Assault
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO FYRESLAYERS INFANTRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Eager to prove themselves in battle, Auric Runesons are at their best leading from the front lines alongside their allies.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for this unit

name: Fearless Charge
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly FYRESLAYERS INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 18" of this unit.
legend: Fearless and bold, Auric Runesons show their devotion to Grimnir with daring assaults and furious charges.

name: Icon of Grimnir
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to the control scores of friendly FYRESLAYERS units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The Battlesmith raises their icon of Grimnir and recounts tales of past glories, inspiring their allies and setting their ur-gold runes ablaze so that they might fight until the bitter end.

name: Bard of the Lodge
description: Effect: If a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.
legend: Standing defiant in front of the enemy, a Battlesmith recites tales of the lodge’s glorious history, rallying the warriors around them.

name: Berserk Fury
description: Effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: No Fyreslayer will easily accept death’s embrace while their kin are still fighting.

name: Fjul’s Retinue
description: Effect: While this unit’s Fjul-Grimnir is on the battlefield, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit each phase.
legend: The bravest of warriors are hand-picked by Fjul-Grimnir to serve as his bodyguard in battle.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Magmadroth’s Claws and Horns is 4.

name: Raging Inferno
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: Throwing back its head, a Magmadroth can spew a wave of flaming bile that scorches through enemy armour.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Warrior-kings
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly FYRESLAYERS units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: With discipline and zeal in equal measure, the Runefather inspires his warriors to bring down the wrath of Grimnir upon any who oppose them.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: Volcanic Blood
description: Effect: If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Born of fire and flame, Magmadroths pulse with the throbbing heat of the volcanic caverns in which they make their fyrenests.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Magmadroth’s Claws and Horns is 4.

name: Runic Empowerment
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly FYRESLAYERS unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: With a sonorous chant, the Runesmiter draws forth the power of the ur-gold runes set into the flesh of their Fyreslayer kin.

name: Lashing Tail
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll is equal to or less than the number of models in the target unit, inflict D3+3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Magmadroths can use their muscular spiked tails to pulverise lesser prey with a single swipe.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Volcanic Blood
description: Effect: If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Born of fire and flame, Magmadroths pulse with the throbbing heat of the volcanic caverns in which they make their fyrenests.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Magmadroth’s Claws and Horns is 4.

name: Vying for Glory
description: Effect: Each time this unit destroys a MONSTER, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Ancestral Weapons for the rest of the battle. This unit can be affected by this ability multiple times and the effects are cumulative.
legend: Runesons seek their father’s favour in battle by slaying the most fearsome enemy creatures.

name: Dominating Roar
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target

Effect: If this unit has fewer damage points than the target, subtract 10 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Flame-scale Youngbloods ridden by Auric Runesons are fiercely territorial when faced with a monstrous challenger.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Volcanic Blood
description: Effect: If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Born of fire and flame, Magmadroths pulse with the throbbing heat of the volcanic caverns in which they make their fyrenests.

name: Molten Rockbolts
description: Effect: Each time a shooting attack made by this unit scores a critical hit, subtract 1" from the target unit’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn. This ability cannot reduce the target unit’s unmodified Move characteristic below half.
legend: Enemies struck by magmapike bolts find their movements become increasingly sluggish as the burning rock cools and rapidly solidifies on their armour and flesh.

name: Oathbound
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit to be this unit’s quarry. You can pick a unit that has been deployed in reserve.

Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for attacks made by this unit that target its quarry.
If this unit is destroyed while it is in combat with its quarry, inflict 3 mortal damage on this unit’s quarry immediately after the ability that destroyed this unit has been resolved.
legend: A Doomseeker chooses their quarry and shouts a vow to Grimnir that they will either destroy the enemy or die trying.

name: Runic Power
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons while this unit has 1 damage point. Add 2 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons instead while this unit has 2 or more damage points.
legend: As a Doomseeker gets closer to their fate, they call upon the power of their many ur-gold runes, ensuring either their victory or that they go down in a final blaze of glory.

name: Grimwrath Oaths
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following oaths for this unit to swear:

‘I will guard them with my life!’: While this unit is wholly within 6" of another friendly FYRESLAYERS HERO:

  • Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s attacks.

  • Add 1 to ward rolls for this unit.

If a friendly FYRESLAYERS HERO wholly within 6" of this unit is destroyed, this effect no longer applies.

‘I will not be stopped!’: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit, and add 1 to save rolls for this unit while it is in combat. If this unit uses the ‘Retreat’ or ‘Rally’ abilities, t
legend: Before battle, each Grimwrath Berzerker swears a sacred oath to Grimnir that they will fulfil a certain deed in his honour that day.

name: Battle-fury
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, it can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has Strike-last for the rest of the phase.
legend: Hewing left and right with their greataxe, a Grimwrath Berzerker enters a state of singleminded frenzy.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Magma Blast
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this MANIFESTATION’s shooting attacks if the target unit has 10 or more models. Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls instead if the target unit has 15 or more models.
legend: At the beck of a Zharrgrim Priest, the Zharrgron Flamespitter hurls forth a fiery orb that arcs across the sky before detonating in an explosion of flame amidst the enemy lines.

name: Roaring Rune-fire
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units within 6" of this MANIFESTATION to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

  • Subtract 3 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: The leaping flames of a Runic Fyrewall act as a barrier that only creatures born of fire can pass.

name: Flamescarred
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this MANIFESTATION’s attacks to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks until the end of your next turn.
legend: Those wounded by a Molten Infernoth are left scorched and writhing in pain.

name: Spending the Forge
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly FYRESLAYERS PRIEST within this terrain feature’s combat range to expend the power of the forge.

Effect: Heal (D3) each friendly FYRESLAYERS unit on the battlefield. Once this ability has been used, this terrain feature cannot use the ‘Molten Blessing’ ability for the rest of the battle.
