legend: In times of need, a Zharrgrim priest may expend all of the Magmic Battleforge’s power, igniting the ur-gold runes of their Fyreslayer kin and infusing the warriors with strength.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Molten Blessing
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly FYRESLAYERS PRIEST within this terrain feature’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to chanting rolls for the target for the rest of the turn. In addition, the target can use the ‘Unbind’ ability this turn as if it had Wizard (1).
legend: Drawing upon the powerful elemental energies of the Magmic Battleforge, a Zharrgrim priest casts clouds of cinders into the air, imbuing those of their sacred order with burning power.

name: Bubonic Barrage
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses a SHOOT ability, if all of its attacks targeted the same enemy unit, after that ability has been resolved, roll a dice. If the result is equal to or less than the number of models in that enemy unit that were slain by attacks made by this unit’s Plagueclaw Catapult this phase, that enemy unit has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: A Plagueclaw hurls great globs of diseased filth at its targets that can send large formations into disarray.

name: More-more Warp Lightning!
description:
Effect: If this unit is within the combat range of a friendly SKRYRE HERO, add 6 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Warp Lightning Blast for the rest of the turn.

However, for each unmodified hit roll of 1 for an attack made with this unit’s Warp Lightning Blast, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit after the SHOOT ability has been resolved.
legend: Warlock Engineer can increase the power output of a Warp Lightning Cannon at the risk of harming the weapon and its crew.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Warp Lightning Blast
description: Effect: Each attack made with this weapon in a single phase must target the same enemy unit. Each hit inflicts 1 mortal damage on the target and the attack sequence ends.
legend: A Warp Lightning Cannon fires massive bolts of warp lightning that disintegrate any who are struck by them.

name: Warpstone Snipers
description: Effect: If this unit has not used a MOVE ability this turn and was not set up this turn, add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s Warplock Jezzails for the rest of the turn.
legend: Having set up the Warplock Jezzail in position, the gunner can wait for the perfect moment to fire their shot.

name: Seething Swarm
description: Effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
legend: Clanrats overwhelm their enemies with their seemingly endless numbers – biting, stabbing and trampling their own fallen beneath their bloody claws.

name: Rolling Doom
description:
Effect: This unit can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. This unit can pass through other models and the combat ranges of enemy units, but it cannot end that move in combat.

Then, pick up to 3 enemy units that this unit passed across during that move to be the targets. Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

Designer’s Note: This unit can use this ability even if it is in combat.
legend: A Doomwheel will mercilessly crush anything in its path.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Gnashing Teeth and Flailing Fists is 8.

name: Regenerating Monstrosity
description: Effect: Heal (D6) this unit.
legend: Hell Pit Abominations are notoriously difficult to slay and can even regrow severed limbs.

name: Avalanche of Flesh
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: A Hell Pit Abomination can rear up to its fullest height before crashing back to the ground, crushing foes beneath its sickening bulk.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Too Horrible To Die
description:
Effect: The first time this unit would be destroyed, before removing it from the battlefield, roll a dice and apply the corresponding effect:

$000001419
legend: As it twitches in its shuddering death throes, there is a chance that either the Abomination’s unholy metabolism will restart one of its many foul hearts or its carcass will disgorge the revolting tide of parasitic rats that had been gnawing upon its innards.

name: Overseers of the Enginecovens
description: Effect: If a friendly SKRYRE unit wholly within 13" of this unit uses the ’Covering Fire’ command, no command points are spent.
legend: The Arch-Warlocks of the Clans Skryre command their enginecovens with a blend of deadly efficiency and overt sadism.

name: Cornered Rat
description: Effect: While this unit is damaged, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of its Warpforged Blade.
legend: A Clawlord in fear for their life fights with rabid ferocity.

name: Gnash-gnaw On Their Bones!
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO VERMINUS INFANTRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: At a Clawlord’s command, their minions hurl themselves at the foe.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for this unit

name: Shadowy Killers
description: Effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: Ulguan illusions and other tools of misdirection shroud Deathmasters in perpetual darkness, keeping them from harm.

name: Running Death
description: Effect: While friendly ESHIN units are wholly within 13" of this unit, they can use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities even if they used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: Deathmasters lead only the nimblest Eshin agents to war.

name: Warpstone Shards
description:
Effect: The next time you make a casting roll for this unit this phase, roll 3D6 instead of 2D6. This roll cannot be re-rolled or modified.

If the casting roll is 13, the spell is successfully cast and cannot be unbound. After the effect of that spell has been resolved, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.

If the casting roll is not 13, remove 1 dice of your choice from the casting roll and use the remaining 2D6 as the casting roll.
legend: Grey Seers consume potentially lethal shards of warpstone to enhance their spellcasting.

name: Lord of Flesh-grafting
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly MOULDER unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Heal (3) the target.
legend: These burly commanders are the breeders, mutators and healers of the Clans Moulder.

name: Tyrannical Packmaster
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly MOULDER unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: Master Moulders use pain and terror to drive their fighting beasts into a battle frenzy.

name: Feed On Pestilence
description: Effect: Give this unit 1 ritual point.
legend: Plague Priests are empowered by the spread of disease, drawing upon the foulness propagated by their zealous throngs to power their rites.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for a friendly %000010705Pestilens% unit wholly within 13" of this unit

name: Seething Swarm
description: Effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
legend: Clanrats overwhelm their enemies with their seemingly endless numbers – biting, stabbing and trampling their own fallen beneath their bloody claws.

name: Explosive Payload
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks that target an enemy unit that has 10 or more models.
legend: Nothing is more satisfying to a Bombardier than seeing their doomrocket go off in the midst of a tightly packed swarm of enemies.

name: More-more Doom!
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, set the Damage characteristic of its Doomrocket to D3+3 for the rest of the turn. On a 1, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.
legend: An extra doomrocket warhead can be attached to the payload if the wielder dares.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Shoot</ky> ability for this unit, it was not set up this turn and it has not used a <ky>Move</ky> ability this turn

name: Sniper-master
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy HERO to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, this unit and friendly Warplock Jezzails units wholly within 13" of this unit can ignore the effects of the ‘Guarded Hero’ ability when picking the target for their shooting attacks.
legend: No enemy is safe from the warp-laced bullets of a Warlock Engineer and his underlings.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: More-more Warp Energy!
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, set the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Warplock Musket to 3 for the rest of the turn. On a 1, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.
legend: The Engineer overcharges their weapon with volatile energy.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Shoot</ky> ability for this unit, it was not set up this turn and it has not used a <ky>Move</ky> ability this turn

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Crushing Bulk is 4.

name: Altar of the Horned Rat
description: Effect: Friendly SKAVEN INFANTRY units have Ward (6+) while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
legend: Throngs of rat-thralls swarm around this mighty construct in battle and will sell their lives to see it from harm.

name: Peal of Doom
description:
Effect: Roll a dice and apply the corresponding effect:

$000001418
legend: The ominous tolling of a Screaming Bell resounds above the clamour of battle, crying out ‘Doom! Doom! Doom!’

name: Cracks Call
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit that does not have FLY and is within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the casting roll exceeds the target’s Move characteristic, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the difference between the casting roll and its Move characteristic.
legend: Harnessing the thunderous peals of the Screaming Bell, the Grey Seer channels a sorcerous blast into the ground beneath the foe’s feet. Gaping chasms yawn wide, sending screaming victims vanishing into the depths.

name: The Thirteen-headed One
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply until the start of your next turn. You cannot pick the same effect more than once per battle.

Master of Dire Sorcery: Add 1 to casting rolls for friendly MASTERCLAN WIZARDS while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.

Commander of Vermin: Add 1 to charge rolls for friendly VERMINUS units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.

Knower of Warp-tech: Add 1 to hit rolls for shooting attacks made by friendly
legend: Lord Verminking can call upon his extensive knowledge of the Skaven clans.

name: The Dreaded Thirteenth Spell
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13" to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll 13 dice. For each 5+:
  • Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
  • You can return 1 slain model to a friendly Clanrats unit wholly within 13" of this unit.
legend: The twisting power of the Great Horned Rat transforms men into rat-mutants that swiftly join the evil throng.

name: Terrifying Monstrosity
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+:
  • The target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
  • Subtract an amount equal to the roll from the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: Lord Skreech has a malevolent and horrific visage that can shatter the enemy’s resolve.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Great Plague Censer is 2.

name: Altar of the Great Corruptor
description: Effect: Friendly PESTILENS units have Ward (6+) while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
legend: This giant construct is venerated by the swarms of pox-ridden rats that flock to its side.

name: Corrupting Influence
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from ward rolls for enemy units while they are within 13" of this unit.
legend: This giant construct bathes all in a thick billowing smog that is anathema to its enemies.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Warpfire Braziers is 4.

name: Staff of the Horned Rat
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.
legend: Said to be crafted from scrap thieved from the Horned Rat’s lair, Thanquol’s staff thrums with malign potency.

name: Terrible Madness
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target cannot use commands until the start of your next turn. In addition, roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Thanquol can inflict madness on his enemies, causing them to lash out at close allies.

name: Boneripper Rampage
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3-5, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. On a 6, inflict 2D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Thanquol’s monstrous Rat Ogor, Boneripper, pulverises enemies that dare stray too close.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Warp-amulet
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Thanquol wears a thrumming green warpstone amulet, the mutating magics of which serve to meld and rapidly heal his, or Boneripper’s, flesh.

name: Lord of Great Plagues
description:
Effect: If the unmodified chanting roll for a friendly PESTILENS PRIEST this phase was 6, pick 1 of the following effects to apply:

Crimsonweal Curse: Pick an enemy unit within 13" of this unit to be the target. For the rest of the battle, each time the target uses a MOVE ability, inflict D3 mortal damage on it after the MOVE ability has been resolved.

The Neverplague: For the rest of the battle, you can re-roll chanting rolls for friendly PESTILENS PRIESTS.

Undulant Scourge: Pick a visible enemy unit wit
legend: If the raving prayers of Pestilens priests reach fever pitch across the battlefield, the Verminlord Corruptor can cause one of the legendary Great Plagues to temporarily manifest.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Plaguemaster
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
  • Give this unit 1 ritual point.
legend: Hideous parasites and diseases made flesh spill from a Verminlord Corruptor to spread their sickness.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Lord of Assassins
description: Effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.
legend: The skulking warriors of the Clans Eshin move like swift smoke in a Verminlord Deceiver’s presence.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009837Redeploy%’ command for a friendly %000010769Eshin Infantry% unit wholly within 13" of this unit

name: Burst From The Shadows
description:
Effect: If this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 4+, you can pick a point on the battlefield within 13" of this unit and within 1" of any enemy units. Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of that point.

Designer’s Note: This ability allows the unit to set up in combat with a new enemy unit.
legend: A Verminlord Deceiver is shrouded in darkness and dread, leaping through the aether to strike at its foes in the blink of an eye.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Killing Blow
description:
Declare: Pick a damaged enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is less than the number of damage points the target has, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Warbringers drive their spike-fists into already wounded enemies, exploiting the slightest gap in their foe’s defences to deliver a bloody coup de grâce.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Tyrant of Battle
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 friendly VERMINUS INFANTRY units wholly within 13" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: The targets can each use the ‘All-out Attack’ or ‘All-out Defence’ command this phase even if that command has been used by a friendly unit this phase.
legend: These towering monstrosities are the commanders of the seething hordes of Clans Verminus.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Tectonic Splintering
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
legend: Hissing invocations of ruin and collapse, the Verminlord compels the earth to break and belch forth hostile warpgales, leaving their enemies staggering.

name: Divine The Future
description: Effect: While this unit is on the battlefield, add 2" to the distance friendly units can move when using the ‘Always Three Clawsteps Ahead’ ability.
legend: The swirling scry-orbs of the Warpseer can show it glimpses of the future.

name: Hurl Scry-orb
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: This unit cannot use the ‘Divine the Future’ ability for the rest of the battle. Roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The Warpseer throws its scry-orb into the midst of the foe, where it explodes in a shattering cloud of madness and destruction.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Arch-Manipulator
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: Those who dare face a Warpseer find themselves utterly pre-empted and outmanoeuvred.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Deliver The Killing Strike
description: Effect: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Punch Dagger and Blade for the rest of the turn.
legend: Gutter Runners will wait for the perfect opening before unleashing a flurry of deadly attacks.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Sneaky Infiltrators
description: Effect: While each model in this unit is within 1" of any terrain features, this unit cannot be targeted by shooting attacks unless the attacking model is within 9" of it.
legend: Gutter Runners are masters of stealth and can sneak up on almost anyone.

name: Grappling Hooks
description:
Declare: If this unit was not set up this turn, pick a terrain feature within 3" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of the target and more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: Night Runners are experts at scaling vertical terrain with their grapnels, either to ambush an unwary foe or retreat to where the enemy cannot follow.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Smoke Bombs
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat or charged this turn, this unit can make a pile-in move. Then, if this unit is in combat, you must pick 1 or more enemy units to be the target(s) of this unit’s attacks.

Effect: Resolve combat attacks against the target unit(s). Then, if this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but can only end that move in combat with units it was in combat with at the start of that move. It does not have to end the move in combat.
legend: The Clans Eshin use smoke bombs to cause confusion and disorientate the enemy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Spreaders of Filth and Disease
description: Effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. On a 6+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Possessed with a mad zealotry, Plague Monks in their death throes will bite, claw and scratch their foe, leaving wounds that quickly fester and rot.

name: Unleashed Warp-fury
description: Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit. Then, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The warpstone hammered into the flesh of these creatures crackles with volatile energies, driving them into a frenzy.

name: Hidden Weapon Team
description: Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly Clanrats unit that has 5 or more models, and there are no other friendly WEAPON TEAM units within that unit’s combat range, this unit is not visible to enemy units more than 13" away.
legend: Skryre weapon teams often lurk amidst larger formations.

name: Grinderfist Tunnellers
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is in the tunnels below and includes any models armed with Grinderfists.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Grinderfists can be used to create underground tunnels.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: Shock Gauntlets
description: Effect: Each time an attack made with this unit’s Shock Gauntlets scores a critical hit, that attack scores D6 hits on the target unit instead of 1. Make a wound roll for each hit.
legend: The electrical discharge created by shock gauntlets can trigger a series of linked explosions.

name: Elite Bodyguard
description: Effect: Friendly SKAVEN INFANTRY HEROES have Ward (5+) while they are within this unit’s combat range.
legend: Every ratman of rank knows the value and prestige of Stormvermin bodyguard – they are even almost loyal…

name: Hidden Weapon Team
description: Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly Clanrats unit that has 5 or more models, and there are no other friendly WEAPON TEAM units within that unit’s combat range, this unit is not visible to enemy units more than 13" away.
legend: Skryre weapon teams often lurk amidst larger formations.

name: Tunnel Skulkers
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and up to 1 friendly non-MONSTER SKAVEN unit if those units have not been deployed.

Effect: Set up those units in reserve in the tunnels below. They have now been deployed.
legend: A Warp-Grinder can be used to tunnel through reality, allowing the Skaven to strike from unexpected quarters.

name: Warp-ambush
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is in the tunnels below, then pick an enemy unit more than 6" from all other enemy units to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, set up this unit within 3" of the target and more than 6" from all other enemy units. Then, set up the unit that was in the tunnels below with this unit within 3" of the target and more than 6" from all other enemy units.
legend: As the Warp-Grinder's tip tears open the realms, Skaven warriors burst forth shrieking and with blades drawn.

name: Toll of Doom
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target friendly SKAVEN INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 13" of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: The dreadful ringing of the Bell of Doom fills the minds of the Skaven’s foes with a deep despair.

name: More-more Rats
description: Effect: Heal (D6) this MANIFESTATION.
legend: An endless tide of unholy vermin pours through the cracks in reality, their eyes aglow and their fangs unnaturally sharp.

name: Multiple Parts
description: Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and all its parts are removed from play.

name: Warp Vortex
description: Effect: Subtract 2 from run rolls and charge rolls for enemy units while they are within 6" of this MANIFESTATION. In addition, if an enemy unit passes across this MANIFESTATION and/or the round-cornered triangle formed by drawing a line around all the bases of the MANIFESTATION’s parts, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit after the MOVE ability has been resolved.
legend: The sheer destructive anarchy that surrounds a Warp Lightning Vortex slows the progress of warriors caught in its midst.

name: Warp Lightning Bolts
description:
Declare: If this MANIFESTATION was not set up this turn, pick each enemy unit within 6" of this MANIFESTATION to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Coruscating bolts of warp lightning leap outwards from the Warp Lightning Vortex, obliterating those nearby.

name: Volatile Ground
description:
Effect: Models can pass through this terrain feature but cannot be set up on or end moves on any part of this terrain feature.

Each time an enemy unit ends a move that passed through or across this terrain feature, roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
legend: Crackling warp lightning skitters around the ruptured rocks that ring this tear in reality.

name: Tunnels Through Reality
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKAVEN unit that is not in combat and is wholly within 6" of this terrain feature to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of another friendly Gnawhole and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Skaven can move through gnawholes to invade any corner of the Mortal Realms.

name: The Endless Vermintide
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO SKAVEN INFANTRY unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 6" of a friendly Gnawhole and more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: Swarms of vermin scurry forth from the gnawhole, overwhelming the enemy lines.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn

name: One With The Forest
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for attacks that target this unit while it is wholly within the creeping overgrowth.
legend: Dryads seamlessly blend in with the surrounding foliage; in overgrown environments, the attacks of their opponents are as likely to strike unfeeling wood as they are the Sylvaneth themselves.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Sweeping Blows is 3.

name: Lash and Tangle
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit’s Strangleroots to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is within the creeping overgrowth. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: The whipping tendrils that shoot from the Treelord’s palm ensnare enemies and keep them at bay with their frantic thrashing.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Strangling Grasp
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 10" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: The Treelord’s tendrils coil around a chosen foe, crushing the life out of them.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Gossamid Commander
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible friendly Gossamid Archers unit that is not in combat and is wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target can immediately use a SHOOT ability as if it were your shooting phase but all of the attacks made as part of that SHOOT ability must target an enemy unit that is in combat with this unit.
legend: The winged Arch-Revenants often go to battle at the head of a flight of Gossamid Archers, who loose coordinated volleys of arrows as their leader plunges into the fight.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Fight and Fly
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, this unit can move up to 2D6" after that FIGHT ability has been resolved. It cannot end that move in combat.
legend: Arch-Revenants have perfected the art of mobile warfare, diving down to slay their targets before swiftly retreating to the skies before the foe can muster a reprisal.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Slay the Trespassers!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that is within the creeping overgrowth or that is visible to this unit and within friendly territory to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Branchwych singles out a foe to suffer the full extent of the Sylvaneth’s vengeance.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Ylthari
description: Effect: While this unit’s Ylthari is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: The mellifluous sound of Sylvaneth magic is both beautiful and terrifying to those upon whom it is unleashed.

name: Bitterness of the Soul
description:
Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Enchanted Glade Weapons for each model in this unit that is slain.

Designer’s Note: Models that have been slain and returned to this unit do not count as being slain for the purposes of this ability.
legend: The souls of Ylthari’s Guardians are chilled through by the frost of the Everdusk.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Wardroth Beetle’s Antlers is 4.

name: Seasons of War
description:
Declare: You must use this ability.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the battle round. You cannot pick the effect that you picked in the previous battle round.

The Burgeoning: Each time a friendly Awakened Wyldwood uses the ‘Ever Growing’ ability, you can pick any terrain feature your opponent does not control to be the target rather than the closest.

The Reaping: Add 1 to casting rolls and chanting rolls for friendly SYLVANETH units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Alarielle and her children are fundamentally intertwined with the shifting of the seasons, and their abilities and temperaments alter accordingly. It is within the power of the goddess to temporarily manipulate this state of being, should she wish it.

name: Lifebloom
description: Effect: Heal (2D6) this unit.
legend: Just as the Burgeoning follows Everdusk, the restorative energies of Ghyran heal Alarielle’s wounds with cyclical inevitability.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: Metamorphosis
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict 2D3 mortal damage on the target. If the target would be destroyed by this spell, before removing any models, pick the closest terrain feature to the target that does not have a friendly overgrown token and give it a friendly overgrown token. If all terrain features on the battlefield already have a friendly overgrown token, inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 6" of the target instead.
legend: With a fierce glare, Alarielle’s foes are wracked with creaking contortions as they violently transform into twisted effigies of living wood.

name: The Goddess of Life
description:
Declare: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with 8 damage points allocated to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points) wholly within the creeping overgrowth and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: So long as Ghyran endures, so will the Everqueen.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: Living Battering Ram
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: A charging Wardroth Beetle tramples all in its path.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Terror of the Deep Woods
description: Effect: Enemy units cannot use RUN or RETREAT abilities while they are within 9" of this unit.
legend: When faced with Drycha’s fury, even the most seasoned warriors feel like young rabbits frozen beneath the gaze of a hungry wolf.

name: Enrage the Spites
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units that are visible to and within 12" of this unit or that are within the creeping overgrowth to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.
legend: Drycha shares a special kinship with the flitting, scuttling lesser spirits of the forest, who are stirred into a frenzy when her ire is raised.

name: Merciless Ambush
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat and has not used a RUN or RETREAT ability this turn, make a charge roll of 2D6. Then, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within ½" of an enemy unit and wholly within X" of a terrain feature that has a friendly overgrown token, where X is equal to the charge roll. If you do so, this unit has charged.
legend: Despite her size and terrifying presence, Drycha stalks silently through hidden realm-root passageways, emerging without warning to fall upon her prey.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Guardian Sword is 3.

name: Guardian of the Glades
description: Effect: Add 2 to the charge roll but this unit must end that charge move within ½" of an enemy unit that is in combat with another friendly SYLVANETH HERO.
legend: While they answer to no single glade, the Spirits of Durthu have sworn solemn oaths to safeguard all of Alarielle’s children. In battle, they will stand in defence of the wargrove’s commanders, and their wrath is terrible to behold should those under their protection be imperilled.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>CHARGE</ky> ability for this unit

name: Groundshaker
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy non-FLY INFANTRY or CAVALRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Spirit of Durthu stamps down hard with one of its trunk-like legs, shaking the earth as well as the enemy’s wits.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Sweeping Blows is 3.

name: Awakening Slumbering Spirits
description:
Declare: Pick a visible terrain feature that has a friendly overgrown token and is within 12" of this unit. Then, pick a friendly non-UNIQUE KURNOTHI or Treelord unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with 1 model from the target unit wholly within 6" of that terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, remove the friendly overgrown token from that terrain feature. If the
legend: As the Sylvaneth reclaim parts of the realms, the spirit-song calls out to tree spirits that are deep in slumber to rejoin the glades.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Eldest of Elders
description:
Declare: Pick each friendly FOREST ELDER within this unit’s combat range to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, add 1 to hit rolls for that target’s combat attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Treelord Ancient imparts its ancient wisdom through the spirit-song to the members of its circle, enlightening them on how best to deal with these particular enemies of the forest.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Shadowcreep
description: Effect: If this unit is wholly within the creeping overgrowth, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of a terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, add 1 to charge rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Spite-Revenants have an affinity with the oppressive dark of the deepwood. They are able to dissolve into the shadows at will, creeping along the spirit paths before emerging once more where the enemy least expect it.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Warriors of the Woods
description: Effect: While this unit is in combat and has not charged this turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons.
legend: The Tree-Revenants comprise the formal warrior class of the Sylvaneth. It is their duty to engage and hold the enemy’s battleline, and it is one they perform with exceptional ability. Once they have the foe’s measure, they become even more dangerous, overwhelming their opponents with their relentless martial skill.

name: Feed on Eldritch Energy
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from casting rolls, unbinding rolls, chanting rolls and banishment rolls for enemy units while they are in combat with this MANIFESTATION.
legend: As predators of preternatural threats, Gladewyrms readily devour the energies that the enemy draws upon to fuel their spells and rituals.

name: Eldritch Hunters
description: Effect: If this MANIFESTATION is not in combat, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy non-WIZARD non-PRIEST units and more than 3" from all enemy WIZARDS and enemy PRIESTS.
legend: Gladewyrms are magical creatures, and their prey of choice is similarly arcane in nature. During battle, they burrow beneath the surface, reemerging to devour spellcasters and other mystics, whom they sense with greater clarity than other beings.

name: Anger the Hive
description: Effect: If this MANIFESTATION was not set up this turn, add 10 to the Attacks characteristic of this MANIFESTATION’s ranged weapons for the rest of the phase, but all of the shooting attacks it makes this phase must target an enemy unit within 9" of it.
legend: As enemies draw closer to the hive, the spites attack with heightened ferocity to protect their home.

name: Vengeful Terrors
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are within 6" of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: Wherever this rogue spirit drifts, creeping ominously through the air, its roots churn open the shallow graves of battles past, dragging grotesque remains to the surface that chill the hearts of the forest’s foes.

name: Budding Forests
description: Effect: When this terrain feature is set up, give it a friendly overgrown token.
legend: Once awakened, a wyldwood will rapidly grow into an entire forest in a matter of days, should the Sylvaneth successfully repel those who would threaten its flourishing.

name: Ever Growing
description:
Declare: Pick the closest terrain feature to this terrain feature that does not have a friendly overgrown token to be the target.

Effect: If the target is not controlled by your opponent, give the target a friendly overgrown token.
legend: A wyldwood roused by the Sylvaneth will spread its roots deep, inundating its surroundings with life.
condition: Once Per Battle Round, Start of Battle Round

name: Vengeful Forest Spirits
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit within 3" of this terrain feature to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The spirits within a Sylvaneth wyldwood are easily angered by trespassers into their domain.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Lithe and Swift
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Piercing Claws for the rest of the turn if this unit charged in the same turn.
legend: Charging Daemonettes can riddle an enemy with a quicksilver flurry of claw-strikes.

name: Soulgorgers
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly non-UNIQUE HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WAR MACHINES wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons for the rest of the turn. This ability also affects Companion weapons.
legend: The grandest Bladebringers excel in stoking fits of manic violence in their disciples and hangers-on.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Mutilating Blades
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: A Slaaneshi chariot inflicts carnage when it ploughs into the foe.

name: Soulscent
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units that this unit passed across this phase to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If any models are slain by this ability, this unit has Ward (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: The whirling blades of this fearsome chariot mow down the enemy, transmuting their souls into an exhilarating incense that drives its riders into an ecstatic frenzy.

name: Slavering For Sensation
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 friendly Hellflayer units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of this unit and each target for the rest of the turn.
legend: This Bladebringer encourages their chariot-mounted followers to plunge themselves into enemy ranks.

name: Threshing Doom
description: Effect: When this unit moves, it can pass through models in enemy INFANTRY units and can pass through the combat ranges of enemy INFANTRY units, but it cannot end a move in combat unless specified in the ability used.
legend: The wail of an approaching Hellflayer sees enemy infantry diving for cover.

name: Thrillseeking Cavalcade
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly Seeker Chariot units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit and the targets for the rest of the turn. In addition, for the rest of the turn, when this unit and the targets use the ‘Mutilating Blades’ ability, add 1 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted (if any).
legend: A Bladebringer has no patience for minions who dally in the search for new sensation.

name: Mutilating Blades
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: A Seeker Chariot inflicts carnage when it ploughs into the foe.

name: Discordant Disruption
description: Effect: The casting roll for that spell must be re-rolled. If 2 or more dice in the re-rolled casting roll have the same value or if 1 of the dice is a 6, inflict D3 mortal damage on that Wizard after the effect of that spell has been resolved.
legend: An Infernal Enrapturess can play music so dissonant that it causes physical harm to those attuned to magic.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>Spell</ky> ability for a Wizard within 18" of this unit

name: Deadly Symbiosis
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO SYBARITE unit and a friendly non-HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON unit to be the targets. Both units must be wholly within 12" of this unit.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, if either target uses the ‘All-out Attack’ or ‘All-out Defence’ command, the other target can also use the same command in the same phase and no command points are spent to use the command a second time.
legend: In battle, the hosts of Syll’Esske seek to emulate the symbiosis of their master, compelling one another to escalating acts of depraved violence.

name: The Vengeful Allegiance
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Should one aspect of the Vengeful Allegiance deflect a blow, their other half will swiftly capitalise on the situation.

name: Subvert
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: Syll torments the foe with whispers and visions, distracting them from their duties.

name: The Endless Dance
description: Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: The Masque dances eternally across the Mortal Realms, endlessly seeking an audience to confound and swiftly slay.

name: Staff of Masks
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Razor-edged Claws for the rest of the turn.
  • Heal (3) this unit.
legend: The masks on this staff constantly flicker and change, enhancing the Masque’s attacks or protecting them from harm.

name: Lithe and Swift
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Ravaging Claws for the rest of the turn if this unit charged in the same turn.
legend: Charging Daemonettes can riddle an enemy with a quicksilver flurry of claw-strikes.

name: Lust For Violence
description: Effect: Pick a friendly Daemonettes unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Viceleaders bid their fellow Daemonettes enter the fray and join them in the bliss of combat.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for this unit

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Elegant Greatblade is 4.

name: Supernatural Grace
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target this unit.
legend: Whether they turn blows aside or simply dodge out of harm’s way, it is extremely difficult to pin down a Keeper of Secrets.

name: Locus of Slaanesh
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON unit that started the battle with 3 or more models and has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: With violence and excess, the walls of reality can be made thin enough to draw forth reinforcements of Slaaneshi daemons.

name: Dark Temptations
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
  • Add 1 to save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
  • If the target is damaged, Heal (D3) the target.

Then, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Elegant Greatblade for attacks that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Few can resist the wiles of a Keeper of Secrets.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Cacophonic Choir
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 visible enemy units within 6" of this unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. If the roll exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, inflict D3 mortal damage on it.
legend: The wizard unleashes a sanity-shattering chorus of magical sound.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Soulpiercer is 4.

name: Supernatural Grace
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target this unit.
legend: Whether they turn blows aside or simply dodge out of harm’s way, it is extremely difficult to pin down a Keeper of Secrets.

name: Refine Senses
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to wound rolls for this unit’s attacks that target enemy HEROES.
  • Add 1 to save rolls for attacks made by enemy HEROES that target this unit.
legend: The sorcerer channels magical power into their senses so that nothing can be hidden from them and none can escape their wrath.

name: Paramount Hunter
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, it can immediately move 2D6". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but it must end that move within ½" of that HERO. If it does so, this unit has charged, and that HERO’s CHARGE ability has no effect.
legend: Shalaxi will permit none save themselves the honour of striking down their chosen quarry.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>Charge</ky> ability for a Hero within 9" of this unit

name: Excess of Violence
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target can use 2 FIGHT abilities this turn. After the first is used, however, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: With the subtlest of gestures, Shalaxi Helbane can rouse their followers to attack with redoubled aggression.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Combat Phase

name: Excess of Blades
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the unmodified charge roll for that CHARGE ability. For each roll that exceeds the target’s Save characteristic, the target suffers 1 mortal damage.
legend: An Exalted Chariot inflicts horrendous carnage when it ploughs into the foe.

name: Soporific Musk
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: A Fiend exudes a pervasive and oily musk that numbs a foe to all but the most extreme of stimuli.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Disruptive Song
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from casting rolls and unbinding rolls for enemy WIZARDS while they are within 12" of this unit.
legend: Fiends of Slaanesh let out a keening song that disturbs the concentration of spellcasters who hear it.

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Soulscent
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units that this unit passed across this phase to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If any models are slain by this ability, this unit has Ward (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: The whirling blades of this fearsome chariot mow down the enemy, transmuting their souls into an exhilarating incense that drives its riders into an ecstatic frenzy.

name: Threshing Doom
description: Effect: When this unit moves, it can pass through models in enemy INFANTRY units and can pass through the combat ranges of enemy INFANTRY units, but it cannot end a move in combat unless specified in the ability used.
legend: The wail of an approaching Hellflayer sees enemy infantry diving for cover.

name: Mutilating Blades
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: A Slaaneshi chariot inflicts carnage when it ploughs into the foe.

name: Quicksilver Speed
description: Effect: When making run rolls for this unit, if you roll a 1-3, you can use a value of 4 instead.
legend: Seekers of Slaanesh are daemonic hunters and swift beyond belief.

name: Damned Conduit
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HEDONITES OF SLAANESH unit wholly within 12" of this terrain feature to be the target.

Effect: Allocate D3 damage points to the target (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). Then, pick 1 of the following effects to apply until the start of your next turn:

  • Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks.
  • Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for the target.
  • Add 1 to casting rolls and unbinding rolls for the target.
legend: Slaanesh’s minions can make sacrifices at a Fane of Slaanesh to gain martial prowess.

name: Flensing Tongues
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Roll 6 dice. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If any models are slain by this ability, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: Opening its soul-sucking maw, the Dreadful Visage lets fly a plethora of hooked tongues that lash and flense the flesh of those nearby.

name: Irresistible Lure
description: Effect: If that enemy unit does not end the move closer to this MANIFESTATION than it was at the start of the move, inflict D3 mortal damage on it after the MOVE ability has been resolved.
legend: The Mirror lures mortals as a candle draws moths to its light. Those strong enough to turn away feel knives of anguish and loss driven into their hearts.
condition: Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>Move</ky> ability for a unit wholly within 12" of this Manifestation

name: Gaze Not Into Its Depths
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 6" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: A Mesmerising Mirror can enthral a warrior’s soul, offering tempting gifts of power while slowly sapping their very essence.

name: Royal Approval
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons while it is wholly within 12" of any friendly NOBLES or ABHORRANTS.
legend: These mordants will always do their utmost to attract the attention of their sovereign.

name: Necromantic Limits
description:
Effect: This unit’s Skeletal Talons have a maximum Attacks characteristic of 10.

While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Skeletal Talons is 4.

name: Shriek of Terror
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If 3 or more damage points are allocated to the target by this ability, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: The soul-rending shriek of a Terrorgheist is enough to stop a warrior’s heart.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Wicked Predator
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: For each champion, standard bearer and musician in the target unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Skeletal Talons, to a maximum of 10, for the rest of the phase. Those additional attacks must target that enemy unit.
legend: In life, Terrorgheists were cruel and spiteful monsters, dark instincts driving them to terrify prey into submission. Little has changed in death.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Necromantic Limits
description:
Effect: This unit’s Draconic Claws have a maximum Attacks characteristic of 10.

While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Draconic Claws is 5.

name: On Rotten Wings
description: Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set up it again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Hurling itself skyward, a Zombie Dragon descends on new and tantalising prey.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Soaring Terror
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move 2D6". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but must end that move in combat. Then, pick an enemy unit that this unit passed across during that move. Inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.
legend: The Zombie Dragon soars over the enemy warriors, scouring those below with its corrosive breath.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Musicians, Play!
description: Effect: While you believe this DELUSION, subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS units while they are wholly within 12" of a friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS HERO.
legend: On the Archregent’s signal, the court musicians strike up an exhilarating tune to which the joyful revellers begin to dance.

name: Countless Servants
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SERFS or KNIGHTS unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+:
  • If the target is a SERFS unit, you can return up to 3 slain models to that unit.
  • If the target is a KNIGHTS unit, you can return 1 slain model to that unit.
legend: With a chilling shriek, the Archregent summons some of their most trusted warriors.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Code of Honour
description: Effect: While you believe this DELUSION, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly non-UNIQUE FLESH-EATER COURTS HEROES for attacks that target an enemy HERO.
legend: Delusions of chivalry and honourable combat swirling, the Ghoul King issues direct challenges to enemy champions.

name: Vassals, to Arms!
description: Effect: Pick a friendly SERFS unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Standing tall in the midst of the melee, this regal lord swiftly delivers an impassioned speech that inspires nearby serfs.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Marshal of the Peasantry
description: Effect: Pick a friendly Crypt Ghouls unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Leading from the front, the Crypt Ghast Courtier inspires the lowliest warriors of a kingdom to new heights of murderous ‘valour’.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Blessed Blood
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: The blood of their liege grants these Flesh-eaters a supernatural regenerative capacity.

name: Knightly Exemplar
description: Effect: Pick a friendly Crypt Horrors unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Witnessing a Crypt Haunter Courtier’s frenzied, blood-spraying assault sends the warriors in their pack into a murderous frenzy.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: On Winged Steeds
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Crypt Flayers unit that used the ‘To Our Liege!’ ability this turn and is wholly within 9" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target can immediately move D3" but cannot end that move in combat.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Mind-shattering Cacophony
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit’s Piercing Death Screech to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of ranged weapons used by friendly Crypt Flayers units for attacks that target that enemy unit.
legend: When a Crypt Infernal Courtier directs their retinue to focus their death screams on an enemy, the resulting discordant soundwaves can fell the mightiest of foes.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Victory Feast
description:
Effect: If any models were slain by this unit this turn:
  • Heal (D6) this unit.
  • If this unit is in combat, this unit can immediately move 10". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but must end that move in combat with the units it was already in combat with at the start of the move.
  • If this unit is not in combat, this unit can immediately move 10" but cannot end that move in combat.
legend: Varghulf rampages through the enemy’s ranks at will, its wounds sealing with unholy rapidity as it guzzles the flesh of the savaged foe.

name: Necromantic Limits
description:
Effect: This unit’s Terrorgheist’s Skeletal Talons have a maximum Attacks characteristic of 10.

While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Terrorgheist’s Skeletal Talons is 4.

name: Ferocious Hunger
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made with this unit’s Companion melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Assailed by visions of the glorious feast to come, the abhorrant’s steed is filled with a hunger-driven impetus.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: A Majestic Menagerie
description: Effect: While you believe this DELUSION, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Companion melee weapons used by friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS HEROES.
legend: Magnificent are the courtly warbeasts, resplendent in glittering armour and utterly loyal to their noble masters.

name: Wicked Predator
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: For each champion, standard bearer and musician in the target unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Terrorgheist’s Skeletal Talons, to a maximum of 10, for the rest of the phase. Those additional attacks must target that enemy unit.
legend: In life, Terrorgheists were cruel and spiteful monsters, dark instincts driving them to terrify prey into submission. Little has changed in death.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Necromantic Limits
description:
Effect: This unit’s Draconic Claws have a maximum Attacks characteristic of 10.

While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Draconic Claws is 5.

name: For The Kingdom!
description:
Effect: While you believe this DELUSION, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly KNIGHTS units and friendly FLEASH-EATER COURTS MONSTERS while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly FLEASH-EATER COURTS HEROES.

Add 2 to charge rolls for friendly KNIGHTS units and friendly FLEAS
legend: Brave nobles lead the thunderous charge of the court’s knights and royal warbeasts, but none are as inspirational as this abhorrant.

name: Monstrous Hunger
description: Effect: While they are wholly within 12" of this unit, friendly non-HERO FLESH-EATER COURTS MONSTERS can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: The Ghoul King imposes their will upon the creatures of the court’s menagerie, awakening a glimmer of predatory hunger in long-dead senses.

name: Draconic Terror
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: To behold such a majestic beast as a dragon in the grip of undeath evokes awe and abject terror in equal measure.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: To Our Liege!
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 12" of a friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS HERO and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: There are many ghoulish legends of Crypt Flayers winging down to join their lieges upon the battlefield.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Holy Blades of Bone
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2 dice for each model in this unit. Add 2 to each roll if the target is CAVALRY. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Crypt Horrors wield huge, monstrous femurs – as well as other grisly relics – as if they were blessed weapons.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Grasping Hands
description:
Effect: Enemy units cannot use RUN or RETREAT abilities while they are within this MANIFESTATION’s combat range.
In addition, if an enemy unit is picked to use a MOVE ability while it is within this MANIFESTATION’s combat range, halve that unit’s Move characteristic (rounding up) for the rest of the turn.
legend: The animated corpses trapped in a Cadaverous Barricade grab at any living creature that comes too close.

name: Draughts of Delusion
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 6" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, your opponent must pick 1 of the following to apply for the rest of the turn:

Drink Deep from the Chalice: Other than the Companion weapon ability, weapon abilities for attacks made by the target have no effect.

Turn Aside and Suffer the Consequences: Combat attacks that target that enemy unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: The contents of Ushoran’s chalice will warp the minds of those who drink from it, although to refuse to toast the Summerking risks affronting his subjects.

name: Trampled Underfoot
description:
Declare: This MANIFESTATION can use this ability even if it is in combat.

Pick a point on a battlefield edge to be the target. Then, make a stampede roll of 2D6. Add 1D6 to the roll for each battle round that this MANIFESTATION has been on the battlefield and has not been banished. For example, the stampede roll would be 2D6 in the turn in which it was summoned, 3D6 in your next turn, and so on.

Effect: This MANIFESTATION can move a distance up to the value of the stampede roll in a straight line directly towards the target. It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units. It cannot end that move in combat unless it ends that move within ½" of a
legend: As a Corpsemare Stampede charges across the battlefield, it tramples over anything that gets in its way.

name: Reigning Champion
description:
Declare: If this terrain feature does not have a Steward, pick a friendly FLESH‐EATER COURTS INFANTRY HERO within 3" of it and not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Place the target on this terrain feature. The target is now the Steward (see ‘Steward of the Realm’).
legend: A trusted member of the court may sit the throne in the absence of their liege-lord, though they must abdicate immediately on their return.

name: Duty Calls
description: Effect: If this terrain feature has a Steward that was not placed on it this turn, set up the Steward on the battlefield wholly within 6" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer the Steward.
legend: When duty demands it, an abhorrant monarch or their regent will descend from the throne to take up the sword.

name: Ruler of All They Survey
description:
Declare: If this terrain feature has a Steward, pick a visible friendly non-HERO FLESH-EATER COURTS unit that is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: The target can move D3". If the target was set up this turn, it can move D6" instead. It cannot move into combat during that move.
legend: A steward may become convinced of their own grandeur and bid troops sally forth in their glorious name.

name: Steward of the Realm
description:
Effect: While this terrain feature has a Steward:
  • The Steward cannot use MOVE abilities.
  • Instead of measuring range or visibility to the Steward, measure to this terrain feature instead.
  • All attacks that would target the Steward target this terrain feature instead.
  • If this terrain feature is destroyed, before removing it from the battlefield, inflict D3 mortal damage on the Steward. Then, set up the Steward on the battlefield within 3" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer the Steward. If it is not possible to set up the Steward, it is slain.
legend: Those who sit upon a Charnel Throne rule over all they survey, but they must be wary of foes who would see them violently cast down.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Bigteef’s Fists and Tail is 6.

name: Strength From Victory
description:
Effect: If any damage points were allocated to an enemy unit by this unit’s combat attacks this turn and that enemy unit has been destroyed, give this unit a Waaagh! token, to a maximum of 3.

Until the end of the next turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s weapons for each Waaagh! token it has.
legend: The more fights a Megaboss wins, the stronger they become.

name: Voice of Gork
description: Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly IRONJAWZ units while they are wholly within 18" of this unit.
legend: Gordrakk’s bellow carries the elemental force of his god; it inspires Ironjawz to surge toward the enemy, hacking, bludgeoning and stomping with furious abandon.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared a <ky>WAAAGH!</ky> ability

name: Monster Grapple
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick 1 of the target’s weapons. You must pick a Companion weapon if it has any. Halve the Attacks characteristic of that weapon (rounding up) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Gordrakk’s Maw-krusha, Bigteef, is strong and mean enough to wrestle even the most gigantic rivals into the dirt.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Maw-krusha’s Fists and Tail is 5.

name: Strength From Victory
description:
Effect: If any damage points were allocated to an enemy unit by this unit’s combat attacks this turn and that enemy unit has been destroyed, give this unit a Waaagh! token, to a maximum of 3.

Until the end of the next turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s weapons for each Waaagh! token it has.
legend: The more fights a Megaboss wins, the stronger they become.

name: Destructive Bulk
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, roll a D3. On a 2+, this unit can move 2D6". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units and can end that move in combat. Then, pick an enemy unit that this unit passed across during that move. Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the D3 roll. If that enemy unit is INFANTRY, double the mortal damage inflicted.
legend: A Maw-krusha is an unstoppable avalanche of ill-tempered muscle that turns all in its path into pulverised meat.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Merciless Conquerors
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons while it is contesting an objective you do not control.
legend: When dispatched to take the enemy’s holdings, these warriors race forwards in the blink of an eye.

name: Storm of Iron-tipped Bolts
description: Effect: If this unit has not used a MOVE ability this turn and was not set up this turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Master-crafted Repeater Crossbows for the rest of the turn.
legend: The skies darken moments before the enemy is shredded by a volley of iron bolts.

name: Coven Guard
description: Effect: If this unit did not charge this turn, add 1 to wound rolls for this unit’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: These warriors are trained to wait for the perfect moment before thrusting their spears into the hearts of their foes.

name: Gromril Shieldwall
description: Effect: While this unit is affected by the ‘Hold the Line’ OFFICAR’S ORDER ability, it has Ward (4+) instead of Ward (5+).
legend: Once formed up into a shieldwall, a line of gromril-clad Ironbreakers is nigh impenetrable.

name: ’I Thought Duardin Were Made Of Sterner Stuff!’
description: Effect: Add 2 to the control scores of friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR DUARDIN units, excluding Longbeards units, while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: A disgruntled look from a grumbling Longbeard is often enough to galvanise the spirits of younger duardin and keep them in the fight.

name: Portents of Battle
description:
Declare: Pick up to D3 visible friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR HUMAN units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for the targets’ combat attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: Celestial Hurricanums leak magical energy, granting nearby soldiers visions of the imminent future that allow them to land their blows with uncanny accuracy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Storm of Shemtek
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Make a number of D3 rolls equal to the current battle round number. For each 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: A Celestial Hurricanum can summon a magical storm to batter the foe with the fury of the heavens. As the battle rages, the tempest grows ever stronger.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Abyssal Howl
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 5 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: These creatures let loose spine-chilling roars when they scent the blood of their prey.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Aura of Protection
description: Effect: Friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR units have Ward (6+) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Luminarks of Hysh are surrounded by a protective magical aura.

name: Searing Beam of Light
description: Effect: Each time this unit attacks with its Searing Beam of Light, pick a point on the battlefield within range to be the target. If the attack scores a hit, draw a straight line between that point and the closest point on this unit’s base. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each visible unit (friendly and enemy) that the line passes across.
legend: As interlocking lenses of aetherquartz click into place, a beam of blinding white light shoots forth to incinerate all before it.

name: Sever One Head, Another Takes Its Place
description: Effect: Heal (6) this unit.
legend: It is almost impossible to kill a Hydra, for they regenerate wounds and regrow severed heads with alarming speed.
condition: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn

name: Six-headed Strike
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Make 6 rolls of D3. For each roll that exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Stoked into a killing rage by their handlers’ goads and whips, War Hydras lumber forward into battle, each of their six heads lashing out to strike the enemy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Hidden Murderer
description: Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly INFANTRY unit that has 5 or more models and there are no enemy units within this unit’s combat range, this unit is not visible to enemy units.
legend: Stalking the shadows, the Assassin only reveals their position when they launch a killing strike.

name: In For The Kill
description: Effect: This unit has Strike-first if it charged in the same turn.
legend: With their target in sight, the Assassin bursts from the shadows and unleashes a flurry of attacks upon the unsuspecting victim.

name: Magic of the Realms
description: Effect: Pick a SPELL ability that this unit can use. For the rest of the battle, add 1 to casting rolls for this unit when it uses that SPELL ability.
legend: As varied as the Mortal Realms themselves, each Battlemage knows how to harness the arcane might of the land they call home.

name: ’At Them, You Curs!’
description:
Effect: Pick a friendly Black Ark Corsairs unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Under the gaze of their Fleetmaster, Scourge Corsairs slaughter the enemy without mercy.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for this unit

name: Direct the Gyrocorps
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 visible friendly Gyrocopter or Gyrobomber units wholly within 18" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: With phosphorescent munitions, Cogsmiths can direct bombing runs and counterattacks by the gyro-machines of the Ironweld Arsenal.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Runes of Spellbreaking
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Unbind’ ability as if it had Wizard (1).
legend: Runelords dampen the magic of their enemies with ancient sigils of unbinding.

name: Forgefire
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR DUARDIN unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons. In addition, if the chanting roll was 10+, pick another friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR DUARDIN unit wholly within 12" of this unit. Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn as well.
legend: Calling upon the latent power of runic engravings, Runelords imbue the weapons of their kin with ancient might.

name: Cruel Sacrifice
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR AELF unit wholly within 6" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn. Then, roll a dice. On a 4+, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
