legend: The Sorceress shows no mercy as she slits the throat of a nearby thrall and draws power from the blood that gushes forth.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Word of Pain
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Sorceress utters a forbidden name, wracking her foes with unbearable pain.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Fearless Leader
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO CITIES OF SIGMAR DUARDIN unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Warden Kings are often first into the fray, with their oathsworn kin following closely in their wake swinging gromril hammers and settling grudges.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for this unit

name: Ancestral Grudgebearer
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in your opponent’s army to bear a grudge against. You can pick an enemy unit that is in reserve.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR DUARDIN units that target that unit.
legend: Every Warden King knows the names of those who wronged their forebears. As they march out to defend or reclaim their holds, they seek to settle those grudges.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Griffon’s Razor Claws and Twin Beaks is 4.

name: Ghurish Ferocity
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Griffon’s Razor Claws and Twin Beaks for attacks that target enemy MONSTERS for the rest of the turn.
legend: The twinheaded griffons of Ghur ridden by Amber Battlemages are alpha predators that prey upon other megafauna.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Black Dragon’s Fearsome Jaws and Claws is 4.

name: Under the Shadow of Black Wings
description: Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR AELF CAVALRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Dreadlords send in the cavalry to weaken the enemy before swooping down to deliver the killing blow.

name: Indiscriminate Slaughter
description:
Declare: Pick all units (friendly and enemy) within this unit’s combat range, excluding this unit, to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The cruel rituals involved in raising Black Dragons curse them with sadistic urges, causing them to revel in slaughter just as much as their Dreadlord riders.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Black Dragon’s Fearsome Jaws and Claws is 4.

name: Command Underlings
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR AELF INFANTRY units wholly within 12" of this unit to be targets.

Effect: Add 3" to the Move characteristic of each target for the rest of the turn.
legend: The cold-hearted rulers of the Darkling Covens wield absolute control over their ensorcelled underlings, commanding them to do their bidding unquestioningly.

name: Feed on Life Force
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If any enemy models are slain by this ability, place a dark sorcery token next to this unit for the rest of the battle, to a maximum of 3 tokens.
legend: The Black Dragon tears into the enemy, spilling copious blood as the Sorceress completes her dark ritual.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Dark Sorcery
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for each dark sorcery token it has.
legend: The Sorceress draws power from the blood spilled by her Black Dragon.

name: More Pressure!
description:
Effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll is less than the number of damage points this unit has, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit. Otherwise, pick 1 of the following effects to apply to this unit until the start of your next turn:

Power the Wheels: This unit can use a Run ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.

Power the Guns: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Steam Gun.
legend: Pumping pressure into the valves and pistons of a Steam Tank can improve its performance – but risks a catastrophic backfire.

name: Division Commander
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 friendly Steam Tank units to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for shooting attacks made by this unit and by each target.
legend: From atop the turret, the commander directs the other tanks in their division upon the battlefield.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Shooting Phase

name: Skilled Swashbucklers
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: With a flash of steel, each ill-timed strike directed at a Corsair is paid for in blood as the aelf delivers a perfect riposte.

name: Steel and Sorcery
description: Effect: While any friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR AELF INFANTRY HEROES are wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those friendly units have Ward (5+).
legend: Black Guard are often charged with protecting heroes on the field of battle.

name: Sow Havoc
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+:
  • Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
  • This unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: The speed and discipline of the Dark Riders is unmatched, allowing them to charge the enemy’s weak points and retreat before the foe can react.

name: Bestial Instincts
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Drakespawn’s Ferocious Jaws while it is in combat with any damaged enemy units or while it is in combat with any enemy units that have had any models slain.
legend: As the Drakespawn tear apart their prey, the scent of fresh gore sends them into a frenzy.

name: Severing Strike
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, this unit’s attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: Heads roll and crimson arcs of hot blood spurt into the air as these warriors swing their deadly blades.

name: Glorious Martyrs
description: Effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if this unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly Pontifex Zenestra. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: When all hope is lost, a Flagellant will fling themselves at the enemy with reckless abandon, heedless of their own survival.

name: Grudgebuster Bombs
description:
Declare: If this unit used a MOVE ability this phase, pick an enemy unit that does not have FLY and that this unit passed across this turn to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects:

Tactical Bombing: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

Drop It All!: Make 2 rolls of D3. For each 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Then, roll a D3 for each unit (friendly and enemy) within the target’s combat range that does not have FLY. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll. Once the ‘Drop It All!’ effect of this ability has been resolved, this unit cannot use this ability again for the rest of the battle.
legend: Gyrobombers swoop over the enemy lines, dropping a lethal payload onto the hapless warriors below.

name: Oathsworn
description: Effect: While any friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR DUARDIN INFANTRY HEROES are wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those friendly units have Ward (5+).
legend: These warriors are oathsworn to protect their liege.

name: Cinderblast Bomb
description:
Declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: This weapon explodes in a burst of shrapnel and flame.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: More Pressure!
description:
Effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll is less than the number of damage points this unit has, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit. Otherwise, pick 1 of the following effects to apply to this unit until the start of your next turn:

Power the Wheels: This unit can use a RUN ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.

Power the Guns: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Steam Gun.
legend: Pumping pressure into the valves and pistons of a Steam Tank can improve its performance – but risks a catastrophic backfire.

name: Overwhelming Storm
description:
Declare: If this unit is contesting an objective that you control, pick a friendly non-HERO STORMCAST ETERNALS INFANTRY unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the phase, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks.
legend: Few can stand before the unleashed power of the Sacrosanct chambers.

name: Averon Stormsire
description: Effect: While this unit’s Averon Stormsire is on the battlefield, it has Wizard (1).
legend: Averon can summon forth a storm of celestial lightning of unmatchable ferocity.

name: Lethal Payload
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses a SHOOT ability, pick either the Big Shot or Hail Shot weapon characteristics for all the attacks it makes with its Ironblaster Cannon.
legend: An Ironblaster’s rifled barrel can be loaded with projectiles that fill its copious width or with several smaller cannonballs to cover a wider area.

name: Rain of Scrap
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any models slain this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Salvaged weapons and shards of metal rain down upon the enemy, forcing them to take cover or dodge out of the way.

name: Load It Up!
description: Effect: If this unit is within the combat range of a friendly Gnoblars unit, this unit’s shooting attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+ until the start of your next turn.
legend: Gnoblars close to a Scraplauncher will diligently scavenge any nearby scrap to pile upon the catapult. After all, looking busy is a good way to avoid getting stepped on by an angry ogor!

name: Insatiable Gluttony
description: Effect: If you have used the ‘Feast on Flesh’ ability this battle, add 1 to the control score of this unit for each model in this unit.
legend: Once Gluttons have started eating, it is nearly impossible to shift them.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Stonehorn’s Rock-hard Horns is 4.

name: Stonehorn Avalanche
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, when this unit makes a pile-in move this phase, add D6" to the distance it can move.
legend: With hearty roars, the Beastriders pick their target and send their Stonehorn crashing forward with the force of a mountain’s worth of snow and rock.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Stone Skeleton
description: Effect: Ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit in each phase.
legend: The thick, rocklike skeletons of these beasts can take substantial punishment.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Thundertusk’s Colossal Tusks is 2.

name: Everwinter’s Assault
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn:
  • If the target is a MONSTER, subtract 3 from its control score.
  • If the target is a non-MONSTER unit, subtract 5 from its control score.
legend: The enemy are left scattered and reeling before the combination of the Thundertusk’s charge and the great missiles loosed by its riders, forced to give ground until they can regather their wits.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Savage Hunger
description: Effect: While they are wholly within 12" of this unit, friendly GUTBUSTERS units can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: The Butcher stokes the hunger of a group of nearby ogors, causing even slight belly-rumbles to erupt into the nigh-uncontrollable desire to feast.

name: Torrent of Flame
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Fire Breath for attacks that target INFANTRY.
legend: Fiery morsels are consumed by this ogor moments before they spew a torrent of flames at the enemy.

name: The Hunt is On
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is outflanking the prey.

Effect: Set up this unit wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, set up each Frost Sabres unit that was set up outflanking the prey with this unit wholly within 12" of it and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Sensing the time is right, the Icebrow Hunter and their Frost Sabre companions launch their ambush.

name: Masters of Ambush
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and up to 2 friendly Frost Sabres units if those units have not been deployed.

Effect: Set up those units in reserve outflanking the prey. They have now been deployed.
legend: Always on the move, Icebrow Hunters range ahead of the main ogor force alongside packs of trained Frost Sabres.

name: Great Cauldron
description:
Effect: You can spend 1 or more of this unit’s grisly remains points. For each point spent, pick a friendly GUTBUSTERS unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then pick 1 of the following effects:

Bloodgruel: The target has Ward (5+) for the rest of the turn.

Spinemarrow: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Lashed to a Slaughtermaster is a great cauldron containing the remains of foes, which the ogor gobbles down in order to unleash gastromantic powers.

name: Fill the Pot
description: Effect: Each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a combat attack made by a friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES unit wholly within 18" of this unit, give this unit a grisly remains point, to a maximum of 3.
legend: As enemies are cut down by the ogors, the Slaughtermaster collects their remains to fill his cauldron.

name: Brawlerguts
description: Effect: Add 1 to the D3 roll made when this unit uses the ‘Trampling Charge’ ability.
legend: Combining brutish strength with devastating bulk, this ogor enters combat like an avalanche.

name: Bully of the First Degree
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 3 to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: Tyrants use constant violence to help them maintain an iron rule, and they never let their underlings forget it.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Stonehorn’s Rock-hard Horns is 4.

name: Stone Skeleton
description: Effect: Ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit in each phase.
legend: The thick, rocklike skeletons of these beasts can take substantial punishment.

name: Earth-shattering Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, roll 2D6. This unit can move a distance up to the value of the roll. During that move, it can pass through models in the target unit but must end that move in combat.
legend: Enemies are crushed and trampled beneath the unstoppable ferocity of a Frostlord upon a charging Stonehorn.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Frost Spear
description: Effect: If any damage points are allocated to an enemy HERO or MONSTER by attacks made with this unit’s Frost Spear, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of that enemy unit’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: Blessed by the Everwinter, the bite of this ogor’s Frost Spear chills the enemy with crippling cold.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Thundertusk’s Colossal Tusks is 2.

name: Sweeping Tusks
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: With a deafening bellow, the Thundertusk swings its huge frost-wreathed tusks from side to side, sending enemies flying.
condition: Once per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: Bellowing Voice
description:
Declare: Pick any number of friendly BEASTCLAW RAIDERS units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Each target can add 1 to the D3 roll made if that unit uses the ‘Trampling Charge’ ability this turn.
legend: With their booming voice, the Frostlord signals the hunt.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Charge Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Stonehorn’s Rock-hard Horns is 4.

name: Stone Skeleton
description: Effect: Ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit in each phase.
legend: The thick, rocklike skeletons of these beasts can take substantial punishment.

name: Everwinter’s Goad
description:
Declare: Pick each friendly and enemy MONSTER within this unit’s combat range to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+:
  • If the target is a friendly OGOR MAWTRIBES unit, its Companion weapons have Crit (2 Hits) for the rest of the turn.
  • If the target is an enemy unit, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made with its Companion weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: This ogor’s Stonehorn unleashes a mighty roar that drives nearby monsters into a frenzy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Thundertusk’s Colossal Tusks is 2.

name: Freezing Aura
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target had Strike-last as a result of this ability in the previous turn. On a 4+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Winter storms gather about this Huskard, freezing and slowing those foolish enough to close in on them on foot.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Hunters of the Frozen Wilds
description: Effect: This unit is not visible to enemy units while it is within 3" of a terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The coats of Frost Sabres act as a natural camouflage in the bleak wilderness.

name: Nasty Traps And Tricks
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 6" of this unit and that used a MOVE ability this turn to be the target. You cannot pick the same unit to be the target of this ability more than once per turn.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: These cunning creatures specialise in fighting dirty and laying all manner of lethal and cunning traps.

name: Bounding Leaps
description: Effect: This unit can move up to 3". It can move into combat.
legend: Adapted to an environment of plunging chasms and sheer cliffs, Icefall Yhetees possess long limbs with corded strength that see them close the distance to their prey in a single mighty bound.

name: Down to the Ironguts
description: Effect: This unit can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: It is not often that a mawtribe’s battleline falters, but if it does, the Tyrant will call upon their Ironguts to turn the battle back in their favour.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Protect the Tyrant
description: Effect: While this unit is within the combat ranges of any friendly Tyrants, both this unit and those Tyrants have Ward (6+).
legend: Ironguts have risen through the tribe’s ranks not only by amassing status and equipment but also by earning the favour of their Tyrant.

name: Firing from the Belly
description: Effect: If this unit has not used a MOVE ability this turn and was not set up this turn, add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: An ogor’s sturdy frame easily absorbs the recoil of even cannon-sized weapons.

name: Powder Gnoblars
description: Effect: This unit has up to 2 Powder Gnoblar tokens. Each time this unit uses a SHOOT ability, for each of this unit’s Powder Gnoblars that are on the battlefield, you can re-roll 1 random characteristic roll for this unit’s Attacks characteristic. If a random characteristic roll re-rolled in this manner is 1, remove 1 of this unit’s Powder Gnoblars from the battlefield.
legend: When assisted by a Gnoblar minion, Leadbelchers can cause even more carnage.

name: Been There, Done That
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: Having travelled the realms and eaten every conceivable foe, Maneaters just laugh off the puny tricks and magics of their enemies.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: This unit was picked as the target of a non-Core ability

name: Lumpen Wall of Flesh
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly BEASTCLAW RAIDERS units while they are within this unit’s combat range.
legend: Mournfangs and their riders provide a living shield for the other ogors, soaking up and foiling incoming ranged fire with their thick, furry hides and broad profiles.

name: Alpha Cavalry
description: Effect: The Charge (+1 Damage) weapon ability has no effect on attacks that target this unit.
legend: Those Mournfangs that have risen to the top of the fighting pits have done so by repeatedly charging equally massive rivals head-on and coming out on top.

name: Great Mawpot
description: Effect: The Great Mawpot is either full or empty. It starts the battle full.
legend: All manner of ingredients are thrown into this metal cauldron and boiled up into a thick magical broth that reinvigorates any ogors who taste it.

name: Throw ’Em In
description: Effect: If an enemy model is slain within 6" of the Great Mawpot when it is empty, it becomes full.
legend: The bludgeoned and hacked remains of dead foes are thrown into the bubbling cauldron to thicken the stew.

name: Vessel of the Gulping God
description:
Declare: If the Great Mawpot is full, pick a friendly OGOR WIZARD within 3" of it to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to the power level of the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: Swirling gastromantic fumes emanate from the Great Mawpot when it is full to the brim.

name: Battlebroth
description: Effect: If the Great Mawpot is full, Heal (D3) each friendly unit wholly within 18" of it. After you have done so, the Great Mawpot is empty.
legend: The contents of the Mawpot are suffused with strange magic; a single mouthful can restore an ogor’s vitality and stitch up their wounds.

name: Deathrider Wedge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the enemy target. Then, you can pick a friendly Liege-Kavalos within this unit’s combat range to be the friendly target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the enemy target. Inflict an additional D3 mortal damage on the enemy target if you picked a friendly target. Then, this unit and the friendly target (if any) can move 10". They can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.
legend: The Kavalos Deathriders plunge through the enemy ranks, slashing as they quickly disengage before a reeling enemy can mount a defence.

name: Shields of the Legion
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks made as part of that Attack ability that target any friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS units within this unit’s combat range.
legend: The Mortek Guard are the backbone of the Ossiarch legions, preventing enemy assaults from finding purchase wherever their nadirite shields are raised in tireless defence.
condition: Once Per Phase (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared an <ky>ATTACK</ky> ability that targeted a %000010532visible% <ky>OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS</ky> unit within this unit’s %000009665combat range%

name: Deathly Barrage
description: Effect: After that SHOOT ability has been resolved, if all of this unit’s attacks targeted the same enemy unit, roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if this unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly Mortisan Ossifector, and add 1 to the roll if any other friendly Mortek Crawlers picked that enemy unit to be the target of all of their shooting attacks this turn. On a 4+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The grisly ammunition of a Mortek Crawler can leave even the most stoic souls staggering.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>SHOOT</ky> ability for this unit

name: Cursed Stele
description:
Effect: For the rest of the turn:

description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll 10 dice. For each 6:

  • Roll an extra dice.

For each 5+ on those extra dice, repeat the above bullet points, Then, do the same for each 4+ and then each 3+. Finally, for each 2+, give the target 1 necrotic withering point (do not roll any extra dice).

After a roll, if the target has 8 or more necrotic withering points, it is automatically destroyed. Otherwise, after the last roll, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the number of necrotic withering points it has. Then, those necrotic withering points are lost.

name: Fuelled By Sorcery
description:
Effect: Each time a spell is successfully cast by a unit within 12" of this MANIFESTATION, give this MANIFESTATION 1 ruinous energy point, to a maximum of 6.

Each time this MANIFESTATION uses a SHOOT ability, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its Darkfire Torrent for each ruinous energy point it has.

If this MANIFESTATION is removed from play, all of its ruinous energy points are lost.
legend: A Darkfire Daemonrift absorbs magical power, widening and expelling ever more gouts of ruinous sorcery as it hungrily devours arcane energies.

name: Debilitating Shockwave
description:
Declare: If this MANIFESTATION charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If any models in the target unit are slain by this ability, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: The vicious spikes that erupt from an onrushing Realmscourge Rupture impale those unfortunate enough to be struck by them even as the tremors that accompany them send those nearby staggering.

name: Swift Death
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Chaos Chariots are at their most deadly on the charge, where their considerable bulk and bladed wheels can cause untold devastation.

name: Heralds of Ruination
description: Effect: This unit can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Paragons of the Dark Gods, Chaos Chosen cut a swathe through the enemy lines, leaving nothing but blood and ruin in their wake.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Impaling Charge
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of its Cursed Lances.
legend: A charging Chaos Knight is capable of spitting several enemies at once with the point of their ensorcelled polearm.

name: Shadow-lurkers
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve lurking in the shadows. It has now been deployed.
legend: The Corvus Cabal favour stalking their prey and striking from unexpected angles.

name: Strike From The Shadows
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is lurking in the shadows.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, add 1 to charge rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: From an unseen quarter, these agile warriors race forward to cut down the enemy.

name: Shattered Gloom Globes
description: Effect: This unit cannot be targeted by shooting attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Thrallmasters carry globes that release dense clouds of shimmersmoke when shattered, choking the foe and masking the Cypher Lords’ advance.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase

name: Acrobatic Leaps
description: Effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST if it charged in the same turn.
legend: In a dizzying display of agility, the Cypher Lords somersault towards the foe before cutting them to ribbons with their exotic blades.

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Drawn to Power
description: Effect: While this unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly Daemon Prince, you can re-roll the random characteristic rolls for this unit’s Move and Attacks characteristics.
legend: Even cursed with their hideous and twisted form, Chaos Spawn still covet the boons of the Dark Gods and are drawn to those most favoured by their patron.

name: Cursed Destroyers
description:
Declare: Pick a terrain feature within 1" of this unit, then pick each other unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that terrain feature to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Once skilled masons, these creatures have been cursed by the Everchosen to now live only to destroy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Brutal Momentum
description: Effect: When this unit uses the ‘Power Through’ command, inflict an additional D3 mortal damage on the target and add 3" to the distance this unit can move as part of that ability.
legend: The ferocity of Gorebeasts is terrible to behold as they carve a path of bloody destruction through the enemy ranks.

name: Ogor Breacher
description: Effect: While this unit includes an Ogor Breacher, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit in each phase.
legend: With their masterforged armour and unwavering spirit, an Ogor Breacher can weather all manner of blows.

name: Iron Resilience
description: Effect: Add 1 to save rolls for this unit if it has not used a MOVE ability in the same turn.
legend: At a barked command from their Dominar, the Iron Golem snap into an impenetrable shieldwall.

name: Dominate Mind
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 6" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: A Sphiranx can manipulate the actions of its enemies with a simple glance.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Crazed Flock
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its melee weapons. This ability also affects Companion weapons.
legend: A flock of snapping, screeching Raptoryx is capable of swiftly bringing down any prey should they catch them unawares.

name: Fight For Glory
description: Effect: The first time each turn that this unit is picked to use a FIGHT ability in the combat phase, if this unit is wholly within 12" of any friendly SLAVES TO DARKNESS HEROES, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: In battle, the Spire Tyrants seek the favour of powerful warlords and will fight harder in their presence.

name: Paralysing Strikes
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses a FIGHT ability, if its attacks score 2 or more critical hits against the same enemy unit, that unit has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Those struck by the blades of the Splintered Fang may find their limbs turning leaden and their thoughts becoming clouded as the cult’s venoms work their way into the blood.

name: Slithering Serpents
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Serpents are on the battlefield, pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 1, remove this unit’s Serpents from the battlefield. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Creatures of the Coiling Ones, a tangle of venomous snakes accompanies the Splintered Fang into battle.

name: Frozen In Fear
description: Effect: Enemy units cannot use the ‘Redeploy’ or ‘Rally’ commands while they are within 12" of this unit.
legend: The self-inflicted mutilation performed by the Unmade is a sight disturbing enough to momentarily freeze even a veteran warrior in horror.

name: Jagged Harpoon
description:
Declare: If this unit includes a First Fang, pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. If the target is a BEAST or MONSTER, roll a dice instead. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Upon piercing the enemy’s flesh, the serrated edges of a First Fang’s harpoon shred vital organs; the more the target thrashes about, the more severe the internal damage.

name: Unleash The Beast
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: With bursts of primal energy, the Untamed Beasts chase down their enemies with relentless fervour.

name: Relentless Killers
description: Effect: This unit can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Varanguard have slaughtered foes beyond counting, butchering their way across the battlefields of the Mortal Realms without mercy.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Gor Stampede
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy non-HERO INFANTRY unit that has fewer models than this unit and is within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: Gors gather in massive droves before charging their enemies, seeking to overwhelm them with superior numbers and brutish aggression.

name: Fleet of Hoof
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: The wiry agility of the Ungors allows them to move with great speed while evading enemy attacks, making them difficult to pin down.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Whipped Into A Frenzy
description: Effect: If this unit is within 6" of any friendly BEASTS OF CHAOS HEROES, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The leaders of a beastherd often goad gargants so as to send them into a berserk rage.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Timberrrrr!
description: Effect: When this unit is destroyed, before removing it from play, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield within 3" of this unit. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point that has a lower Health characteristic than this unit.
legend: A dying gargant is a weapon of ruin in its own right, though it is anyone’s guess where their body will fall.

name: Thricefold Savagery
description: Effect: Roll 3 dice. For each 4+, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Chimeric Heads for the rest of the turn.
legend: Each head of a Chimera operates independently of the others, and though they are prone to violent disagreement as to which prey they should hunt, they are capable of working in terrifying concert.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Massive Horns is 4.

name: Soul-eater
description: Effect: This unit can use UNBIND abilities as if it had Wizard (1). Each time this unit unbinds a spell, inflict D3 mortal damage on the caster.
legend: Feeding off the swirling winds of magic, Cygors pose an incredible threat to spellcasters.

name: Consume Endless Spell
description:
Declare: Pick an ENDLESS SPELL within 9" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll exceeds the target’s Banishment characteristic:
  • The target is banished.
  • Heal (X) this unit, where X is an amount equal to the roll.
legend: A Cygor perceives mystic evocations as they are being formed, swallowing manifested spells as easily as the wizards that summoned them.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Butchering Blades is 4.

name: Swallow Whole
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic:
  • 1 model in the target unit is slain.
  • Heal (X) this unit, where X is an amount equal to the roll.
legend: The huge, cavernous maw of a Ghorgon can swallow a man whole – a grisly fate for any warrior.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Aura of Madness
description:
Declare: Roll a D3. On a 2+, pick up to a number of enemy units equal to the roll that are within 9" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, each time the unmodified hit roll for a combat attack made by the target is 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Those who gaze upon a Jabberslythe are soon overcome by a babbling madness, rendering them easy prey for the creature.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Hatred of Heroes
description: Effect: While this unit is in combat with any enemy HEROES, add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly BEASTS OF CHAOS units wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: A Beastlord reserves their prodigious strength and fury for the greatest of the enemy’s champions, calling upon their followers to witness and join the butchery.

name: Call of Battle
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO BRAYHERD INFANTRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Beastlords swiftly lead their underlings towards the foe, desperate to get to grips with the enemy so that the bloodletting can begin.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for this unit

name: Alpha Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: A Doombull is a living, snorting siege engine, and their headlong charge can shatter entire enemy formations.

name: Slaughterer’s Call
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly WARHERD unit that is not in combat and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a maximum of 3.
legend: A feral roar by the Doombull alerts the warherd to the scent of flesh on the wind, sending them into an attacking frenzy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Scion of the Primordial Storm
description: Effect: If this unit or a friendly Dragon Ogors unit wholly within 12" of this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 4+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit or that friendly unit. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per SPELL ability.
legend: The untrammelled fury of the primordial storm flows through this creature, a fulminating power so intense that it can render malevolent sorceries harmless.

name: Beneath The Tempest
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, Heal (X) this unit, where X is an amount equal to the roll. Then, roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Dark clouds gather above the battlefield, threatening to unleash the fury of the tempest.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Infuse With Bestial Vigour
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly BEASTS OF CHAOS unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the target can use a RUN ability and still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: Raw chaotic energy emanates from the Bray-Shaman, imbuing surrounding beastmen with unnatural speed.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Ferocious Advance
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: Volleys of enemy fire do nothing to dissuade these bestial warriors from running down the enemy.

name: Despoilers
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Despoiler Axes for the rest of the turn.
legend: Bestigors reserve the greatest part of their hatred for those who rally under the banners of civilisation.
condition: Reaction: Opponent declared the ‘All-out Defence’ command for a unit within 6" of this unit

name: Warherd Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit. For each 2+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: When a warherd charges, the enemy is sent flying through the air by the force of the impact.

name: Drunken Revelry
description: Effect: This unit can use this ability if it is not in combat. It has Ward (4+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Centigors glut themselves on potent brews made of fermented blood and Chaos-infused oozes that they bring from their territories, sending them into a state of drunken bravado in which they are blind to fear and pain.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Outrunners of Chaos
description: Effect: Change one of the dice in the charge roll to a 4.
legend: Packs of Chaos Warhounds close upon their prey with unnatural quickness.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Charge</ky> ability for this unit

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Petrifying Gaze
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If any damage points are allocated to the target by this ability, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: As a Cockatrice surges forwards, its eyes begin to glow with warping energy, transfixing foes where they stand.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army,) Your Shooting Phase

name: Speed Of An Avalanche
description: Effect: If this unit did not charge this turn and is in combat with an enemy unit that charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 4+, this unit has Strike-first for the rest of the turn.
legend: Despite their formidable size, Dragon Ogors can move as swift as an avalanche, often surprising enemies who foolishly charge them.

name: Tuskgor Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Spurred on by merciless whipping, Tuskgor Chariots barrel headlong into their foes.

name: Hidden Volley
description:
Declare: If this unit is in reserve in ambush, pick a non-HERO enemy unit within 12" of a battlefield edge to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in this unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. Then, in your next movement phase, set up this unit on the battlefield using the ‘Beastherd Ambush’ ability. If it is not possible to do so, it is destroyed.
legend: Ungor Raiders are capable of unleashing devastating volleys of arrows from the safety of canopies and vantage points. By the time the foe knows where the attacks are coming from, the Raiders have already moved on.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Booming Cacophony
description: Effect: When this MANIFESTATION is set up, the range of this ability is 6". Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are within range of this MANIFESTATION’s ability.
legend: In the terrible blasting of the Dirgehorn can be heard the bestial growls of a thousand beastherds.

name: Louder and Louder
description: Effect: Increase the range of this MANIFESTATION’s ‘Booming Cacophony’ ability by 6". This effect can be applied multiple times to this MANIFESTATION and is cumulative. If this MANIFESTATION is removed from play, this effect no longer applies.
legend: The maddening blast of this foul magic grows ever more deafening until all within a dozen leagues can hear it.

name: Multiple Parts
description:
Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and all of its parts are removed from play.

Each time this MANIFESTATION moves, each of its parts must end within 1" of at least 1 other part.

Each part of this MANIFESTATION is armed with Murderous Beaks.

name: Harbingers of Dark Omens
description: Effect: Subtract 5 from the control scores of enemy units while they are within 12" of this unit.
legend: Those who hear the cawing of these fell creatures experience terrifying visions of their own impending doom.

name: Trail of Destruction
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the unmodified charge roll. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If any damage points are allocated to the target by this ability, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: Warriors are sent sprawling, set aflame and trampled underhoof as the Wildfire Taurus charges headlong through their ranks.

name: Entropic Lodestone
description:
Effect: From the second battle round onwards, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly BEASTS OF CHAOS units while they are wholly within 24" of this terrain feature.

If this terrain feature is wholly within 18" of the centre of the battlefield, this ability affects all friendly BEASTS OF CHAOS units on the battlefield instead of those wholly within 24" of it.
legend: As the corrupting influence of the herdstone spreads, buildings, armour and other trappings of civilisation begin to crumble to dust, allowing even the crude weapons of the Beasts of Chaos to cut through their defences with ease.

name: Driven by Destiny
description: Effect: If this unit is more than 6" from all enemy units, it can move X", where X is the number of fate points you have. It cannot move into combat during any part of that move.
legend: Willing pawns in the Change God’s schemes, Kairic Acolytes are driven by the winds of fate to wherever they can cause the most bloodshed and confusion.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Movement Phase

name: Eldritch Raiders
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for this unit’s attacks while it is wholly within enemy territory.
legend: Tzaangors plunge into enemy lands, desperately seeking the arcane trinkets and treasures they crave – as well as victims to be transformed in their own bird-like image.

name: Scrolls of Sorcery
description: Effect: The next time this unit uses a non-SUMMON SPELL ability this phase, do not make a casting roll as part of that ability. Instead, roll a dice. On a 2+, the spell is successfully cast and cannot be unbound.
legend: The unlimited arcane knowledge held on these scrolls can conjure sorceries of perfect structure.

name: Treacherous Bond
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • This unit has WARD (4+).
  • Each time you make an unmodified ward roll of 1-3 for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to the target.
legend: By creating a psycho-conductive link, the Blue Scribes can siphon the worst of any harm that befalls them to allies nearby.

name: Locus of Command
description: Effect: Each time a friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH DAEMON unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.
legend: Granted a fraction of Tzeentch’s authority, Changecasters anchor the battleline with their stern presence.

name: Weapon Curse
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH DAEMON unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target was set up this turn. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, other than the Companion weapon ability, weapon abilities for attacks that target that unit have no effect.
legend: The Changecaster's strange powers of mutation warp and dull enemy weapons, rendering them near useless.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Puckish Misdirection
description: Effect: While they are wholly within 12" of this unit, friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH units can use the ‘Redeploy’ command even if they were set up in the same turn.
legend: The Changeling uses illusion and misdirection to mask the movements of its accomplices.

name: Arch-Deceiver
description:
Declare: This unit can only use this ability if it is masked by illusion. Pick a model in a friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH unit to be the target.

Effect: This unit can immediately use a SPELL ability. When it does so, measure the range and visibility of that SPELL ability from the target. The target is treated as the caster for the purpose of other abilities such as ‘Unbind’.
legend: None can detect the veil of the Changeling. Assuming the form of an ally, it sows arcane discord before vanishing.

name: Whispers of Treachery
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Changeling spreads thoughts of betrayal amongst the enemy, inciting a bitter spree of bloodshed.

name: With Spell and Sword
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, it can use a non-SUMMON SPELL ability as if it were your hero phase, as if that ability had the UNLIMITED keyword and as if this unit had not cast any spells this turn.
legend: The Curseling casts deadly spells even in the midst of blade-on-blade combat.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Armour-Bane Curse
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for combat attacks that target that unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Tretchlet mutters an arcane hex, transforming the enemy’s armour into a molten, dripping ruin.

name: Long in the Planning
description:
Declare: Spend 2 fate points. Then, pick a visible friendly ARCANITE unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the first time an enemy unit ends a charge move within 3" of the target, you can remove the target from the battlefield and set it up in reserve masked by illusion.
legend: Carefully prepared deceptions and illusions pave the way for a merciless Arcanite assault.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: Bound Retinue
description:
Declare: This unit can only use this ability if it is masked by illusion. Pick up to 1 other friendly unit that is masked by illusion to be the target.

Effect: Set up this unit on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, set up the target wholly within 6" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Fatemaster’s Twistwing relays the locations of favoured followers, and when the uprising breaks out, it is these chosen blades who form an honour guard for their master.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Spread the Inferno
description: Effect: Companion weapons used by friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH units have Crit (2 Hits) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The Fateskimmer’s fiery determination to burn reality to ashes incites nearby daemons to a murderous frenzy.

name: Fuel for the Flames
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: If the target is destroyed this turn, before removing it from play, gain 1 fate point.
legend: Even the blazing ruin of its own kind serves a Fateskimmer’s ends, each death fuelling the spreading fires.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: Arcane Tome
description: Effect: Re-roll 1 of the dice in the casting roll.
legend: This arcane tome holds scriptures of ancient incantation that allows a brief mastery of the Herald’s chosen spell lores.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> ability for this unit

name: Masters of the Silver Towers
description: Effect: Enemy units cannot end a charge move within 1/2" of a friendly Argent Shard that is wholly within 12" of this unit and was set up on the battlefield in the same turn.
legend: Gaunt Summoners are attuned to the esoteric magic of the Argent Shards and can call upon their power to violently repulse charging foes.

name: All Belongs to Tzeentch
description:
Declare: Pick an objective you do not control and that you controlled earlier in the battle to be the target.

Effect: You control the target objective.
legend: The Gaunt Summoners have spent centuries remaking reality in their master’s image.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Start of Any Turn

name: Leaden Limbs
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • Halve the target’s Move characteristic.
  • The effects of the ‘Fly’ ability do not apply to the target.
legend: The Gaunt Summoner turns the bones of their foes to heavy lead, slowing them to a pained crawl.

name: Spellmaster
description:
Effect: Make an unbinding roll of 2D6. If the roll exceeds the casting roll for the spell, the spell is unbound and its effect is not resolved.

If the spell is unbound, add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for the rest of the phase.
legend: Magisters are attuned to magical energy and can harness the raw essence of Chaos. There are those however, that delve too deep into this source of power.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>Spell</ky> ability for a %000007444Wizard% within 30" of this unit and the %000010766casting roll% equalled or exceeded the spell’s casting value and that spell has not been %000012162unbound%

name: Imbued With Arcane Fire
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly ARCANITE unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target’s melee weapons have Crit (Mortal) until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Magister sets their allies’ blades ablaze with deadly wyrdflame that can melt through steel.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Spellmaster
description:
Effect: Make an unbinding roll of 2D6. If the roll exceeds the casting roll for the spell, the spell is unbound and its effect is not resolved.

If the spell is unbound, add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for the rest of the phase.
legend: Tzeentch’s foremost mortal disciples are masters of magic, capable of absorbing powerful arcana to fuel their own spells.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>Spell</ky> ability for a %000007444Wizard% within 30" of this unit and the %000010766casting roll% equalled or exceeded the spell’s casting value and that spell has not been %000012162unbound%

name: Fates Converge
description: Effect: While you have 6 or more fate points, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly ARCANITE units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: As the paths of Tzeentch’s endless plots cross, the Magister imbues their warriors with a sense of destiny.

name: Thaumaturge Hunger
description: Effect: This unit can move 6". It can move into combat and must end that move closer to the caster. If this unit was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.
legend: The ogroid senses the coalescence of arcane motes and charges forth in search of this brewing power.
condition: Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> ability for a unit within 30" of this unit

name: Arcane Absorption
description:
Effect: If any damage points were allocated to an enemy WIZARD or PRIEST by this unit’s attacks this turn and that enemy unit has been destroyed:
  • Heal (7) this unit.
  • Add 1 to this unit’s power level for the rest of the battle.

This unit can be affected by this ability multiple times and the effects are cumulative.
legend: Ogroid Thaumaturges feast upon the eldritch power of those they slay.

name: Avian Swiftness
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly ARCANITE unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, the target can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: The Shaman invests nearby allies with avian speed, allowing them to close with the foe in moments.

name: Wit of Beasts
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy MONSTER or CAVALRY unit within 6" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target’s melee weapons have the Companion weapon ability for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Shaman curses the enemy with an atavistic madness, causing them to see themselves as the beasts they ride – or as the beast within.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, subtract 1 from its power level.

name: Master of Destiny
description:
Effect: If this unit has not already engineered the outcome this battle round, instead of making a casting roll, unbinding roll, banishment roll, hit roll, wound roll or save roll for a visible friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH unit wholly within 12" of this unit, this unit can engineer the outcome.

If the roll would have been a D6 roll, you can use a value of 6 for it that cannot be modified. If the roll would have been a 2D6 roll, you can use a value of 9 for it that cannot be modified.
legend: Kairos sees both past and future, granting him unchecked power of the fate of his victims.

name: Mastery of Magic
description: Effect: When you make a casting roll for this unit, you can change the lowest D6 to match the highest D6.
legend: To master the arcane is to embody Tzeentch’s designs.

name: Beacon of Sorcery
description:
Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls and unbinding rolls for friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARDS while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

In addition, if a friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD wholly within 12" of this unit unbinds a spell, no command points are spent for that WIZARD to use the ‘Magical Intervention’ command in that phase.
legend: Spreading his arms, Kairos saturates the area with magic.

name: Fateful Reverse
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • If the target charged in the same turn, friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH units in combat with the target have Strike-first.
  • The target’s weapons cannot be affected by the Charge (+1 Damage) weapon ability.
legend: Tzeentch’s oracle invades his enemies’ minds with false visions of victory, causing them to charge willingly to their doom.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, subtract 1 from its power level.

name: Summon Daemons of Tzeentch
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH DAEMON unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: To challenge the fractal plans of the Architect of Fate is to face strange daemons born from chaotic sorcery itself.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Temporal Manipulation
description:
Declare: Pick another visible friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH unit that was not set up this turn and that is wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase, but it must end that move closer to this unit.
legend: Lords of Change can alter the very flow of time, calling minions to their side in the blink of an eye.

name: Locus of Impossibility
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit. In addition, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH DAEMON units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The aura of maddening instability surrounding Tzeentch’s greatest daemons fuels their own power whilst ensuring that foes can scarcely land a telling blow.

name: Capricious Wyrdflame
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: The target has the BURNING keyword for the rest of the battle.
legend: The mutagenic fires expelled by Flamers are most drawn to those already ablaze with the potential for change.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

Declare: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed. Pick any number of BURNING enemy units to be the targets.

legend: Wyrdflame clings to the enemy, near impossible to quench as it agonisingly devours their bodies and souls.

Declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick an enemy MANIFESTATION to be the target. Then, make a charge roll of 3D6.

Effect: This unit can move a distance up to the value of the charge roll. It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units and must end that move within 1/2" of the target. If it does so, this unit has charged.

Then, if this unit charged this turn, inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy MANIFESTATION in combat with this unit.
legend: These eldritch creatures like to feast upon arcane manifestations, which they hungrily pursue on sight.

  • Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Tzeentchian Spear and Vicious Beak.
legend: The Enlightened are able to glimpse snapshots of their enemy’s past battles, giving them a vital edge in combat.

description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks.
legend: The attacks of these warriors are directed by glimpses of the future.

legend: Skyfires often select a target to utterly obliterate and erase from the tapestry of fate.

description:

Effect: Roll 2 dice, pick either result, then apply the corresponding effect for the rest of the turn:
1: No effect.
2-3: Heal (D3) each friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH target. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy target.
4: Friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH targets can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RUN ability in the same turn. Enemy targets cannot use

Declare: Pick a visible friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD within 3" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: The target can immediately use a SPELL ability from the Lore of Change or the Lore of Fate.

Designer’s Note: That spell does not count towards the number of SPELL or BANISH abilities the target can use this phase.

description: Effect: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Snapping Jaws for each fate point you have.
legend: The more potent the aura of Tzeentchian magic, the more terrifyingly corporeal the Simulacrum’s teeth become.

  • For the rest of the phase, this unit’s Privateer Heavy Weapons have Shoot in Combat.
legend: Arkanauts learn to fight with cutlass and pistol, combining the two to fearsome effect.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase.

Pick a number of units up to its Transport Capacity that are wholly within 6" of it, that are not in combat and that have not charged this turn to be the targets. Then, make a charge roll of 2D6.

legend: This skyvessel carries a variety of bombs that can be dropped onto the battlefield.

description: Effect: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units within 9" of this unit.

Declare: Pick a friendly Arkanaut Company unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKYVESSEL within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

  • No mortal damage is inflicted on the target by RETREAT abilities.
legend: Under orders of the ship’s Captain, the Endrinmaster attempts to squeeze every bit of power out of a vessel’s endrin.

  • The target cannot be contested until the start of your next turn.
legend: Thundrik harnesses the power of his Aethermatic Anatomiser to obscure the loot so they can safely recover the plunder beneath the noses of their enemies.

name: Emergency Field Repairs
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKYVESSEL or Zontari Endrin Dock within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Make a field repairs roll of D6 for each model in this unit. For each 4-5, Heal (1) the target. For each 6, Heal (2) the target.
legend: Endrinriggers conduct intricate repair work even as battle rages around them.

name: Specialist Grundstok Ammunition
description:
Declare: Pick Shieldbreaker ammunition or Thunderdrakk ammunition.

Effect: If all of the attacks made for that SHOOT ability target the same enemy unit, after that SHOOT ability has been resolved, roll a dice and add the number of damage points allocated to the target by that SHOOT ability. If the roll is higher than the target’s Control characteristic, apply the following effect to the target based on the ammunition type picked:

Shieldbreaker: Ward rolls cannot be made for the target until the start of your next turn.

Thunderdrakk: That target has a maximum control score of 1 until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Gruncorps outfits its soldiers with the latest in experimental munitions.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase, Reaction: You declared a <ky>SHOOT</ky> ability for this unit

description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

legend: A Stegadon prepares to face a charging enemy by turning its mighty head and bracing for impact, impaling the enemy and blunting their attacks with its thickly scaled crest.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Cosmic Engine
description:
Declare: Pick if this unit will harness or reserve the power of its cosmic engine.

Effect: If it will reserve the power, place a cosmic power token next to this unit.

If it will harness the power, roll a dice and add the number of cosmic power tokens this unit has to the roll. Then, remove all cosmic power tokens this unit has and pick 1 of the following effects (if possible).

Healing Light: On a 3+, you can Heal (D3) all friendly SERAPHON units wholly within 12" of this unit.

Starlight Summons: On a 5+, you can pick up to 3 friendly SERAPHON units wholly within 12" of this unit. Return 1 slain model to each unit.

Time Slows: On a 6+, you can pick up to 3 friendly
legend: The Engine of the Gods is an ancient device capable of disrupting the natural laws of the universe.

legend: Devoted servants of the Old Ones, Saurus Warriors are as intractable in defence as they are relentless upon the attack.

name: Unstoppable Stampede

legend: The slann are amongst the greatest wizards in existence, but Lord Kroak is mighty even in comparison to others of his kind.

name: Dead for Innumerable Ages
description: Effect: This unit must use this ability each turn while it is damaged. Roll 3D6 and add the number of damage points this unit has to the roll. On a 20+, this unit is destroyed. Otherwise, Heal (18) this unit.
legend: Lord Kroak is no longer truly alive; his form is preserved only by his indomitable spirit. As a result, he is immune to all but the most devastating attacks.

name: Arcane Vassal
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKINK WIZARD wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target.

The target is treated as the caster for the purpose of other abilities or spell effects, such as ‘Unbind’ or ‘The Earth Trembles’.
legend: A Slann Starmaster can channel the power of a spell through one of their followers.
condition: Once Per Turn, Any Hero Phase

name: Celestial Deliverance
description:
Declare: This unit can cast this spell more than once per phase. Pick up to 3 different visible enemy units within 18" of this unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.
legend: Lord Kroak’s palanquin quivers with barely contained force before unleashing ruination on the enemies of the Seraphon.

name: Blot Toad
description:
Declare: You receive 1 Blot Toad token for each Ripperdactyl Chief or Ripperdactyl Riders unit in your army, to a maximum of 3 tokens. Pick a number of enemy units equal to the number of Blot Toads you have to be the targets.

legend: When a Ripperdactyl flock takes flight, the Seraphon will seed creatures known as blot toads across the battlefield. These loathsome amphibians emit a pervasive stink that is unpalatable to all cold-blooded creatures, but especially the Ripperdactyls.

name: Ripperdactyl Assault

legend: A Ripperdactyl Chief is as ferocious as their mount, inspiring nearby Ripperdactyl Riders to attack with unbridled fury.

condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Spell</ky> ability for a friendly %000003097Seraphon Wizard% wholly within 12" of this unit

name: Wrath of the Seraphon

legend: The slann are amongst the greatest wizards in existence, and they shape the very stars with their magic.

description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: Terradons circle high in the sky, only darting down for a brief moment to launch a strafing run.

name: Chief’s Deadly Cargo
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that this unit passed across this phase to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice and add 2 to the roll if this unit is within the combat ranges of any friendly Terradon Riders units. On a 5+:
  • Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

  • If any damage points are allocated by this ability and the target does not have Fly, the target cannot use RUN abilities until the start of your next turn.
legend: Terradons carry heavy boulders hewn from meteoric rock and carved with sigils of destruction. When these are dropped upon enemy lines, those not immediately crushed are sent flying in all directions.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Carnosaur’s Massive Jaws is 2.

name: Spearhead of the Charge
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly SAURUS units while they are wholly within 18" of this unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Atop their mighty Carnosaur steeds, Oldbloods lead their saurian brethren into battle.

name: Terror
description: Effect: Subtract 2 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: This terrifying monstrosity strikes fear into the hearts of its foes.

name: Blood Frenzy
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat with any damaged enemy MONSTERS, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit has Strike-first for the rest of the turn.
legend: A Carnosaur that senses an injured predator will not hesitate to assert its dominance in combat.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Carnosaur’s Massive Jaws is 2.

name: Maim and Tear
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of damage points the target has. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: As champions of the Seraphon hosts, Scar-Veterans and their especially bloodthirsty mounts pursue the greatest enemy warriors, falling on them with vicious brutality.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Terror
description: Effect: Subtract 2 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: This terrifying monstrosity strikes fear into the hearts of its foes.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Troglodon’s Jaws is 2.

name: Noxious Roar
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: These creatures bring the roul stench of their swampland homes to battle, their noxious breath reeking all the worse when they roar in anger.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Terror
description: Effect: Subtract 2 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: This terrifying monstrosity strikes fear into the hearts of its foes.

name: Troglodon Regeneration
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Troglodons are able to mend injured flesh almost as soon as they are harmed.

name: Brutal Blows
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for attacks that target an enemy unit that has 10 or more models.
legend: Kroxigor swing their weapons in wide arcs, smashing aside a multitude of foes with each blow.

name: Blot Toad
description:
Declare: You receive 1 Blot Toad token for each Ripperdactyl Chief or Ripperdactyl Riders unit in your army, to a maximum of 3 tokens. Pick a number of enemy units equal to the number of Blot Toads you have to be the targets.

Effect: Place a Blot Toad next to each target.
legend: When a Ripperdactyl flock takes flight, the Seraphon will seed creatures known as blot toads across the battlefield. These loathsome amphibians emit a pervasive stink that is unpalatable to all cold-blooded creatures, but especially the Ripperdactyls.

name: Toad Rage
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Ripperdactyl’s Tearing Jaws while it is in combat with any units that have a Blot Toad.
legend: The mere scent of a blot toad sends Ripperdactyls into a frenzy.

name: Dispersed Formation
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".

name: Selfless Protectors
description: Effect: While any friendly SLANN units are within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those SLANN units have Ward (5+).
legend: The Saurus Guard stand as a living shield between the leaders of the Seraphon and their foes.

name: Swift and Nimble
description: Effect: When this unit uses the ‘Redeploy’ command, when determining the distance this unit can move, you can roll 2 dice instead of 1 and pick either result.
legend: Though not physically powerful, skinks are fleet of foot, able to rapidly redeploy and outmanoeuvre the enemy at a single chirruped command.

name: Deadly Cargo
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that this unit passed across this phase to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit, and add 2 to each roll if this unit is within the combat ranges of any friendly Terradon Chief units. For each 5+:

  • Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
  • If any damage points are allocated by this ability and the target does not have Fly, the target cannot use RUN abilities until the start of your next turn.
legend: Terradons carry heavy boulders hewn from meteoric rock and carved with sigils of destruction. When these are dropped upon enemy lines, those not immediately crushed are sent flying in all directions.

name: Attack From on High
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: Terradons circle high in the sky, only darting down for a brief moment to launch a strafing run.

name: Dispersed Formation
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".

name: Fierce Guardians
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly SAURUS or KROXIGOR units that target an enemy unit while that enemy unit is within 9" of this terrain feature.
legend: The defenders of these ancient edifices will stop at nothing to see any intruders driven back.

name: Power Unleashed
description:
Declare: If there are any friendly SERAPHON WIZARDS within 3" of this terrain feature, pick another terrain feature within 24" of this terrain feature, then pick up to 3 enemy units within 3" of that terrain feature to be the targets.
