Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If that terrain feature has a Health characteristic, inflict D3 mortal damage on it.
legend: The waves of power that spread from an activated Realmshaper Engine bring the surrounding landscape to violent life.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Stegadon’s Horns and Jaws is 4.

name: Crushing Stomps
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Add 2 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted, if any, if this unit charged this turn.
legend: At the command of the Stegadon Chief, the Stegadon crushes its enemies with its unstoppable bulk.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Skink Coordination
description: Effect: If a friendly non-MONSTER SKINK unit uses the ‘Redeploy’ command while it is wholly within 18" of this unit, no command points are spent.
legend: A Skink Chief mounted on a Stegadon is in the perfect position to direct the efforts of nearby skink warriors and warbeast handlers, amplifying their destructive power.

name: Anticipated Strike
description: Effect: If this unit has not charged this turn, ignore the effect of the Charge (+1 Damage) ability for combat attacks made by enemy units that target this unit.
legend: When Auralan Wardens stand shoulder to shoulder, they present a bristling wall of pikes to the foe.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Stoneheart Worldhammer is 3.

name: With the Force of a Landslide
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Stoneheart Worldhammer for each instance of Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain depicted on your battle scripture.
legend: The Alaithi rune imbues mountain spirits with increasing power.

name: Rain of Stone
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. Add 2 to the roll if the target charged this turn. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Boulders crash down from the Spirit of the Mountain, crushing foes under the avalanche.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Strength of Stone
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly Alarith Stoneguard unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.
  • The target cannot make pile-in moves.
legend: The Stonemage focuses upon the stoic majesty of their guardian mountain, imbuing a nearby group of Alarith with its immovability and might.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Raise the Earth
description:
Declare: Pick an objective within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time a non-FLY unit (friendly or enemy) that is contesting the target objective uses a MOVE ability, inflict D6 mortal damage on that unit after that ability has been resolved.
legend: With a great rumbling and the grinding of stone upon stone, the caster turns an area of clear ground into a jumble of clefts, scree and jagged terrain that is extremely perilous for warriors to traverse.

name: Darkness of the Soul
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands until the start of your next turn.
legend: Scinari Cathallars wield the negative energy locked in aetherquartz as a weapon, afflicting the enemy with a soul-shrivelling despondency that dulls them to their superiors’ orders.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Supreme Swordmaster
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s attacks.
legend: The Light of Eltharion is a consummate warrior and one of the greatest swordmasters of all time.

name: Valorous intervention
description:
Declare: This unit cannot use this ability if it is in combat. Pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS unit that is in combat to be the target.

Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of the target and in combat.
legend: The Light of Eltharion manifests alongside his allies in their time of greatest need.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Celennar’s Moonbright Talons is 3.

name: Aura of Celennar
description:
Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls and banishment rolls for friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARDS while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

In addition, this unit can use Spell abilities from the Lore of Hysh, the Lore of the Awakened Realms and the warscrolls of all friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARDS on the battlefield.
legend: Those who bathe in the lambent glow of Celennar find themselves lifted to new heights of erudition, and Teclis is no exception.

name: Archmage
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following:

Magical Supremacy: Instead of making a casting roll for the next SPELL ability used by this unit this turn, you can use a value of 12 for the roll that cannot be modified.

Drain Power: Pick a visible enemy WIZARD or PRIEST within 18" of this unit to be the target. Subtract 1 from the target’s power level, to a minimum of 0, until the start of your next turn.
legend: Teclis’s knowledge of magic is such that weaving spells and denying the efforts of enemy mystics comes to him as easily as breathing.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: The Light of Truth
description:
Declare: Pick any number of different visible enemy units within 18" of this unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.
legend: Annihilating beams of white light lance forth from Teclis’s brow, effortlessly scything through the ranks of the foe.

name: Discs of the Aelementiri
description:
Declare: You cannot use this ability in the first battle round.

Effect: Depict a rune of your choice on your battle scripture.

Designer’s Note: This allows you to have that rune depicted earlier in the battle scripture for the purposes of other abilities. Do not resolve the effect of the ‘Depict Rune’ ability as part of this ability.
legend: These sacred artefacts are a vital component of the Mage God’s deep connection with the elements of the Hysh-Mhensa. Their innate magic allows Lumineth to draw more readily upon the power of their own runic scriptures.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Firestealer Hammers is 4.

name: Call of the Mountains
description:
Effect: While a visible friendly ALARITH unit is wholly within 12" of this unit:
  • You are treated as having 1 additional instance of Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain depicted on your battle scripture for the purposes of the abilities on that unit’s warscroll.
  • If that unit is picked to be a target of the ‘Depict Rune’ ability, you can apply the enhanced effects of that ability to that unit as if you had an instance of Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain depicted on your battle scripture.
legend: In the presence of Avalenor, the mountains awaken to give protection to their allies.

name: With the Force of a Landslide
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Firestealer Hammers for each instance of Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain depicted on your battle scripture.
legend: The Alaithi rune imbues mountain spirits with increasing power.

name: Unbreakable Bulwark
description:
Declare: If this unit did not charge this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, while that enemy unit is in combat with this unit, all attacks made by models in that enemy unit within this unit’s combat range must target this unit.
legend: Lumineth who fight in Avalenor’s shadow need not fear; as long as he stands, they will come to no harm.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Fortitude of the Earth
description: Effect: While you have 2 or more instances of Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain depicted on your battle scripture, this unit’s Save characteristic is 3+.
legend: When the Stoneguard adopt this unyielding martial stance, even the most ferocious assaults cannot break them.

name: Lofted Shots
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s Auralan Bows but subtract 1 from hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks.
legend: To strike a distant target, these warriors point their bows to the sky before launching a volley, the soft sound of their loosed bowstrings like a breath of anticipation before the foe meets their doom..

name: Dawnrider Charge
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Dawnrider Lances and Blades if it charged in the same turn.
legend: The Dawnriders speed across the battlefield like the rays of Hysh spilling over the horizon, their sunmetal weapons empowered by the swiftness of their onset.

name: BLINDING CHARGE
description:
Declare: Pick a unit in this Regiment of Renown that charged this turn. Then, pick an enemy INFANTRY unit within 1" of that unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, ignore positive modifiers to save rolls for the target.
legend: As they bear down on the foe with great swiftness, the aetherquartz in the Dawnriders’ armour reacts, causing it to blaze with a fierce radiance that makes their enemies flinch at a critical moment.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: MASTERS OF ALL TERRAIN
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to run rolls and charge rolls for units in this Regiment of Renown and to their Move characteristic.
legend: These Dawnriders have been dispatched on multiple missions throughout the realms. Consequently, their steeds have become accustomed to traversing all kinds of terrain, be it scree, sand or swamp.

name: Reservoir of Power
description:
Effect: Each time a unit (friendly or enemy) successfully casts a spell while it is within 12" of this MANIFESTATION, give this MANIFESTATION 1 arcane charge point.

This MANIFESTATION can have a maximum of 6 arcane charge points.
legend: The Twinstones glow brighter with each spell cast, forming a reservoir from which the Lumineth can draw greater power.

name: Release Arcane Charge
description: Effect: Add this MANIFESTATION arcane charge points to the casting roll or unbinding roll. Then, reset this MANIFESTATION's arcane charge points to 0.
legend: The Lumineth draw out the power absorbed by the twinstones.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> or <ky>UNBIND</ky> ability for a %000003368LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD% within 3" of this %000009952<ky>MANIFESTATION</ky>%

name: Turn to Stone
description: Effect: Roll a D3 for each enemy unit within 6" of this MANIFESTATION. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll. If an enemy unit has at least 3 mortal damage inflicted on it by this ability this turn, it has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: Foes who remain too close to this hovering sigil will find their flesh hardening and turning into stone until they are nothing more than lifelike statues.

name: Sigil of Yngra
description:
Effect: While a friendly unit with a Health characteristic of 10 or less is wholly inside the ring formed by this MANIFESTATION:
  • That unit is not visible to enemy units.
  • Enemy abilities that would target that unit must target this MANIFESTATION instead.
legend: The sanctum creates a protective shield around the Lumineth.

name: Multiple Parts
description: Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and all its parts are removed from play

name: Violent Despoilers
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s attacks while it is wholly outside friendly territory.
legend: Grashrak’s gor-kin leave a trail of wanton destruction in their wake, for they hate the trappings of civilisation with a bestial vehemence.

name: Grashrak Fellhoof
description: Effect: While this unit’s Grashrak Fellhoof is on the battlefield, it has Wizard (1).
legend: For Grashrak, it is not enough to despoil the land – the air itself must writhe with the power of anarchy.

name: Quest to Slay the Monster
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, while this unit is in combat with any enemy MONSTER or BEAST units, it has STRIKE-FIRST. However, for the rest of the turn, while it is in combat with any enemy MONSTER or BEAST units, all of this unit’s combat attacks must target an enemy MONSTER or BEAST unit.
legend: Under the command of Duke Crakmarrow, these ghouls believe themselves to be noble knights charged with slaying a great beast that threatens their kingdom.

name: Ghostly Howl
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit’s Piercing Scream to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, the target cannot use commands until the start of your next turn.
legend: There is no describing the shrieking wail of the Banshee; it is so horrific that its sound alone can pierce the soul of any who hear it.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: The Briar Queen
description: Effect: While this unit’s Briar Queen is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: The Briar Queen and her lieutenants once ruled the criminal underworld of Shadespire with a magical fist.

name: Marking Your Territory
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Wolfgit Weapons while it contests an objective you control that is not contested by any other friendly units.
legend: Rippa is out to make a name for himself, and what better way then grabbin’ a big pile of loot and keeping it.

name: Hamstring
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Mean-eye is on the battlefield and not in combat, pick a visible enemy unit within 15" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is damaged. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Mean-eye can find the soft spot in the toughest foes.
condition: Once per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Hrothgorn’s Mantrappers
description: Effect: This unit’s Bushwakka, Bushwakka’s Trap, Quiv, Luggit and Thwack, and Thrafnir are tokens. After setting up this unit on the battlefield for the first time, place all of its tokens except for its Bushwakka’s Trap next to it. Then, pick an objective or terrain feature and place its Bushwakka’s Trap next to it.
legend: The Icebrow Hunter is accompanied to battle by a band of Gnoblars and his loyal Frost Sabre, Thrafnir.

name: Hunting Beast
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Thrafnir is on the battlefield, pick an enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 1, remove Thrafnir from the battlefield. On a 2+, place Thrafnir next to the target. Until the start of your next turn, the target is being stalked by Thrafnir. While a unit is being stalked by Thrafnir, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Trap Launcher for attacks that target that unit.
legend: Masked in the swirling blizzards of the Everwinter, Thrafnir ruthlessly hunts its prey.

name: Bushwakka’s Traps
description: Effect: The first time an enemy unit finishes a move within 1" of the objective or terrain feature with this unit’s Bushwakka’s Trap next to it, remove that Bushwakka’s Trap from the battlefield, then roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
legend: With a satisfying snap, this crude iron trap springs up on the legs of an unwitting enemy.

name: Gnoblar Minions
description: Effect: You can re-roll hit rolls for attacks made with this unit’s Trap Launcher while this unit’s Bushwakka, Quiv or Luggit and Thwack are on the battlefield. If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove 1 of those tokens from the battlefield after the ATTACK ability has been resolved (the damage point is still inflicted).
legend: Hrothgorn tolerates the constant bickering of his Gnoblar companions only for as long as they remain useful.

name: Fleet of Foot
description: Effect: This unit can use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities even if it used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: Skaeth’s Wild Hunt advance on their foes with the speed of an autumn gale.

name: Karthaen
description: Effect: While this unit’s Karthaen, Huntcaller, is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: With a blast of his horn, the air itself comes to the aid of Karthaen.

name: Keep Up!
description: Effect: While this unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly MEGA-GARGANT, this unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: Mancrusher Gargants run as fast as they can so as not to be left out behind when their bigger brethren charge into battle.

name: Stuff ’Em In Me Bag
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is at least double the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: Gargants are known to grab hapless warriors and stuff them screaming into their bags ‘ for later’…
condition: Once Per Turn, Any Combat Phase

name: ’Oo’s Under The Heel Now?
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses the ‘Gargant Charge’ ability, add 1 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted, if any, for each model in this unit.
legend: The mob of gargants crash into the enemy in unison, wreaking havoc among the enemy ranks.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 15 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Fortcrusha Flail is 4 and this unit has a Control characteristic of 10.

name: Sons of Behemat
description: Effect: If this unit would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: The Sons of Behemat are nearly as difficult to kill as their mighty progenitor.

name: Longshanks
description: Effect: This unit can pass through models in non-MONSTER units and parts of terrain features that are less than 4" tall.
legend: Mega-Gargants tower high above the battlefield; with their long legs, they can step over most obstacles.

name: Pulverising Strike
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: This unit can make a pile-in move. Then, roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 4D6 mortal damage on the target.
legend: A Gatebreaker may swing its fortcrusha flail hard and bring it down in a single pulverising strike.

name: Smash Down
description:
Declare: Pick a terrain feature within 3" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: If the target is FACTION TERRAIN, inflict D3+3 mortal damage on it. Then, roll a D3 for each non-MONSTER unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of the target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
legend: Gatebreakers have a deep loathing of settlements, which they see as symbols of those who killed Behemat.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 15 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Shipwrecka Warclub is 3 and this unit has a Control characteristic of 10.

name: Sons of Behemat
description: Effect: If this unit would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: The Sons of Behemat are nearly as difficult to kill as their mighty progenitor.

name: Longshanks
description: Effect: This unit can pass through models in non-MONSTER units and parts of terrain features that are less than 4" tall.
legend: Mega-Gargants tower high above the battlefield; with their long legs, they can step over most obstacles.

name: Get Orf Me Land!
description:
Declare: Pick an objective within 1" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, move the target 2D6" to a new position on the battlefield more than 1" from all models, terrain features and other objectives. That objective is treated as if it were in the same territories as it was when it was first set up on the battlefield for the purposes of the battleplan.
legend: Kraken-eaters hate intruders and trespassers, and they do not take kindly to people who decide to fight battles on their land.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Stuff ’Em In Me Net
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 3 dice. For each roll that is at least double the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: Kraken-eaters are constantly putting things into the nets they carry ‘ for later’, including unlucky opponents and other tasty-looking morsels.
condition: Once Per Turn, Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 15 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Titanic Boulderclub is 3 and this unit has a Control characteristic of 10.

name: Son of Behemat
description: Effect: If this unit would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: The Sons of Behemat are nearly as difficult to kill as their mighty progenitor.

name: Longshanks
description: Effect: This unit can pass through models in non-MONSTER units and parts of terrain features that are less than 4" tall.
legend: Mega-Gargants tower high above the battlefield; with their long legs, they can step over most obstacles.

name: Titanic Boulderclub
description: Effect: If all of the attacks made with this unit’s Titanic Boulderclub target the same enemy unit, for every 5 models in the target unit, add 2 to its Attacks characteristic for the rest of the phase.
legend: A Warstomper will drive straight into the midst of the enemy, swinging their titanic boulderclub to smash foes in all directions.

name: Hurled Body
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is at least double the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in that unit is slain and you can pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit. Inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the target’s Health characteristic.
legend: Warstompers wade into the thick of battle and pick up smaller opponents to hurl at other enemies.

name: Dance of Death
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Sisters of Slaughter delight in frustrating foes with acts of incredible acrobatics and martial skill.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Frenzied Fervour
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons if it charged in the same turn.
legend: Witch Aelves hurl themselves at the enemy with no fear of death, cutting down foes in a whirlwind of blades.

name: Lord of Murder Incarnate
description: Effect: This MANIFESTATION is affected by the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability as if it were a unit.
legend: When a grand ritual of murder approaches completion, a deep-red, pulsing glow begins to emanate from where the Avatar’s heart would be, and its wrath becomes incandescent as it crashes through the enemy ranks.

name: Wrath of Khaine
description: Effect: Add X to the Attacks characteristic of this MANIFESTATION’s melee weapons, where X is the number of times you have used the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability this battle, to a maximum of 3.
legend: Khaine’s subjects channel their faith through this bladed idol of the Murder God, allowing it to carry out acts of monstrous carnage.

name: Exsanguinating Glare
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target. If this unit is not in combat, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Then, if any enemy models were slain by that mortal damage, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to its Health characteristic.
legend: The Bloodwrack Medusa’s eyes blaze with pure hatred, and those who meet her gaze perish in agony as blood explodes violently from their every pore and orifice.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Arcane Resonance
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit when it uses a SUMMON ability and add 1 to banishment rolls for this unit.
legend: Those who go through the agonising ritual of the Slith-onóir become creatures of supreme arcane might.

name: Catechisms of Violence
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, each time a visible friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses a FIGHT ability, after that ability has been resolved, you can pick a visible friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST wholly within 12" of this unit. That PRIEST gains 1 ritual point.
legend: The Hag Queen drives her followers into a blood-soaked fury, drawing power from their every impalement and evisceration.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: The Iron Heart of Khaine
description:
Effect: Each time you perform a blood rite, immediately after the ability that destroyed a unit has been resolved, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Until the start of your next turn, this unit is only visible to enemy units while those units are within its combat range.
  • Heal (D6) this unit or a friendly Shadow Queen.
  • A friendly Shadow Queen can immediately use the ‘Normal Move’ or ‘Retreat’ ability as if it was your movement phase.
  • Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
  • For the rest of the turn, set this unit’s Control characteristic to 5 and a
legend: As blood is spilt in his name, the Iron Heart is drained by Morathi-Khaine to further swell her powers.

name: Divine Matriarch
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST or WIZARD wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls and chanting rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.
legend: Having ascended to godhood, Morathi-Khaine’s sorcerous power knows no bounds.

name: Surge of Hatred
description:
Declare: Pick either a friendly Shadow Queen wholly within 12" of this unit and in combat or a visible friendly non-HERO DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE unit wholly within 12" of this unit and in combat to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is a friendly Shadow Queen, it can immediately use a FIGHT ability as if it were your combat phase. Otherwise, inflict D3
legend: As the Shadow Queen rages, Morathi-Khaine binds that anger and unleashes it, magnifying it tenfold or imbuing a nearby cultist with a sliver of divine frenzy.

name: Fanatical Blademaster
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick a blessing from the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability that is not active. The effect of that blessing applies to the target until the start of your next turn as if it were active. If you have used the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability 3 or more times this battle, you can pick 2 blessings instead of 1.
legend: The Slaughter Queen is a priest whose temple is the frenzied heartbeat between each blade strike, whose offerings are the opened throats of her enemies and whose screams of savage laughter are her ministrations to a fanatical following.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Born of Slaughter
description:
Declare: If there are fewer friendly Avatars of Khaine on the battlefield than there are friendly Bloodwrack Shrines on the battlefield, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Set up an Avatar of Khaine wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: As the Khainites’ slaughterous worship reaches its apex, the Bloodwrack Medusa conjures forth a manifestation of murder and death.

name: Aura of Agony
description:
Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • Enemy MANIFESTATIONS cannot be set up within 12" of this unit.
  • This unit has WARD (4+) against mortal damage inflicted by SPELL abilities, PRAYER abilities and abilities used by MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: The aura that surrounds this malefic engine can be enhanced to nullify enemy hexes and resist even the most perfidious spellcraft.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Agonising Spasms
description: Effect: After that SHOOT ability has been resolved, if all of this unit’s attacks made as part of that SHOOT ability targeted the same enemy unit and any enemy models were slain by those attacks, roll a dice. On a 3+, that enemy unit has a maximum control score of 1 for the rest of the turn.
legend: Those who meet the Medusa’s gaze are stricken by bone-shattering spasms, leaving them prostrate in helpless agony.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>SHOOT</ky> ability for this unit

name: Wrathful Repulsion
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE unit that is wholly within 12" of this unit and is in combat with an enemy unit that charged this turn to be the target. If there are any friendly Slaughter Queens on Cauldrons of Blood on the battlefield, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.

Effect: The targets have WARD (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: The fierce oratory of the Hag Queen and the Cauldron of Blood’s mystical power combine to create an aura of furious defiance so strong that it makes enemies stagger.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Roaring Idol
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE MANIFESTATION wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot be picked to be the target of BANISH abilities used by enemy units until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Avatar of Khaine’s keen-edged malice strengthens bloody conjurations, making them harder to destroy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Consecrated Revulsion
description: Effect: Add 1 to save rolls for visible friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The Slaughter Queen’s fanaticism is so intense that her deity provides protection for her followers from the attacks of heathens and weaklings.

name: Icon of Slaughter
description: Effect: Each time a friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6. In addition, if there are any friendly Hag Queens on Cauldrons of Blood on the battlefield when that command is used, you receive D3 additional rally points.
legend: The Slaughter Queen calls out in a forbidden tongue and her acolytes surge to their feet, their exhaustion, injury and fear forgotten in an blur of bloodletting madness.

name: Outmanoeuvre
description: Effect: When this unit uses the ‘Redeploy’ command, if you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance this unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.
legend: Doomfire Warlocks are the light cavalry of the war covens, worrying the enemy’s flanks and engaging unprotected targets.

name: Crystal Touch
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY or CAVALRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is equal to or less than the target’s Health characteristic, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The scáth touch of a Blood Sister can permanently transmute an enemy into an immobile – though still fully conscious – crystal statue.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Barbed Arrows
description: Effect: After that SHOOT ability has been resolved, if all of this unit’s attacks targeted the same enemy unit, roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if any other friendly Blood Stalkers units picked that enemy unit to be the target of all of their shooting attacks this turn. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
legend: The deadly missiles fired by the Blood Stalkers are designed so that they are not easily removed from the target’s flesh, inflicting debilitating agony even if the victim manages to survive.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>SHOOT</ky> ability for this unit

name: Fire and Flight
description: Effect: After that SHOOT ability has been resolved, this unit can move 2D6". It cannot move into combat during any part of that move.
legend: Khinerai are masters of the hit-and-run strike; Heartrenders loose volleys of sharpened projectiles before darting away.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>SHOOT</ky> ability for this unit

name: Fight and Flight
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move 12". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat. Then, roll a D3 for each enemy unit that this unit passed across during that move. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: Khinerai are masters of the hit-and-run strike; Lifetakers bleed and maim their victims before darting away.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Heartrender is 5.

name: Two Bodies, One Soul
description:
Declare: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed. If you have used the Blessings of Khaine ability 3 or more times this battle, pick a friendly Morathi-Khaine or Shadow Queen that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target within 3" of a friendly Morathi-Khaine or Shadow Queen.
legend: Should either the Shadow Queen or Morathi-Khaine be struck down, their shared soul ensures their mutual survival.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Coils of the Shadow Queen
description:
Declare: If any enemy units are constricted, they are no longer constricted. Pick an enemy HERO or MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, the target is constricted while it is in combat with this unit.

This unit’s combat attacks that target a constricted enemy unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: The Shadow Queen can grasp individuals in her deadly coils and utterly crush the life from them.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Crown of Serpents
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 5 dice. Add 2 to each roll if the target is constricted. For each 5+, pick 1 of the following effects. You cannot pick the same effect more than once per turn.
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
  • Subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
  • Random characteristic rolls for the Damage characteristic of the target’s melee weapons are treated as unmodified rolls of 1 for the rest of the turn.
  • Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
  • The target cannot be healed or have slain models returned to it for the
legend: The snakes that adorn the Shadow Queen's brow are magical creatures with a deadly sentience all of their own. Their poisons are many and varied, each serving a nefarious purpose.

name: Sweeping Blows
description: Effect: If any damage points inflicted by attacks made as part of that FIGHT ability are allocated to any enemy units, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by those enemy units for the rest of the turn.
legend: A Namarti Thrall’s aggressive swiping strikes are intended to knock their enemies off their feet.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit.

name: Void Drum
description: Effect: Friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 6" of this unit.
legend: A void drummer rides on the back of every Akhelian Leviadon. The mesmerising rhythm that they beat out sends rippling currents through the air, distorting the outlines of the drummer’s comrades and making them hard to see.

name: Crushing Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy INFANTRY unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target unit has more than 10 models. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: When a Leviadon charges into battle, it crushes the foe with its sheer mass.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Leviadon’s Scythed Fins and Crushing Jaws is 5.

name: Wave Rider
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
  • Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Akhelian Royal Weapons for attacks that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: When an Akhelian King charges the foe, they hit with the power of a crashing wave.

name: Crest of the Wave
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by other friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units for attacks that target enemy units in combat with this unit.
legend: Riding the momentum of the ethersea, the Akhelian King leads a glorious charge to shatter the enemy ranks.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Dormant Energies
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.
legend: The Isharann aspect of an Eidolon of Mathlann seethes with suppressed energies that it can draw upon at need.

name: Tsunami of Terror
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 different visible enemy units within 12" of this unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for combat attacks that target those units until the start of your next turn.
legend: With a wave of its sceptre, the Eidolon sends forth invisible waves of fear that cause even the bravest of opponents to cower.

name: Vengeful Waves
description:
Declare: If this unit has not charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: When threatened, the Eidolon causes the ethersea to crash around it, overwhelming its enemies.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Tranquillity of the Abyss
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to the control scores of friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: An Eidolon in its aspect of the sea radiates an aura of unnatural tranquillity, calming any fears that nearby Idoneth may harbour.

name: Crashing Upon The Foe
description: Effect: This unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by RETREAT abilities.
legend: The Eidolon surges up into the sky before crashing down like a tidal wave, reforming to dive again and again until nothing is left of the enemy.

name: Pulled Into The Depths
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The viciously barbed crulhook can ensnare unfortunate foes.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Drench With Hate
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The mere presence of an Eidolon in its warrior aspect is enough to imbue nearby Idoneth with a fierce and bitter hate.

name: Hangman’s Knot
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, it is automatically destroyed.
legend: The noose on a talúnhook can be used to ensnare a victim, ensuring they cannot escape their doom at the hands of the Soulrender.

name: Lurelight
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 different friendly NAMARTI units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets. You cannot pick the same unit to be the target of this ability more than once per turn.

Effect: Make a lurelight roll of D3 for each target unit. On a 2+, return a number of slain models to the target unit equal to the roll.
legend: Isharann Soulrenders possess a mystical lure that is used to draw unto them the souls of slain opponents so that they can be captured. Should the Soulrender act quickly enough, the stolen essence can be repurposed to resurrect fallen Namarti mid-battle.

name: Finder of Ways
description: Effect: Instead of setting up the targets as described in the ability used, set them up on the battlefield wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 7" from all enemy units.
legend: Soulscryers are the Idoneth’s navigators, helping them divine hidden paths through the realmseas.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000017205Unpredictable Tide%’ ability or the ‘%000017221Steed of Tides%’ ability

name: Master of the Ethersea
description:
Declare: Make an Isharann ritual roll of D6.

Effect: On a 3+, pick 1 of the following effects to apply until the start of your next turn:

Creeping Mist: Friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units cannot be targeted by shooting attacks unless the attacking model is within 12" of them.

Surging Stream: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units.

Spiteful Riptide: Each time an enemy unit uses a RETREAT ability, after the effect of that ability has been resolved, inflict D3 mortal damage on that unit.
legend: A Tidecaster can manipulate the ethersea like no other.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Catalogue of Souls
description: Effect: Each time an enemy unit is destroyed, give this unit a soul-quota token.
legend: The Soul Wardens keep records of the souls that are harvested by the phalanxes.

name: Fount of Willpower
description: Effect: Remove 1 of this unit’s soul-quota tokens. Then, you can re-roll the casting roll.
legend: Such is Lotann’s obsessive commitment to his duty that his willpower bleeds out into the ethersea, a potent magical force that can be drawn upon to empower his fellow Isharann.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: You declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> ability for a friendly %000006435ISHARANN% unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: Empowered By Memory
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN unit wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target’s melee weapons have Crit (Auto-wound) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Lotann draws on the accumulated memories of his people to grant his allies supernatural strength and resolve.

name: Cealith, the High King’s Shield
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (3+) against mortal damage inflicted by SPELL abilities, PRAYER abilities or abilities used by MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: Cealith is said to have been crafted by Teclis himself. However it was created, the mystical aura it projects guards the bearer against malign magics.

name: First Among Akhelians
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by other friendly AKHELIAN units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Volturnos is the greatest Akhelian King to have ever lived. His supreme skill and vast experience serve as an inspiration to all members of the Idoneth’s warrior caste.

name: Supreme Lord of Tides
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 other friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: At the High King’s command, his warriors will attack with unrelenting fury.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Galv-shields
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (5+) if it charged in the same turn.
legend: Thanks to their protective aura, the Ishlaen have greater staying power in prolonged combat than their spear-armed kin.

name: Biovoltaic Barrier
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target unit’s weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The biovoltaic energy produced by Fangmora Eels is channelled by Ishlaen Guard into a crackling luminescent energy field that protects them from harm.

name: Biovoltaic Blast
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in this unit. Add 1 to each roll if there are more models in the target unit than this unit. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The biovoltaic energy produced by Fangmora Eels is stored by Morrsarr Guard, ready to be discharged as a bolt of energy when the time is right.

name: Strike on the Move
description: Effect: This unit can use SHOOT abilities even if it used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: Namarti Reavers are experts at running out from cover to unleash a hail of deadly arrows.

name: Rise From The Depths
description:
Declare: This ability must be used instead of the ‘Deploy Faction Terrain’ ability.

Effect: Set up this faction terrain either as 1 terrain feature consisting of 2 scenery pieces (that must be set up within 3" of each other) or as 2 separate terrain features. Set up each terrain feature wholly within friendly territory and more than 3" from all objectives and other terrain features. After you have done so, it has been deployed.

If this faction terrain is set up as 1 terrain feature consisting of 2 scenery pieces, it has a Health characteristic of 14 instead of 7.
legend: Ancient wreckages adrift in the great currents of the ethersea provide a haven for Idoneth.

name: Guardians of the Deep
description: Effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN INFANTRY and CAVALRY units while they are wholly within 6" of this terrain feature.
legend: Shoals of small sea creatures infest this wreck, instinctively swarming out to shield Idoneth Deepkin that are nearby.

name: Phantasmal Ruin
description:
Effect: Models can pass through this terrain feature but cannot be set up on or end moves on any part of this terrain feature.

Each time an enemy unit ends a move that passed through or across this terrain feature, roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
legend: Gloomtide Shipwrecks are apparitions of sunken vessels filled with ethereal creatures that strike out at those who stray too close.

name: Ironscale’s Fury
description: Effect: Each time a model in a friendly non-HERO DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE unit is slain by a combat attack, if that friendly unit is within this unit’s combat range and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. If that friendly unit is a Blood Sisters or a Blood Stalkers unit, roll 2 dice instead. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the
legend: The doctrine of the Melusai Ironscales is simple: every Khainite death must be answered with immediate and shockingly violent vengeance.

name: Cloud of Flies
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit while it is contesting an objective you control.
legend: Plaguebearers are surrounded by a cloud of swarming flies that feast on their rotting bodies.

name: Tallyman of Nurgle
description:
Effect: You gain a number of tally points equal to the current battle round number.

During the battle round, you can spend your tally points. For each tally point you spend, you can re-roll 1 hit roll, 1 wound roll, 1 save roll or 1 ward roll for a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE unit wholly within 12" of this unit.

At the end of the battle round, any unspent tally points are lost.
legend: Epidemius keeps an endless tally of Nurgle’s diseases, and as the count rises higher, the Plague God’s minions grow stronger.

name: Retchling
description: Effect: If this unit’s Fecula Flyblown is on the battlefield, add 1 to its power level for the rest of the turn.
legend: Accompanying Fecula into battle is her loyal Retchling. This plague-ridden familiar is a powerful locus of plague sorcery.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Fecula Flyblown
description: Effect: While this unit’s Fecula Flyblown is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: Through vile sorceries are the unnatural plagues of Nurgle spread.

description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Gathoblyt’s Fanged Maw is 3.

name: The Leechlord's Curse
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: This unit gains 1 leech point for the rest of the battle. Until the start of your next turn, each time the target uses a CORE ability or command, after that ability has been resolved, roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. Then, if any damage points were allocated to the target by this ability, Heal (1) this unit.
legend: The unfortunate victim finds themselves host to parasitic leeches that drain the vitality from their very soul.

name: Vile Poisons and Debilitating Toxins
description:
Declare: If this unit did not charge this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target. You cannot pick a MANIFESTATION or terrain feature.

Effect: You and your opponent must roll off. Add this unit’s Control characteristic to your roll and the target’s Control characteristic to your opponent’s roll. If your roll is higher, apply the corresponding effect:
  • If the target is a HERO or MONSTER, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the difference between your roll and your opponent’s roll.
  • If the target is a non-HERO non-MONSTER unit, 1 model in the
legend: Festus is a master mixer of deadly potions and virulent concoctions.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Annelid Engorgement
description: Effect: For each enemy unit that was in combat with this unit this turn and was destroyed this turn, this unit gains D3 leech points for the rest of the battle. Add 1 to this unit’s Control characteristic for the rest of the battle for each leech point it gained this turn.
legend: Festus is a master mixer of deadly potions and virulent concoctions.

name: Master of the Slime Fleet
description:
Declare: Pick a regiment led by this unit to be the target if no units from that regiment have been deployed.

Effect: Each unit in the target regiment is set up in reserve aboard the Slime Fleet. Those units have now been deployed.
legend: Gutrot’s Slime Fleet haunts the oceans of the Mortal Realms, fighting alongside and transporting warriors that the Lord of Tentacles judges to share his aims.

name: Pestilential Beachhead
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is aboard the Slime Fleet.

Effect: Set up this unit on the battlefield, wholly within 7" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units. Then set up every other friendly unit that is aboard the Slime Fleet on the battlefield wholly within 7" of a battlefield edge, wholly within 7" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: To the creak of rotting timbers and the waft of rancid brine, the Slime Fleet makes land.

name: Flailing Tentacles
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Gutrot grabs his opponents with his melange of slimy tentacles, rendering them helpless as he swings his rusted axe.

name: Knell of Doom
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. If the target is within 6" of a friendly Sloven Knights unit, you can roll a D6 instead. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.
legend: The ominous toll of the Harbinger's bell is enough to give pause to even the bravest warriors.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: Omens of Decay
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Subtract twice the current battle round number from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn. If the chanting roll was 10+, this ability affects all enemy units within 12" of this unit.
legend: Harbingers of Decay are diseased prophets, able to divine omens through grisly rites and observing the spread of sickness.

name: Cultivating the Garden of Nurgle
description: Effect: If there is no more than 1 friendly Feculent Gnarlmaw on the battlefield, you can set up a Feculent Gnarlmaw wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 3" from all enemy units, objectives and other terrain features.
legend: Wherever Horticulous slimes around in the Mortal Realms, daemonic foliage pokes through the cracks in reality and swiftly takes root.

name: Beast Handler
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Beast of Nurgle unit that has been destroyed.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, set up a replacement unit wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Horticulous is accompanied by romping packs of Beasts of Nurgle, who look to him like hounds do their master and whose foolishness he always forgives.

name: Gnarlmaw Whisperer
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Feculent Gnarlmaw to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 3" from all enemy units, objectives and other terrain features.
legend: With a little gentle coaxing, the daemonic trees of the Garden will uproot themselves and lumber to the Grand Cultivator’s side.

name: Vectors of Foulest Contagion
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Through the use of rancid corpse-totems and other such gifts from the Grandfather, a Lord of Afflictions spreads death wherever they travel.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Master of Rot Flies
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick this unit and up to 2 friendly Pusgoyle Blightlords units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the targets’ Rot Fly’s Mouthparts and Sting for the rest of the turn.
legend: A Lord of Afflictions leads a swarm of Rot Flies that act as brutal linebreakers, using their sheer bulk to smash enemy formations asunder.

name: Thrice-ripened Death’s Heads
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit or with a friendly Plague Drones unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll D3. On 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: These blessed death’s heads are projectiles ripe with disease and hurled at incoming foes to spread the plagues festering within.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Festering Bulwark
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and a friendly Putrid Blightkings unit within 3" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for the targets for the rest of the turn.
legend: Heavy shield planted in the mud, a Lord of Blights orders their warriors brace for the enemy attack.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Lord of the Infected Legions
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly Rotswords units that did not charge this turn while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Under the rheumy gaze of a Lord of Plagues, Rotswords will repel those foolish enough to try to break their diseased ranks.

name: Sevenfold Slaughter
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Rotswords unit that did not charge this turn and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s Ruined Master-crafted Weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: A Lord of Plagues drives their warriors to keep hacking at the foe until they are reduced to nothing more than twitching, filth-streaked offal.

name: Captain of the Plague Legions
description: Effect: Pick a friendly Plaguebearers unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Poxbringers lead their fellow Plaguebearers into battle and ensure that the orders of the Great Unclean Ones are followed to the letter.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Jolly Gutpipes
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE DAEMON unit wholly within 12" of this unit or a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: If you picked a friendly unit to be the target, roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, add 2 to run rolls and charge rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.

If you picked an enemy unit to be the target, roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefi
legend: With a parp and a honk from their gutpipes, a Sloppity Bilepiper entertains their fellow daemons while ensuring their foes remain a captive audience.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Keep Counting, I’m Watching You
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Plaguebearers unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D6. On a 2+, pick 1 of the following effects to apply until the start of your next turn:

Tally of Blows: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks.
Recorded Stamina: Add 5 to the target’s control score.
legend: Spoilpox Scriveners are responsible for making sure that the Plaguebearers of the tallybands do not shirk their duties.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Stupefying Sneezes
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: The target cannot use RAMPAGE abilities until the start of your next turn.
legend: The thick mucus ejected by a Spoilpox Scrivener is so revolting that those hit by it are overwhelmed by disgust.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Bilespurter’s Claws is 3.

name: Miasma of Pestilence
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, other than the Companion weapon ability, weapon abilities for attacks that target that friendly unit have no effect.
legend: Bloab Rotspawned completes a complicated gesture in the air and a vile mist rises from the ground around his target.

name: Daemon Flies
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The whirling fly-storm that surrounds Bloab protects him from harm.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Ghurk’s Tentacle is 3.

name: Overgrowth of Flesh
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the target’s Health characteristic. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target, to a maximum of 7 mortal damage. If any mortal damage was inflicted on the target, and the target was not a MANIFESTATION or terrain feature, it has the DISEASED keyword.
legend: For all his endless grumbling, Ethrac Glott is not miserly in doling out Nurgle’s bountiful gifts.

name: Horrific Opponent
description: Effect: Subtract 5 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: So terrifying are the Brothers Glott that enemy lines are sent into disarray at the very sight of them.

name: Blighted Stampede
description: Effect: Pick up to 2 friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets. After the ‘Counter-charge’ command for this unit has been resolved, if this unit charged, each of the targets can immediately use the ‘Counter-charge’ command in an order of your choosing without any command points being spent.
legend: At a signal from his brothers, the usually ponderous Ghurk launches into an earthshaking counter-charge. Nearby Maggotkin are quick to take advantage of the enemy’s shock at his sudden turn of speed.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009844Counter-charge%’ command for this unit

name: Tentacle Trap
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO or MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, for the rest of the turn:
  • The target cannot move and cannot be removed from the battlefield by an ability that would allow it to be set up elsewhere on the battlefield.
  • Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks that target that enemy unit.
legend: Ghurk wraps his boil-covered appendage around an unfortunate enemy hero.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Colossal Blight Weapons is 3.

name: Plague Wind
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target. You cannot pick a MANIFESTATION or terrain feature. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target has the DISEASED keyword.
legend: With a satisfied belch, the greater daemon unleashes a gust of putrid air that smothers the battlefield.

name: Locus of Nurgle
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE DAEMON unit that started the battle with 3 or more models and that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 6" of this unit or a friendly Feculent Gnarlmaw and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Great Unclean calls upon Grandfather Nurgle to tear a rift in reality through which loathsome, foetid daemons can spill.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Bloated with Corruption
description:
Declare: If this unit is damaged, pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Should a Great Unclean One be wounded, the noxious effluvia within its swollen body will burst forth in a flesh-melting spray.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Tripletongue’s Claws is 3.

name: Lord of Nurglings
description:
Effect: While any friendly Nurglings units are wholly within 12" of this unit:
  • Ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to that Nurglings unit each phase.
  • That Nurglings unit can ignore the effect of the ‘Beast’ ability.
legend: Nurglings follow their mortal champion into battle with boundless enthusiasm.

name: Tide of Nurglings
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 friendly Nurglings units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 2+:
  • If the target is not in combat, it can move a number of inches equal to the roll but cannot end that move in combat.
  • If the target is in combat, it can make a pile-in move.
legend: Morbidex’s pox maggoth bellows out a gurgling roar that drives nearby swarms of Nurglings into a frenzy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Gigantic Nurgling-kin
description: Effect: Heal (X) this unit, where X is half the number of damage points this unit has (rounding up).
legend: Morbidex has come to resemble the Nurglings physically and has gained much of their unnatural resilience.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Whippermaw’s Claws is 3.

name: Acid Ichor
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Whenever Orghotts’s flesh is cut open, a gout of daemonic ichor spews out with shocking force. Its vitriolic potency is enough to burn through steel and dissolve the flesh beneath.

name: Grasping Tongue
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE units that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: The massive pox maggoth Whippermaw lashes its tongue around its hapless victim, preparing to devour them.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Gnarlrod is 3.

name: Bringer of Plenty
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Rotigus is a masterful sorcerer, able to bind the energies of decay. His spells inspire grotesque fecundity and flesh-growth, stimulated by the arcane deluge that follows him.

name: Mountain of Loathsome Flesh
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, roll a dice. On a 3+, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Rotigus is a corpulent abomination; when he goes on a rampage, enemies caught in his path are often swallowed up and crushed between his great rolls of blubber.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Deluge of Nurgle
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the enemy targets, then pick each friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE unit within 18" of this unit to be the friendly targets. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict 1 mortal damage on each enemy target and Heal (1) each friendly target.

Then, until the start of your next turn, if an ability would heal or return any slain models to an enemy unit while they are within 18" of this unit, that ability does not heal any damage points or return any slain models to it.
legend: Rotigus has an affinity with the plagued downpours that spill from Nurgle’s cauldron, and he is able to influence where the blighted rains fall.

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Endless Swarm
description:
Declare: This unit can only use this ability if it has been destroyed.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit wholly within 6" of a friendly Feculent Gnarlmaw and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The presence of Nurglings in the realms continuously draws more of their number from the Grandfather’s Garden, making their swarms extremely hard to eradicate.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Dispersed Formation
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".
legend: These warriors maintain a wide formation, enabling more precise strikes and greater battlefield control.

name: Ripe Pastures
description: Effect: This unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by RETREAT abilities.
legend: Rot Flies buzz across the battlefield, consuming their enemies before moving on to fresh targets, their retreat covered by a repulsive cloud of decaying flesh.

name: Dispersed Formation
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".
legend: These warriors maintain a wide formation, enabling more precise strikes and greater battlefield control.

name: Relentless Attackers
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s FLYRIDER’S ARSENAL for attacks that target units contesting an objective.
legend: Blightlords descend from fume-choked skies to smash Nurgle’s most stubborn enemies to ruin.

name: Discomfiting Stench
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy WIZARD or PRIEST within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice.
  • If the target is a WIZARD and the roll exceeds the target’s power level, until the start of your next turn, each time a casting roll for the target includes 2 or more rolls of 1, 2 or more rolls of 2 or 2 or more rolls of 3, the spell is miscast.
  • If the target is a PRIEST and the roll exceeds the target’s power level, until the start of your next turn, each time your opponent makes an unmodified chanting roll of 1 or 2 for the target, the prayer fails, its effect is not resolved and your oppone
legend: So disturbing is the Blightkings’ odour that it can cause those with arcane or divine might to lose their focus.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Riddled With Disease
description: Effect: Each time a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE DAEMON unit wholly within 12" of this terrain feature uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 1 additional rally roll of D6. If that unit is a non-HERO unit, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6 instead.
legend: The vapours emanating from a Feculent Gnarlmaw are laden with plagues and disease that further empower the Garden’s denizens.

name: Rot-Blossom
description: Effect: Friendly ROTBRINGERS units have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of this terrain feature
legend: Nurgle’s mortal warriors revel in the decaying blossoms that fall from a Feculent Gnarlmaw.

name: Tendrils of Corruption
description:
Effect: For the rest of the phase, this terrain feature has a Move characteristic of 3" and can immediately move 3". It cannot move through or end that move within the combat ranges of enemy units and it cannot end that move on an objective or another terrain feature.

Designer’s Note: This terrain feature cannot use MOVE, RUN, RETREAT or CHARGE abilities.
legend: Blighted roots worm their way underground as the Feculent Gnarlmaw slowly drags itself across the land.

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: On The Hunt
description: Effect: This unit can use a RUN ability and still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: Unlike most undead, Dire Wolves have lost almost none of the swiftness they possessed in life and are forever hungry for warm flesh.

name: The Reliquary
description: Effect: When this unit is set up for the first time, place a stored energy dice beside it with the ‘1’ facing up. Each time a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS WIZARD successfully casts a spell while it is within 12" of this unit, increase the value of the stored energy dice beside this unit by 1 (to a maximum of 6).
legend: When the amethyst magics that thrum through a Mortis Engine reach a crescendo, its Corpsemaster custodian can unleash them as a lethal bow wave of power.

name: Nexus of Death Energy
description: Effect: When a friendly DEATHRATTLE or DEADWALKERS unit wholly within 12" of this unit is picked to be the target of the ‘Deathly Invocation’ ability, add D3 to the number of damage points that can be healed or the combined Health characteristic of models that can be returned.
legend: Mortis Engines are constructed around the remains of a slain Necromancer, who acts as a locus for the magics of the underworlds.

name: Wave of Power
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units within 10" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the value of this unit’s stored energy dice. Then, change the value of the stored energy dice back to 1.
legend: With arms held aloft, the Corpsemaster discharges the energy stored within the Mortis Engine, searing the life force from those nearby.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Skeletal Talons is 4.

name: Gaping Maw
description: Effect: Each time an attack made with this unit’s Fanged Maw scores a critical hit, that attack inflicts 6 mortal damage on the target unit and the attack sequence ends.
legend: This horrific creature bites a great chunk out of its prey – or even swallows it whole.

name: Sonic Assault
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit.

If 3 or more of the dice have the same value, for the rest of the turn, this unit has STRIKE-FIRST.

If 6 or more of the dice have the same value, for the rest of the turn, this unit has STRIKE-FIRST and the target cannot use commands.
legend: With a barrage of ear-piercing shrieks, the Terrorgheist drops from the sky to savage its stunned prey.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Undead Minions
description:
Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly DEATHRATTLE or DEADWALKERS unit:
  • This unit has WARD (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly DEATHRATTLE or DEADWALKERS unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Necromancers are obsessed with staving off death and will sacrifice any number of their resurrected servants to protect themselves.

name: Vanhel’s Danse Macabre
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DEATHRATTLE or DEADWALKERS unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: The undead are filled with magical energy that causes them to jerk forwards and attack with tireless, unnatural speed.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: Sanguine Blur
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy non-HERO units and more than 3" from all enemy HEROES.
legend: By the time this vampire’s prey notices the crimson streak heading towards them, it is far too late.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Wails of the Damned
description: Effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are within 12" of this unit.
legend: Unnerving howls follow this macabre carriage wherever it roams.

name: A Promising Concoction
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly VAMPIRE units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Sanguinarchs are obsessed with crafting the finest ichorous blends, and they can further refine such rich pickings to bolster their strength and that of their lackeys.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: Tactical Insight
description: Effect: Friendly DEATHRATTLE and DEADWALKERS units have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 6" of this unit.
legend: The vampire and their acolytes employ their divinatory abilities to manipulate and aid their undying servants.

name: Scrying Pool
description: Effect: If a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Redeploy’ command, you can pick another friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS unit wholly within 12" of this unit that has not used a command this phase to use the ‘Redeploy’ command immediately after the first has been resolved (this is an exception to Commands, 1.2). No command point is spent the second time that command is used.
legend: Within this pool of shimmering gore, the vampire foresees the shape of the battle to come.

name: A Promising Concoction
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly VAMPIRE units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The gory contents of the Coven Throne’s scrying bowl can be consumed by its riders and other vampires nearby, giving them a flush of power.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, subtract 3 from its power level.

name: The Staff of Power
description: Effect: Add 2 to casting rolls for this unit while it has not miscast any spells this turn. If this unit miscasts a spell, ignore the restriction that would stop this unit from casting any more spells this turn.
legend: Alakanash is capped with gems of purest grave-sand.

name: Hand of Dust
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy HERO or MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Hide a dice in one of your hands or under one of two appropriate containers. Your opponent must pick one of your hands or containers. If they pick the one hiding the dice, this ability has no effect. If they pick the empty one, the target is automatically destroyed.
legend: Nagash’s touch can turn a foe to a pile of dusty bones in moments.
