condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Invocation of Nagash
description:
Declare: This unit can cast this spell more than once per phase. Pick a visible unit wholly within 18" of this unit that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is an enemy unit, inflict D3 mortal damage on it. If the target is a friendly DEATH unit, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Return a number of slain models to the target unit with a combined Health characteristic of up to 3.
  • The target has WARD (5+) until the start of your next turn.
legend: In a storm of morbid sorcery, Nagash blasts his foes’ souls or re-knits his minions’ bodies.

name: Supreme Lord of the Undead
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO NON-UNIQUE DEATH unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Nagadron’s Claws is 3.

name: The Adevore
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO that was allocated any damage points inflicted by this unit’s Akmet-har this turn to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 5+, the target is automatically destroyed.
legend: Should Nagadron sense the impending doom of a foe wounded by the Dagger of Jet, it will fall upon them and hungrily feast on their soul.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Dark Mist
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly non-MONSTER SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Ignore modifiers to save rolls for the target (positive and negative) until the start of your next turn.
legend: Neferata summons tendrils of penumbral mist to coil around her minions, rendering their corporeal forms as insubstantial as smoke.

name: The Mortarch of Blood
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly DEATHRATTLE INFANTRY or DEADWALKERS INFANTRY units to be the targets.

Effect: Each target can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: Neferata has millennia of experience analysing and unpicking her foes’ ploys.

name: Twilight’s Allure
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS units while they are wholly within 6" of this unit.
legend: Neferata cloaks her minions in perpetual gloom.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Shordemaire’s Claws is 5.

name: Saint of Slaughter
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-MONSTER VAMPIRE unit that destroyed a unit this turn using a FIGHT ability and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the battle:
  • Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic.
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.
  • Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.
More than 1 effect can apply to a unit at the same time; however, each effect can only be applied to a unit once.
legend: Under the fierce scrutiny of Prince Vhordrai, vampires revel in displaying their martial skill.

name: Trail of Crimson
description:
Declare: This unit can make a pile-in move (even if it is not in combat). Then, if this unit is in combat, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Shordemaire ploughs into the enemy’s lines, its giant jaws tearing huge chunks from monsters or swallowing smaller foes whole.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Quickblood
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST until the start of your next turn.
legend: Vhordrai calls upon the power of the curse running through his veins to strike with impossible speed.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Draconic Claws is 5.

name: That Which Should Not Be
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, subtract 5 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: To behold such a majestic beast as a dragon in the grip of undeath evokes awe and abject terror in equal measure.

name: Bloodthirsty Dominance
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the target’s Health characteristic. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Vampire Lord and its monstrous mount single out worthy prey, tearing into them with relentless fury.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Riders of Ruin
description: Effect: When this unit moves, it can pass through models in enemy INFANTRY units and can pass through the combat ranges of enemy INFANTRY units, but it cannot end a move in combat unless specified in the ability used.
legend: Blood Knights trample clean over lesser foes to strike at more worthy challengers.

name: Trampled to Dust
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that this unit passed across this turn to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Infantrymen who find themselves in the Blood Knights’ path are crushed beneath the hooves of their Nightmare steeds.

name: Fleet and Fell
description: Effect: This unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by RETREAT abilities.
legend: Borne swiftly upon huge, tattered wings, Fell Bats are able to swoop down upon and break away from their prey with impunity, their frenzied flapping making it difficult to pin them down.

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Restless Dead
description: Effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
legend: Nagash denies the gift of eternal rest to those who defied his will.

name: Death’s Descent
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Vargheists swoop down upon their victims from the sky, suddenly overwhelming them in a flurry of claws and fangs.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Zarshia Bittersoul
description: Effect: While this unit’s Zarshia Bittersoul is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: Zarshia mastery over sorcery fuels her dark ambitions.

name: Ravagers of the Mortal Realms
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (5+) while it is contesting an objective you control.
legend: The profane acts of Khagra’s Ravagers are rewarded by the Dark Gods, who seek nothing more than the desecration of the Mortal Realms themselves.

name: Unnatural Edge
description:
Declare: If this MANIFESTATION charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: If any damage points are allocated to the target this phase by this MANIFESTATION’s combat attacks, ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the battle.
legend: The falchions carve through an enemy’s defences, and even powerful mystical enchantments are hewn asunder.

name: Crushing Coils
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO or MONSTER in combat with this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The coils of the Bloodwrack Viper wrap around an enemy, pinning them in place.

name: Bind and Bite
description: Effect: This unit’s combat attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 4+ if the target of those attacks has STRIKE-LAST.
legend: As the Bloodwrack Viper constricts, the victim is completely at the mercy of its deadly bite.

name: Locus of the Murder God
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: As the faithful look upon a Heart of Fury, they are imbued with Khaine’s undying rage, a wrath so all encompassing that not even pain can penetrate it.

name: Shadow Leap
description: Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Shadowstalkers can vanish and reappear at will as they navigate the Umbral Web.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Greatblade and Claws is 6.

name: Gorge on Excess
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SYBARITE unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Heal (6) the target.
legend: Glutos’s followers grow strong on acts of excess.

name: Crippling Famishment
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • Halve the target’s Move characteristic.
  • Halve run rolls and charge rolls for the target.
legend: With a snap of his fingers, Glutos paralyses his prey with immeasurable hunger.

name: The Grand Gourmand
description:
Effect: A different effect applies to friendly SYBARITE units each battle round while they are wholly within 12" of this unit, as shown below. The effects of all previous battle rounds also apply to those units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

Battle Round 1:
Starter: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for those units.

Battle Round 2:
Main: Add 3 to those units’ control scores.

Battle Round 3:
Dessert: Add 1 to hit rolls for those unit’s attacks.

Battle Round 4+:
Digestif: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of those units’ melee weapons.
legend: To Glutos, battle is a sumptuous banquet.

name: Disciples In Torment
description: Effect: While this unit is contesting an objective, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly SYBARITE units wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Slaanesh’s Sybarites flock around a battling Lord of Pain, eager to be rewarded with the choicest expressions of agony.

name: Share The Pain
description: Effect: Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit for a damage point inflicted by a combat attack, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Lords of Pain have mastered every kind of torment and are adept at gifting the most terrible of agonies to their foes.

name: Twisted Mirror
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 8" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, subtract 1 from save rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.
legend: A Twisted Mirror tests the spirit of any who gaze into it, weakening those who fall victim to its illusions.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Mist Lurkers
description: Effect: If this unit successfully casts a spell, until the start of your next turn, it can attack with its Shadowcloaked Claws.
legend: The mist-daemons that billow and slink around a Shardspeaker are empowered by arcane energies.

name: Powered By Vainglory
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn and the unmodified charge roll was 6+, the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Shardslash is equal to the unmodified charge roll.
legend: Sigvald is the epitome of vainglory, one of Slaanesh’s favourite sins. So great is his sense of superiority that few can stand before his prideful assaults.

name: The Glorious Reborn
description: Effect: This unit has Strike-first if it charged in the same turn.
legend: None can best Sigvald in hand-to-hand combat, or so he believes, and the Geld-Prince is determined to prove it.

name: Shardslash
description: Effect: Ward rolls cannot be made for damage points inflicted by this unit’s combat attacks.
legend: This majestic blade slices through sigmarite and arcane wards alike as if they were merely the thinnest silk.

name: Blissbrew Homonculus
description:
Effect: This unit’s Blissbrew Homonculus is a token. There is 1 Blissbrew Homonculus for every 10 models in this unit.

Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit while it has a Blissbrew Homonculus. If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove the Blissbrew Homonculus from the battlefield after the ATTACK ability has been resolved (the damage point is still inflicted).
legend: Blissbrew Homonculi bear censers from which clouds of sickly-sweet incense emanate.

name: Glory Shots
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s ranged weapons for attacks that target units contesting an objective you do not control.
legend: Nothing pleases the Blissbarb Seekers more than shooting down enemies encamped on a vital point, all without breaking stride.

name: Blissbarb Shafts
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Hadzu is on the battlefield, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+:
  • Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
  • The target is blissmarked for the rest of the turn.
legend: Barbed arrows speed through the air, guiding the Dread Pageant to vulnerable enemies.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Slicing Fervour
description: Effect: This unit has Strike-first while it is in combat with a blissmarked unit.
legend: As the blissbarb arrows dig deep, the Dread Pageant follow up in an ecstatic frenzy.

name: Paragons of Battle
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons while it is contesting an objective you do not control.
legend: Myrmidesh Painbringers seek to prove their martial prowess in the manic heart of battle.

name: Slaughter At Any Cost
description: Effect: If any damage points were allocated to this unit this turn, this unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: When stirred by the excesses of battle, Fiendbloods waste no time in hunting down their victims.

name: Unrivalled Velocity
description: Effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for this unit.
legend: Slickblade Seekers are obsessed with high-speed kills, tearing towards the foe with relentless haste.

name: Ego-driven Excess
description: Effect: If this unit did not charge this turn, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: These warriors refuse to be outdone by their comrades and use unorthodox techniques to best their foes.

name: Fiendish Reflexes
description: Effect: If this unit did not charge this turn, it has Ward (5+) while it is in combat.
legend: As the daemons possessing these mortals take control, their speed increases tenfold, making them almost impossible to hit.

name: Klaq-Trok
description: Effect: While this unit’s Klaq-Trok is on the battlefield, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit each phase.
legend: A warrior unparalleled in his primal ferocity and strength, Klaq-Trok crushes any who would defy the will of the Old Ones.

name: Kixi-Taka the Diviner
description: Effect: While this unit’s Kixi-Taka, the Diviner, is on the battlefield, it has Wizard (1).
legend: Though only a lowly priest in the complex rungs of the skink hierarchy, Kixi-Taka is looked upon with favour by his slann masters.

name: Otapatl’s Dartpipe
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Otapatl is on the battlefield, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Starblood Stalkers are bolstered by the Chameleon Skink Otapatl, who lurks unseen and fires poisoned darts at unsuspecting foes.

name: Equal Prodigies
description:
Declare: Pick whether Ellania will take the lead or Ellathor will take the lead.

Effect: If Ellania takes the lead, until the start of your next turn, add 1 to this unit’s power level and it has WARD (4+).

If Ellathor takes the lead, until the start of your next turn, add the current battle round number to the Damage characteristic of Altairi.
legend: On the battlefield, one twin will take the lead to aid their allies while the other stands guard.

name: Sudden Translocation
description:
Declare: This unit can only use this ability if any enemy models were slain this turn by this unit’s combat attacks.

Effect: Heal (D6) this unit. Then, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Should Ellathor use Altairi for too long, he will start to be overwhelmed by its arcane power and Ellania will be forced to transport him away from the battle, lest he be transformed into a creature of blazing fury.

name: Total Eclipse
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the first time an enemy unit within 18" of this unit uses a command, unless your opponent spends 1 additional command point, the command has no effect, it still counts as having been used and the command points spent to use the command are still lost.
legend: Ellania gestures towards a lunar body and causes a shadow to draw across it, distracting the foe.

name: Windleap
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly HURAKAN unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, each target can use a RUN ability and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: Windmages often accompany Windchargers into battle, allowing the cavalry archers to perform soaring leaps right over the heads of their enemies.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Transporting Vortex
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS unit wholly within 12" of this unit and not in combat to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The caster calls upon a magnanimous whirlwind to sweep up allies and carry them to safety.

name: Champion of the Lord Phoenix
description:
Effect: While a visible friendly VANARI unit is wholly within 12" of this unit:
  • You are treated as having 1 additional instance of Varinor, Rune of Strength depicted on your battle scripture for the purposes of the abilities on that unit’s warscroll.
  • If that unit is picked to be a target of the ‘Depict Rune’ ability, you can apply the enhanced effects of that ability to that unit as if you had an instance of Varinor, Rune of Strength depicted on your battle scripture.
legend: As a member of Tyrion’s inner circle, Lyrior has led countless armies to victory in the name of the Lord Phoenix and inspires all those around him as a result.

name: Focused Fury
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6. Add 2 to the roll if this unit is in combat.

Effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Lyrior channels his anger and the aetherquartz within his master-crafted panoply responds, imbuing him with the speed of Hysh.

name: Myari Lightcaller
description: Effect: While this unit’s Myari Lightcaller is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1) and the SCINARI keyword.
legend: With his deep wisdom and arcane prowess, few can withstand Myari’s might.

name: Dazzling Light
description:
Declare: Pick an objective that you do not control that is within 18" of and visible to this unit’s Myari Lightcaller, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units that are contesting that objective.
legend: Myari conjures a ball of blinding light, forcing foes to avert their gaze.

name: Realmscribe
description:
Effect: Replace 1 instance of a rune on your battle scripture with 1 of the following:
  • Varinor, Rune of Strength
  • Ydriliqi, Rune of the River
  • Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain
  • Oreali, Rune of the Wind
legend: Scinari Calligraves are the undisputed masters of the arcane art of tracing runes on the battlefield.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘%000020773Depict Rune%’ ability

name: Independent Operative
description: Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Loreseekers venture deep into unfamiliar lands searching for arcane artefacts and are adept at operating on their own without support.

name: Arcane Discovery
description:
Declare: Pick a non-FACTION TERRAIN terrain feature within 3" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, add 1 to casting rolls for units (friendly and enemy) while they are within 3" of the target.
legend: Scinari Loreseekers study all aspects of the realms to uncover hidden founts of power.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Call of the Winds
description:
Effect: While a visible friendly HURAKAN unit is wholly within 12" of this unit:
  • You are treated as having 1 additional instance of Oreali, Rune of the Wind depicted on your battle scripture for the purposes of the abilities on that unit’s warscroll.
  • If that unit is picked to be a target of the ‘Depict Rune’ ability, you can apply the enhanced effects of that ability to that unit as if you had an instance of Oreali, Rune of the Wind depicted on your battle scripture.
legend: In the presence of Sevireth, the winds awaken to give aid to their allies.

name: Spirit of the Wind
description: Effect: If this unit used a SHOOT ability this phase, this unit can move D6". Add 2 to the roll for each instance of Oreali, Rune of the Wind depicted on your battle scripture. It cannot end that move in combat.
legend: A Spirit of the Wind never remains in one place for long.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Searing Desert Winds
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 visible enemy units within 6" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll and subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Sevireth is the lord of burning-hot and parching desert winds. If Sevireth whirls around a foe for long enough, only desiccated corpses are left in his wake.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: World Banner
description: Effect: While a visible friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS unit is wholly within 12" of this unit, it can use the ‘Rally’ command even if it is in combat.
legend: This mighty standard is replete with symbols of great importance to the Lumineth, filling them with profound resolve and a hope for a brighter future for all the realms.

name: Shining Example
description: Effect: Each time a friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.
legend: The inspiring words and deeds of the Vanari Lord Regent instil a determination in their warriors never to yield.

name: Wall of Blades
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Vanari Auralan Wardens unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the wall of blades. Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with the wall of blades to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the wall of blades that is within 3" of the target. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Vanari Lord Regent is a master of anticipating where the enemy will strike and preparing their warriors accordingly.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Hunters of Majestic Beasts
description: Effect: The Damage characteristic of this unit’s Bow of the Wind’s Vengeance is 3 for attacks that target MONSTERS.
legend: With vindictive glee, wind spirits race across the battlefield in pursuit of mighty behemoths, seeking to lay them low with a well-placed shot.

name: Spirit of the Wind
description: Effect: If this unit used a SHOOT ability this phase, this unit can move D6". Add 2 to the roll for each instance of Oreali, Rune of the Wind depicted on your battle scripture. It cannot end that move in combat.
legend: A Spirit of the Wind never remains in one place for long.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Hurricane Winds
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The arrows of the Spirits of the Wind are followed by a blast of wind, throwing enemies to the ground.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Guided by the Winds
description: Effect: While you have 2 or more instances of Oreali, Rune of the Wind depicted on your battle scripture, add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s Windcharger Bows.
legend: The Windchargers’ arrows are lofted by benevolent winds and sped toward to their targets.

name: Guardians of the Scinari
description: Effect: While any friendly SCINARI HEROES are wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those friendly units have WARD (5+).
legend: It is the duty of the Bladelords to safeguard the Lumineth’s spellcasters, allowing their charges to weave conjurations free from the distraction of physical combat.

name: Masters of Combat
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Sunmetal Blades for each instance of Varinor, Rune of Strength depicted on your battle scripture.
legend: The Bladelords have long meditated upon the rune of Varinor to improve their martial prowess.

name: Cleansing Rituals
description: Effect: While this terrain feature has a Shrine Guardian, you can re-roll the casting roll for that spell.
legend: These shrines are instrumental to the Lumineth’s efforts in purging Chaos from the Mortal Realms.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: You declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> ability for a <ky>LUMINETH REALM-LORDS</ky> unit wholly within 12" of this terrain feature

name: Shrine Guardian
description:
Effect: While this terrain feature has a Shrine Guardian:
  • This terrain feature has a Move characteristic of 6" and can use non-command non-CHARGE MOVE abilities as if it were a unit. It cannot end a MOVE ability within the combat range of an enemy unit.
  • The Shrine Guardian cannot use MOVE abilities and remains on this terrain feature each time it moves.
  • Instead of measuring range and visibility to the Shrine Guardian, measure to this terrain feature instead.
  • All attacks that would target the Shrine Guardian target this terrain feature instead.

If this terrain feature is destroyed, before removing it from the battlefield,
legend: Protected from attacks, the Shrine Guardian can move the metalith with but a fleeting thought.

name: Enter the Shrine
description:
Declare: If this terrain feature does not have a Shrine Guardian, pick a friendly LUMINETH REALM‐LORDS INFANTRY HERO within 3" of it and not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Place the target on this terrain feature. The target is now a Shrine Guardian (see ‘Shrine Guardian’).
legend: Worthy Lumineth take up position within a Shrine Luminor to help to cleanse the realms.

name: Exit the Shrine
description: Effect: If this terrain feature has a Shrine Guardian that was not placed on it this turn, set up the Shrine Guardian on the battlefield wholly within 6" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer a Shrine Guardian.
legend: The Guardian floats down to the battlefield to rejoin the fray.

name: Empowered Through Excruciation
description: Effect: Ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to each friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit wholly within 12" of this unit in each phase.
legend: Krulghast Cruciators draw power from the suffering of those around them, becoming beacons of death magic that make nearby Nighthaunt more difficult to banish.

name: GHOSTLY PATHS
description:
Declare: This spell can be cast by the same WIZARD more than once per phase. Pick the Lady Olynder in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly unit in this Regiment of Renown that is wholly within 12" of them, that is not in combat and that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Guided by the sorrowful wails of the dead, the Sorrowmourn Choir rapidly traverse the battlefield along unseen pathways.

name: INSUBSTANTIAL
description: Effect: Ignore negative modiers to save rolls for units in this Regiment of Renown
legend: Nighthaunt spirits are nigh impossible to land a blow upon.

name: HARVESTERS OF SORROW
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with a unit in this Regiment of Renown to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: For the handmaidens of the Unrequited Queen, only the choicest despair can alleviate their torment.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Aura of Purity
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS units have Ward (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Gardus’s faith is so strong when he is in full flow that even Nurgle’s garden was unable to corrupt him.

name: Saintly Assault
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 visible friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS INFANTRY units wholly within 6" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to charge rolls for the targets.
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons.
legend: Calling upon the celestial grace of Sigmar, the lords of the Steel Souls engage the foe with zealous wrath.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Charge Phase

name: Keeper of the Corpse-gardens
description:
Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly Deadwalker Zombies unit:
  • This unit has WARD (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly Deadwalker Zombies unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: In battle, Gorslav can call upon his Deadwalker minions to throw themselves into enemy attacks and blunt their blades.

name: Arise! Arise!
description: Effect: When resolving the effect of the ‘Endless Legions’ ability, set up the replacement unit wholly within 3" of this unit instead of wholly within 12" and more than 3" from all enemy units instead of more than 9", even if it is not your movement phase. The replacement unit can still use CHARGE abilities this turn.
legend: With a rasping cry, the Gravekeeper beckons his freshly buried victims to rise as undead and defend the walls of Ulfenkarn.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared the ‘%000015893Endless Legions%’ ability and picked a friendly %000004739Deadwalkers% unit to be the target

name: Master of the Pack
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, you can re-roll charge rolls for friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: His voice redolent with supernatural power, Radukar the Wolf barks the command to charge and his undead minions hurl themselves at the enemy.

name: Call to the Hunt
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly DEATHRATTLE and DEADWALKERS units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: With an exultant howl, Radukar leads the charge, his surge of bloodlust filling nearby undead minions with unholy impetus.

name: Trusted Lieutenant
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Deathly Invocation’ ability even if a different friendly unit has already used it this turn, but units that have already been picked to be targets of that ability this turn cannot be picked to be targets.
legend: Radukar has granted Torgillius the resources with which to continue his research. In return, the Chamberlain offers his necromantic expertise and the secrets gathered for him by his vermin spies.

name: Failing Fortitude
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks.
legend: Ruthlessly targeting his prey’s weaknesses, Torgillius hurls bolts of enervating energy to drain their strength and resilience.

name: Disciplined Advance
description: Effect: Each time you make a run roll for a friendly Deathrattle Skeletons unit wholly within 12" of this unit, you can change that roll to a 4.
legend: Under Halgrim’s command, his warriors advance ceaselessly in regimented lockstep to crush the foes of Ulfenkarn.

name: Echoes of the Watch
description: Effect: Pick a friendly Deathrattle Skeletons unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Beneath the sightless gaze of Halgrim, the long-dead garrison of Mournhold act with a disturbing semblance of the martial training they prided themselves on in life.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: A Pact Maintained
description: Effect: While a friendly Radukar the Wolf or Radukar the Beast is within this unit’s combat range, both that unit and this unit have WARD (5+).
legend: The undead mercenaries of Kos are as loyal to Radukar in death as they were in life.

name: Cling to the Shadows
description: Effect: While each model in this unit is within 1" of any terrain features, this unit cannot be targeted by shooting attacks unless the attacking model is within 9" of it.
legend: With quicksilver speed, these creatures scale terrain in a matter of moments, hiding in the shadows while they prepare to strike.

name: Shadowfast
description: Effect: is unit can use a MOVE ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: Vyrkos Blood-born move with savage swiftness.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Enemy Turn

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Bounding Haste
description: Effect: Add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for this unit, to a maximum of 3. In addition, when this unit uses a CHARGE ability, it can pass through terrain features and enemy models as if it had FLY.
legend: Three times the height of a man and with supernatural strength and reflexes, a Vargskyr covers ground with terrifying speed.

name: Skeleton Legion
description: Effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
legend: As necromantic energies blanket the battlefield, long-dead warriors stagger to their feet once more, eye sockets aglow with killing light.

name: Come Then, Amuse Us
description:
Effect: If this unit is in combat with any enemy HEROES, roll a D3 and then pick a number of effects from the list below equal to the roll:
  • Add 1 to save rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn.
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
  • Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Prince Duvalle and his courtiers scour every corner of the Mortal Realms in the hopes of finding worthy opponents. Alas, few measure up to the vampires’ lofty standards.

name: First of the Vyrkos
description: Effect: Add 3 to the control scores of friendly Radukar the Wolf, Radukar the Beast, Ivya Volga, Lady Annika and Kritza units while they are wholly within 18" of this unit.
legend: Belladamma is the matriarch of the Vyrkos bloodline, and she commands their conquests with calculating efficiency.

name: Under a Killing Moon
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 visible friendly Dire Wolves units wholly within 18" of this unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons (including Companion weapons).
  • The targets can ignore the effect of the ‘Beast’ ability.
legend: Beneath the light of a blood moon, Volga’s wolves attack with mad-eyed ferocity.

name: Wolfguard
description:
Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly Dire Wolves unit:
  • This unit has WARD (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly Dire Wolves unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Belladamma’s lupine allies will unthinkingly sacrifice themselves to protect their savage mistress.

name: Scurrying Retreat
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: Just when a foe has him cornered, Kritza transfigures into a swarm of scurrying rats, only to rematerialise elsewhere and drive his blade into an enemy’s back.

name: The Verminous Court
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target, then pick an artefact of power that the target has.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target no longer has that artefact of power.
legend: Kritza believes himself an appreciator of the finer things in undeath, and his rodent servants are adept in snatching away trinkets and treasures for his collection.

name: Supernatural Speed
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve lying in wait. It has now been deployed.
legend: Lady Annika’s near-permanent state of starvation drives her ahead of the main battlelines, ready to pounce as soon as prey draws near.

name: Starving Nightmare
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is lying in wait.

Effect: Set up this unit wholly within enemy territory and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Unable to contain her hunger any longer, Lady Annika springs forth from hiding, eager to glut herself on the blood of the foe.

name: Kiss of the Blade Proboscian
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that was allocated any damage points inflicted by this unit’s combat attacks this turn to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the battle.
legend: This pitted and corroded blade should not endure – and yet, it does. The same cannot be said for anything scratched by its mouldering point.

name: Nightmare’s Miasma
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: The strange curse of the Vengorians sees shining blades and hallowed relics crumble and patinate in their presence.

name: The Queen’s Dictat
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly non-UNIQUE SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS MONSTER wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Pick 1 of the target’s melee weapons. If the target has any Companion melee weapons, you must pick 1 of those. Add D3 to the Attacks characteristic of that weapon for the rest of the turn.
legend: Lauka summons an arcane blood-mist that drives a beast among her brood into a terrible frenzy.

name: Impaling Talons
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is equal to or less than the target’s Health characteristic, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Lauka Vai thrusts her massive talons into her prey with lethal precision, inflicting horrendous wounds upon them.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: The Beast Will Out
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, it can move D6". It can move into combat.
legend: In his hulking bestial form, Radukar is a frenzied abomination concerned only with tearing apart everything in his path.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Call to the Hunt
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly DEATHRATTLE and DEADWALKERS units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: With an exultant howl, Radukar leads the charge, his surge of bloodlust filling nearby undead minions with unholy impetus.

name: Armour of the Night
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for attacks that target this unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: With a mere thought, Radukar the Beast summons wisps of pure darkness to form a penumbral shield around his body, protecting him from harm.

name: Nightmare’s Miasma
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: The strange curse of the Vengorians sees shining blades and hallowed relics crumble and patinate in their presence.

name: Festering Feast
description: Effect: If any damage points were allocated to enemy units by this unit’s attacks this turn, Heal (D3) this unit and each other friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS MONSTER unit wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Vengorians bid their monstrous broods indulge in gory feasts even as battle rages.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Scything Talons
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: As the Vengorian Lord crashes into the foe, it lays about itself with frenzied sweeps of its huge talons, cutting down droves of lesser foes.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: King of Shambling Bones
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DEATHRATTLE unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) for the rest of the turn.
legend: In the presence of their sovereign, the footsoldiers of the Deathrattle kingdoms assume a sliver of their former warlike vigour.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Ancient Strategies
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO DEATHRATTLE INFANTRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Death does not rob a Wight King of their strategic genius, and they direct their undead thralls with great skill.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Ashigaroth’s Claws is 3.

name: Wind of Death
description:
Declare: Pick a point on the battlefield within 18" of the caster, pick up to 3 enemy units within 6" of that point and visible to the caster to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Mannfred conjures a howling gust of spectral wind that tears the souls from the bodies of those who feel its chilling bite.

name: The Mortarch of Night
description: Effect: The unit using the ‘Redeploy’ command can move into combat when using that ability.
legend: Mannfred’s ancient cunning is rightly feared throughout the Mortal Realms.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009837Redeploy%’ command for a <ky>SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS</ky> unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: The Sword of Unholy Power
description: Effect: If this unit has slain any enemy models this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly DEATHRATTLE and DEADWALKERS units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Gheistvor drinks deep of its victims’ souls, bolstering the power of Mannfred’s risen minions.

name: Ashigaroth’s Hunger
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Mannfred’s dread abyssal is afflicted by a hunger as indiscriminate as it is unending, and it strikes with lightning-fast speed to attempt in vain to satiate that hunger.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Mindless Ferocity
description: Effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. On a 6+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Heedless of pain and knowing nothing of fear, Deadwalker Zombies are relentless in their efforts to slay the foe, and they will continue to hack, claw and bite even as they meet their final end.

name: Nadirite Bow
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Nohem is on the battlefield, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: With grim efficiency, the warrior Nohem fires shot after shot into the enemy lines with his nadirite bow, felling foes left and right.

name: Mir Kainan
description: Effect: While this unit’s Mir Kainan is on the battlefield, this unit has Wizard (1), Relentless Discipline (2) and can be picked as the target of the ‘Immortal Elite’ ability as if it had the HERO keyword.
legend: Mir Kainan is a master of necromancy as well as a formidable fighter.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of The Dread Mace is 4 and this unit has a Control characteristic of 10.

name: Rampaging Destruction
description:
Effect: If this unit charged this phase, pick 1 of the following effects:

  • Roll a dice for each enemy unit within 1" of this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
  • Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit and roll 2D6. On a 7, this ability has no effect. Otherwise, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the results on the dice used for the 2D6 roll multiplied together. For example, a 2D6 roll of 2 and 6 would inflict 12 mortal damage (2 × 6).
legend: Kragnos rampages through the press of his foes, his hooves flattening all in his path.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Avatar of Destruction
description: Effect: If this unit would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Kragnos is the embodiment of Ghur’s relentless ferocity. No single strike can lay him low.

name: The Shield Inviolate
description: Effect: If this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 3+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per SPELL ability.
legend: Tuskbreaker has the power to guard Kragnos against even the most potent magical force.

name: The End of Empires
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for friendly DESTRUCTION units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit, to a maximum of 3.
legend: Where Kragnos goes, the hordes of Destruction follow.

name: Alarielle’s Song
description: Effect: Friendly SYLVANETH units have WARD (6+) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit. Subtract 1 from ward rolls for enemy units while they are within 12" of this unit.
legend: To the Sylvaneth, the sound that emanates from a Warsong Revenant’s flute is sweet and uplifting. To their foes, it is a sonic assault of devastating potency.

name: Rousing Accompaniment
description: Effect: Re-roll that chanting roll.
legend: The harmonies played by the Warsong Revenants entwine with and enhance the spirit-song.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You made an unmodified %000010763chanting roll% of 1 for a %000021836SYLVANETH PRIEST% wholly within 12" of this unit

name: Joyous Battle Fury
description:
Effect: If any enemy models were slain by this unit’s combat attacks this turn, Heal (D3) this unit, then place a battle fury token next to it.

Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Impaling Talons for each battle fury token it has until the end of the next turn.
legend: Once Dexcessa begins to fight, they become invigorated by the glorious thrill of combat.

name: Fleeting Dance of Death
description: Effect: This unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by RETREAT abilities.
legend: Dexcessa rarely stays locked in combat in one place for long, flitting swiftly all over the battlefield and bringing death wherever they alight.

name: Scion of Slaanesh
description: Effect: While a friendly Synessa is on the battlefield, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit.
legend: Despite their mutual enmity, Dexcessa and Synessa are inextricably connected, giving them an advantage over their foes.

name: Redolence of Violence
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick up to D3 other friendly non-HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The beautiful scent of Dexcessa’s savagery permeates through the Hedonite ranks.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Enthralling Splendour
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: A mere glance at Synessa’s magnificence leaves those nearby captivated.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Voice of Slaanesh
description:
Declare: Pick a visible unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: If the target is a friendly unit, add 5 to the target’s control score for the rest of the turn. If the target is an enemy unit, subtract 5 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: Possessing all the Dark Prince’s skill in intoxicating oratory, Synessa can reduce an enemy warrior to a paranoid wreck or lift an ally to a state of rapturous obedience.

name: Progeny of Slaanesh
description: Effect: While a friendly Dexcessa is on the battlefield, add 1 to this unit’s power level.
legend: Despite their mutual enmity, Synessa and Dexcessa are inextricably connected, giving them an advantage over their foes.

name: Whispers of Doubt
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy HERO within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for combat attacks that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Synessa whispers words that reveal the enemy’s darkest desires, breaking their concentration and leaving them vulnerable to attack.

name: Weapons of Banishment
description: Effect: Double the Damage characteristic of this unit’s weapons for attacks that target WIZARDS, PRIESTS and MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: Inscribed with the holy writ of Sigmar and inlaid with nullstone and silver, the weapons of the Ven Densts are anathema to spellcasters and their works, banishing all forms of arcane energy in a flash.

name: Weapons of Banishment
description: Effect: Double the Damage characteristic of this unit’s weapons for attacks that target WIZARDS, PRIESTS and MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: Inscribed with the holy writ of Sigmar and inlaid with nullstone and silver, the weapons of the Ven Densts are anathema to spellcasters and their works, banishing all forms of arcane energy in a flash.

name: Guardian and Mentor
description: Effect: While a friendly Doralia ven Denst is wholly within this unit’s combat range, this unit has Strike-first and both this unit and that Doralia ven Denst have Ward (5+).
legend: When faced with an imminent threat, Galen will protect his daughter at all costs.

name: Elathain’s Lurelight
description: Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, return a number of slain models to this unit equal to the roll.
legend: Like all Isharann Soulrenders, Elathain possesses a mystical lure that can trap the souls of slain opponents so that they can be used to resurrect fallen allies.

name: Soulnet
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Elathain Ill-fated is on the battlefield, pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: A soulnet can be used to ensnare a victim, ensuring they cannot escape their doom at the hands of the Soulrender.

name: Hold the Shieldwall
description: Effect: If this unit did not charge this turn and is in combat with an enemy unit that charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 4+, this unit has Strike-first for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Vindictor retinues form the unyielding shieldwalls upon which the forces of ruin shatter.

name: Indomitable Loreseekers
description:
Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit when it uses a SUMMON ability and add 1 to banishment rolls for this unit.

Enemy MANIFESTATIONS cannot pass through or end any move within this unit’s combat range unless they started that move within this unit’s combat range.

This unit has Ward (4+) against mortal damage inflicted by MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: The thick tomes carried by Knight-Arcanums are filled with the magical secrets they have learnt, including how to resist the raging sorcerous energies of the realms.

name: Loyal Gryph-hound
description:
Effect: This unit’s Gryph-hound is a token. This unit has Ward (5+) while its Gryph-hound is on the battlefield.

If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove its Gryph-hound from the battlefield after the ATTACK ability has been resolved (the damage point is still inflicted).
legend: The Gryphhound that accompanies the Lord-Imperatant is the most faithful guard.

name: Guided by Lightning
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS units wholly within 12" of this unit that were set up this turn using the ‘Scions of the Storm’ ability to be the targets.

Effect: Each target can immediately move D3". The targets cannot move into combat during any part of that move.
legend: With the aid of their enchanted stormcaller baton, a Lord-Imperatant can direct the arrival of their brethren with the utmost precision.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: The Prime Huntress
description: Effect: Double the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Thengavar for attacks that target MONSTERS.
legend: Celestial strength, lifetimes of experience and the power of the spear Thengavar see even the most behemothic of terrors swiftly fall before Yndrasta’s fury.

name: Dazzling Radiance
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to the control scores of friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Yndrasta’s god-touched brilliance casts a protective aura of light around nearby Stormcasts.

name: On Wings of Brilliance
description: Effect: Add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for this unit, to a maximum of 3.
legend: Yndrasta soars across the battlefield to strike at the heart of Sigmar’s enemies.

name: Blazing Impact
description:
Declare: If this unit was set up this turn using the ‘Scions of the Storm’ ability, pick up to 3 enemy units within 10" of it to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Annihilators arrive upon the field with devastating force, twin tailed trails streaking behind them as an earth-shattering shock-wave blasts apart the foes of Sigmar.

name: Brace for Impact
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit. If any of the rolls are a 6, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: Annihilators brace behind their mighty shields to hold off even the most ferocious charge.

name: Soul-bonded
description: Effect: Pick a friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS HERO to be this unit’s soul-bonded charge for the rest of the battle. This unit can use this ability while it is in reserve.
legend: Praetors are exemplary bodyguards, linked to their assigned wards at an arcane, spiritual level.

name: Soul-forged Guardians
description: Effect: While this unit’s soul-bonded charge is within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and that soul-bonded charge have Ward (5+).
legend: Praetors will protect their soul-bonded charges with every ounce of their being.

name: All Shall Burn
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Flameburst Pots and Infernal Fires for attacks that target WAR MACHINES or INFANTRY units with 10 or more models.
legend: Hungry flames spread through the enemy’s ranks and engulf their war machines as the Scions bombard the foe with burning projectiles.

name: Scare Taktikz
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by non-HERO units that target this unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Gutrippaz use all manner of means to unnerve and soften up their foes before the first blow is struck, from gruesome ‘skareshields’ to ululating battle cries that echo from the boggy mists.

name: All Part of Da Plan
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly KRULEBOYZ unit wholly within 9" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 3 to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: Kruleboyz tend to be very impressed by a Killaboss’s kunnin’ feats – so long as the boss has a plan, they are willing to face down even the most unlikely odds.

name: That’s Ours, Ya Gitz!
description: Effect: While this unit is contesting an objective you do not control, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly KRULEBOYZ INFANTRY units wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Kruleboyz are raiders by nature, and the Killabosses are expert at getting the boyz all worked up when they see territory or loot that they’d love to get their dirty hands on.

name: Stab-grot
description: Effect: This unit’s Stab-grot is a token. If this unit’s Stab-grot has been removed, it can no longer attack with its Stab-grot’s Shiv and it cannot use the ‘Unleash the Stab-grot!’ ability.

name: Unleash the Stab-grot!
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target. Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
  • This unit has WARD (5+) for the rest of the turn.
After resolving either effect, remove this unit’s Stab-grot from the battlefield.
legend: A Stab-grot isn’t just good for stabbin’ – they double up as an effective living shield when things get dicey.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Keep ’Em In Line
description: Effect: If this unit is wholly within 12" of the unit using the ‘All-out Attack’ command, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by that unit for the rest of the phase.
legend: With a threatening glare and barked commands, the Killaboss keeps their boyz in formation.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009661All-out Attack%’ command for a friendly %000011275KRULEBOYZ INFANTRY% unit

name: Power of Kragnos
description: Effect: Friendly KRULEBOYZ units have WARD (6+) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: When the energy of the Waaagh! hangs thick in the air, the Belcha-banna channels the mighty power of Kragnos himself, emboldening the Kruleboyz around it and warding off harmful sorcery.

name: Breath of the Mire-drakes
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 1, this ability has no effect. On a 2-5, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. On a 6, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Belcha-bannas are typically built around the severed tongue of a mire-drake, creatures so vile that even after death, their remains belch forth clouds of soulshrivelling gas.

name: Scrap-bang
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+:

  • Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
  • This unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: By detonating their scrap-grenades at the feet of the foe, Hobgrot Slittaz can scarper off to a safe distance.

name: Man-skewer Crossbows
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses a SHOOT ability, pick either the Hasty Shot or Aimed Shot weapon characteristics for all the attacks it makes with its Man-skewer Crossbows.
legend: Boltboyz either unleash quick volleys at nearby foes or take careful aim at far-off targets.

name: Pick ’Em Off
description: Effect: If this unit has not used a MOVE ability this turn and was not set up this turn, add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Boltboyz prefer to remain stationary to fire carefully aimed shots.

name: The Pendulum Swings
description: Effect: This MANIFESTATION cannot use CHARGE or FIGHT abilities. In addition, when this MANIFESTATION moves, it must move in a straight line either in the direction in which the tip of the pendulum blade is pointing or in the opposite direction to the direction in which the tip of the pendulum blade is pointing.
legend: The Aethervoid Pendulum arcs across the battlefield in a straight line.

name: Scything Blade
description: Effect: This MANIFESTATION can move a distance up to its Move characteristic in one direction (see ‘The Pendulum Swings’). It can pass through models during that move and can end that move in combat. Then, pick up to 3 enemy units that this MANIFESTATION passed across during that move or that are within 1⁄2" of it to be the targets. Roll a dice for each targets. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: A single pass of the Pendulum’s blade can decimate enemy ranks, sending out gory showers of severed limbs and decapitated heads.

name: Burning Up
description: Effect: Each time this MANIFESTATION uses a SHOOT ability, after that ability has been resolved, allocate 1 damage point to this MANIFESTATION (ward rolls cannot be made for that damage point).
legend: The Burning Head can unleash a torrent of flame upon the enemy, but doing so quickly extinguishes its essence.

name: Mechanisms of Time
description:
Effect: If there are any friendly WIZARDS within 3" of this MANIFESTATION, pick 1 of the following effects:

Increase Time Flow: Until the start of your next turn, you can re roll charge rolls for friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of this MANIFESTATION.

Decrease Time Flow: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly WIZARDS while they are wholly within 12" of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: The workings of the Chronomantic Cogs show the passing of seconds and aeons alike. By manipulating the Cogs, a spellcaster can speed up time around them, allowing warriors to quickly close with their enemies, or slow time’s passage so as to avoid incoming blows.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: Bounteous Healing
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit within 3" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Heal (3) the target.
legend: Squirming into the gaps between rent flesh and broken bones, the insects of the Emerald Lifeswarm seal the wounds of the living.

name: Restored Vigour
description: Effect: Heal (3) this MANIFESTATION.
legend: A Lifeswarm can use the healing powers of Ghyran to rejuvenate itself as well as its allies.

name: Multiple Parts
description:
Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and both its parts are removed from play.
Each time this MANIFESTATION moves, both its parts must end within 9" of each other.
Each part of this MANIFESTATION is armed with Tendrils of Light and Shadow.

name: Tendrils of Shadow and Light
description: Effect: Enemy units cannot use commands while they are within 3" of either part of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: Where the Shadow Geminid trails a noxious dark mist populated by unsettling illusions, the Light Geminid radiates incinerating light and bestows mind-destroying truths.

name: Harbinger of Horror
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that was targeted by this MANIFESTATION’s shooting attacks this phase to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is less than the number of models in the target unit that were slain this phase, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: Horrorghasts devour the terror of their victims, spitting it back out in waves of disconsolate dread.

name: Traverse the Tides of Death
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly INFANTRY WIZARD HERO within 3" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: This MANIFESTATION can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through models during that move but cannot end that move in combat. Then, remove the target from the battlefield and set them up again on the battlefield within 3" of this MANIFESTATION and not in combat. Then, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Soulseeker knows the location of every spirit in the realms and can guide a spellcaster to that which they seek. Yet no journey is ever free...

name: Necrotic Vortex
description:
Effect: Give this MANIFESTATION 1 maelstrom point each time:
  • This MANIFESTATION is set up.
  • A unit successfully casts a spell while it is within 12" of this MANIFESTATION.
  • A model is slain within 12" of this MANIFESTATION.
This MANIFESTATION can have a maximum of 6 maelstrom points at once.
legend: Sorcery and souls are sucked into the Maelstrom as it prowls the battlefield.

name: Morbid Detonation
description:
Declare: You must, and can only, use this ability if this unit has 6 maelstrom points. Pick each unit (friendly and enemy) within 9" of it to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Then, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed.
legend: Having gorged itself on magic and the howling spirits of the dead, the Maelstrom detonates in a nova of devastating energy.

name: Blinding Light
description: Effect: This MANIFESTATION cannot be targeted by shooting attacks. In addition, a unit cannot be targeted by shooting attacks if it is impossible to draw a straight line from a model in the attacking unit to a model in the target unit without that line passing across this MANIFESTATION.
legend: The radiant beams projected from this barrier confound the aim of all within sight of it.

name: Pull of the Nadir
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for friendly and enemy units while they are within 3" of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: To gaze upon the Purple Sun of Shyish is to feel oneself wither and waste away.

name: End Given Form
description: Effect: This MANIFESTATION can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through models during that move but cannot end that move in combat. Then, pick up to 3 enemy units that this MANIFESTATION passed across during that move to be the targets. Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: All those touched by the dire rays of the Purple Sun meet their final fate, their bodies crystallised and their souls ripped away to Shyish.

name: Dancing Blades
description: Effect: Ward rolls cannot be made for damage points inflicted by this MANIFESTATION’s attacks.
legend: Cantrips and other eldritch barriers cannot save one from the keen edged blades of this manifestation.

name: Ravening Hunger
description:
Declare: If this MANIFESTATION charged this turn, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll 10 dice. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Rampaging across the battlefield in a blur of bestial motion, Ravenak’s Gnashing Jaws are indiscriminate in their hunger.

name: Multiple Parts
description: Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and both its parts are removed from play.

name: Deathly Passage
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 6" of one part of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield wholly within 6" of the other part of this MANIFESTATION and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Those who pass across a Soulscream Bridge travel the tides of deathly magic, avoiding physical obstructions.

name: Multiple Parts
description: Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and all its parts are removed from play.

name: Bound for the Great Oubliette
description:
Declare: For each part of this MANIFESTATION, you can pick an enemy unit within 3" of that part to be the targets. You cannot pick the same unit to be the target of this ability more than once per turn.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
  • Subtract a number of inches equal to the roll from the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn.
legend: These manacles latch onto not just the bodies of combatants but their souls, draining them of vigour until they are at last dragged into the yawning cells of the Great Oubliette.

name: Pulled to the Grave
description: Effect: This MANIFESTATION can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through models during that move but cannot end that move in combat. Then, you can pick an enemy unit that this MANIFESTATION passed across during that move to be the target. Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Warriors caught in the path of a Suffocating Gravetide are buffeted by churning earth and dragged down by the spectral, restless dead.

name: Multiple Parts
description: Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and both its parts are removed from play.

name: Arcane Passage
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly WIZARD within 3" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: The next time the target uses a non-SUMMON SPELL ability this phase, add 1 to the casting value of that spell. When picking targets for that spell, you can measure range and visibility from either part of this MANIFESTATION instead of from the caster, and your opponent can measure range and visibility to either part of this MANIFESTATION instead of to the caster for the purposes of the ‘Unbind’ ability.
legend: When looking upon an Umbral Spellportal, those versed in magic see a shadowy reflection of what lies on the other side of its twinned construct; while physical matter cannot travel through the portal, aetheric energy knows no such restriction.

name: Shoddy Wing-Like Gizmos
description: Effect: You can re-roll hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks this turn, but for each hit roll that is re-rolled, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Doom Diver for the rest of the turn.
legend: With a bit of frantic flapping and ‘leanin’ into da wind’, Doom Divers can attempt to correct their trajectory mid-flight, though doing so slows their momentum somewhat.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Shot and Shell
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses a SHOOT ability, if it is in a fortified position, pick either the Cannonball or Grapeshot weapon characteristics for all the attacks it makes with its Great Cannon. If it is not in a fortified position, use the Grapeshot weapon characteristics.
legend: The engineers of the Ironweld Arsenal have developed different ammunition for the Great Cannon to fire.

name: Fortify Position
description: Effect: This unit establishes a fortified position and remains in a fortified position until it either uses a MOVE ability or is removed from the battlefield. While this unit is in a fortified position, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit.
legend: This cumbersome war machine is wheeled into position with its heavy oaken shield facing the foe, protecting the crew from enemy fire.

name: Skewering Bolts
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Beast-skewer Bolts is 6 if the target is a MONSTER.
legend: When sighting a particularly large target, the crew load vicious skewering bolts that can tear through even the mightiest of beasts.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Pick ’Em Off
description: Effect: If this unit has not used a MOVE ability this turn and was not set up this turn, add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Once set up in position, the Beast-skewer Killbow takes its time to line up every shot with deadly results.

name: Tear Limb From Limb
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit within 1" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: Mirebrute Troggoths take great delight plucking foes from the enemy ranks and pulling off their limbs one by one.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Regeneration
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Troggoths are able to regrow injured flesh almost as quickly as it is harmed.

name: Breaka-harness
description:
Effect: Make a breaka-roll of D3.
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on this unit equal to the breaka-roll.
  • Double the breaka-roll and add that value to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Mirebrute’s Clubs for the rest of the turn.
legend: When a Breaka-boss enters combat, they yank their Mirebrute Troggoth’s harness savagely to get the beast good and angry!

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Killabeak’s Talons and Beak is 5.

name: Strangle Hex
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the target’s Health characteristic, to a maximum of 10. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Coiling tendrils of magic burst from Gobsprakk’s outstretched hand, choking the life from the target.

name: Crush to Death
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: Gobsprakk’s mount, Killabeak, takes wicked delight in crushing smaller foes in its talons.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Mork Sez No!
description: Effect: Each time this unit unbinds a spell, inflict D3 mortal damage on the caster. If the unbinding roll was 10+, inflict D6 mortal damage on the caster instead.
legend: As enemy wizards foolishly attempt to weave their magics, Gobsprakk summons tapewyrm sguigs into their guts and fills their minds with so much Waaagh! energy that they sometimes explode!

name: Screamin’ Mandrakk
description: Effect: This unit uses the ‘Unbind’ ability but the unbinding roll is 3D6 instead of 2D6.
legend: The awful sound this plant emits wreaks havoc on the concentration of enemy wizards.
condition: Once Per Battle, Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> ability

name: Battle Damage
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Vulcha’s Talons and Beak is 5.

name: Vulcha Dive
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the unmodified charge roll. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Corpse-rippa crashes down into the enemy’s ranks from on high, tearing into reeling warriors with cruel relish.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Commanding View
description: Effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.
legend: From his position high above the battlefield, a Killaboss riding a Corpse-rippa Vulcha can keep a careful eye on the battle, guiding the movements of their ladz.
condition: Reaction: You declared the ‘%000009837Redeploy%’ command for a friendly %000014827Gutrippaz% unit wholly within 12" of this unit

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Sludgeraker’s Talons is 4.

name: Sludgeraker Venom
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: That unit has the SLUDGERAKER VENOM keyword for the rest of the turn.
legend: The underbelly of a Sludgeraker Beast is coated in rotting detritus, encrusted marsh-slime and the beast’s own secretions – a highly virulent mixture that is used by nearby Kruleboyz to coat their weapons.

name: Festering Wounds
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units that had any damage points allocated to them this turn by attacks made by this unit or a friendly unit with the SLUDGERAKER VENOM keyword to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
  • Subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks until the end of the next turn.
legend: A Sludgeraker’s talons and fangs are so coated with toxins and grime that wounds they inflict swiftly turn foul and gangrenous.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
