description: Effect: This unit is not visible to enemy units more than 12" from it while it is affected by the ‘Cover’ terrain ability. In addition, add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks while it is wholly within 3" of a terrain feature.
legend: Lurking unseen by the enemy, Wildercorps Hunters stalk their quarry sometimes for days on end before they launch surprise volleys of crossbow bolts from hidden positions.

name: Expert Trackers
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: These soldiers are tasked with scouting ahead of the main advance.

name: Unstoppable Momentum
description:
Effect: Each time this unit has charged as a result of using a CHARGE ability, it gains 1 momentum point.

Each time it uses a RUN ability, it gains 2 momentum points. It can have a maximum of 3 momentum points at once.

Add the number of momentum points this unit has to the Damage characteristic of its Maw-grunta’s Tusks. At the end of each battle round, subtract 1 from its momentum points, to a minimum of 0.
legend: Once a Maw-grunta begins its charge, it can only stop by crashing into something, and it becomes ever more deadly as its speed increases.

name: Flattened Into The Mud
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice and add the number of momentum points this unit has to the roll. On a 5+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Should a foe miraculously survive the impact of a charging Maw-grunta, it will take some time for them to regather their wits!
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Carve a Path
description:
Effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through models and the combat ranges of enemy units, but it cannot end that move in combat.

Then, pick each enemy unit that this unit passed across during that move to be the targets. Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Then, this unit gains 2 momentum points.
legend: The job of the hakkin’ krew is to clear a path through packed enemies to ensure the Maw-grunta maintains its momentum.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Unstoppable Momentum
description:
Effect: Each time this unit has charged as a result of using a CHARGE ability, it gains 1 momentum point.

Each time it uses a RUN ability, it gains 2 momentum points. It can have a maximum of 3 momentum points at once.

Add the number of momentum points this unit has to the Damage characteristic of its Maw-grunta’s Tusks. At the end of each battle round, subtract 1 from its momentum points, to a minimum of 0.
legend: Once a Maw-grunta begins its charge, it can only stop by crashing into something, and it becomes ever more deadly as its speed increases.

name: Iron-fisted Commander
description: Effect: If a friendly Ardboyz unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.
legend: No Ardboy would dare quit the fight with the boss around.

name: Get Bashin’!
description: Effect: Add 1 to shield bash rolls for friendly Ardboyz units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Shields are made for krumping in the eyes of a Big Boss, who makes sure their boys are using them the ‘propa way’.

name: Power of Da Great Green God
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly IRONJAWZ INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Make a forgin’ roll of D6. Add 1 to the roll if this unit is armed with Grunta-tongs. On a 4+, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (Mortal) until the start of your next turn.
legend: Channelling the raw energies of the Waaagh! with his ‘bashin’ tools’, Zoggrok can empower the weapons of orruks gathered around him.

name: Klonk
description:
Effect: Klonk is a token. You can re-roll forgin’ rolls for this unit while this unit’s Klonk is on the battlefield.

If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove this unit’s Klonk from the battlefield after the ATTACK ability has been resolved (the damage point is still inflicted).
legend: This rockbrow squig’s headache is only relieved by a bash on the head, making it the perfect portable anvil.

name: Ward-smashing Choppa
description: Effect: If an attack made with this unit’s Ward-smashing Choppa scores a hit, the target has the WARD-SMASHED keyword for the rest of the battle. Ward rolls cannot be made for a WARD-SMASHED unit even if this unit has been destroyed.
legend: A strike from this choppa shatters not only skulls but also arcane wards and other mystical forms of protection.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Maw-grunta’s Tusks is 3.

name: Head of the Stampede
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick up to 3 friendly MAW-GRUNTA units wholly within 12" of this unit that charged this turn to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 momentum point to each target.
legend: At the forefront of a grunta stampede rides the Tuskboss, racing to be the first to the fray.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Unstoppable Momentum
description:
Effect: Each time this unit has charged as a result of using a CHARGE ability, it gains 1 momentum point.

Each time it uses a RUN ability, it gains 2 momentum points. It can have a maximum of 3 momentum points at once.

Add the number of momentum points this unit has to the Damage characteristic of its Maw-grunta’s Tusks. At the end of each battle round, subtract 1 from its momentum points, to a minimum of 0.
legend: Once a Maw-grunta begins its charge, it can only stop by crashing into something, and it becomes ever more deadly as its speed increases.

name: Unleashed Rage
description: Effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST if it charged in the same turn.
legend: Brute Ragerz waste no time in venting their pent-up rage when they get within striking distance of the foe.

name: Berserkers
description: Effect: This unit can use a RUN ability and still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: These Brutes forego heavy armour, which means they can get stuck in to the fighting as quickly as possible.

name: Berserkers
description: Effect: This unit can use a RUN ability and still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: These Brutes forego heavy armour, which means they can get stuck in to the fighting as quickly as possible.

name: Drothmasters
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract D3 from the Damage characteristic of the target’s Companion melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Vulkyn Flameseekers are skilled at dominating monstrous wild beasts.

name: Frenzied Hunters
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is lurking on the fringes.

Effect: Set up this unit on the battlefield wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Overwhelmed with bloodlust, the Gorger Mawpack launch themselves from their hiding place in a futile frenzy to end their eternal hunger.

name: Troglodytic Lurkers
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve lurking on the fringes. It has now been deployed.
legend: Gorgers are shunned and reviled creatures. When a mawtribe goes to war, they often lurk on the edge of the battlefield, waiting to strike.

name: Altar of the Gulping God
description:
Effect: While this terrain feature has a Head Butcher:

  • The Head Butcher cannot use MOVE abilities.
  • Instead of measuring range or visibility to the Head Butcher, measure to this terrain feature instead.
  • All attacks that would target the Head Butcher target this terrain feature instead.
  • If this terrain feature is destroyed, before removing it from the battlefield, inflict D3 mortal damage on the Head Butcher. Then, set up the Head Butcher on the battlefield wholly within 3" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer a Head Butcher. If it is not possible to set up the Head Butcher, it is slain.
legend: A Mawpit is a tooth-lined sinkhole in which the aggressive nature of Ghur has become manifest. They are used a places of worship by the ogors, who constantly hurl gory sacrifices into their chomping orifices.

name: Feed the Maw
description:
Declare: If this terrain feature does not have a Head Butcher, pick a friendly Butcher or Slaughtermaster within 3" of it and not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Place the target on this terrain feature. The target is now a Head Butcher (see ‘Altar of the Gulping God’).
legend: The new Head Butcher ascends the platform above the Mawpit.

name: Step Away From The Maw
description: Effect: If this terrain feature has a Head Butcher that was not placed on it this turn, set up the Head Butcher on the battlefield wholly within 3" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer a Head Butcher.
legend: The Head Butcher descends from the platform.

name: Throat of Ghur
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units within 12" of this terrain feature, or within 18" if it has a Head Butcher, to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. Add 1 to the roll if the target is more than 3" from all other enemy units. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
legend: With a rumble, smaller Mawpits suddenly manifest beneath the feet of distant foes.

name: Shield of Azyr
description: Effect: While any friendly THE BLACKTALONS HEROES are wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those friendly units have Ward (5+).
legend: These golden armoured warriors will willingly put themselves in mortal danger in order to protect Neave and Lorai.

name: Aquatic Illusions
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit.
legend: Lorai conjures liquid figures out of the ethersea that mystify and confuse nearby enemies.

name: Nebulous Sea-fog
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, while a friendly <KY>THE BLACKTALONS</KY> unit is wholly within 6" of this unit, if the unmodified hit roll for a shooting attack that targets that unit is 1-5, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: A hazy mist coalesces into a thick, obscuring fog around Lorai.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Cthorak’s Ancient Claws is 4.

name: Spirit-scouring Flames
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit’s Spirit-scouring Flames to be the target.

Effect: The target has the SOULBURNED keyword for the rest of the battle.
legend: Enemies engulfed by Cthorak’s pale-flame breath feel their very souls begin to burn away.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Soulburned
description:
Declare: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed. Pick any number of SOULBURNED enemy units to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Once an enemy has been burnt by Cthorak’s scouring flames, their soul ignites deep within their body.

name: Lightning Tempest
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be struck by lightning, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on that unit, then roll a dice. On a 1-2, the sequence ends. On a 3+, pick another enemy unit within 3" of that unit to be struck by lightning and inflict D3 mortal damage on it. If the chanting roll was 10+, you can pick another enemy unit within 6" of that unit instead of 3". Keep rolling dice in this way until the sequence ends or there are no other enemy units eligible to be struck by lightning. A unit cannot be struck by lightning more than once per turn.
legend: Ionus calls upon Sigmar to unleash the wrath of Azyr.

name: Ruination Chamber
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: These veterans march where others cannot tread, fighting upon battlefields transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on their souls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: is unit was picked as the target of a non-<ky>Core</ky> ability

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Carnelian Greatspite’s Mandibles is 3.

name: Kurnothi War-horn
description: Effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly KURNOTHI units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The sounding of Belthanos’s war-horn brings forth a surging response from the hunt.

name: Huntmaster’s Strike
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again more than 6" from all enemy units and wholly within the creeping overgrowth.
legend: The battlefield is the hunting ground and until his god returns, Belthanos is the prime hunter.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Rhythm of the Chase
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll, then you can remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of the target.
legend: Belthanos relentlessly harries his quarry before deftly closing the distance to deliver the killing strike
condition: Once per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Monstrous Talons is 4.

name: The One True King
description:
Effect: While you believe this DELUSION:
  • Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS units.
  • Subtract 1 from run rolls and charge rolls for enemy units.
  • The melee weapons used by friendly SERFS units have Anti-charge (+1 Rend) while they are wholly within friendly territory and did not charge in the same turn.
legend: News of Ushoran’s mighty deeds spreads like wildfire through the Flesh‑eater ranks, inspiring his subjects to carry out their duties with greater vigour.

name: Epicentre of Delusion
description: Effect: Each time you make a delusion roll, you can add 1 to or subtract 1 from the roll.
legend: In fleeting moments of near lucidity, Ushoran has a small degree of control over the delusion believed by the cannibal army.

name: Glimpse of Delusion
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy model within 18" of this unit to be the target, pick an enemy unit that is visible to the target and within the target’s combat range to be the victim, then make a casting roll of 2D6. You can only pick the target’s unit to be the victim if that unit has 2 or more models.

Effect: Pick 1 of the target’s melee weapons. Immediately resolve combat attacks for the target made with that weapon against the victim.
legend: Ushoran pulls an enemy into his delusion, causing them to see friends as vicious monsters.

name: Shroudcage Fragment
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. If the roll exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Madness pulses from the gem in Ushoran’s crown, overwhelming those who draw too close.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Insular Contemplations
description: Effect: While this unit is more than 6" from all enemy units, add 1 to chanting rolls for this unit.
legend: A Cardinal’s ability to bend reality with their ranting is all the more potent when there are no questioning ‘heretics’ nearby.

name: Banishing Liturgy
description:
Effect: While you believe this DELUSION:
Add 2 to banishment rolls for friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS units.
Friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS units have WARD (4+) against damage points inflicted by SPELL abilities, PRAYER abilities and abilities used by MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: The solemn sacraments of a Cardinal and their faithful congregation can nullify the most hostile magics.

name: Lord of the Marches
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and up to 2 friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS units in this unit’s regiment that have not been deployed to be the targets.

Effect: Set up the target units in reserve patrolling the borders. They have now been deployed.
legend: A Gorewarden is responsible for patrolling the borders of their liege’s territory, leading flights of warriors to ambush their enemies.

name: Trespassers!
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is patrolling the borders, then pick an enemy unit to be the target.

Effect: Set up this unit more than 6" from the target and more than 9" from all other enemy units. Then, set up the units that were patrolling the borders with this unit wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: When intruders are sighted, a Gorewarden and their flock make haste towards them, shrieking bloody murder

name: Defenders of the Kingdom
description:
Effect: While you believe this DELUSION and this unit is on the battlefield, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS units while they are wholly within 12" of a friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS HERO. Add 2 to charge rolls instead if they were also set up in the same turn.

When using the ‘A Kingdom Deluded’ ability, you can pick this DELUSION even if this unit is patrolling the borders.
legend: The Gorewarden and their sworn swords quickly repel any intrusion over the kingdom’s borders.

name: Arrest Those Miscreants!
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, the target has STRIKE-LAST while it is in combat with any friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS HEROES and any friendly SERFS or KNIGHTS units.
legend: Should an enemy break Ushoran’s laws, Gormayne is quick to condemn them.

name: Accusations of Regicide
description: Effect: While you believe this DELUSION, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly SERFS and KNIGHTS units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS HEROES that had any damage points allocated to them in the same turn.
legend: Of the many crimes Gormayne is empowered to punish, few stir his jury to a frenzy more than an attempt to harm the nobility.

name: Executioner’s Entourage
description: Effect: Pick a friendly SERFS unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Though Royal Decapitators are often shunned by their fellow ghouls, when the blood starts flying, these sinister figures can attract quite the following.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Off With Their Head!
description: Effect: Immediately after that FIGHT ability has been resolved, pick an enemy INFANTRY HERO in combat with this unit to be the target. Roll 2D6. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, it is automatically destroyed.
legend: A Royal Decapitator’s axe hungers to cleave through necks in one fell swing.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Royal Bodyguard
description: Effect: While any friendly non-MONSTER FLESH-EATER COURTS HEROES are wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those HEROES have WARD (5+).
legend: In battle, it falls to the tenacious Cryptguard to form a half-living shield for their vampiric overlords.

name: Elite Guardians
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat with any enemy units that charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, this unit has STRIKE-FIRST but ward rolls cannot be made for it.
legend: The Cryptguard will gladly give their lives to protect their liege from any who might do them harm.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Predator Knights
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, this unit can use a RETREAT ability as if it were your movement phase. No mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by that RETREAT ability.
legend: Though they lack the power of true flight, nightshriekers can leap clean over obstacles and the heads of the foe, allowing the Morbheg Knights to strike and disengage at will.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Enemy Turn

name: Roar of Kragnos
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Hurrk da Howla is on the battlefield, pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The massive horn carried by Hurrk da Howla emits a booming blast that leaves the Stab-ladz’ enemies disorientated.

name: Cyreni of the Abyss
description: Effect: While this unit’s Cyreni of the Abyss is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: As a Tidecaster, Cyreni can draw upon the swirling currents of the ethersea in battle.

name: Phase Ink
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Cephanyr is on the battlefield, pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Cephanyr emits a cloud of ink as black as the abyss that shrouds the enemy and sows confusion.

name: Indulgence Given Form
description: Effect: Each time an enemy unit uses a command while it is within 12" of this unit, give 1 indulgence point to this unit, to a maximum of 6.
legend: The Thricefold Discord are a sinister example of all of one’s vices and virtues taken to excess.

name: Sublime Harmonies
description: Effect: While this unit’s Vashtiss is on the battlefield, it has Wizard (1). In addition, each time you make a casting roll for this unit, you can spend any number of indulgence points it has. For each point spent, add 1 to the casting roll.
legend: The cacophony unleashed by Vashtiss allows the Thricefold Discord to synchronise their weaving of dark magics.

name: Klutcha-grot
description: Effect: This unit’s Klutcha-grot is a token. If it is removed from the battlefield, this unit cannot use the ‘A Tough Grot to Swallow’ ability.

name: Bait and Trap
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is damaged. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Monsta‑killaz have perfected the art of baiting even the most fearsome monsters into debilitating traps.

name: A Tough Grot To Swallow
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, that RAMPAGE ability has no effect. On a 1, remove this unit’s Klutcha-grot from the battlefield.
legend: The spiky-armoured Klutcha-grot is usually gobbled up by the Monsta-killaz’ prey, causing it to choke, retch and vomit up the little git. Of course, sometimes the grot just gets eaten, which the orruks find equally hilarious.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>RAMPAGE</ky> ability for an enemy <ky>MONSTER</ky> within 6" of this unit

name: The Time-Swallowers Maw
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: This unit cannot use the ‘Serpentine Agility’ ability for the rest of the battle. Roll 2D6 for each target. If the roll exceeds the target’s Move characteristic, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the difference between the roll and its Move characteristic.
legend: Though Sekhar is loath to let Ouboroth feast upon souls, sometimes, needs must.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Serpentine Agility
description: Effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: Sekhar moves as a blinding blur, her unnatural speed obscuring her form from even the keenest gaze.

name: Death’s Construction
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, while they are wholly within 6" of this unit, friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS units cannot be picked to be the target of abilities used by the target other than FIGHT abilities.
legend: Through the subtlest arcane suggestion, Sekhar implants her will in vulnerable minds – supplanting their former purpose with the undying will of Nulahmia.

name: The Croneseer
description:
Effect: Each time you perform a blood rite, immediately after the ability that destroyed a unit has been resolved, give this unit 1 prophecy token.
  • While this unit has 2 or more prophecy tokens, this unit cannot be picked to be the target of shooting attacks or SPELL abilities used by enemy units.
  • While this unit has 3 or more prophecy tokens, you can re-roll unmodified chanting rolls of 1 for this unit.
  • While this unit has 4 or more prophecy tokens, if the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: Krethusa’s gifts of foresight are legendary, empowered further still by sacrifice and burnt offerings.

name: Omens of Doom
description:
Declare: Make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects. If the chanting roll was 10+, pick up to 2 different effects instead.

Prophecy of Exile: Pick a visible enemy WIZARD or PRIEST within 18" of this unit. Subtract 1 from that unit’s power level until the start of your next turn.

Prophecy of Dark Wings: Pick a visible friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit. That unit can immedia
legend: Krethusa uses her connection to Morai-Heg to follow the twisting skeins of fate and glean a prophetic vision.

name: Right Tools For The Job
description: Effect: Double the Damage characteristic of this unit’s weapons for attacks that target WIZARDS, PRIESTS and MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: Callis and Toll have sacred bullets and blade oils prepared for particularly deadly foes.

name: Wily to the Last
description: Effect: If this unit has 2 models and would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, 1 model in this unit is slain.
legend: Laying low one of these heroes is hard, but laying low both is next to impossible.

name: Get It Done
description: Effect: Pick a friendly Toll’s Companions unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Callis, Toll and their companions are renowned for their dogged commitment to the mission.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for this unit

name: Hidden Agents
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and a friendly Callis and Toll unit in the same regiment as this unit if those units have not been deployed.

Effect: Set up those units in reserve in the shadows. Those units have now been deployed.
legend: A locked door is to be picked, a high wall is to be scaled and the shadows are to be embraced.

name: Saviours of Cinderfall
description: Effect: While a friendly Callis and Toll unit is wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and that Callis and Toll unit have Ward (5+).
legend: These companions have endured through thick and thin, watching each other’s backs and holding back the tides of darkness.

name: Emerge from the Shadows
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is in the shadows.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, set up the Callis and Toll unit that was set up in the shadows with this unit wholly within 6" of it and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Their mission imperative, these agents only reveal themselves when they are poised to bring down Sigmar’s judgement upon their quarry.

name: Zondara Rivenheart
description: Effect: While this unit’s Zondara Rivenheart is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: Zondara infuses savage Ghurish magic into her minions, granting them bestial strength even in their undeath.

name: Wrest From the Realms
description:
Effect: If this unit is in a Soulblight Gravelords army, pick a terrain feature within 3" of this unit, then roll a dice and apply the corresponding effect. You cannot pick the same terrain feature more than once per battle.

1 Cruel Hope: No effect.

2-4 Cursed Flesh: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.

5-6 Borrowed Power: Pick a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS HERO wholly within 12" of this unit that does not have an artefact of power. You can pick an artefact of power from the Soulblight Gravelords faction rules that no other friendly HERO has and give it to that HERO</
legend: Zondara will tear what she needs from the bones of the realms itself, if necessary.

name: Crackling with Faith
description: Effect: Each time a combat attack made by this unit scores a critical hit, you can pick an enemy unit within 6" of this unit that was not the target of that combat attack. Inflict 1 mortal damage on that enemy unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: The half-sane Brethren of the Bolt draw the power from the Azyrite thunderstorms above to charge their weapons and smite the foes of Sigmar.

name: Pater Filius
description: Effect: While this unit’s Pater Filius is on the battlefield, it has PRIEST (1).
legend: The Brethren of the Bolt are led by Pater Filius, a Sigmarite priest who is as crazed as he is pious.

name: Bolt From the Blue
description:
Declare: You can pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: This unit has Ward (5+) for the rest of the turn. If a target was picked, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. If the chanting roll was 10+, inflict 3 mortal damage on the target instead.
legend: The skies darken above the Brethren of the Bolt, crackling with holy power that rains down upon them and their enemies.

name: Prime Cuts
description: Effect: Each time a combat attack made by this unit scores a critical hit, give 1 prime cut point to this unit, to a maximum of 6.
legend: With cuts and swipes of surprising precision, the Skinnerkin’s foes unwittingly find themselves the main ingredient of the upcoming feast.

name: Dinner is Served
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS HERO wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Heal (X) the target, where X is the number of prime cut points this unit has. Then, reset this unit’s prime cut points to 0.
legend: A grisly platter of splintered bones, rotten meat and spilled entrails is offered up to the nobility.

name: Cavalry Warleader
description: Effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for friendly DARKOATH CAVALRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The Darkoath Chieftain leads the cavalry swiftly into the enemy ranks.

name: Oath of Murder
description: Effect: If this unit destroyed an enemy HERO or MONSTER this turn, this unit has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the battle.
legend: Darkoath Chieftains offer up the souls of enemy lords and champions in exchange for divine power.
condition: Once Per Battle, End of Any Turn

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Feed on Flesh
description: Effect: Each time a model (friendly or enemy) is slain within 12" of this unit, give this unit a sacrifice point, to a maximum of 6. If there are more than 1 friendly Darkoath Wilderfiend units within 12" of the slain model, only 1 of them can be given a sacrifice point for that slain model.
legend: Having been appeased with sacrificial blood, this creature may bestow dark blessings upon its kin.

name: Primal Sorcery
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects:

Mind Shroud: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target and roll a number of dice equal to the number of sacrifice points this unit has. If any of the rolls are a 5+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.

Warping Balefire: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target and roll a number of dice equal to the number of sacrifice points this unit has. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

Dark Might: Heal (X) this unit, where X is the number of sacrifice points this unit has.

After applying the effect you picked, reset this unit’s sacrifice points to 0.
legend: Though bestial, Darkoath Wilderfiends possess innate powers of sorcery.

name: Oath of the Marauder
description: Effect: If this unit charged this phase and the unmodified charge roll was 8+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s weapons for the rest of the battle.
legend: These bloodthirsty tribal warriors loudly declare vows of violence and slaughter as they race after their foes.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Charge Phase

name: Glorious Death
description: Effect: While this unit is wholly within 12" of any friendly DARKOATH HEROES, each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Ever keen to earn the favour of their tribe, when the eyes of the fiercest fighters are upon them, these warriors will not go down without a fight.

name: Oath of the Raider
description: Effect: If this unit charged this phase and is only in combat with 1 enemy unit, and that enemy unit is only in combat with this unit, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s weapons for the rest of the battle.
legend: Before battle, Fellriders swear oaths to harry the enemy without mercy, showing no mercy to those stragglers who fall beneath their axes.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Charge Phase

name: Swift Attackers
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: As they close in on the enemy at frightening speed, these skilled horsemen are nigh impossible to hit with missile fire.

name: Light A Pyre
description:
Declare: If this unit is contesting an objective, pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
  • Add a number equal to the roll to this unit’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: Arcane loci are set ablaze by the Pyregheists, who direct those deadly witchfires with terrible efficacy.

name: Travel The Waterways
description:
Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

If you picked to depict Ydriliqi, Rune of the River on your battle scripture this battle round, you can instead set up this unit anywherecon the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Ydrilan are able to navigate the realms’ waterways in order to travel as fast as the flow of the rapids.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Relentless as the Driving Current
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move 2D6". It can pass through models in enemy units but must end that move in combat.
legend: An Ydrilan warrior keeps surging forwards, their movements fluid and bewilderingly fast as they embody the momentum of rushing water.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of the Thanatorg’s Claws and Fangs is 4.

name: Warlord of the First Circle
description: Effect: If a friendly Varanguard unit uses the ‘Relentless Killers’ ability while it is wholly within 12" of this unit, that unit does not have STRIKE-LAST as a result of that ability.
legend: Abraxia commands the Swords of Chaos with relentless brutality.

name: Roar of Domination
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Thanatorg is quick to put potential usurpers of Abraxia’s power in their place.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Gorbolga the Accurs’d
description:
Effect: If this unit is in combat, roll a dice and apply the corresponding effect:

1 - Uncontrollable Power: Allocate 1 damage point to this unit.

2 - The Spear Slumbers: No effect.

3-5 - White-hot Varanite: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Gorbolga for the rest of the turn.

6 - Rampant Mutation: The effect of ‘White-hot Varanite’ applies and this unit’s Gorbolga has Crit (Mortal) for the rest of the turn.
legend: A ‘gift’ from the Everchosen, Gorbolga is a varanite spear that carries a potent mutative curse – but should its wielder’s will slip, they too will learn of its hunger…

name: Blood of Molten Varanite
description: Effect: Roll a dice each time a damage point inflicted by a combat attack is allocated to this unit. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Any who wound the Thanatorg risk being splashed by its highly mutative blood.

name: Carve a Path To Glory
description:
Declare: This unit can only use this ability if it is in combat with an enemy HERO.

Effect: This unit can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn. When using the second FIGHT ability, this unit must pick an enemy HERO to be the target of all of its attacks.
legend: Ruthless in battle, Gunnar Brand closes in on the enemy’s champions, claiming skulls and earning glory with each swing of his axes.

name: Oath of Bloodshed
description:
Declare: This unit can only use this ability if any enemy HEROES were slain by this unit’s combat attacks this turn.

Effect: Friendly GUNNAR’S OATHSWORN units have WARD (4+) for the rest of the battle.
legend: Though he is contemptuous of the gods, Gunnar is still Darkoath; he is not so foolish as to reject their boons should they seek to reward his murder-making.
condition: Once Per Battle, End of Any Turn

name: Broken Nadja
description: Effect: While this unit’s Broken Nadja is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: Broken Nadja wields the energies of ruin itself through dark incantations.

name: Withering Death
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy HERO within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target and subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: Nadja spits a vile curse in the Dark Tongue, drawing unnatural shadows to coil around an enemy champion and sap their life force.

name: Swift As The Wind
description: Effect: Only critical hits score successful hits for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: Singri’s horsemanship is unrivalled by any of the Darkoath. She weaves deftly across the battlefield, avoiding enemy fire and loosing deadly accurate shots with her bow in return..

name: Uncanny Shot
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Singri’s Warbow for attacks that target enemy units that are within 6" of a friendly Gunnar Brand.
legend: Gunnar Brand has been saved on more than one occasion by a well-placed arrow from Singri.

name: Draw Power
description: Effect: Roll a dice. Give a number of power points to this terrain feature equal to the roll. This terrain feature can have a maximum of 12 power points at once.
legend: Constructed at confluences where magical ley lines converge, a Nexus Chaotica can draw power from the realms and into a floating crucible.

name: Infernal Sorcery
description:
Declare: If this terrain feature has 3 or more power points, pick a friendly SLAVES TO DARKNESS WIZARD within 3" of this terrain feature to be the target.

Effect: Remove 3 power points from this terrain feature, then add 1 to casting rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: A sorcerer of Chaos can draw upon the bound daemons of the Nexus Chaotica to empower their spellcasting.

name: Corrupt The Realms
description:
Declare: If this terrain feature has 9 or more power points, pick an objective or terrain feature within 24" of this terrain feature to be the source. Then, pick any number of enemy units within 3" of the source to be the targets.

Effect: Remove 9 power points from this terrain feature, then roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: These diabolical constructs use harnessed daemonic power to corrupt the geomantic energy of the Mortal Realms.

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Feed On Mangled Remains
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses a FIGHT ability, after that FIGHT ability has been resolved, Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Such is the appetite and metabolism of a Razorgor that it can consume a slain warrior, armour and all, in a matter of seconds and still remain unsatisfied.

name: Lay The Beast Low
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks that target enemy MONSTERS.
legend: Loosed by a keen-eyed aelf, a harpoon sails through the air and sinks deep into its target’s vital organs.

name: Guild Bombs
description:
Declare: If this unit used a MOVE ability this phase, pick an enemy unit that does not have FLY and that this unit passed across this turn to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Every Gyrocopter goes to battle with a single payload of these volatile blackpowder explosives.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: Scythed Runners
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Vicious blades are fitted to this chariot, carving apart anything that gets in its way.

name: Blackpowder’s Buccaneers
description: Effect: This unit’s Peggz, Kagey, Mange and Shreek are tokens. After setting up this unit on the battlefield for the first time, place its tokens next to it.
legend: Gorlok’s minions scurry between his legs or over his broad shoulders, scampering out to maim or loot the ogor’s foes.

name: Tiny Braggarts
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of this unit’s tokens that is on the battlefield and roll a dice. On a 1, remove that token from the battlefield. On a 2+, apply its effect for the rest of the turn:

Peggz: The abilities of enemy artefacts of power that target this unit have no effect on this unit.

Kagey: This unit has Strike-first.

Mange: Each time an unmodified hit roll for a combat attack that targets this unit is 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.

Shreek: Other than the Companion weapon ability, weapon abilities for attacks that target this unit have no effect.
legend: While the foe is engaged with Gorlok, his minions run rings around his enemies, hindering their every step.

name: Sneaky Little Devils
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: Chaos Furies are spiteful creatures that utterly loathe the idea of engaging in a fair fight, much preferring – where possible – to stab distracted enemies in the back.

name: Behold My Genius!
description:
Declare: Pick all friendly VOLT-KLAW’S ENGINECOVEN units to be the targets.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • Add 1 to hit rolls for the targets’ shooting attacks.
  • Add 3" to the Range characteristic of the targets’ ranged weapons.
legend: While setting Volt-Klaw's machines to maximum power quickly burns through their fuel, it also enhances their lethality to appalling levels.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Hide-shelter!
description: Effect: While a friendly VOLT-KLAW’S ENGINECOVEN INFANTRY unit is within the combat range of a friendly VOLT-KLAW’S ENGINECOVEN Ratling Warpblaster, it is not visible to enemy units more than 13" away.
legend: Volt-Klaw is insanely protective of his arsenal - afact that his long- suffering underlings use as an excuse to shelter behind sturdier weapons when needed.

name: Fickle Motives
description:
Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly KRITTOK’S CLAWPACK units while you have more victory points than your opponent.

Subtract 3 from the control scores of friendly KRITTOK’S CLAWPACK units while you have fewer victory points than your opponent.
legend: Krittok has built his reputation on an impressive stack of victories, in part down to the ferocity of his Stormvermin elite and in part because of his willingness to cut his losses.

name: Always Three Clawsteps Ahead
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KRITTOK’S CLAWPACK unit that is not in combat to use this ability.

Effect: That unit can use the ’Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: The best laid plans of the Skaven never go awry (or so they claim).
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: Skryre Payloads
description: Effect: Friendly KRITTOK’S CLAWPACK Doom-Flayers units have Ward (5+) while they are within the combat range of a friendly KRITTOK’S CLAWPACK Stormvermin unit.
legend: Krittok has made great effort to secure an arsenal of deadly Doom-Flayers, and he expects his minions to protect his investment with their lives.

name: Overwhelming Fire
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks that target an enemy unit that has 10 or more models.
legend: Large enemy formations are decimated by the sheer volume of fire a Ratling Warpblaster unleashes upon them.

name: More-more Warpstone Bullets!
description:
Effect: If this unit is within the combat range of a friendly SKRYRE HERO, this unit’s Hail of Warpstone Bullets has an Attacks characteristic of 6D6+3 instead of 3D6+3 for the rest of the turn.

However, for each unmodified hit roll of 1 for an attack made with this unit’s Hail of Warpstone Bullets, inflict 1 mortal damage on this unit after the SHOOT ability has been resolved.
legend: Under the dubious supervision of the Warlocks of Clans Skryre, the gunner cranks up the Ratling Warpblaster’s velocity to the max.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Gas Clouds
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Poisoned Wind Globes for attacks that target an enemy unit that has 10 or more models.
legend: Poisoned wind globes are crystal orbs filled with deadly warp-gas that can engulf and lethally transmute an enemy regiment.

name: Hidden Weapon Team
description: Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly Clanrats unit that has 5 or more models, and there are no other friendly WEAPON TEAM units within that unit’s combat range, this unit is not visible to enemy units more than 13" away.
legend: Skryre weapon teams often lurk amidst larger formations.

name: Lightning Master
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Warpvolt Scourgers unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, set the Attacks characteristic of the target’s Warpvolt Scourgers to 10 for the rest of the turn.
legend: None are better than a Warlock Galvaneer at engineering storms of electrical carnage.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: More-More Warpvolt Doom!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit’s Warpvolt Obliterator to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each other enemy unit within the target’s combat range. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: This warpvolt weapon unleashes an all-consuming wave of sparking death that vaporises nearby enemies.

name: Hidden Weapon Team
description: Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly Clanrats unit that has 5 or more models, and there are no other friendly WEAPON TEAM units within that unit’s combat range, this unit is not visible to enemy units more than 13" away.
legend: Skryre weapon teams often lurk amidst larger formations.

name: Doomfang
description: Effect: This unit has Strike-first for the rest of the turn but it cannot use commands this phase.
legend: Though Doomfang offers the ageing Krittok martial power, he must constantly haggle with its daemonic occupant, a fact that can sometimes prove distracting.

name: A Reputation For Cunning
description: Effect: You can pick 2 different eligible units to use the ’Always Three Clawsteps Ahead’ ability this phase instead of 1, but at least 1 of those units must have the VERMINUS keyword.
legend: Krittok's laboriously crafted reputation for deviousness sees his thralls obey him without question.

name: Foster Competition
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for friendly Stormvermin units while they are wholly within 13"of this unit.
legend: Krittok has created a system in which his armoured swarms are so desperate to earn his favour that they spend only some of their time plotting his overthrow.

name: Enshrouding Fumes
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: Choking, miasmatic clouds swirl around a Plaguepack.

name: Plague Rat
description: Effect: This unit’s Plague rat is a token. If you make a unmodified chanting roll of 1 for this unit while its Plague rat is on the battlefield, you can remove its Plague rat from the battlefield and then re-roll that chanting roll.
legend: Plague rats carry shards of warpstone that can be consumed to lend the Plaguepack’s prayers more frothing urgency.

name: Regenerating Terror
description: Effect: Heal (D6) this unit.
legend: Brood Terrors are a nightmare of mutation and overwhelming strength.

name: Warpstone Fumes
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, for the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are within 6" of this unit.
legend: The belching, flesh-twisting smoke that clings to a Brood Terror obscures the clawpacks from view.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Whirling Doom
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Doom-Flayers crash into the foe with hellish results, leaving a trail of gore in their wake.

name: The Death Frenzy
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13"of this unit or a visible friendly SKAVEN INFANTRY unit within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: If the target is an enemy unit, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

If the target is a friendly unit, it can use 2 FIGHT abilities this turn. After the first is used, however, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.

If the chanting roll was 12+, you can pick 2 targets instead of 1.
legend: Such is the force of Vizzik's screeching oratory that the verminous hordes froth and spasm under his influence as mere mortals unravel to visions of their inevitable doom.

name: Prophet of the Horned Rat
description: Effect: You can re-roll chanting rolls for this unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: Vizzik endlessly schemes to extend his god's influence - alongside his own.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Gaze of the Gnaw
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, for the rest of the turn:
  • If this unit is in combat with the target when the target is picked to use a FIGHT ability, all of the target’s attacks must target this unit.
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks that target this unit.
legend: To catch Vizzik's gaze is to be driven from one's mind by agonising raptures.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Fissures In Reality
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Those who resist Vizzik's will are swallowed by fang-mouthed fissures that wrench open in his presence.

name: Cornered Rat
description: Effect: While this unit is damaged, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of its Warpforged Halberd.
legend: A Clawlord in fear for their life fights with rabid ferocity.

name: Cruel Commander
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO VERMINUS INFANTRY unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. Then, add 5 to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Clawlord strikes down one of their underlings to show their cruel power and then, with shrieks and hissed threats, commands their swarming underlings to overrun the foe.

name: Frenzied Assault
description: Effect: If this unit charged in the same turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The presence of the enemy drives these crazed warriors into a terrible rage.

name: Enshrouding Fumes
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: Choking, miasmatic clouds swirl around the Plague Censer Bearers.

name: FAVOUR OF THE GODS
description:
Effect: If any enemy HEROES were slain this turn by the Gunnar Brand in this Regiment of Renown:
  • Heal (5) each unit in this Regiment of Renown.
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by units in this Regiment of Renown for the rest of the battle.
legend: Whether it pleases him or not, Gunnar Brand has attracted the notice of the Chaos Gods. With each worthy kill he makes, he draws down their blessings.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: BESTIAL DOMINATION
description:
Used By: The unit using that FIGHT ability.

Effect: Pick a unit in this Regiment of Renown that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Their self-preserving instincts crushed by their master’s brute will, Hargax’s beasts attack without relent.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for a unit in this %000010371Regiment of Renown%

name: Extremis Chamber
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Most scarce of Sigmar’s forces are the Extremis chambers, with each Stormcast mounted on a living weapon. To draw near these warriors is to risk being scoured by lightning or flame.

name: Impaling Strikes
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: On the charge, the blade of a stormstrike glaive can impale several foes.

name: Extremis Chamber
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Most scarce of Sigmar’s forces are the Extremis chambers, with each Stormcast mounted on a living weapon. To draw near these warriors is to risk being scoured by lightning or flame.

name: Cleaving Blow
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Thunderaxes if the target unit has 10 or more models.
legend: A single swing of a thunderaxe can carve through several foes.

name: Faithful Gryph-hounds
description: Effect: This unit’s Gryph-hounds are tokens. After setting up this unit on the battlefield for the first time, place both Gryph-hounds next to it.
legend: A Knight-Judicator is often accompanied into battle by a pair of these loyal beasts of Azyr.

name: Hunting Hounds
description:
Declare: If this unit was not set up this turn and any of this unit’s Gryph-hounds are on the battlefield, pick an enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 1, remove 1 of this unit’s Gryph-hounds from the battlefield. On a 2+, pick 1 of this unit’s Gryph-hounds that is next to this unit or next to an enemy unit and place it next to the target instead.

While any of this unit’s Gryph-hounds are next to an enemy unit, add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks that target that unit.

If an enemy unit is destroyed or removed from the battlefield while any of this unit’s Gryph-hounds are next to it, place those Gryph-hounds next to this unit.
legend: The Knight-Judicator sends one of their Gryph-hounds to harass an enemy unit.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Ruination Chamber
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: These veterans march where others cannot tread, fighting upon battlefields transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on their souls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: This unit was picked as the target of a non-<ky>Core</ky> ability

name: Heralds of Righteousness
description: Effect: Add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for this unit, to a maximum of 3.
legend: Prosecutors cross the battlefield in a blur of light.

name: Dispersed Formation
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".
legend: These warriors maintain a wide formation, enabling more precise strikes and greater battlefield control.

name: Vanguard Chamber
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, this unit can use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities even if it used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: Through swiftness, guile and more than a hint of savagery, the warriors of the Vanguard chamber are able to outfight forces many times their own limited numbers.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Shocking Strikes
description: Effect: If any damage points are allocated to an enemy unit by attacks made with this unit’s Shock Handaxes, subtract 1 from wound rolls for that enemy unit’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Enemies struck with shock handaxes reel in pain as electricity courses through their veins.

name: Vanguard Chamber
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, this unit can use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities even if it used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: Through swiftness, guile and more than a hint of savagery, the warriors of the Vanguard chamber are able to outfight forces many times their own limited numbers.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Charging Volley
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: This unit can immediately use a Shoot ability as if it were your shooting phase, but it must target that enemy unit. This unit’s Starstrike Javelins have Shoot in Combat this phase.
legend: Vanguard-Palladors unleash a deadly volley of missiles as they charge into their foes.

name: Extremis Chamber
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Most scarce of Sigmar’s forces are the Extremis chambers, with each Stormcast mounted on a living weapon. To draw near these warriors is to risk being scoured by lightning or flame.

name: Thunderstruck
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: When a lightning hammer finds its mark, enemies are paralysed by crackling energy and a flash of blinding light.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Extremis Chamber
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Most scarce of Sigmar’s forces are the Extremis chambers, with each Stormcast mounted on a living weapon. To draw near these warriors is to risk being scoured by lightning or flame.

name: Overwhelming Volleystorm
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit’s Volleystorm Crossbows to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, the target cannot use the ‘All-out Defence’ command in the following combat phase.
legend: The Tempestors fire charged crossbow bolts into the foe, weakening their defences and leaving them open to a follow-up assault.

name: Ruination Chamber
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: These veterans march where others cannot tread, fighting upon battlefields transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on their souls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: This unit was picked as the target of a non-<ky>Core</ky> ability

name: Earn an Honourable Death
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO RUINATION CHAMBER INFANTRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Lord-Terminos accompanies their Ruination chamber, the Stormcasts seeking to earn their final rest by proving themselves one last time in battle.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for this unit

name: Memorian
description:
Effect: This unit’s Memorian is a token. Add 3 to the control scores of friendly RUINATION CHAMBER units wholly within 12" of this unit while its Memorian is on the battlefield.

If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove its Memorian from the battlefield after the Attack ability has been resolved (the damage point is still inflicted).
legend: Memorians serve to remind soul-damaged Stormcasts of their humanity.

name: Ruination Chamber
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: These veterans march where others cannot tread, fighting upon battlefields transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on their souls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: This unit was picked as the target of a non-Core ability

name: Deliver Judgement
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO RUINATION CHAMBER unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Lord-Vigilant orders their soul-hollowed brethren to deliver Sigmar's wrath unto their enemies.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Ruination Chamber
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: These veterans march where others cannot tread, fighting upon battlefields transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on their souls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: This unit was picked as the target of a non-<ky>Core</ky> ability

name: Memorian Descendants
description:
Effect: This unit’s Memorians are tokens. There are 2 Memorians for every 3 models in this unit. While any of this unit’s Memorians are on the battlefield, add 1 to this unit’s resistance rolls when using the ‘Ruination Chamber’ ability.

Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove 1 of its Memorians from the battlefield after the ATTACK ability has been resolved (the damage point is still inflicted).
legend: Reclusians are accompanied by Memorians who serve to remind them of their humanity.

name: Dispersed Formation
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".
legend: These warriors maintain a wide formation, enabling more precise strikes and greater battlefield control.

name: Extremis Chamber
description: Effect: Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Most scarce of Sigmar’s forces are the Extremis chambers, with each Stormcast mounted on a living weapon. To draw near these warriors is to risk being scoured by lightning or flame.

name: Draconic Onslaught
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move 2D6". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units and can end that move in combat. Then, pick an enemy unit that this unit passed across during that move. Inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.
legend: To reclaim their old empire, the Draconith and their riders fight together as a single furious whole, savaging any who cross their path.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: JUSTICE WILL BE SERVED
description:
Declare: Pick the Neave Blacktalon in this Regiment of Renown to be the target if it is in combat with an enemy HERO.

Effect: The target can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. Each time it does so, if it is in combat with an enemy HERO, all of its attacks must target an enemy HERO. In addition, after the first FIGHT ability is used, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: When her appointed target is within her grasp, Neave fights with the overwhelming fury of an Azyrite storm.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: RUNE OF RESTORED HEARTH
description: Effect: If the Runelord in the Regiment of Renown is contesting an objective, for the rest of the battle, units in this Regiment of Renown have Ward (5+) while they are contesting that objective.
legend: Upon striking this rune, Norgrimm and his kin are filled with a tenacious impulse to restore their people’s glory.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: WRATH AND RUIN
description:
Declare: Pick the Runelord in this Regiment of Renown to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Roll 6 dice. If the chanting roll was 8+, roll 9 dice instead. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If 3 or more damage points are allocated to the target as a result of those dice rolls, ignore positive modifiers to save rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.
legend: The very earth cracks before the priest, venting fire and sulphurous fumes that engulf the enemy.

name: DUTY BOUND
description: Effect: While every model in the same unit in the Regiment of Renown is contesting the same objective, add 1 to save rolls and ward rolls for that unit.
legend: Hanniver Toll has assembled a formidable array of agents, bound by oath – or debt – to serve Sigmar unto death.

name: SIGMAR’S JUSTICE
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit to be marked for justice. You can pick a unit that is in reserve.

Effect: For the rest of the battle, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by units in this Regiment of Renown that target a unit that is marked for justice.
legend: Callis, Toll and their companions are single-minded in their purpose: the elimination of a high-priority target.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of The Dread Mace is 4 and this unit has a Control characteristic of 10.

name: Avatar of Destruction
description: Effect: If this unit would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Kragnos is the embodiment of Ghur’s relentless ferocity. No single strike can lay him low.

name: The Shield Inviolate
description: Effect: If this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 3+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per SPELL ability.
legend: Tuskbreaker has the power to guard Kragnos against even the most potent magical force.

name: Rampaging Destruction
description:
Effect: If this unit charged this phase, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Roll a dice for each enemy unit within 1" of this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
  • Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit and roll 2D6. On a 7, this ability has no effect. Otherwise, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the results on the dice used for the 2D6 roll multiplied together. For example, a 2D6 roll of 2 and 6 would inflict 12 mortal damage (2 × 6).
legend: Kragnos rampages through the press of his foes, his hooves flattening all in his path.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: The End of Empires
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for friendly DESTRUCTION units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit, to a maximum of 3.
legend: Where Kragnos goes, the hordes of Destruction follow.

name: You Messin’?
description: Effect: Enemy models with a Health characteristic of 1 or 2 cannot contest objectives while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: Most beings with half an ounce of common sense swiftly wither under the furious gaze of an orruk Brute who has marked their territory.

name: Shield Bash
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Make a shield bash roll of D6 for each model in this unit that is within 3" of the target. For each 6+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The shields carried by Ardboyz are great slabs of iron festooned with spikes and metal teeth, making them deadly weapons in their own right.

name: Brutal Power
description: Effect: Add 1 to this unit’s power level while there are any friendly IRONJAWZ units that have 10 or more models wholly within 12" of it.
legend: A Weirdnob Shaman channels the Waaagh! energy emitted by nearby orruk mobs.

name: Gore-grunta Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Add 1 to the mortal damage inflicted (if any) if the target is CAVALRY.
legend: Even by the destructive standards of the Ironjawz, the carnage caused by a Gore-grunta charge is horrific to behold.

name: Foul Elixirs
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, add 1 to save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn. On a 1, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Swampcalla Shamans brew up disgusting but life-saving elixirs, which they distribute to their Kruleboyz mates to aid them in battle.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Pot-grot
description: Effect: This unit’s Pot-grot is a token. Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit while its Pot-grot is on the battlefield. If you make an unmodified casting roll of 4 or less for this unit, remove its Pot-grot from the battlefield.
legend: This little grot is given the important role of ‘stirrin’ da pot’.

name: Strength From Victory
description:
Effect: If any damage points were allocated to an enemy unit by this unit’s combat attacks this turn and that enemy unit has been destroyed, give this unit a Waaagh! token, to a maximum of 3.

Until the end of the next turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s weapons for each Waaagh! token it has.
legend: The more fights a Megaboss wins, the stronger they become.

name: Lead Da Brutes
description: Effect: Pick a friendly BRUTE unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Megabosses stride into battle flanked either side by the toughest and meanest Brutes.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Rhythm of Destruction
description: Effect: If any enemy models were slain this turn by this unit’s combat attacks, give this unit D3 ritual points.
legend: With each enemy skull caved in by the Warchanter’s Gorkstikk and Morkstikk, the febrile energy of the Waaagh! begins to build.

name: SKEWER IT AGAIN!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by a shooting attack made by the Beast-skewer Killbow in this Regiment of Renown. Then, pick any number of Man-skewer Boltboyz units in this Regiment of Renown to focus fire.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the ranged weapons used by the units you picked to focus fire but all of their attacks must target the enemy MONSTER you picked.
legend: Rather than gesture in the traditional way, Grikk uses his bolts to indicate which beastie he wants his ladz to bring down.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Hunters Unleashed
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: Unable to hold back any longer, these feral constructs rush forward to engage their prey.

name: Bone-deep Savagery
description: Effect: This unit can move 3". If it can move into combat, it must. If it was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.
legend: The impure materials used in the creation of the Teratic Cohort has lent them an innate savagery that is all but impossible to truly control in the heat of battle.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: BULWARK OF THE NECROPOLIS
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with a unit in this Regiment of Renown to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 2D6 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: No meagre foe may exert their will over the warriors of Katakros’s elite guard, the Scions Praetoris.

name: SKELETAL SPLINTERING
description:
Declare: This spell can be cast by the same WIZARD more than once per phase. Pick the Arkhan the Black in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.
legend: The magics weaved by the caster calcify the bones of their enemies, causing them to break as they try to move.

name: UNHOLY SACRAMENTS
description: Effect: Add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making banishment rolls for the Arkhan the Black in this Regiment of Renown, to a maximum of 3.
legend: Such is Arkhan’s command of necromancy that even magic withers in his presence.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, subtract 3 from its power level.

name: The Staff of Power
description: Effect: Add 2 to casting rolls for this unit while it has not miscast any spells this turn. If this unit miscasts a spell, ignore the restriction that would stop this unit from casting any more spells this turn.
legend: Alakanash is capped with gems of purest grave-sand.

name: Hand of Dust
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy HERO or MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Hide a dice in one of your hands or under one of two appropriate containers. Your opponent must pick one of your hands or containers. If they pick the one hiding the dice, this ability has no effect. If they pick the empty one, the target is automatically destroyed.
legend: Nagash’s touch can turn a foe to a pile of dusty bones in moments.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Invocation of Nagash
description:
Declare: This unit can cast this spell more than once per phase. Pick a visible unit wholly within 18" of this unit that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is an enemy unit, inflict D3 mortal damage on it. If the target is a friendly DEATH unit, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Return a number of slain models to the target unit with a combined Health characteristic of up to 3.
  • The target has WARD (5+) until the start of your next turn.
legend: In a storm of morbid sorcery, Nagash blasts his foes’ souls or re-knits his minions’ bodies.

name: Supreme Lord of the Undead
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO non-UNIQUE DEATH unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Nagash is the undisputed master of all undead creatures.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Witchbrew
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has WARD (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Witchbrew drives the imbiber into such an ecstasy of destruction that they will fight on in the face of impossible odds.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: Morgwaeth the Bloodied
description: Effect: While this unit’s Morgwaeth the Bloodied is on the battlefield, it has PRIEST (1).
