legend: As coldly ambitious as any of Morathi-Khaine’s priestesses, the ruthless Hag Queen Morgwaeth the Bloodied travels the realms in search of precious Khainite treasures.

name: Curse of Loyalty
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, add 3 to the control scores of friendly NIGHTHAUNT units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Dreadblade Harrows are spectral knights who serve as cursed vassals for the commands of their masters.

name: Phantasmal Discorporation
description: Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Dreadblade Harrows are able to disappear in a spectral mist.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, subtract 3 from its power level.

name: The Staff of Power
description: Effect: Add 2 to casting rolls for this unit while it has not miscast any spells this turn. If this unit miscasts a spell, ignore the restriction that would stop this unit from casting any more spells this turn.
legend: Alakanash is capped with gems of purest grave-sand.

name: Hand of Dust
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy HERO or MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Hide a dice in one of your hands or under one of two appropriate containers. Your opponent must pick one of your hands or containers. If they pick the one hiding the dice, this ability has no effect. If they pick the empty one, the target is automatically destroyed.
legend: Nagash’s touch can turn a foe to a pile of dusty bones in moments.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Invocation of Nagash
description:
Declare: This unit can cast this spell more than once per phase. Pick a visible unit wholly within 18" of this unit that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is an enemy unit, inflict D3 mortal damage on it. If the target is a friendly DEATH unit, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Return a number of slain models to the target unit with a combined Health characteristic of up to 3.
  • If the target was not set up this turn and is not
legend: In a storm of morbid sorcery, Nagash blasts his foes’ souls or re-knits his minions’ bodies.

name: Supreme Lord of the Undead
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO NON-UNIQUE DEATH unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Nagash is the undisputed master of all undead creatures.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Scryhawks
description: Effect: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s Starshard Bolts while it is wholly within 12" of any friendly Vanari Auralan Sentinels units.
legend: The scryhawks that accompany Auralan Sentinels have been trained to circle above distant foes, marking them out as potential targets for Starshard Ballista crews.

name: Blinding Bolts
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that was targeted by all of this unit’s shooting attacks this phase to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is a MONSTER. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: A Starshard Ballista can be loaded with special bolts that explode with blinding light when they strike a target.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Hail of Bolts
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy INFANTRY unit that does not have Fly and that had any models slain this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
legend: After shooting, the area around a Judicator’s target is riddled with stray bolts and corpses, creating obstacles for the enemy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Step Into The Storm
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-MONSTER STORMCAST ETERNALS unit that is not in combat and is wholly within 6" of this terrain feature to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Stormreach Portals are used in battle to redirect the warriors of the Stormcast Eternals to where the fighting is fiercest.

name: Ruination Chamber
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: These veterans march where others cannot tread, fighting upon battlefields transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on their souls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: This unit was picked as the target of a non-<ky>Core</ky> ability

name: Direct The Assault
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO RUINATION CHAMBER unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, while the target is wholly within 12" of this unit, add 5 to the target’s control score.
legend: Surveying the battlefield, the Lord-Vigilant perceives a weak point in the enemy lines and orders their brethren to follow them into the breach.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Vice-Like Grip
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy non-MONSTER HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2D6. If the result exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, for the rest of the turn:
  • The target has Strike-last.
  • The target cannot use commands.
legend: The Morrgryph pounces on an enemy leader, pinning them in the grip of its talons.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Ride for Vengeance
description:
Effect: If any friendly WARRIOR CHAMBER units have been destroyed this battle:
  • You can re-roll charge rolls for this unit.
  • This unit has Strike-first if it charged in the same turn.
legend: As Stormcast casualties increase and the battle seems poised upon a knife’s edge, an armoured wedge of Stormstrike Palladors crashes into the enemy lines. Driven by a desire to avenge their fallen brethren, these warriors and their avian mounts unleash the fury of the storm on the God-King’s foes.

name: Gather the Aether
description: Effect: Add 1 to this unit’s power level while it is contesting an objective.
legend: A Stormcoven can harness the aetheric energies from the ley lines that criss-cross the Mortal Realms, ready to be unleashed at a moment’s notice.

name: Aethershock
description:
Declare: Pick a visible unit within 12" of the caster to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is a friendly unit, it has Strike-first for the rest of the turn. If the target is an enemy unit, it has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Stormcoven unleash their stored energies across the battlefield, bolstering their allies or blasting enemies to the ground.

name: Prayer of the Witness
description:
Declare: Make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, each time a friendly RUINATION CHAMBER unit uses a FIGHT ability while it is wholly within 18" of this unit, after that ability has been resolved:
  • Heal (D3) that unit. If the chanting roll was 8+, Heal (3) that unit instead.
  • That unit has Ward (6+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: Iridan serves as a beacon of light that guides the souls of those in the Ruination chambers, giving their actions purpose and calming the storm that churns within each of them.

name: Dark Flight
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic:
  • 1 model in the target unit is slain.
  • This unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability without any mortal damage being inflicted upon it.
legend: A hapless foe is crushed in the talons of Ariax before the Morrgryph takes flight once more with a beat of their ebon wings.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Ruination Chamber
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: These veterans march where others cannot tread, fighting upon battlefields transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on their souls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: This unit was picked as the target of a non-<ky>Core</ky> ability

name: Herald of Redemption
description: Effect: If a friendly RUINATION CHAMBER unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you receive 3 additional rally points.
legend: In Tornus, the troubled warriors of the Ruination chambers see a kindred spirit and heed his rallying call in battle.

name: The Light of Sigmar
description:
Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
  • Heal (D3) each friendly STORMCAST ETERNALS unit within this unit’s combat range
legend: With its shutters closed, the lantern of a Knight-Azyros soothes nearby allies. Opening it wide blinds the enemy with the full majesty of Sigmar’s light.

name: Ruination Chamber
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: These veterans march where others cannot tread, fighting upon battlefields transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on their souls.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: This unit was picked as the target of a non-<ky>Core</ky> ability

name: HUNTER’S COHESION
description:
Effect: Each time this Regiment of Renown’s Lord-Aquilor uses its ’Ride the Winds Aetheric’ ability, you can pick all units in this Regiment of Renown that are not in combat to be the targets.

In addition, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this Regiment of Renown’s Lord-Aquilor and VANGUARD-PALLADORS units that target a HUNTED enemy unit.

Designer’s Note: See the ’Astral Compass’ ability on the Vanguard-Hunters warscroll to see how an enemy unit can become Hunted.
legend: The Horizon Seekers have long roamed the wilderness together, operating in well-honed unison to run circles around the foe.

name: HOUR OF RETRIBUTION
description:
Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made by units in this Regiment of Renown.
  • Add 1 to save rolls for units in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: Aldus Valnir and Ortana dive down from the clouds into the midst of the reelingfoe, using the shock of their sudden assault to inflict maximum damage.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Dispersed Formation
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".
legend: These warriors maintain a wide formation, enabling more precise strikes and greater battlefield control.

name: Relentless Attackers
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Flyrider’s Arsenal for attacks that target units contesting an objective.
legend: Blightlords descend from fume-choked skies to smash Nurgle’s most stubborn enemies to ruin.

name: FOG OF DESPAIR
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target units in this Regiment of Renown while they are wholly within 9" of the Harbinger of Decay in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: The advance of Phulgoth’s entourage is shrouded by miasmas of concentrated misery.

name: NAUSEATING CONVALESCENCE
description: Effect: Heal (1) each unit in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: Phulgoth and his minions are empowered by the spread of hopelessness and woe.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: A Twisted Fate
description:
Declare: This unit must be deployed using this ability

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve masked by illusion. It has now been deployed.
legend: For some, their destiny is to become a mewling abomination – they just do not know it yet.

name: Waves of Mutation
description: Effect: Each time this unit or the replacement of this unit is destroyed, set up a replacement unit in reserve masked by illusion. Each friendly Chaos Spawn of Tzeentch unit can be replaced any number of times.
legend: There is no limit to Tzeentch’s appetite for change.

name: Heart of the Inferno
description:
Declare: Pick up to 2 visible friendly Flamers of Tzeentch units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the targets’ shooting attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Exalted Flamer causes the fires of its lesser kin to reach truly horrific levels of intensity.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Unnatural Heat
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that was targeted by this unit’s shooting attacks this phase to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add the number of damage points allocated to the target this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to the roll. On a 5+, subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: An Exalted Flamer’s streams of warping fire melt armour to slag and devour defensive wards.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Fiery Death From Above
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Effect: Roll a D3. On a 1, gain 1 fate point. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
  • This unit can immediately use a RETREAT ability as if it were your movement phase. No mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by that RETREAT ability.
legend: The Burning Chariot barges through enemy lines, spreading flaming ruin in its wake.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Lunatic Demise
description:
Effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain, before removing the model from play, pick 1 of the following effects:

Split: Pick a visible friendly Blue Horrors and Brimstone Horrors unit within 12" of this unit. Return up to 2 slain Blue Horror models to that unit.

Petty Vengeance: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target, then roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Should a Pink Horror be slain, it is capable of bursting into two smaller daemons or else detonating in a blast of wyrdflame.

name: Split Again
description:
Effect: Roll a dice for each Blue Horror model in this unit that is slain. On a 3+, you can add 1 Brimstone Horrors model to this unit.

Designer’s Note: You cannot have more than 10 Blue Horror models and 10 Brimstone Horrors models in a non-reinforced unit. You cannot have more than 20 Blue Horror models and 20 Brimstone Horrors models in a reinforced unit.

Models that have been slain and returned to this unit do not count as being slain for the purposes of this ability.
legend: Should a Blue Horror meet its end at the hands of the enemy, it is capable of splitting itself into two lesser daemons.

name: Brimstone Horror
description: Effect: This unit’s Brimstone Horror is a token. When this unit’s Blue Horror is slain, place this unit’s Brimstone Horror on the battlefield. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Mighty Sorcerous Bolt while its Brimstone Horror is on the battlefield. If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove this unit’s Brimstone Horror from the battlefield.
legend: If the Blue Horror is slain, it transforms into a pair of capering Brimstone Horrors.

name: Vortemis the All-seeing
description: Effect: While this unit’s Vortemis the All-seeing is on the battlefield, it has WIZARD (1).
legend: No greater practitioners of the arcane arts are there than the Magisters of Tzeentch.

name: SPARKS OF PROFANE POTENTIAL
description:
Effect: If the Magister in the Regiment of Renown has been deployed, set up one of the following MANIFESTATIONS within 1" of them:
  • 1 Burning Sigil of Tzeentch
  • 1 Tome of Eyes
  • 1 Daemonic Simulacrum
legend: Thryx’s spells are powered by the stolen daemonic essences of the daemons bound to him.

name: SKILLED SUMMONER
description:
Declare: Pick the Magister in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick 1 of the MANIFESTATIONS from the list below that is not on the battlefield, then make a casting roll of 2D6:
  • 1 Burning Sigil of Tzeentch
  • 1 Tome of Eyes
  • 1 Daemonic Simulacrum

Effect: If there is already a friendly MANIFESTATION from the list above on the battlefield, it is immediately banished. Then,
legend: Thryx is a master at manipulating the arcane manifestations of the Change God.

name: FLICKERING WYRDFLAME
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points inflicted on it this turn by WYRDFLAME SPELL abilities or attacks made with weapons that have the WYRDFLAME weapon ability to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: These unnatural flames warp and mutate even as they burn and devour.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: BOLT OF TZEENTCH
description:
Declare: Pick the Magister in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: This spell manifests as a prismatic beam of raw magic that tears its victims apart in a display of multispectral colour.

name: Exquisite Agony
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units that this MANIFESTATION passed across this turn to be the targets.

Effect: Roll 6 dice for each target. For each roll that is less than the target’s Save characteristic, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Wheels of Excruciation deliver death by a thousand exquisite cuts to those who get in their way.

name: Maiming Charge
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy INFANTRY units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: The gruesome carnage caused by Hellstriders on the charge can unnerve the staunchest foe.

name: Latching Paraspites
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target has the INFESTED keyword for the rest of the battle. INFESTED enemy units cannot move more than 6" when using non-CHARGE MOVE abilities.
legend: The Twistweald are riddled with horrific parasitic plants and fungi that latch onto others nearby, draining them of their vitality.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Pain-Induced Frenzy
description: Effect: This unit’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) if it charged in the same turn.
legend: The pain caused by the Twistweald’s parasitic infestations reaches its zenith when their thoughts turn to imminent murder-making, driving them into an agonised fury.

name: To Our Liege!
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 12" of a friendly FLESH-EATER COURTS HERO and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: There are many ghoulish legends of Crypt Flayers winging down to join their lieges upon the battlefield.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Holy Blades of Bone
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2 dice for each model in this unit. Add 2 to each roll if the target is CAVALRY. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Crypt Horrors wield huge, monstrous femurs – as well as other grisly relics – as if they were blessed weapons.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, subtract 3 from its power level.

name: Utter Contempt
description: Effect: This unit ignores the effects of DELUSION abilities.
legend: Nagash is disgusted by the rabid mania of the Flesh-eaters, but their usefulness to his goals is beyond doubt.

name: The Staff of Power
description: Effect: Add 2 to casting rolls for this unit while it has not miscast any spells this turn. If this unit miscasts a spell, ignore the restriction that would stop this unit from casting any more spells this turn.
legend: Alakanash is capped with gems of purest grave-sand.

name: Hand of Dust
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy HERO or MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Hide a dice in one of your hands or under one of two appropriate containers. Your opponent must pick one of your hands or containers. If they pick the one hiding the dice, this ability has no effect. If they pick the empty one, the target is automatically destroyed.
legend: Nagash’s touch can turn a foe to a pile of dusty bones in moments.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Invocation of Nagash
description:
Declare: This unit can cast this spell more than once per phase. Pick a visible unit wholly within 18" of this unit that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is an enemy unit, inflict D3 mortal damage on it. If the target is a friendly DEATH unit, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Return a number of slain models to the target unit with a combined Health characteristic of up to 3.
  • The target has WARD (5+) until the start of your next turn.
legend: In a storm of morbid sorcery, Nagash blasts his foes’ souls or re-knits his minions’ bodies.

name: Supreme Lord of the Undead
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO NON-UNIQUE DEATH unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Nagash is the undisputed master of all undead creatures.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: DERANGED TRANSFORMATION
description:
Declare: Pick the Ushoran in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick another visible unit in this Regiment of Renown wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic.
  • Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks.
legend: The spellcaster causes the limbs of a nearby pack to bulge and lengthen, allowing the creatures to charge forwards at a furious pace and imbuing them with greater strength.

name: MADDENING RADIANCE
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by units in this Regiment of Renown while they are wholly within 12" of the Ushoran in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: The very presence of Ushoran sends his devoted subjects into a feeding frenzy.

name: SUMMON DELUDED THRONGS
description:
Declare: Pick the Ushoran in this Regiment of Renown to use this ability, then pick another unit in this Regiment of Renown that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units. The replacement unit is part of this Regiment of Renown.
legend: Ushoran travels with a seething entourage of cannibals, all of whom wait upon his howled summons.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: URGENT MISSIVE
description: Effect: Units in this Regiment of Renown can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on units in this Regiment of Renown by RETREAT abilities.
legend: Sir Jerrion and his retainers are devoted to their holy duty, which sees them lope and scrabble across the battlefield with terrifying haste.

name: Ancient Barrow Curse
description:
Effect: If an attack made with this unit’s King’s Relic Weapon scores a critical hit, the target unit becomes cursed for the rest of the battle. Subtract 1 from save rolls for cursed units even if this unit has been destroyed.

Designer’s Note: Multiple enemy units can become cursed by this ability but the same enemy unit cannot become cursed more than once.
legend: The weapons of the most powerful Wight Kings leave a scar on the soul that causes the victim to slowly crumble to dust.

name: Immortal Conqueror
description:
Declare: Pick an objective or terrain feature within enemy territory.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by friendly DEATHRATTLE units while they are wholly within 6" of that objective or terrain feature.
legend: A mighty general in life, in undeath, the endless need to wage war and conquer the lands of the living lingers on in this ancient wight as a thirst that can never be quenched.

name: SOULPIKE
description:
Declare: Pick the Neferata in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time the target uses a CHARGE ability, immediately after that ability has been resolved, roll a number of dice equal to the unmodified charge roll for that ability. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The caster places a hex on a group of foes so that, should they move too hastily or aggressively, they risk impaling their own souls on a shimmering forest of purple-black spears.

name: PREMEDITATED DEMISE
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of the Neferata in this Regiment of Renown to be the target.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, ward rolls cannot be made for damage points inflicted on the target by attacks made by units in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: Neferata’s guile has already ensured that her foe’s defences will falter at a critical point.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: THE BLOOD QUEEN’S WILL
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit contesting an objective that the Neferata in this Regiment of Renown is contesting to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2-5, subtract 10 from the control score of the target for the rest of the turn. On a 6, the target has a maximum control score of 1 for the rest of the turn.
legend: When Neferata takes to the field, she does so only to ensure the completion of plans long since spun.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn

name: VITIATING VAPOURS
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from ward rolls for enemy units while they are within 12" of the Corpse Cart in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: By burning grains of grave-sand in his brazier, Veremord creates smoke that can corrode eldritch defences.

name: LEGEND AMONG GRAVEROBBERS
description:
Declare: Pick the Corpse Cart in this Regiment of Renown to use this ability if it is within 3" of the Deadwalker Zombies unit in this Regiment of Renown. Then, pick each enemy INFANTRY, CAVALRY and BEAST unit within 12" of the Corpse Cart to be the targets.

Effect: For each target that had any models slain this turn, you can return D3 slain models to the Deadwalker Zombies unit in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: Veremord’s reputation as a graverobber is unsurpassed.

name: STALKING BLADES
description:
Declare: Pick the Mannfred von Carstein in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target for each other enemy unit within 3" of the target.
legend: The enemy’s minds are filled with doubts as to their allies’ true loyalties, which manifest as tenebrous shades that stalk among their ranks. As soon as the victims’ backs are turned, these gheists dart forth to plunge spectral daggers between the shoulders of those overcome with paranoia.

name: ENGULFING SHADOWS
description: Effect: Each time a unit in this Regiment of Renown is set up, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Those who serve Mannfred von Carstein excel in the unforeseen strike.

name: COVER OF NIGHT
description:
Declare: Pick 1 friendly unit in this Regiment of Renown that is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: Mannfred is a master of misdirection; few can predict where his hosts will strike from next.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of The Dread Mace is 4 and this unit has a Control characteristic of 10.

name: The Shield Inviolate
description: Effect: If this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 3+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per SPELL ability.
legend: Tuskbreaker has the power to guard Kragnos against even the most potent magical force.

name: Avatar of Destruction
description: Effect: If this unit would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Kragnos is the embodiment of Ghur’s relentless ferocity. No single strike can lay him low.

name: Rampaging Destruction
description:
Effect: If this unit charged this phase, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Roll a dice for each enemy unit within 1" of this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
  • Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit and roll 2D6. On a 7, this ability has no effect. Otherwise, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the results on the dice used for the 2D6 roll multiplied together. For example, a 2D6 roll of 2 and 6 would inflict 12 mortal damage (2 × 6).
legend: Kragnos rampages through the press of his foes, his hooves flattening all in his path.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: The End of Empires
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for friendly DESTRUCTION units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit, to a maximum of 3.
legend: Where Kragnos goes, the hordes of Destruction follow.

name: DEAD CUNNING, FOR A GARGANT
description:
Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s weapons.

Then, roll a dice. On a 4+, this unit has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: The aelven artefact hanging from Bundo’s ear has increased his intellect, giving him brains as well as brawn. He can be uncannily patient, knowing just where and when to strike to cause maximum havoc. Some say his hoard even contains strange papery things called ‘books’…
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: TIMBERRRRR!
description: Effect: When the MEGA-GARGANT in this regiment of renown is slain, before removing it from play, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield within 3" of that model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point that has a lower Health characteristic than that model.
legend: A dying gargant is a weapon of ruin in its own right, though it is anyone’s guess where their body will fall.

name: MIGHTY WALLOPER
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The great beasts of the Godswallow Delta are practically endangered species, for the crazed Odo spends almost every waking second relentlessly hunting them before grinding their bones and caving their skulls in brutal displays of violence.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: TIMBERRRRR!
description: Effect: When the MEGA-GARGANT in this regiment of renown is slain, before removing it from play, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield within 3" of that model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point that has a lower Health characteristic than that model.
legend: A dying gargant is a weapon of ruin in its own right, though it is anyone’s guess where their body will fall.

name: GRIEVOUS HALITOSIS
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Drogg has dined well on the spoils of war, having smashed and eaten the contents of many a fortified town – yet he has never picked his teeth clean. His breath is so foul that it can stun an ox at ten paces.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: TIMBERRRRR!
description: Effect: When the MEGA-GARGANT in this regiment of renown is slain, before removing it from play, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield within 3" of that model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point that has a lower Health characteristic than that model.
legend: A dying gargant is a weapon of ruin in its own right, though it is anyone’s guess where their body will fall.

name: SHAKE THE EARTH
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If the target is INFANTRY, double the amount of mortal damage inflicted.
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Grunnock has learnt that the best way to break an enemy army is to send its soldiers flying. His signature move – leaping high before stomping down to cause a small earthquake – is feared for good reason.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: TIMBERRRRR!
description: Effect: When the MEGA-GARGANT in this regiment of renown is slain, before removing it from play, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield within 3" of that model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point that has a lower Health characteristic than that model.
legend: A dying gargant is a weapon of ruin in its own right, though it is anyone’s guess where their body will fall.

name: Bloodthirsty Predators
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Allopex’s Ferocious Bite while it is within 6" of any damaged enemy units or while it is within 6" of any enemy units that had any models slain in the same turn.
legend: Allopexes are drawn towards the scent of freshly spilt blood.

name: Ensnared
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy MONSTER or CAVALRY unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
legend: The Akhelians are experts at ensnaring their prey with a well-placed harpoon or Retarius net.

name: Duty Unto Death
description: Effect: While any friendly FYRESLAYERS INFANTRY HEROes are wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those friendly units have Ward (5+).
legend: Hearthguard Berzerkers are sworn to protect their lodge and its masters until their dying breath.

name: Fires of Vengeance
description: Effect: While this unit is within the combat ranges of any damaged friendly FYRESLAYERS HEROES, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons.
legend: Should one of the elders of the lodge be harmed while under the protection of Hearthguard Berzerkers, they are sent into such a vengeful rage that they become nigh unstoppable.

name: Whirlwind of Destruction
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons if this unit charged this turn.
legend: With the light of Grimnir burning in their eyes, these impetuous warriors hurl themselves into the fray, leaving a trail of death in their wake.

name: Duty Unto Death
description: Effect: While any friendly FYRESLAYERS INFANTRY HEROES are wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those friendly units have Ward (5+).
legend: Hearthguard Berzerkers are sworn to protect their lodge and its masters until their dying breath.

name: Smouldering Braziers
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: With each swing of a flamestrike poleaxe, the brazier chained to it arcs towards the foe, sparks and fire trailing in its wake.

name: TOE TO TOE
description: Effect: Subtract 10 from the control scores of enemy MONSTERS while they are in combat with any units in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: The duardin who follow Fjori into battle do not back down from any foe, no matter the size.

name: GRIMNIR’S DEFIANCE
description: Effect: Units in this Regiment of Renown cannot be picked to be the target of RAMPAGE abilities used by enemy units.
legend: For these vengeful Fyreslayers, the bigger the enemy, the better.

name: Blot Toad
description:
Declare: You receive 1 Blot Toad token for each Ripperdactyl Chief or Ripperdactyl Riders unit in your army, to a maximum of 3 tokens. Pick a number of enemy units equal to the number of Blot Toads you have to be the targets.

Effect: Place a Blot Toad next to each target.
legend: When a Ripperdactyl flock takes flight, the Seraphon will seed creatures known as blot toads across the battlefield. These loathsome amphibians emit a pervasive stink that is unpalatable to all cold-blooded creatures, but especially the Ripperdactyls.

name: Toad Rage
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Ripperdactyl’s Tearing Jaws while it is in combat with any units that have a Blot Toad.
legend: The mere scent of a blot toad sends Ripperdactyls into a frenzy.

name: Dispersed Formation
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".

name: Deadly Cargo
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that this unit passed across this phase to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit, and add 2 to each roll if this unit is within the combat ranges of any friendly Terradon Chief units. For each 5+:

  • Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
  • If any damage points are allocated by this ability and the target does not have Fly, the target cannot use RUN abilities until the start of your next turn.
legend: Terradons carry heavy boulders hewn from meteoric rock and carved with sigils of destruction. When these are dropped upon enemy lines, those not immediately crushed are sent flying in all directions.

name: Attack From on High
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: Terradons circle high in the sky, only darting down for a brief moment to launch a strafing run.

name: Dispersed Formation
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".

name: Ark of Sotek
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 different enemy units within 9" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: So numerous are the snakes unleashed by an Ark of Sotek that some will find their way past the foe’s defences to deliver a lethal venomous bite.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Tail Swipe
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit, to a maximum of 8. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The mighty Bastiladon swings its clubbed tail into the ranks of enemies, knocking them back with brutal force.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Bone Spirit
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly BONESPLITTERZ CAVALRY unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn. This ability also affects Companion weapons.
legend: Maniak Weirdnobs are followed closely into battle by other boarboys, their wild cries riling the ornery hogs as much as it gets the ladz raring for a fight.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Wurrgog Mask
description:
Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • The Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Deadly Green Bolts is 12 instead of D6.
  • For each unmodified hit roll of 1 for a shooting attack made by this unit, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit after the SHOOT ability has been resolved.
legend: The shaman taps into the power of their mask, unleashing the full might of their deadly green bolts – but if they stare too long, their head may explode!
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Squiggly Curse
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy HERO in combat with the caster to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. If the target is destroyed by this spell, add 1 to this unit’s power level for the rest of the battle.
legend: The shaman transforms an enemy into a tiny squiggly beast. Scooping up the indignant creature, the shaman bags himself a new squeaky wotsit that he can squeeze to boost his spells.

name: Primal Hex
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy WIZARD within 24" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, each time the target uses a SPELL or UNBIND ability, this unit gains 1 ritual point.
legend: With a bellow and vigorous shaking of his Bonebeast Stikk, the Wardokk makes it clear that any ‘messin’ about’ will not go well for the enemy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Wild Enthusiasm
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Power Through’ command even if it has not charged this turn. In addition, when you pick a target for that command, the target does not have to have a lower Health characteristic than this unit.
legend: Between their own flagrant disregard for self-preservation and their hogs’ nigh uncontrollable rampages, Savage Boarboys often barrel right into and through even the most dangerous enemies.

name: Morboy Fury
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, enemy units cannot use commands while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: When Morboys charge into battle, the sheer mass and impetus of their charge can crumple battlelines and disrupt the coordination of even the finest warriors.

name: On a Tear
description: Effect: Add 5 to this unit’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: The bellowing jeers of the boarboys and the squealing roars of their ferocious mounts as they pelt towards their targets makes for a bowel-shuddering sight.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>Charge</ky> ability for this unit

name: Aim Fer Its Eyes
description:
Declare: If all of the attacks made with this unit’s Stinga Bows this turn targeted the same enemy unit, pick that enemy unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is a BEAST or CAVALRY unit, or add 2 to the roll if the target is a MONSTER. On a 4+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s Companion weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Arrowboys loose shots at the eyes of their bestial prey, causing them immense pain and fouling their attacks.
condition: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: The Savage Hordes
description: Effect: Add 10 to the control score of this unit while it is in combat with any enemy units that charged this turn.
legend: Savage Orruks are the backbone of their warclan, going to battle in great mobs that become wild and intractable once the fighting gets going.

name: Da Final Fling
description: Effect: While this unit is not in combat, each time a model in this unit is slain by a shooting attack and that model was within 12" of the attacking unit, roll a dice. Add 2 to the roll if the attacking unit was a MONSTER. On a 4+, inflict D6 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the SHOOT ability has been resolved.
legend: Should a Big Stabba team be slain before they get a chance to ‘give ’em a stabbin’’, they will use their last moments to hurl their Gorktoof spear at the foe.

name: Havin’ A Good Old Rukk
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO BONESPLITTERZ INFANTRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: As the boss gets stuck in, the boyz nearby can’t help but get involved.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for this unit

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of The Dread Mace is 4 and this unit has a Control characteristic of 10.

name: Rampaging Destruction
description:
Effect: If this unit charged this phase, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Roll a dice for each enemy unit within 1" of this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
  • Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit and roll 2D6. On a 7, this ability has no effect. Otherwise, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the results on the dice used for the 2D6 roll multiplied together. For example, a 2D6 roll of 2 and 6 would inflict 12 mortal damage (2 × 6).
legend: Kragnos rampages through the press of his foes, his hooves flattening all in his path.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: The End of Empires
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for friendly DESTRUCTION units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit, to a maximum of 3.
legend: Where Kragnos goes, the hordes of Destruction follow.

name: The Shield Inviolate
description: Effect: If this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 3+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per SPELL ability.
legend: Tuskbreaker has the power to guard Kragnos against even the most potent magical force.

name: Avatar of Destruction
description: Effect: If this unit would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Kragnos is the embodiment of Ghur’s relentless ferocity. No single strike can lay him low.

name: Hedkrakka, Gob of Gork
description: Effect: While this unit’s Hedkrakka, Gob of Gork, is on the battlefield, it has Wizard (1).
legend: The self-proclaimed Gob of Gork claims to hear the voice of Gorkamorka through his pet squig-snake.

name: Go For Da Eyes
description:
Declare: If this unit’s Dakko Sharp-Stikka is on the battlefield, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is a MONSTER. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Dakko is one of the more accomplished archers in the warclans and can land a shot with surprising accuracy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of The Dread Mace is 4 and this unit has a Control characteristic of 10.

name: Rampaging Destruction
description:
Effect: If this unit charged this phase, pick 1 of the following effects:
  • Roll a dice for each enemy unit within 1" of this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
  • Pick an enemy MONSTER in combat with this unit and roll 2D6. On a 7, this ability has no effect. Otherwise, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the results on the dice used for the 2D6 roll multiplied together. For example, a 2D6 roll of 2 and 6 would inflict 12 mortal damage (2 × 6).
legend: Kragnos rampages through the press of his foes, his hooves flattening all in his path.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for friendly DESTRUCTION units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit, to a maximum of 3.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, when it uses the ‘Malfunctioning Leystone’ ability, roll 1 dice instead of 3.

name: Malfunctioning Leystone
description:
Effect: Roll 3 dice. You must pick 1 of those dice and apply the effect that corresponds to its value. Effects 2-6 persist until the start of your next turn.

1 - Glyph of Shyish: Inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.

2 - Glyph of Ghur: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly TROGGOTH units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

3 - Glyph of Aqshy: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly TROGGOTH units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

4 - Glyph of Hysh: This unit can use UNBIND abilities as if it had WIZARD (1).

5 - Gly
legend: Trugg can unwittingly channel powerful magic through the contraption on his back.

name: Greater Regeneration
description: Effect: Heal (D6) this unit.
legend: After centuries spent bathing in the focused healing energies of Ghyran, Trugg is almost impossible to kill, even by troggoth standards.

name: Crushing Grip
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: The vice-like grasp of Trugg can squeeze the life out of all but the largest opponent.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Regeneration
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Troggoths are able to regrow injured flesh almost as quickly as it is harmed.

name: Magical Resistance
description: Effect: If this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 4+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit.
legend: The realmstone-infused mushrooms that Dankhold Troggoths consume make them naturally resistant to the effects of magic.

name: Wade and Smash
description: Effect: This unit can move 6" but must end that move in combat. Then, roll a D3 for each enemy unit within 1" of this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
legend: The Dankhold Troggoth rampages through the enemy lines, swinging its enormous club back and forth and sending enemies flying in all directions.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: SNEAKY DISTRACTION
description:
Declare: Pick the Gobbapalooza in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are wholly within 12" of the caster.
legend: The shaman’s unnaturally shrill cries and magical light-show hypnotically draw the attention of their foes.

name: SUPER-SECRET TUNNELS
description:
Declare: Pick a unit in this Regiment of Renown that has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up that unit in reserve in a super-secret tunnel. It has now been deployed.
legend: Rabble-Rowzas have a knack for locating hidden passages beneath the earth.

name: SUDDEN EMERGENCE
description:
Declare: If the Rabble-Rowza in this Regiment of Renown is in a super-secret tunnel, pick it to be the target.

Effect: Set up the target anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, set up all other friendly units that are in a super-secret tunnel within 3" of the target and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Braggit and his ladz tend to turn up wherever they are least expected (and least desired).
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: IRONCLAD DESPOILERS
description:
Effect: Add 1 to save rolls for units in this Regiment of Renown while they are contesting an objective you control.

Add 1 to wound rolls for units in this Regiment of Renown while they are contesting an objective you do not control.
legend: Punching into the enemy lines like a mailed fist, once these warriors have taken a vital position on the battlefield, little can be done to wrest control from them.

name: GODMARKED LEGION
description:
Effect: The unit in this Regiment of Renown gains the ‘Gifts of Chaos’ ability and one of the following faction keywords that matches your army’s faction:
  • BLADES OF KHORNE
  • DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH
  • MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE
  • HEDONITES OF SLAANESH
legend: The mightiest of warriors in the godmarked legions of Chaos can be elevated to daemonhood should their patron deem them worthy.

name: GIFTS OF CHAOS
description:
Effect:
  • If this unit has the BLADES OF KHORNE keyword, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its Hellforged Weapons and its Hellforged Weapons have the Blood-Hungry weapon ability.
  • If this unit has the DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH keyword, it has WIZARD (1).
  • If this unit has the MAGGOTKIN OF
legend: This daemon takes to the field redolent with god-given gifts.

name: GOROAN FORGECRAFT
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DESTRUCTION HERO that is within the combat range of a HERO in this Regiment of Renown to be the target.

Effect: On a 3+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Goroans were renowned for their skill at smithery, and even orruks will acknowledge their general killiness.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: BELLOW OF GORKAMORKA
description:
Declare: Pick the Ogroid Thaumaturge in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST until the start of your next turn. In addition, while the target has the BURNING keyword, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.
legend: Goroan shamans who maintain the old ways channel the sense-blasting roars of Gorkamorka through their magic.

name: COLLECT THE TITHE
description:
Declare: Pick the GOTHIZZAR HARVESTER in this Regiment of Renown to use this ability, then pick a non-HERO INFANTRY unit (friendly or enemy) within its combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain, then give the unit using this ability 1 bone-tithe point.
legend: Nothing may halt the tithe-harvest.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: SOUL TAX
description:
Declare: Pick the Mortisan Ossifector in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, then:
  • Pick a friendly unit, excluding units in this Regiment of Renown, to be the target.
  • Pick a unit in this Regiment of Renown to be the recipient.
The target and the recipient must be wholly within 12" of and visible to the caster. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • The target has a maximum control score of 1.
  • Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for the recipient’s combat attacks.
legend: Part of the Ossiarchs’ tithe is inevitably a portion of their allies’ souls.

name: REBUILD ON THE MARCH
description:
Declare: Pick the Gothizzar Harvester in this Regiment of Renown to use this ability if it has 6 bone-tithe points. Then, pick another unit in this Regiment of Renown that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Reset the Gothizzar Harvester’s bone-tithe points to 0. Then, set up a replacement of the target unit with half the number of models (rounding up) wholly within 9" of the Gothizzar Harvester and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Ossiarch war-constructs can fashion new warriors at a fearsome rate if bone is in ample supply.

name: AN EYE FOR LOOT
description:
Declare: This ability must be used to deploy this Regiment of Renown.

Effect: Set up the units in this Regiment of Renown in reserve studying the battlefield. They have now been deployed.
legend: The Exile Scavengers observe from above to locate the best spot to swoop in and ‘claim their fee’.

name: SWOOP IN
description:
Declare: Pick the Grundstok Gunhauler in this Regiment of Renown to use this ability if it is studying the battlefield.

Effect: Set up the Grundstok Gunhauler on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units that have an artefact of power and more than 9" from all other enemy units. Then, set up all other units in this Regiment of Renown wholly within 3" of the Grundstok Gunhauler and more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: Once the moment is right, Gronn and his crew strike hard and fast.

name: WHAT’S YOURS IS MINE
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with a unit in this Regiment of Renown to be the target. Then, pick an artefact of power the target has.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll for each unit in this Regiment of Renown that is in combat with the target. On a 6+, the target no longer has that artefact of power.
legend: Gronn has always had a cavalier attitude when it comes to ownership.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase

name: A DELUDED QUEST
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit to be the target.

Effect: The target has the ENEMY OF THE EVERCHOSEN keyword.
legend: The deluded Squires of the Everchosen think they have been sent on a personal mission by Archaon.

name: A QUEST WELL DONE
description: Effect: If the enemy ENEMY OF THE EVERCHOSEN unit is destroyed by a unit in this Regiment of Renown, add 10 to the control score of each unit in this Regiment of Renown for the rest of the battle.
legend: To excel in the Everchosen’s eyes brings Utgar and his followers a fleeting glee.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn

name: ENDLESS WANDERING
description:
Declare: Pick a unit in this Regiment of Renown that is not in combat to use this ability.

Effect: That unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: The spirits of the Lost-Song Forest are ever in motion, desperately seeking the ancestral harmonies denied to them.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: OMINOUS FOG
description: Effect: Units in this Regiment of Renown are not visible to enemy units more than 12" from them while they are wholly within 9" of the Treelord in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: A thick fog follows the Lost-Song Spirits, making them difficult to identify until it is too late.

name: INCUBATION PERIOD
description:
Declare: This ability must be used to deploy this Regiment of Renown.

Effect: Set up the units in this Regiment of Renown in reserve festering within. They have now been deployed.
legend: Nurgle’s gifts can incubate slowly within the afflicted, gaining a malign sentience.

name: BURSTING WITH LIFE
description: Effect: If a friendly non-NURGLE’S GIFT unit would be destroyed, before the last model is removed from play, roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll for each other friendly non-NURGLE’S GIFT unit that has been destroyed this battle. On a 5+, pick a friendly unit that is festering within and set it up wholly within 6" of that model. It can be set up in combat.
legend: Guts roil and buboes weep before cheering Nurglings burst forth from the slain.

name: PROJECTILE VOMIT
description:
Declare: Pick this unit to use this ability if it has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn. Then, pick a point on the battlefield within 6" of this unit and pick all other units (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that target equal to the roll.
legend: Better out than in, as they say…
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: BELLOWING MOCKERY
description:
Declare: Pick this unit to use this ability if it has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn, then pick an enemy unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Drunken gargants often holler incoherent insults to aggravate and taunt.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: WHAT’RE YOU LOOKIN’ AT?
description:
Declare: Pick this unit to use this ability if it charged this turn and has not used a RAMPAGE ability this turn. Then, pick an enemy unit within 9" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2D6. This unit can move a number of inches equal to the roll. It can pass through enemy models and must end that move in combat with the target.
legend: Bleary eyes narrowed, the gargant picks a fight with a cocky-looking target.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: GO DAT WAY!
description:
Declare: Pick the Dankhold Troggoth in this Regiment of Renown to be the target if it is within 12" of the Loonboss in this Regiment of Renown.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, the target can still use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: Snerk makes sure to give his troggoth mate a jab if they get distracted. Which they do. Often.

name: TAKTIKAL COWERING
description:
Effect: While the Loonboss in this Regiment of Renown is within the combat range of the Dankhold Troggoth in this Regiment of Renown:
  • That Loonboss has WARD (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for that Loonboss, allocate 1 damage point to that Dankhold Troggoth after the damage sequence for that Loonboss has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Snerk can usually be found hurling insults from behind his mate’s solid, regenerating body.

name: Unstoppable Battle Fury
description: Effect: is unit can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
legend: Once Gotrek has started to fight, he continues to do so with a relentless fury that abates only when all his opponents lie slain.

name: ‘I’ll Get There Myself!’
description: Effect: This unit cannot be set up in reserve and cannot be targeted by abilities that would remove it from the battleeld.
legend: Gotrek is renowned for his legendary stubbornness.

name: Kompany Taktikz
description: Effect: Pick a friendly Hobgrot Slittaz unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Slittabosses drill their hobgrots without mercy – after all, the more decisively they strike, the better chance they have of grabbing up the loot.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Toxic Stash
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, it is automatically destroyed.
legend: A Slittaboss’s swindling talents are used to secure choice poisons that can overwhelm even a stamping ogor.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Man Da Tower!
description:
Effect: While this terrain feature has a Shouty Boss:

  • The Shouty Boss cannot use MOVE abilities.
  • Instead of measuring range or visibility to and from the Shouty Boss, measure to and from this terrain feature instead.
  • All attacks that would target the Shouty Boss target this terrain feature instead.
  • If this terrain feature is destroyed, before removing it from the battlefield, inflict D3 mortal damage on the Shouty Boss. Then, set up the Shouty Boss on the battlefield within 3" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer the Shouty Boss. If it is not possible to set up the Shouty Boss, it is slain.
legend: Orruk bosses know they look dead impressive when lording it up from an idol of their god.

name: Sinister Stare
description: Effect: Add 1 to dirty trick rolls for friendly Kruleboyz units wholly within 12" of this terrain feature or for enemy units within 12" of this terrain feature. If this terrain feature has a Shouty Boss, add 1 to dirty trick rolls for friendly KRULEBOYZ units wholly within 18" of this terrain feature instead of wholly within 12" or for enemy units within 18" of this terrain feature instead of within 12".
legend: Kruleboyz find it hilarious to subject foes under the insidious influence of a Skaregob Totem’s hallucinogenic fogs to a host of nasty surprises.

name: Up We Go!
description:
Declare: If this terrain feature does not have a Shouty Boss, pick a friendly KRULEBOYZ INFANTRY HERO that is not in combat and is within 3" of it to be the target.

Effect: Place the target on this terrain feature. The target is now a Shouty Boss (see ‘Man da Tower!’).
legend: The orruk hauls themselves up to the idol’s platform.

name: I’m Off!
description: Effect: If this terrain feature has a Shouty Boss that was not placed on it this turn, set up the Shouty Boss on the battlefield wholly within 6" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer a Shouty Boss.
legend: The orruk makes a quick exit.

name: Multiple Parts
description: Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and all its parts are removed from play.

name: Wandering Destruction
description:
Declare: Pick a part of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield wholly within 9" of the other part of this MANIFESTATION.

Then, roll a D3 for each enemy unit within 3" of the target. On a 2+:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
  • That unit has the STOMPED keyword until the start of your next turn.
  • Subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for STOMPED units, to a minimum of 1.
legend: You can’t expect Gork to stand still when there’s fighting about.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase

name: Tricksy Footing
description: Effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are within 6" of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: Those who stagger into these eldritch quagmires must use all their strength simply to avoid being pulled under.

name: Grasping Gunge
description: Effect: Enemy units cannot use RUN abilities while they are within 6" of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: The arcane protoplasm of a Morkspit Marsh seizes limbs tight, dragging at those who draw too close.

name: Bellowing Waaagh!-Cries
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly IRONJAWZ or KRULEBOYZ WIZARD or PRIEST within 3" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Pick either 1 or 2 to add to casting rolls or chanting rolls for the target until the start of your next turn. Then, roll a number of dice equal to the number picked. For each 1-2, allocate 1 damage point to the target (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). For each 5+, until the start of your next turn, add 1 to charge rolls for fri
legend: Spurred on by the carnage sweeping the battlefield, the Gork-Roara spews out great drifts of Waaagh! energy that orruks tap into – knowingly or otherwise.

legend: The orruk makes a quick exit.

name: Aggressively Bossy
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this terrain feature to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if this terrain feature has a Shouty Boss. On a 4+, pick 1 of the following effects to apply to the target until the start of your next turn:

Dat’s Ours, Ya Git!: Subtract 3 from the target’s control score.

Zog Off Wiv Ya Magic!: Subtract 1 from casting rolls and/or chanting rolls for the target.

Oi! Hold It!: Subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
legend: Commands and insults bellowed from around this tower seem to carry extra weight.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase

name: Dead ’Ard
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target this unit.
legend: Whether through natural hardiness or sheer belligerence, Ironskull and his boyz fight on through the most grievous wounds, hollering and cheering as they batter their foes into the ground.

name: In Their Element
description: Effect: The first time an enemy MONSTER is destroyed by this unit, add 1 to wound rolls for this unit’s attacks for the rest of the battle.
legend: Morgok and his mob hunt down the most fearsome monsters in Ghur, growing more ferocious and belligerent with each such creature they smash and hack to bits.

name: GRUNTA WAAAGH!
description:
Declare: You can use this ability if this Regiment of Renown’s Tuskboss on Maw-grunta is on the battlefield.

Effect: For the rest of the phase, each time a friendly unit in this Regiment of Renown finishes a charge move, roll a D3 for each enemy unit within 1" of that unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll. If that enemy unit is INFANTRY, add 1 to the mortal damage inflicted (if any).
legend: Just before the stampede crashes headlong into the enemy lines, the Tuskboss bellows a mighty ‘Waaagh!’, encouraging their steeds to cause as much carnage as possible with their impact.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Charge Phase

name: PULLIN’ AHEAD
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit in this Regiment of Renown that charged this turn and has not used any RAMPAGE abilities this turn to be the target.

Effect: The target can move D6". It must end that move in combat. Then, add 1 to the target’s momentum points. After this ability has been resolved, the target cannot use any other RAMPAGE abilities for the rest of the turn.
legend: In their race across the realms, Zog and Goz will blithely pile on the speed and go crashing straight through enemy lines.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: BOMBZ AWAY, LADZ!
description: Effect: Friendly units in this Regiment of Renown can use RUN abilities and still use SHOOT abilities later in the turn while they are wholly within 12" of this Regiment of Renown’s Swampboss Skumdrekk.
legend: Da Kountin’ Krew need only a single thumping drumbeat to start hurling their grenades.

name: SNATCH ’EM UP!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this Regiment of Renown’s Swampboss Skumdrekk to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is at least double the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.
legend: Skumdrekk and his hobgrot toadies are constantly on the lookout for new victims and beasts to snatch up.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase

name: Multiple Parts
description: Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and both its parts are removed from play.

name: Ensnaring Soul-Drain
description: Effect: Each time an enemy unit uses a MOVE ability while it is within 9" of any parts of this MANIFESTATION, the effects of the ‘Fly’ ability do not apply to that unit. Enemy units cannot be set up within 9" of either part of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: The foul energies of the Shards link the prisms to one another, ensnaring nearby creatures in a web of animus-draining magic.

name: Phantasmal Translocation
description: Effect: Pick a part of this MANIFESTATION, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield wholly within 9" of the other part and more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: One pair of Shards blinks out of existence, only to reappear beside the other prisms a moment later.

name: Wild Form
description: Effect: Each time this MANIFESTATION is targeted by the ‘Banish Manifestation’ ability, if it would be banished, it is not banished Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: This manifestation is notoriously wilful, resisting any effort by sorcerers to tame or banish it.

name: Arcane Predator
description: Effect: You can add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for this MANIFESTATION, to a maximum of 3, while it is within 18" of any enemy MANIFESTATIONS, but if you do so, it must end the charge move within 1/2" of an enemy MANIFESTATION.
legend: Krondspine Incarnates are relentless predators, hunting both living creatures and arcane entities with equal ferocity.

name: Devourer of Magics
description: Effect: If this MANIFESTATION destroyed any enemy MANIFESTATIONS this turn, Heal (6) this MANIFESTATION.
legend: A Krondspine Incarnate feasts upon magical energies, ripping into them like a Carnosaur might a haunch of meat.

name: Da Frazzlefangz
description:
Effect: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit:
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls for that enemy unit’s attacks.
  • That enemy unit cannot use the ‘All-out Attack’ command.
legend: Glareface Frazzlegit’s reflected gaze angrily beams out from Droggz’s flashy back-banner, blinding nearby enemies so he can crack their skulls while they can’t see.

name: Time Ta Scarper
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, the unit using that FIGHT ability can move 2D6" after that FIGHT ability has been resolved. It can move through the combat ranges of any enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.
legend: Droggz knows exactly when to get his gitz out of a sticky situation so that they can come back for ‘anuvver go’ once the odds are in their favour again.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>Fight</ky> ability for a unit wholly within 9" of this unit

name: Rip ’Em Ta Bits
description: Effect: Pick a friendly GITMOB unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Whether inspired by the Grand Snarlboss’s cruel example or just worried what will happen if they don’t follow suit, the Gitmobs join Droggz in tearing into the foe.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>FIGHT</ky> ability for this unit

name: Gimme All Da Light
description: Effect: Friendly GITMOB units that are not Frazzlegit Shamans on War-Wheelas cannot be targeted by shooting attacks while they are wholly within 6" of this unit.
legend: As a Frazzlegit Shaman absorbs the ambient light around them, the surrounding area becomes dark and dank – perfect for the Gitmobs to hide in.

name: Frazzlemist
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 visible enemy units within 9" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Snaking plumes of sparking, crackling smoke issue forth from the shaman’s staff, spiralling across the battlefield in search of lungs to scorch and eyes to burn.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: I Got Dis, Boss
description: Effect: While a friendly Snarlboss is within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and that Snarlboss have WARD (5+).
legend: Wolfgitz look out for their Snarlboss in battle, if only because it makes knifin’ him later easier once he’s let his guard down.

name: Careening Destruction
description:
Effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through other models and the combat ranges of enemy units, but it cannot end that move in combat. Then, pick up to 1 enemy INFANTRY or CAVALRY unit that this unit passed across during that move to be the target. Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Add 1 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted for each model in this unit

Designer’s Note: This unit can use this ability even if it is in combat.
legend: Hurtling across the battlefield at death-defying speed, Sunsteala Wheelas careen straight through their enemies leaving behind trails of devastation.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: Markin’ Territory
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, add 5 to its control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: Giant Snarlfangs are extremely territorial and will ferociously attack trespassers on land marked with their scent.

name: Frazzleburned Scrap
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, it has has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.
legend: After the boss, Snarlpack Cavalry often get first dibs on loot, and they have an eye for the scrap and wotsits with the best light-absorbing properties. In battle, they have learned how to unleash these energies from their weapons at just the right moment, dazzling the enemy as their charge hits home.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Keepin’ Up Wiv Da Boss
description: Effect: Pick a friendly Sunsteala Wheelas unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Sunsteala Wheela grots closely follow their boss into battle - after all, if he has an 'accident', they are in with a good chance of taking over as the new boss!
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>FIGHT</ky> ability for this unit

name: Da Glare of Frazzlegit
description:
Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are in combat with any friendly Sunsteala Wheelas.
  • Add 6" to the Move characteristic of this unit and friendly Sunsteala Wheelas.
legend: At a yell from the Snarlboss, the Wheela crews release the Hyshian light absorbed by the metal in their chariots.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: Frazzlegit’s Flame Stream
description:
Effect: This unit can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through other models and the combat ranges of enemy units, but it cannot end that move in combat. Then, pick up to 1 enemy INFANTRY unit that this unit passed across during that move to be the target. Inflict D6 mortal damage on the target.

Designer’s Note: This unit can use this ability even if it is in combat.
legend: The rear of the Snarlboss’s ride is fitted with jars filled with loondust mixed with Hyshian energies. When uncorked and ignited by a torch-wielding snotling, they produce jetting flames that give the chariot a boost of speed and scorch enemies as it ploughs their ranks.

name: Boss Snarlfang
description: Effect: Add 2 to charge rolls for friendly GITMOB CAVALRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
