legend: Like their riders, Snarlfangs follow the lead of the strongest and meanest of their number. When their Alpha scents prey, the grots can do little to restrain their loping chase.

name: Vicious Snarls and Great Howls
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick this unit and up to 2 friendly GITMOB CAVALRY units within this unit’s combat range to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ Companion melee weapons.
legend: The lupine language of the Snarlfang Alpha drives their pack into a frenzy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: SNEAKY PROWLIN’
description:
Declare: Pick all units in this Regiment of Renown if none of them have been deployed.

Effect: Set up those units in reserve prowlin’ around. They have now been deployed.
legend: Letting their temporary allies grab the majority of the foe’s attention, the Shinestealaz circle around the flanks.

name: AMBUSH TIME!
description:
Declare: Pick all units in this Regiment of Renown if they are prowlin’ around.

Effect: Set up those units anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: At a howl from their Snarlboss’s alpha wolf, the Shinestealaz launch their attack, pelting towards the weak spots in the enemy line.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: ON DA MOON’S TRAIL
description: Effect: The melee weapons of units in this Regiment of Renown have Anti-charge (+1 Rend) while they are contesting an objective you control.
legend: Skulkrik and his grots are constantly on the hunt for signs of the Bad Moon’s last position, and they will become extra stubborn and stabby when defending sites touched by their god’s light, lest the trail go cold.

name: Vial of Secrets
description: Effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: Maleneth wears a vial of blood around her neck that contains the soul of her former mistress, whose whispered secrets grant her an uncanny awareness.

name: Hidden Agent
description: Effect: If this unit has not been deployed, set up this unit in reserve in hiding. It has now been deployed.
legend: Maleneth is master of stealth, concealing herself amongst allies and waiting for the perfect time to strike.

name: Strike From the Shadows
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is in hiding. Then, pick a friendly INFANTRY unit that has 5 or more models to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of the target. If you do so, this unit must be set up in combat and has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn. On a failed roll, this unit remains in hiding but you automatically pass the roll the next time you use this ability.
legend: Maleneth waits for her allies to create a distraction before darting out from cover to engage the enemy and complete her deadly mission.

name: Uglug the Troggoth
description: Effect: While this unit includes Uglug, ignore the first damage point allocated to it each phase.
legend: Despite his smaller size, Uglug still has the remarkable resilience of his larger cousins.

name: Borgit’s Masterplan
description:
Declare: This unit can only use this ability if any models in this unit have been slain.

Effect: For the rest of the turn:
  • This unit has Strike-First.
  • Double the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons.
  • This unit’s attacks must target an enemy MONSTER or BEAST.
legend: Cunning and unscrupulous in equal measure, Borgit uses his minions as bait, luring enemy beasties out into the open whereupon he and Uglug can deliver the killing blow.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Draconic Claws is 5.

name: Death on Tattered Wings
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve high above the battlefield. It has now been deployed.
legend: The Revenant Draconith circles above the arrayed armies, eye sockets aglow with unholy energy.

name: Loathsome Descent
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is high above the battlefield.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Revenant Draconith plunges into battle with a roar, slamming into its prey with bone-shattering force.

name: Red Ruin
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, resolve the following effects:
  • Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
  • Heal (X) this unit where X is an amount equal to the roll.
  • This unit can be removed from the battlefield and set up in reserve high above the battlefield.
legend: Tearing free of the press with talons and teeth, the Revenant Draconith leaves a trail of gory destruction behind as it takes to the skies once more, searching for fresh prey.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Multiple Parts
description:
Effect: When a number of damage points equal to this MANIFESTATION’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this MANIFESTATION is destroyed and both its parts are removed from play.

Each time this MANIFESTATION moves, both its parts must end within 9" of each other.

Each part of this MANIFESTATION is armed with Leeching Bites.

name: Leeching Bites
description: Effect: Each time an attack made by this MANIFESTATION scores a critical hit, Heal (1) this MANIFESTATION.
legend: Although arcane in nature, these magical creatures still feed on the blood of the living.

name: Draw on Power
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS HERO wholly within 12" of this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following:
  • Heal (D3) the target.
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn and banish this MANIFESTATION.
legend: The necromantic energy of this long-perished vampire can be siphoned by their kind for sustenance or drawn upon to grant a temporary rush of power.

name: Knights of the King
description: Effect: While any friendly DEATHRATTLE CAVALRY HEROES are within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those friendly units have WARD (5+).
legend: Buried alongside their liege in ancient times, these deathly knights are still bound by arcane ward and ancient oath to ride into battle at their side.

name: Cursed To Rise Once More
description: Effect: You can return 1 slain model to this unit.
legend: Necrotic flames wreathe the shattered remains of an undead knight, compelling them to rejoin the battle.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Chill Grasp
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, the following effects apply until the start of your next turn:
  • While the target is within 3" of this MANIFESTATION, the target has a maximum control score of 1 that cannot be modified.
  • While the target is within 3" of this MANIFESTATION, the target cannot use MOVE abilities.
legend: A deathly chill seizes the hearts of the foe, leaving them petrified with fear.

name: Inescapable Reach
description:
Declare: This MANIFESTATION can only use this ability if it has not been set up this turn.

Effect: Remove this MANIFESTATION from the battlefield and set it up anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, roll a D3. On a 2+, this MANIFESTATION can move a number of inches equal to the roll.
legend: From a yawning rift in the fabric of reality, a colossal arm of eldritch bone emerges.

name: Guardians of the King
description: Effect: While any friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS INFANTRY HEROES are within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those friendly units have WARD (5+).
legend: The Barrow Guard stand alongside the liege lord to whom they are bound.

name: ’For Glory! For Blood!’
description: Effect: You can re-roll the charge roll for that CHARGE ability. Then, before the charge move is made, you can pick a friendly Blood Knights unit that is not in combat, is wholly within 12" of this unit and has not used a CHARGE ability this turn to be the target. If this unit charges, then, immediately after the CHARGE ability used by this unit has been resolved, the target can immediately use the ‘Charge’ ability even if it is not your charge phase. In addition, you can re-roll charge rolls for the target this phase.
legend: The Vampire Lord and their retinue of favoured knights charge into the fray, driving deep into the enemy lines.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>CHARGE</ky> ability for this unit

name: Strike At The Heart
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Blood Knights unit that charged this turn and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of that unit’s Templar Weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Focusing upon their own cursed hunger, the Vampire Lord stokes the predatory urges of a formation of Blood Knights, whose lances and blades strike with great precision and force as they impact with the foe.

name: Lord of Trampling Bones
description: Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for friendly DEATHRATTLE CAVALRY units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The knights who ride alongside a Wight Lord will be the most trusted and skilful of all their housecarls.

name: Royal Companions
description: Effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO DEATHRATTLE CAVALRY unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved.
legend: Mounted Wight Lords fight accompanied by their most skilled cavaliers, tearing through enemy battlelines.
condition: Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>Fight</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Locus of Shyish
description: Effect: Each time a friendly SOULBLIGHT GRAVELORDS WIZARD casts a SUMMON SPELL from the ‘Manifestations of the Grave’ lore, you can measure the range and visibility from this terrain feature instead.
legend: A palpable aura of death lingers over these ancient burial sites, dormant necromantic energy that can be harnessed by Shyishan practitioners.

name: Leeching Soil
description: Effect: Each time a model (friendly or enemy) is slain while it is within 9" of this terrain feature, Heal (1) this terrain feature.
legend: When blood is spilt upon this unhallowed ground, it is hungrily absorbed by the tainted earth and the withered roots running through it.

name: Retribution or Salvation
description:
Declare: This unit can cast this spell while its Cado Ezechiar is on the battlefield. Pick a visible unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target is an enemy unit, inflict D3 mortal damage on it. If the target is a friendly DEATHRATTLE or DEADWALKERS unit, subtract 1 from wound rolls for combat attacks that target that unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Cado's quest for both vengeance and self-control manifests as two forms of sorcery: bolts of killing of judgement and an aura of regal authority that augments nearby undead.

name: Aurelias
description:
Declare: This unit can use this ability while its Aurelias is on the battlefield.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following to apply for the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to this unit’s power level.
  • Each time a casting roll is made for this unit, you can re-roll 1 of the dice.
legend: Vizier to Neferata herself, Aurelias is a learned necromancer who lends his arcane expertise to aid Cado in battle - so long as doing so aligns with the Mortarch's interests as well...

name: Solia, The Tutor
description:
Declare: This unit can use this ability while its Cado Ezechiar is on the battlefield.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following to apply for the rest of the turn:
  • This unit has WARD (5+).
  • This unit’s Ezechiarian Greatsword has Crit (Mortal).
legend: Teacher and tutor to Cado when he was a mortal prince, the spirit of Sofia is now bound to one of his iron rings, offering him guidance on his path.

name: DEATHLESS MONSTROSITY
description: Effect: Heal (3) this unit
legend: Mannfred von Carstein has ever been a deathmage of terrifying power. This risen Draconith, which resides among the highest spires of Castle Sternieste, is a masterwork of his arcane talent and almost impossible to vanquish.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: THE HUNGER
description: Effect: If this unit used a FIGHT ability this turn, Heal (D3) this unit. Heal (2D3) this unit instead if it destroyed an enemy unit this turn using a FIGHT ability.
legend: Those who bear the Soulblight curse constantly crave blood and are empowered by feasting upon their foes.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Unholy Lodestone
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Deadwalker Zombies unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, while the target is wholly within 12" of this unit, its ‘Mindless Ferocity’ ability inflicts mortal damage on rolls of 5+ instead of 6+.
legend: Deadwalker Zombies that are driven into battle like loathsome cattle are invigorated by the presence of nearby Corpse Carts.

name: Necromantic Goad
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Deadwalker Zombies unit that is wholly within 12" of this unit and not in combat to be the target.

Effect: The target can move up to 3". It can move into combat.
legend: Corpsemasters are experts at directing the mindless efforts of the recently deceased.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Allow Me to Remind You...
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 5+, that command has no effect, it still counts as having been used and the command points spent to use it are still lost.
legend: As Neferata’s premier agent in the Mortal Realms, Sekhar’s authority and near matchless powers of hypnotism ensure few have the willpower to resist her demands.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: Opponent declared a command for a %000010532visible% enemy unit within 18" of this unit

name: Lest You Forget...
description: Effect: Pick 1 dice from the charge roll or casting roll for that ability. Your opponent must re-roll that dice.
legend: Sekhar’s presence is a tangible reminder of hidden obligations to the vampiric nation of Nulahmia, causing foes to deliberately foul their own forces’ efforts so that their clandestine allegiances remain undiscovered.
condition: Once Per Battle Round, Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>SPELL</ky> or <ky>CHARGE</ky> ability for a %000010532visible% enemy unit within 18" of this unit

name: Irresistible Demand
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy HERO within 18" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each other enemy unit within 3" of the target.
legend: Sekhar locks eyes across the battlefield with her victim, who falls hopelessly under her control, lashing out wildly even as their allies struggle to hold them down.

name: Barge Through
description: Effect: When this unit moves, it can pass through models in enemy INFANTRY units and can pass through the combat ranges of enemy INFANTRY units, but it cannot end the move in combat unless specified in the ability used.
legend: Infantry who do not have the common sense to move out of the way of an armoured grunta ridden by an Ironjaw orruk are easily barrelled aside by these hefty cavalry.

name: Propa Wonky
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat, pick a friendly IRONJAWZ unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: As nearby Ironjawz see the Wrekkaz wildly whirling through the enemy ranks heedless of danger, they are inspired to fight with similar reckless abandon.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Sloppklaw’s Bite and Talons is 4.

name: Rigged Odds
description:
Effect: The first time you fail a dirty trick roll each turn, give this unit 1 betting chip.

Each time you make a dirty trick roll for an ability that targets a unit wholly within 12" of this unit, you can spend any number of betting chips after seeing the result of the roll. For each betting chip you spend, add 1 to that dirty trick roll.
legend: Skumdrekk never takes a bet unless the outcome is heavily swayed his way.

name: Thrashing Tail
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is less than or equal to the number of models in the target unit, for the rest of the turn, each time this unit uses an ATTACK ability, if all of the attacks target that enemy unit, those attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+. This ability also affects Companion weapons.
legend: Sloppklaw sweeps his tail through a group of foes, throwing them to the ground so that he can trample and gore them with impunity.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Prowling the Flanks
description: Effect: If this unit is wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Killaboss lurks at the edges of the battle looking for weaknesses in the enemy’s lines.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Drag ’Em Out
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY HERO in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll 2D6. This unit can move a distance in inches up to the value of the roll. Then, if possible, your opponent must remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of this unit.
legend: The Killaboss picks the toughest-looking git and has their Gnashtoof drag them away from their allies.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Supreme Swordmaster
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s attacks. In addition, ignore negative modifiers to the characteristics of this unit’s melee weapons.
legend: The Light of Eltharion is a consummate warrior and one of the greatest swordmasters of all time.

name: Eternal Light
description: Effect: If this unit is destroyed and if a friendly LUMINETH REALMLORDS WIZARD successfully casts a SUMMON spell, instead of resolving the effect of that SUMMON spell, you can set up a replacement unit for this unit more than 9" from all enemy units and wholly within 12" of the unit that used that SUMMON spell. This ability is still in effect even if this unit is not on the battlefield.
legend: Should he be vanquished, such is Eltharion’s mythical resolve that his spirit can re-manifest on the battlefield to fight once more alongside the Lumineth.

name: Defend the Banner
description: Effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly VANARI INFANTRY units while they are contesting the same objective as this unit.
legend: While Vanari battle beneath the sacred standard carried by the Bannerblade, their ranks tighten and enemy attacks are deflected with relentless skill and determination.

name: The Kings Court
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by other friendly non-MONSTER FLESH-EATER COURTS HEROES while they are wholly within 12" of this unit. In addition, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for each other friendly NON-MONSTER FLESH-EATER COURTS HERO wholly within 12" of this unit, to a maximum of +3.
legend: Ghoul Kings are often surrounded by their personal attendants, courtiers and royal family, who fight passionately to compete for their liege’s approval and whose loyalty fires the blood of their monarch in turn.

name: Long Live the King
description: Effect: If this unit would be destroyed, before removing it from play, friendly non-UNIQUE FLESH-EATER COURTS units wholly within 12" of this unit become enraged until the start of your next turn. Melee weapons used by friendly enraged units have Crit (Auto-wound) and score critical hits on unmodied hit rolls of 5+, even if this unit has been destroyed.
legend: The death of a member of the royal family sends shockwaves through the cannibal court, sending them into an impassioned rage.

name: Glorious Charge
description: Effect: While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly KNIGHTS unit and has charged this turn, this unit has WARD (5+) and its Gory Talons and Fangs have Charge (+1 Damage).
legend: The Gorewarden launches into battle alongside their trusted knights.

name: Swooping Descent
description:
Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield, then set it up again more than 9" from all enemy units and either:
  • Wholly within 6" of the edge of the battlefield, or
  • Within 3" of an objective you do not control.
legend: The Gorewarden takes to the skies, swooping across the battlefield to secure a glorious treasure for the court.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Enemy Turn

name: The Red Work
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat and has not charged this turn, pick this unit and up to 1 friendly Freeguild Cavalier-Marshal or Freeguild Marshal on Griffon within this unit’s combat range to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if there are fewer models in this unit than the total number of enemy models in units that are in combat with this unit. On a 4+, for the rest of the turn, the targets count as having charged.
legend: In a tight formation of muscle, horseflesh and metal, the Freeguild Cavaliers continue the red work of axe, bludgeon and blade as they grind their way through the ranks of the enemy.

name: Word of the God-King
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy WIZARD, PRIEST or MANIFESTATION within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+:
  • If the target is a MANIFESTATION, it is banished and removed from the battlefield.
  • If the target is a WIZARD or PRIEST, inflict an amount of mortal damage on it equal to the roll.
legend: Zenestra can channel the divine will of Sigmar with but a single utterance, smiting heretical priests and practitioners of proscribed magic, as well as their conjurations.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Sigmar’s Will
description:
Declare: Make a chanting roll of D6. If the roll is an unmodified 1, you can re-roll the dice.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects. Pick up to 2 different effects instead if the chanting roll was 10+.

Hallowed Ground: Until the start of your next turn, enemy units using the ‘Normal Move’ ability cannot end that move within 5" of a friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR HUMAN unit while it is wholly within 12" of this unit.

Fervent Prayers: Until the start of your next turn, each time a friendly CITIES OF SIGMAR HUMAN model is slain by a combat attack while it is wholly
legend: As a vessel of the God-King’s celestial power, Pontifex Zenestra can scour the taint of corrupting magic from the earth around her.

name: Brass Stampede
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move 2D6". It can pass through models in the target unit and must end that move in combat.
legend: Nothing forged of mortal flesh and bone can prevent a charge from a unit of Bloodcrushers.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Howl of Blood-Curdling Savagery
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat, pick a visible friendly BLOODBOUND unit that is wholly within 12" of this unit and not in combat to be the target. Then, make a charge roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target can move a distance up to the value of the charge roll. That unit can move through the combat ranges of any enemy units and must end that move within 1/2" of a visible enemy unit. If it does so, the target has charged.
legend: The Mighty Lord of Khorne leads whole tribes into battle from the front lines. Their ferocious bellows are as much a call to arms as they are a threat not to be caught shirking in the sacred duty of committing murder and slaughter in the Blood God’s name.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Reality-Splitting Axe
description:
Declare: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed. Pick an enemy HERO that was allocated any damage points by this unit’s Axe of Khorne this turn to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 5+, the target is automatically destroyed and cannot be replaced for the rest of the battle.
legend: A rift to the Realm of Chaos can be carved wide open with a single sweep of this axe, causing the souls of those who have felt the bite of its edge to be dragged into that hellish dimension, never to be seen again.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Soul-Deep Devotion
description:
Effect: While this unit is within a friendly non-HERO ARCANITE unit’s combat range:
  • This unit has WARD (4+).
  • Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly non-HERO ARCANITE unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: Thaumaturges surround themselves with staunchly faithful cultists who are willing to sacrifice their souls in the defence of their sorcerous idol.

name: Wrath of the Thaumaturge
description:
Declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick a friendly ARCANITE unit in combat to be the target.

Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of the target and in combat. This unit has charged.
legend: With a sweep of its staff, the Thaumaturge steps into a rift to the Crystal Labyrinth, only to re-emerge in the midst of foes who have had the temerity to assault its devotees.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Empowered By Magic
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons while this unit is wholly within 12" of any MANIFESTATIONS (friendly or enemy).
legend: Kairic Acolytes absorb power from roving arcane manifestations to strengthen their own bodies.

name: Vulcharc
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly Kairic Acolytes units for attacks that target that enemy unit.
legend: Some Kairic Acolytes train to see through the eyes of Vulcharcs, Tzeentch-touched avians that feed upon magic. These birds are often dispatched by their handlers to spy out a foe’s weaknesses, secrets that are duly shared with their fellow cultists to give them the advantage once battle is joined.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Magmadroth’s Claws and Horns is 4.

name: Fire, Blood and Vengeance
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Auric Runefather on Magmadroth on the battlefield to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons, including Companion weapons, while the target is in combat, damaged or destroyed.
legend: Should their sire be imperilled, an Auric Runeson will fly into a berserk rage. Their mount echoes their fury, for the Magmadroth’s own progenitor is likely to be in just as much danger.

name: Volcanic Blood
description: Effect: If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for a combat attack that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Born of fire and flame, Magmadroths pulse with the throbbing heat of the volcanic caverns in which they make their fyrenests.

name: Calamitous Crash
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Magmadroth raises its forelegs and brings them smashing down, causing a rippling eruption of earth and flame that sends lesser foes tumbling into magma-filled lacerations in the ground.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Choking Spore-Clouds
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of weapons used by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: Those not of Gittish kind who inhale too many Puffshroom spores are wracked by violent coughing fits as their bodies rebel against the sudden fungal invasion.

name: Spinning Loons
description: Effect: If this unit was not set up this phase, this unit can move 2D6". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units and can finish that move in combat.
legend: Though they swing bizarre fungi rather than iron wrecking balls, Sporeplattas are still given a wide berth by those around them as they wildy spin amidst the melee.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Lost in the Horde
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve lost in the horde. This unit has now been deployed.
legend: Gibbering and bound, Loonsmasha Fanatics are dragged or carried along by the general mass of grots until the time arrives to unrestrain them and pray to the Bad Moon that they head in the right direction.

name: Whirling Destruction
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is lost in the horde.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a friendly Moonclan Stabbas or Moonclan Shootas unit. Then, this unit can move 2D6". It can pass through enemy models and their combat ranges and can end that move in combat. Then, roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with this unit or that this unit passed across as part of that move. Inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll. If this unit ended that move in combat, it has charged.
legend: Fanatics are hurled out of Moonclan units, swiftly spinning up into living tornadoes that cause absolute carnage as they careen through the enemy ranks.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Champions of the Gilded Throne
description: Effect: When players are alternating picking units to use a FIGHT ability, when it is your turn to pick a unit, instead of picking 1 unit, you can pick a friendly non-HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON unit wholly within 18" of this unit and a friendly non-HERO SYBARITE unit wholly within 18" of this unit. Resolve the second FIGHT ability immediately after the first.
legend: Blessed by Syll’Esske, nearby daemons and mortals fight with a synergy that defies comprehension.

name: Wandering Minds
description:
Declare: Pick up to 1 visible friendly non-HERO SYBARITE INFANTRY unit and up to 1 visible friendly non-HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON INFANTRY unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If you picked a SYBARITE target, subtract 1 from ward rolls for damage po
legend: The dark enchantments woven by Syll and the domineering aura of Esske cause mystical wards and mental defences to slip away like silk sliding from burnished silver.

name: Violent Offerings
description: Effect: If any damage points were allocated to an enemy WIZARD or PRIEST by this unit’s combat attacks this turn and that enemy unit has been destroyed, add 1 to this unit’s power level for the rest of the battle. This unit can be affected by this ability multiple times and the effects are cumulative.
legend: Esske will go to great lengths to please Syll, delicately prising magical trinkets from severed heads and limbs to gift to the source of his obsession.

name: Veiled Threat
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve waiting in ambush. It has now been deployed.
legend: Slaangors can move as smoothly and soundlessly as silk before bursting out into a bleating, bellowing charge.

name: Bestial Onslaught
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is waiting in ambush.

Effect: Set up this unit on the battlefield wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: With primal savagery, the Slaangor Fiendbloods take to the battlefield, ready to surround their enemies.

name: Instinctive Advance
description: Effect: This unit can move up to 3" immediately after that command has been resolved, unless that command is a reaction, in which case this unit can move after the ability that it was reacting to has been resolved. That move can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units, and can end in combat.
legend: The Slaangors are drawn to the screams of the battlefield as a hungering predator is drawn to wounded prey.
condition: Once Per Phase (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared a command for a unit within 12" of this unit

name: Hit-and-Run Tactics
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat or charged this turn, this unit can make a pile-in move. Then, if this unit is in combat, you must pick 1 or more enemy units to be the target(s) of this unit’s attacks.

Effect: Resolve combat attacks against the target unit(s). Then, if this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but can only end that move in combat with units it was in combat with at the start of that move. It does not have to end the move in combat.
legend: The Namarti Thralls strike at their foes before using the ethersea to fall back to a safer position.

name: Way of the Vortex
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit and friendly NAMARTI units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The riptide’s undertow pulls allies from harm, a hidden bulwark against the enemy’s raging storm. Within its grasp, Namarti endure, shielded by the Akhelian’s unwavering stance.

name: Raider Captain
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and up to 3 friendly Namarti Thralls units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Each target can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: Thrallmasters are often among the first of the Idoneth’s forces to arrive on the battlefield, leading Namarti scouting parties to establish forward positions from which they can launch their raid.

name: Transport Capacity
description: Effect: This unit cannot transport any friendly units.

name: Attack Squadron
description: Effect: While this unit is wholly within 12" of any other friendly Grundstok Gunhaulers, it can use SHOOT abilities even if it used the ‘Run’ ability in the same turn.
legend: Groups of Gunhaulers range ahead to clear the way for larger skyvessels.

name: Fighter Vessel
description: Effect: If this unit used a SHOOT ability this phase, this unit can move D6". It cannot end that move in combat.
legend: Gunhaulers are built for speed and manoeuvrability, zipping around larger vessels in the fleet to identify and eliminate priority targets.

name: I’m Watching You
description: Effect: Give this unit D3 vexed points.
legend: Squinting and scowling, the Codewright watches with hawkish scrutiny for any breaches of the Code.

name: Alright, Listen Up
description:
Declare: If this unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly non-HERO KHARADRON OVERLORDS unit, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target. Then, choose to spend either 3 or 6 vexed points.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply to the target for the rest of the turn:
  • Do you see how fast they are going?!: If you spent 3 vexed points, subtract D3 from the target’s Move characteristic. If you spent 6 vexed points, halve the target’s Move characteristic.
  • Those weapons are against regulation!: If you spent 3 vexed points, subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks. I
legend: The Codewright’s fury at such blatant disregard for the precepts and carefully laid-out clauses of the Code is so infectious that nearby Kharadron unleash a barrage of hastily aimed ‘warning shots’, both to appease their surly charge and to force the enemy’s heads down.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Gnarlrod is 3.

name: Befouled Rainfall
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for enemy units while they are within 6" of this unit.
legend: Rotigus is constantly surrounded by a monsoon of disease and foulness.

name: Virulent Downpour
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Add 3" to the range of this unit’s ‘Befouled Rainfall’ ability for the rest of the battle. This unit can be affected by this ability multiple times and the effects are cumulative.

Then, inflict 1 mortal damage on each enemy unit within range of that ability.
legend: With a guttural chant, Rotigus magnifies the storm, spreading Nurgle’s corruption across greater swathes of the battlefield.

name: Bringer of Plenty
description: Effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.
legend: Rotigus is a masterful sorcerer, able to bind the energies of decay with a wave of his gnarled wand. His spells inspire grotesque fecundity and flesh-growth, stimulated through the arcane deluge.

name: Tentacular Grip
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Save characteristic, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Rotigus’s arm tentacles are slow but incredibly powerful; should they take hold of an enemy, the victim will endure a crushing, slimy fate.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Inescapable Mockery
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s combat attacks that target an enemy unit that has a lower Control characteristic than this unit.
legend: There is no respite from the unrelenting harassment afforded to Kurdoss by his hated attendants. The only satisfaction that remains to this embittered conqueror is the spectacularly petty obliteration of any lesser enemies he finds himself face-to-mask with.

name: A Traitor’s Legacy
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat, pick a visible friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following to apply for the rest of the turn:

Regicide and Kinslaying: The target’s melee weapons have Anti‐HERO (+1 Rend).

Usurpation and Larceny: Add 5 to the target’s control score.

Sedition and Betrayal: Enemy units cannot use commands while they are in combat with the target.
legend: The continued declaration of Valentian’s horrifically wicked deeds in life can often give nearby gheists particularly grim inspiration of what horrors to inflict upon the living.

name: Spectral Attendants
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following to apply for the rest of the turn:

Noble Blade: This unit’s melee weapons, including Companion weapons, have Crit (Mortal) instead of Crit (Auto-wound).

Unholy Grail: Pick a friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit wholly within 12" of this unit. Each time that unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you receive 3 additional rally points.

Tome of Undead Lore: This unit has WIZARD (1).
legend: The spectral attendants of the Black Coach bear potent artefacts, usually the possessions with which the occupant was interred. These can greatly empower the coach itself or imbue it with an aura of death magic that invigorates nearby Nighthaunt.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: One Stop, No Return
description:
Declare: Pick an objective you do not control to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, while enemy units are contesting the target objective, they cannot score critical hits while this unit is also contesting it (hit rolls that would be critical hits score hits instead).
legend: A Black Coach bears down upon its target at the appointed hour, flaming hoofprints burning the skies. Where it arrives, soul-numbing terror is brought with it.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: Spectral Carriage
description: Effect: For the rest of the phase, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for this unit, to a maximum of 3.
legend: Unimpeded by physical obstacles due to its phantasmal form and carried upon spectral winds, a Black Coach hurtles towards its victims with horrifying swiftness.

name: Scrap Away!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Save characteristic, halve the target’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn. In addition, on a 5+, until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
legend: The enemy’s manoeuvres are disrupted as a hail of scrap pummels them from above.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Shrapnel Blast
description:
Effect: For the rest of the phase:
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s ranged weapons.
  • This unit’s ranged weapons have Crit (2 Hits).
legend: The gunner thrusts a few handfuls of rusty iron shards into the barrel of the cannon.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Legion Quartermaster
description: Effect: Each time a friendly non-HERO OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.
legend: Though hardly quartermasters in the traditional sense, the Boneshapers of the Ossiarch legions are without peer when it comes to re-assembling their line warriors from shattered remains.

name: Boneshaper
description:
Declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick a friendly Mortek Guard unit that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: When osseous matter and the souls of the slain are in ample supply, the Boneshapers can restore raise entire formations of Mortek Guard mid-battle.

name: Shields of the Legion
description: Effect: For the rest of the phase, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target that friendly unit.
legend: Mortek Guard are the mainstay of the Ossiarch legions, repelling attacks on more valuable constructs wherever their nadirite shields are raised in defence.
condition: Once Per Phase (Army), Reaction: A friendly <ky>OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS</ky> %000016215WAR MACHINE%, %000005667WIZARD% unit within this unit’s combat range was targeted by an <ky>ATTACK</ky> ability

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Carnosaur’s Massive Jaws is 2.

name: Frenzied by Blood
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Companion weapons while it is within 6" of any damaged enemy units or while it is within 6" of any enemy units that had any models slain in the same turn.
legend: The scent and taste of freshly spilled blood drives Carnosaurs into a killing frenzy.

name: Alpha Predator
description: Effect: Friendly Aggradon Lancers do not lose rage tokens at the end of the turn while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Aggradons instinctively know that where an alpha Carnosaur treads, carnage ensues.

name: Thunderous Roar
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: The sheer concussive force of an alpha Carnosaur’s bellow can temporarily stun its prey.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Crushing Bulk is 4.

name: The Bell Tolls
description: Effect: If the current battle round number is odd, add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly SKAVEN units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit. If the current battle round number is even, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units that target a friendly SKAVEN unit while it is wholly within 13" of this unit.
legend: With a swing and a clang, the bell doth peal; Skaven march and man-things squeal!

name: Gnaw Through Reality
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, this unit counts as a friendly Gnawhole for the purposes of the ‘Gnawhole Ambush’, ‘Tunnels Through Reality’ and ‘The Endless Vermintide’ abilities.
legend: The Grey Seer focuses their energy to keep open a tear in reality from which fellow Skaven can pour.

name: Echoes of the Vermindoom
description:
Declare: Pick each friendly SKAVEN unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Heal (D3) each target.
legend: As the bell rings in time with one of its counterparts in sacred Blight City, it releases a pulse of ruinous energies that invigorate the swarm.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Lend a Claw
description:
Declare: Pick up to 4 other friendly non-SKRYRE MOULDER units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Loosely Attached Bladed Limbs for the rest of the phase for each target picked. Add 1 to hit rolls for the targets’ attacks for the rest of the phase, including those made with Companion weapons.
legend: In a horrifying bout of lucidity and multiple flailing appendages, the remains of the Master Moulder who was stitched into this abomination exert a degree of control over the other creatures in its menagerie before swiftly falling back into a pit of insanity.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Regenerating Terror
description: Effect: Heal (D6) this unit.
legend: Brood Terrors are a nightmare of mutation and overwhelming strength.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of The Thanatorg’s Claws and Fangs is 4.

name: Unstoppable Invasion
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, roll 2D6. This unit can move a distance up to the value of the roll. It can pass through models in the target unit but must end that move in combat.
legend: Demonstrating its legendary ferocity, the Thanatorg smashes through the ranks of the foe.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Champion of the Undivided
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-UNIQUE SLAVES TO DARKNESS unit wholly within 12" of this unit and that does not have a Pledge to Chaos keyword to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by the target while they are contesting an objective you do not control.
legend: Abraxia’s fell reputation inspires her followers to embark on murderous rampages to gain her attention – perhaps even her approval. Such success is rare, but the resulting carnage is unquestionable.

name: Unending Will To Conquer
description: Effect: If this unit is contesting an objective you do not control. Heal (D6) this unit.
legend: Abraxia once consumed the flesh of the High Anointed of the Temple of the Ur-Phoenix, an act swiftly followed by her desecration of the sacred flame at the shrine’s heart. Now, when the thrill of battle ignites within her, the power of rebirth sees her wounds rapidly heal over as if they had never occurred.

name: Mutative Spear
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this unit’s combat attacks to be the target.

Effect: The target has a maximum control score of 1 for the rest of the turn.
legend: Gorbolga the Accurs’d causes rampant mutation in its victims, their twisted, mewling remains a source of absolute horror to their surviving allies.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 15 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Shipwrecka Warclub is 3 and this unit has a Control characteristic of 10.

name: Sons of Behemat
description: Effect: If this unit would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: The Sons of Behemat are nearly as difficult to kill as their mighty progenitor.

name: Longshanks
description: Effect: This unit can pass through models in non-MONSTER units and parts of terrain features that are less than 4" tall.
legend: Mega-Gargants tower high above the battlefield; with their long legs, they can step over most obstacles.

name: Emerge From The Deep
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is beneath the waves.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units and wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge.
legend: The Kraken-eater emerges from the depths of the ocean in an explosion of ocean spray and bellowing anger.

name: Lurking Beneath The Waves
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve beneath the waves. It has now been deployed.
legend: Kraken-eater Mega-Gargants are infamous for keeping their heads just below the waterline, ready to emerge from the depths in a roaring tempest of fury at those who dare trespass in their territory.

name: The Flames of Hope
description: Effect: You can re-roll resistance rolls for friendly RUINATION CHAMBER units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The billowing flames borne by Iridan are instantly recognisable by all of Sigmar’s greatest warriors, even those who have lost nearly every part of themselves in his name.

name: Guardian of the Final Threshold
description: Effect: Make a resistance roll of D6. On a 3+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: Iridan does battle where others cannot tread, fighting in lands transformed into scenes of apocalypse. Even the most corrosive magics find no purchase on this shepherd of lost souls, their faith granting them near immunity to such impurities.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: This unit was picked to be the target of a non-<ky>CORE</ky> ability

name: Demands of the Witness
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly RUINATION CHAMBER unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons. If the chanting roll was 7+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.
legend: Iridan understands better than any that the most assured way to avoid the incremental erosion of the flaw in the Reforging process is to avoid being cut down, and so they exhort their charges to vanquish their foes quickly, mercilessly and without hesitation.

name: On Wings of Death
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+:
  • You can remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield within 1" of the target.
  • If the target charged this turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Ariax swoops over the heads of the foe, wrong-footing charging enemies.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Forest Fighters
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".
legend: These warriors fight in loosely scattered formations, the better to navigate the dense terrain of their arboreal domains.

name: Lamentiri Life Energies
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly SYLVANETH unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has WARD (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: The lamentiri recovered by Revenant Seekers from fallen Sylvaneth have powerful mystical properties that can be harnessed to benefit others of their kind.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: Strength from Spite
description: Effect: Ward rolls cannot be made for damage points inflicted by this unit’s attacks.
legend: Having absorbed the dark and bitter energies permeating the cursed earth of the Hamadrithil, Drycha’s talons easily shred defences both mundane and magical.

name: Twisted Spirit-Song
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly SYLVANETH unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks, including those made with Companion weapons.

In addition, if the target is non-KURNOTHI, add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the target’s melee weapons.
legend: Disharmonious and laced with anger, Drycha’s spirit-song fills her allies with rage.

name: Vicious Spiteswarms
description:
Effect: Your opponent must pick 1 of the following:

Avoid the Swarm: Subtract D3 from the charge roll. In addition, if your opponent re-rolls that charge roll, subtract D3 from that roll.

Charge Through the Swarm: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for that unit’s attacks for the rest of the turn, and add 1 to hit rolls for attacks that target that unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Swarms of Flitterfuries and Squirmlings pour forth from the hives within Drycha’s towering barkflesh form.
condition: Reaction: Opponent declared a <ky>CHARGE</ky> ability for a unit within 18" of this unit

name: Hungry Crypts
description: Effect: Remove this terrain feature from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield within 3" of a friendly NIGHTHAUNT unit, more than 3" from all objectives and enemy units, more than 1" from all terrain features and more than 12" from all other friendly Nexuses of Grief.
legend: The haunted crypt tears itself apart, only to reassemble itself moments later.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

name: Screams of the Penitent
description: Effect: Enemy units cannot use commands while they are within 3" of this terrain feature.
legend: The agony inflicted on the souls trapped in a Nexus of Grief is awful to bear witness to.

name: Awful Refashioning
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Nexus of Grief, then pick up to 3 friendly NIGHTHAUNT units wholly within 12" of it to be the targets. You cannot pick the same unit to be a target of this ability more than once per phase.

Effect: For each target:
  • If the target is damaged, Heal (D3) the target.
  • If the target is not damaged, return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health characteristic of up to D3.
legend: The spirits locked within the Nexus of Grief are agonisingly transformed into cackling gheists, their dreadful wails a brief and bitter balm for nearby Nighthaunt.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Light Endrinpacks
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move 2D6" but must end that move in combat.
legend: The aether-powered backpacks worn by the Vongrim allow them to travel light and swift.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Transport Capacity
description: Effect: This unit can transport 1 friendly KHARADRON OVERLORDS INFANTRY unit with a model count of up to 5 (see Battle Traits).

name: Long-line Slings
description: Effect: When you use the ‘Transport Skyfarers’ ability for this unit, you can pick units in combat to be targets.
legend: Specialised harnesses allow Kharadron to rapidly deploy from fast-moving vessels.

name: Light Bomb Racks
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that does not have FLY and that this unit passed across this phase to be the target.

Effect: Roll 4 dice. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: This skyvessel carries a variety of bombs that can be dropped onto the battlefield.

name: Aethershot Overwatch
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Woe betide those who charge a Grundstok gunline.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Release The Auto-Endrins
description: Effect: Set up a friendly Nullifier Auto-Endrin, Stuncloud Auto-Endrin and Grudgeblast Auto-Endrin (see the Auto-Endrin warscroll) on the battlefield within friendly territory, wholly within 6" of this terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Automated defence drones spill from the dock like wasps from a nest.

name: Repair Routines
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly SKYVESSEL within 3" of this terrain feature to be the target.

Effect: Make a repair roll of D6. Add 1 to the roll if there is a friendly Endrinmaster with Dirigible Suit or Endrinmaster with Endrinharness within 3" of this terrain feature. On a 4+, Heal (3) the target.
legend: Auto-Endrins can be used to assist with combat repairs.

name: Endrinworks Outpost
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Auto-Endrin or replacement Auto-Endrin that has been removed from the battlefield to be the target.

Effect: Make a manufacturing roll of D6. Add 1 to the roll if there is a friendly Endrinmaster with Dirigible Suit or Endrinmaster with Endrinharness within 3" of this terrain feature. On a 4+, set up a replacement Auto-Endrin on the battlefield, wholly within 6" of this terrain feature and more than 3" from all enemy units.
legend: The Endrin Dock continuously assembles new drones, a process that is expedited if a skilled endrineer is overseeing its operation.

name: Expendable Munitions
description:
Effect: The following apply to this unit:
  • This unit has a maximum control score of ‘-’.
  • When this unit is destroyed or removed from the battlefield, it does not count as being destroyed for the purposes of other rules (such as scoring battle tactics).
  • This unit cannot be picked to be the target of or be affected by any non-CORE abilities used by other friendly units unless the ability specifies AUTO-ENDRIN.
  • Ignore this unit for the purposes of friendly and enemy battle tactics.
legend: Auto-Endrins are designed to be one-shot weapons, though they are so cheap and easy to manufacture that there are always more to throw at the enemy.

name: Nullifier Auto-Endrin
description:
Declare: If this unit is a Nullifier Auto-Endrin and is in combat with any enemy MANIFESTATIONS, pick each enemy MANIFESTATION in combat with it to be the targets.

Effect: Make a banishment roll of 3D6 for each target. If the banishment roll equals or exceeds the banishment value on the MANIFESTATION’s warscroll, it is banished and removed from play. Then, remove this unit from the battlefield.
legend: This Auto-Endrin carries a gigantic null-field emitter for dispelling magic.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Stuncloud Auto-Endrin
description:
Declare: If this unit is a Stuncloud Auto-Endrin and is in combat, pick each enemy unit in combat with it to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. If the roll is equal to or lower than that target’s Health characteristic, subtract 10 from the control score of that target for the rest of the turn. Then, remove this unit from the battlefield.
legend: The Stuncloud spews an alchemical substance that stuns and disorients.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Grudgeblast Auto-Endrin
description:
Declare: If this unit is a Grudgeblast Auto-Endrin and is in combat, pick each enemy unit in combat with it to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Then, remove this unit from the battlefield.
legend: This device is equipped with a precision charge for demolition work.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Protection of the Void
description: Effect: While they are wholly within 12" of this unit, friendly SKYFARER units have WARD (5+) against mortal damage inflicted by SPELL abilities, PRAYER abilities and abilities used by MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: The powerful magic-quashing aura of null-gas causes spells and incantations to sputter and die.

name: Nullsuit
description: Effect: Double the Damage characteristic of this unit’s weapons for attacks that target PRIESTS, WIZARDS or MANIFESTATIONS.
legend: A product of cutting-edge aethermatics, the nullsuit is designed to dampen magic and eliminate those who wield it.

name: Spotter’s Flaregun
description:
Declare: Pick an objective within 9" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, apply the following effects for the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly SKYFARER units that target a unit that is contesting the target objective.
  • Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly Vongrim Salvagers and Vongrim Harpoon Crew units for attacks that target a unit that is contesting the target objective.
legend: Firing this flaregun sends a message to all nearby Kharadron: this place is claimed and must be defended.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: CRUISING INTO POSITION
description:
Declare: Pick all units in this Regiment of Renown that have not been deployed.

Effect: Set up all of those units in reserve plying the winds. They have now been deployed.
legend: The Aelsling’s speed and agility allow her to enter battle at the perfect moment.

name: YOU CALL IT YOURS, I CALL IT MINE
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for shooting attacks made by units in this Regiment of Renown that target an enemy unit that is within 6" of an enemy unit that has an enhancement.
legend: Aether-gold is Drekki Flynt’s great love, but other treasures will do in a pinch.

name: DAREDEVIL DEPLOYMENT
description:
Declare: Pick the Arkanaut Frigate in this Regiment of Renown to use this ability if it is plying the winds.

Effect: Set up the Arkanaut Frigate anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, set up all other units in this Regiment of Renown wholly within 6" of the Arkanaut Frigate and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Flynt’s crew lead the way with guns blazing.

name: THE GOOD SHIP AELSLING
description: Effect: The Aelsling in this Regiment of Renown has a Health characteristic of 17 instead of 14.
legend: Flynt’s beloved skyship has endured all that the realms can throw at her with stubborn indifference.

name: SUPPLIES DONT COME CHEAP
description:
Declare: Pick a visible terrain feature within 18" of the Codewright in this Regiment of Renown. Each friendly unit wholly within 3" of that terrain feature is a target.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, Heal (X) the target, where X is an amount equal to the roll.
legend: Profiteers will dispatch aid to beleaguered allies in exchange for payment.

name: NO ONE RIDES FOR FREE
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly INFANTRY unit with up to 10 models that is wholly within 9" of the Codewright in this Regiment of Renown and not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Remove the target from the battlefield, then set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Kharadron can make a healthy profit transporting allies via the skyways.

name: LONG-RANGE SUPPORT
description:
Declare: Pick an objective within 15" of the Codewright in this Regiment of Renown and that no friendly units are contesting. Each unit contesting that objective is a target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: The Codewright can call in a long-range barrage to reduce a troublesome obstacle to dust.

name: Trophies of Glorious Deaths
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On an 5+, that command has no effect, it still counts as having been used and the command points spent to use it are still lost. This reaction cannot be used more than once per command.
legend: The sight of mighty champions reduced to nothing more than a Deathbringer's grisly trophies is enough to make the staunchest warrior baulk and falter.
condition: Reaction: Opponent declared a command for a unit within 8" of this unit

name: Killer of Kings
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit and MANIFESTATION in combat with this unit to be a target.

Effect: Roll 2D6 for each target. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model from that unit is slain or, if the target is a MANIFESTATION, it is automatically destroyed.
legend: A Deathbringer slays without pause or relent.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: HATRED FOR ALL
description:
Declare: You must use this ability if this unit is not in combat and there are any other visible friendly units within this unit’s combat range. You must pick 1 of those friendly units to be the target.

Effect: Resolve combat attacks for this unit against the target.
legend: Skarbrand acknowledges no friend or ally - for in time, as sure as the cosmos wheels, all friendships fail, all love and trust dies, and all returns to blood and violence.

name: FRENZIED VIOLENCE
description:
Declare: Pick the Slaughterpriest in this Regiment of Renown to chant this prayer, pick a visible unit in this Regiment of Renown wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target unit has WARD (5+) while every model in that unit is wholly within the combat range of an enemy unit. If the chanting roll was 10+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.
legend: Zarxor's chanting inspires an insensate frenzy in his followers.

name: GLIMPSE THE GOD
description:
Declare: Pick each unit in this Regiment of Renown that used a FIGHT ability this turn to be a target.

Effect: If any damage points were allocated to an enemy unit by the target’s combat attacks this turn, that enemy unit was destroyed this turn, and no damage points were allocated to that enemy unit this turn by combat attacks made by a friendly unit that is not in this Regiment of Renown, for the rest of the battle, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s Blood-hungry weapons.
legend: Those who spy a shard of Zarxor's truths fight without human restraint.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Rapid Approach
description: Effect: This unit can use a RUN ability and still use CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
legend: Moving with liquid speed and uncanny agility, the Ikon is on its foes before they have a chance to react.

name: The Surging Sea
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and up to 1 friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN unit within this unit’s combat range to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the targets, to a maximum of 3.
legend: The Ikon’s aura of calm yet fearsome power sweeps up nearby Idoneth, carrying them into battle like a racing current.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Charge Phase

name: Surrender to the Sea
description: Effect: When this MANIFESTATION is removed from play, each friendly Abyssal Tendril on the battlefield is automatically removed from play.
legend: If the Incarnate is driven back from the enemy, its tendrils slink back into the ethersea too.

name: Wild Form
description: Effect: Each time this MANIFESTATION is targeted by the ‘Banish Manifestation’ ability, if it would be banished, it is not banished. Instead, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).
legend: This manifestation is notoriously wilful, resisting any effort by sorcerers to tame or banish it.

name: Grasping Tendrils
description:
Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if it is your turn. On a 4+:
  • You can remove 1 friendly Abyssal Tendril from the battlefield.
  • If there are fewer than 2 friendly Abyssal Tendrils on the battlefield, you can set up an Abyssal Tendril wholly within 9" of this MANIFESTATION.
legend: The Incarnate reaches out across the ethersea to conjure tendrils of freezing, coiling water.

name: Whirlpool’s Fury
description:
Effect: Enemy units cannot use RETREAT abilities while they are in combat with this unit.

Friendly units that use a RETREAT ability while they are wholly within 12" of this unit can still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
No mortal damage is inicted on friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units by RETREAT abilities while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: An Ikon of the Storm is a vortex of rage, overwhelming enemies and inspiring their kin to fight ever harder.

name: Storm of Blades
description: Effect: This unit can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: Channelling the frothing violence of a maelstrom, the Ikon of the Storm lashes out again and again.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Watery Clutch
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this MANIFESTATION to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, the target is ensnared for the rest of the turn.

A unit cannot use commands while it is ensnared.
legend: Just as an ocean current seizes a helpless creature and drags it down to its doom, so too do the Incarnate’s tendrils ensnare and drown their victims.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Crushing Coil
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN MANIFESTATIONS that target an ensnared enemy unit.
legend: Once the tendril has its victim, it begins to squeeze with bone-splintering strength.

name: Crushing Pressure
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the target’s Health characteristic, to a maximum of 10. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Mathaela subjects their foes to the devastating pressure of the deepest trenches, causing bones to shatter and metal to crumple like paper.

name: Siren Song of the Abyss
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 friendly IDONETH DEEPKIN units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ Companion weapons.
legend: More attuned to the heartbeat of the ocean than any Isharann, Mathaela can stir the seas to thrashing life with but a gesture.

name: HUNT OF THE BLOODTHIRSTY SHIVER
description:
Effect: If both units in this Regiment of Renown are within each other’s combat range, pick 1 of the following effects to apply until the start of your next turn:

Evasive Approach: While both units in this Regiment of Renown are within each other’s combat range, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target them.

Ferocious Attack: While both units in this Regiment of Renown are within each other’s combat range, their Allopex’s Ferocious Bites have Crit (2 Hits).
legend: Advancing in tandem, the Akhelian Allopexes either evade the foe in skilled formation or close in to deliver the killing bite.

name: IN THE SHADOW OF THE ETHERSEA
description:
Declare: This ability must be used to deploy this Regiment of Renown.

Effect: Set up the units in this Regiment of Renown in reserve in the ethersea. They have now been deployed.
legend: Though their allies may not understand the nature of the ethersea, they have come to rely on the advantages it provides in battle as the Idoneth advance out of sight of the enemy.

name: LAUNCH THE ATTACK
description:
Declare: Pick each unit in this Regiment of Renown that is in the ethersea.

Effect: Set up each unit on the battlefield wholly within 7" of a battlefield edge, more than 9" from all enemy units and within the combat range of another unit in this Regiment of Renown. Then, each unit can immediately move D3". The units cannot move into combat during any part of that move.
legend: There is a sudden blur of movement as these Namarti warriors burst forth from an unseen quarter.

name: Starspawned
description: Effect: Ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to friendly SAURUS and KROXIGOR units each phase while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The concentrated Azyrite magic radiating from the Sunblood imbues their warrior kin with incredible resilience.

name: Scaled Protectors
description: Effect: Ignore negative and positive modiers to save rolls for this unit.
legend: The saurus bodyguard know no other purpose than to protect their Sunblood leader until their dying breath.

name: Venomite Swarm
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: If this unit’s Venomites token is on the battleeld, roll a D3. On a 1, remove this unit’s Venomites token from the battleeld. On a 2+, inict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Beloved of the serpent god Sotek, the fangs of the Venomites drip with toxins that can inflict near-instant death.
condition: Once Per Turn(Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Mantrapper’s Accomplices
description:
Effect: is unit’s Sabrefang, Gnoblars and Trap are Mantrapper accomplice tokens. Aer setting up this unit on the battleeld for the rst time, place all its tokens next to it.

If an enemy unit is destroyed or removed from the battleeld while any of this unit’s Mantrapper accomplices are next to it, remove those Mantrapper accomplices from the battleeld.
legend: Mantrappers are accompanied by motley gaggles of gnoblars and hunting beasts.

name: Just a Little Closer…
description:
Declare: If any of this unit’s Mantrapper accomplices are next to this unit, pick a visible enemy unit to be the target.

Effect: Place 1 of this unit’s Mantrapper accomplices next to the target.
legend: It is the job of a Mantrapper’s pets and cronies to lure prey into the ogor’s snares.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Start of Battle Round

name: Trapped!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to
it this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Make a trapped roll of D6. Subtract 1 from the roll for each friendly Mantrapper accomplice next to the target. If the roll is less than the target’s Save characteristic, until the start of your next turn:
  • Subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
  • The target does not have FLY
legend: The jaws of an ogor trap can hobble even the most belligerent of prey.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Spectral Alchemy
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 10" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick 1 of the following effects or roll two dice and apply both corresponding effects in an order of your choosing, including duplicate effects:

1 Phantasmal Solvent: If the target has a Move characteristic of’-’, inflict 6 mortal damage on the target.
2 Acidic Fug: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
3 Fling Concoctions: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Hurled Vial this phase but all attacks made by this unit this phase must target that enemy unit.
4 Choking Vapours: If the target is a WIZARD, subtract 1 from its power level until the start of your next turn.
5 Fear-laced Hallucinogen: If the target is a PRIEST, rem
legend: With a chilling cackle, the Lord Vitriolic prepares a specifically abominable elixir to inflict on their unwilling victims, or they spitefully hurl whatever is to hand into the ranks of their foes.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: ENEMY OF THE THRONE
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for units in this Regiment of Renown for attacks that target a SENTENCED unit.
legend: Sent by royal decree against those known to have mocked or derided Kurdoss Valentian, the bolts of the Craven throne Executioners are guided by spite-filled sentence scribed on the mark's death warrant.

name: ETHEREAL
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for units in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: Nighthaunt spirits can rarely be harmed by blows delivered by those caught in the grip of a spiritual terror.

name: DARK RESURRECTION
description:
Declare: If any damage points were allocated to an enemy unit by this unit’s combat attacks this turn and that enemy unit was destroyed this turn, pick a friendly non-UNIQUE DEATH INFANTRY HERO that has been destroyed to be the target.

Effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 12" of this unit. The replacement unit can only be set up in combat with enemy units that are in combat with this unit.
legend: The Black Coach's occupant is fed the amethyst energies drawn by the slaughter, fuelling their return to undeath.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: ETHEREAL
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for units in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: Nighthaunt spirits can rarely be harmed by blows delivered by those caught in the grip of a spiritual terror.

name: Be Mine Eyes
description:
Declare: This unit’s Grype is a token. If this unit’s Grype is not next to an enemy unit, pick an enemy unit within 18" of this unit and not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Place this unit’s Grype next to the target. If the target is destroyed while this unit’s Grype is next to it, remove this unit’s Grype from the battlefield.
legend: Felgryn and his favoured ‘falcon’, Grype, are adept at rooting out hidden prey.

name: Winged Reconnoitrer
description: Effect: While this unit’s Grype is next to an enemy unit, ward rolls cannot be made for damage points inflicted on that enemy unit by combat attacks made by this unit and friendly SERFS units.
legend: The screeches of Felgryn’s twisted ‘falcon’ act as a beacon to other cannibal hunters.

name: Sir Felgryn is Abroad!
description: Effect: While you believe this DELUSION, subtract 10 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with any friendly SERFS units or any friendly non-HERO FLESH-EATER COURTS MONSTER or BEAST units.
legend: Felgryn’s roguish example and affinity with animals make him beloved of commonfolk and creature alike, each resisting all the more fiercely when he takes to the field.

name: DARK HUNT
description: Effect: In your charge phase, if this unit is not in combat and has not used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn, it must use the ‘Charge’ ability, and if the charge roll would allow it to end the move within ½" of a visible enemy unit, it must do so.
legend: A dire animus clings to this beast.

name: RAVENOUS SHRIEKS
