description: Effect: Each time an enemy unit is destroyed by this unit’s shooting attacks, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Death Shriek for the rest of the battle (this effect is cumulative).
legend: The power of this Terrorgheist’s sonic shrieks seems to magnify the more vigorously it feeds on flesh.

name: PUNISHMENT FITS THE CRIME
description: Effect: You believe the ‘Accusations of Regicide’ DELUSION (see Grand Justice Gormayne’s warscroll).
legend: For Gormayne, the practice of law is quite simple. The crime is always life; the sentence is always death.

name: Scaled Protectors
description: Effect: While this unit’s Kro-Jax is on the battlefield, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit in each phase.
legend: Ro-Tak and So-Kar know no other purpose than to follow and protect Kro-Jax until their dying breath.

name: Venomite Swarm
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: This unit’s Sotek’s Venomites is a token. If this unit’s Sotek’s Venomites is on the battlefield, roll a D3. On a 1, remove this unit’s Sotek’s Venomites from the battlefield. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Lethal venom drips from the fangs and claws of Sotek’s Venomites.

name: Seeds of Rot
description: Effect: When using the ‘Blessed by the Plaguefather’ ability, if you choose to infect an enemy unit, you can pick an enemy unit that is contesting an objective that is seeded with rot.
legend: Those that draw close to the Gardeners’ horticultural horrors are bound to be infected by rotsome blooms.

name: Blooming Plague
description:
Declare: Pick an objective that is contested by this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target is seeded with rot for the rest of the battle.
legend: The Gardeners sow foulsome seeds throughout the battlefield, infecting the very land itself.

name: KA-BOOM!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: This unit’s Tik Tik is a token. If this unit’s Tik Tik is on the battlefield, remove it from the battlefield and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll and the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn
legend: Tik Tik carries an explosive charge that makes a mockery of armour and carefully planned charges alike.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Tunneling Team
description: Effect: Set up this unit in reserve drilling beneath the surface. It has now been deployed.
legend: Zikkit’s Tunnelpack often turn up when least expected.

name: Tunnelpack Ambush
description:
Declare: Pick this unit if it is drilling beneath the surface.

Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: With a deafening crack, the earth splits and the Tunnelpack scurry forth into battle.

name: Khornate Hound
description: Effect: This unit’s Kannat is a token. Each time you declare a FIGHT ability for this unit while its Kannat is on the battlefield, as a reaction, you can remove its Kannat from the battlefield and then add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Bloodied Weapons for the rest of the phase.
legend: Kannat is a savage, corrupt beast

name: Gather The Skulls!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain and you earn 1 blood tithe point.
legend: Kamandora and her disciples seek skulls to raise new monuments to the Blood God.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Graceful Leaps
description:
Effect: Each time this unit makes a pile-in move:
  • Add 3" to the distance this unit can move.
  • This unit can pass through models in enemy units.
legend: The agility and deer-like lower bodies of these Kurnothi allow them to leap right over the heads of the foe in the middle of combat.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of Ghorrakos’s Horns and Hooves is 4.

name: Peerless Among Daemonsmiths
description:
Effect: Apply the effect below that corresponds with the number of daemonic power points (DPP) this unit has:
$000001713

condition: Once Per Battle, Any Charge Phase

name: Ascended Warlord
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Axe of Khorne for each other friendly BLADES OF KH0RNE unit that is within this unit’s combat range and is in combat.
legend: Though he has shed his mortal flesh, Khul remains the one true master of the Goretide, and his followers worship him through fanatical violence.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Reality Splitting Axe
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by combat attacks made by this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 5+, 1 model in that unit is slain.
legend: Khul's axe cleaves the very fabric of reality.

name: Loathe The Arcane
description: Effect: This unit can use this ability if it is not in combat. This unit can move 3" but must end that move closer to the unit that used the SPELL ability. It cannot move into combat during any part of that move.
legend: Now utterly Khorne's creature, Khu/ fights his god's wars and hunts his sorcerous nemeses without relent.

name: Sweat-Soaked and Reeking
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Rotswords’ clammy stench is a weapon in its own right, seeing foes recoil in horror the moment it reaches their nostrils.

name: Ruptured Cysts
description:
Declare: Pick a visible DISEASED enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, inflict 1 mortal damage on each other DISEASED enemy unit within 3" of the target. If the chanting roll was 9+, you can also pick a friendly Plaguebearers unit within 12" of the target. For each enemy INFANTRY model slain by this ability this turn, you can return 1 slain model to that friendly unit.
legend: Belga intones a chant that triggers a chain reaction of agonising, pus-filled eruptions in the bodies of sickened foes.

name: Scry the Filth
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to casting rolls for friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE WIZARDS while they are within 3" of this unit.
  • Add 1 to chanting rolls for friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE PRIESTS while they are within 3" of this unit.
legend: Globules of bloody mucus in Belga’s cauldron coalesce into misshapen masses that Belga uses to divine Nurgle’s will.

name: Bestial Desecration
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons while it is not within enemy territory.
legend: As Pestigor herds use their own bodily waste to pollute the land in tribute to Father Blight, their filthy blades brim with all manner of fluid-borne pathogens.

name: Purulent Profusion
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: With a wave of his staff, Shaman Foulhoof causes an enemy’s flesh to blister and curdle, ejecting vast quantities of sticky, foul-smelling pus.

name: Rampant Defilement
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Pestigors unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Shaman Foulhoof’s mere presence sends his bestial flock into a frenzy of despoliation.

name: Pall of Exhaustion
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is in combat with any other friendly ROTBRINGERS units. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: A cloud of gloom rests heavily on any who approach the Sloven Knights.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Mire Kelpies
description: Effect: This unit’s Mire Kelpies are tokens. There are 6 Mire Kelpies for every 14 models in this unit.
legend: Drawn to the Nurglites’ abhorrent nature, Mire Kelpies wetly follow Pox-Wretches wherever they roam.

name: Contagious Catarrh
description:
Declare: If this unit has any Mire Kelpies, pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target. You cannot pick a MANIFESTATION or terrain feature.

Effect: Pick any number of this unit’s Mire Kelpies and remove them from the battlefield. Then, roll a dice, adding 1 to the roll for each Mire Kelpie you removed this phase. On an unmodified roll of 1, this ability has no effect. On a 6+, the target has the DISEASED keyword.
legend: Disease-laden, phlegmy beasts squelch alongside the Pox-Wretches, happily infecting all those who come into contact with them.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Beast
description: Effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

name: Attention Seekers
description:
Declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick the closest enemy unit to it to be the target. If 2 or more enemy units are tied to be the closest, you can pick which is the target. Then, make a charge roll of 2D6.

Effect: This unit can move a distance up to the value of the charge roll. It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units and must end that move within 1/2" of the target. Then, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. If it does so, this unit has charged.
legend: Beasts of Nurgle seek out playmates with an enthusiasm that is rarely reciprocated by the horrified source of their fascination.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase

name: Utter Defilement
description:
Declare: This unit’s Pestilent Pollutants are tokens. This unit has 2 Pestilent Pollutants. Pick an objective or terrain feature within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Place 1 of this unit’s Pestilent Pollutants next to the target. If both of this unit’s Pestilent Pollutants are already on the battlefield, pick 1 of them, remove it from the battlefield and place it next to the target instead.
legend: The Cankerborn corrupt the land around them until it is so saturated with toxins and pathogens as to be nigh unrecognisable.

name: From the Tainted Earth
description:
Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again more than 9" from all enemy units and wholly within 3" of:
  • An objective or terrain feature that has a friendly Pestilent Pollutant, or
  • A POLLUTED terrain feature (see Gelgus Pust’s warscroll), or
  • An objective you control.
legend: Where the lands have been utterly contaminated, there can the Cankerborn manifest at will.

name: Entropy Endures
description: Effect: If this unit has 2 models and would be automatically destroyed, it is not automatically destroyed. Instead, 1 model in this unit is slain.
legend: Such is the Cankerborn’s resilience that they are almost impossible to banish back to the Garden.

name: Master Contaminator
description:
Declare: Pick a terrain feature within 6" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target has the POLLUTED keyword for the rest of the battle.
legend: Pust has tainted countless freshwater tarns, ancient forests and fertile arable fields.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: Polluting Aura
description:
Effect: While a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE unit is wholly within 6" of a POLLUTED terrain feature, each time that unit uses or is the target of an ability that would heal 1 or more damage points, add 1 to the number of damage points healed.

While an enemy unit is within 6" of a POLLUTED terrain feature, each time that unit uses or is the target of an ability that would heal 1 or more damage points, subtract 1 from the number of damage points healed, to a minimum of 0.
legend: Where Pust corrupts the land, the air is thick with disease – inimical to enemies but life-giving to the Maggotkin.

name: Grin of the Grandfather
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, pick 1 of the following to apply for the rest of the turn:
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s combat attacks.
  • Subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks.
  • Subtract 1 from the target’s Control characteristic.
legend: To look upon Pust’s ever-smiling visage is to glimpse the face of Nurgle – a sight that is hard to stomach.

name: Parasitic Infestation
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Those who approach Pust risk being contaminated with the wriggling parasites that infest his swollen body.

name: BLIGHTED GROWTH
description: Effect: Set up this Regiment of Renown’s Feculent Gnarlmaw wholly within friendly territory and more than 3" from all objectives and other terrain features. After you have done so, it has been deployed.
legend: Gifted in the seeding of blighted earth, the Pustules can always coax part of the Grandfather’s rancid orchard into existence.

name: MULTITUDINOUS DISEASES
description:
Declare: If this Regiment of Renown’s Plaguebearer’s unit is wholly within 12" of this Regiment of Renown’s Feculent Gnarlmaw, pick that Plaguebearers unit to be the target.

Effect: Heal (1) the target. If the target is contesting an objective, you can also return 1 slain model to the target unit.
legend: The soil around the Pustules’ Feculent Gnarlmaw is so ripe with a slew of diseases that the pestilent and malodorous gain unclean succour from its presence.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: THE PIPER’S INFECTIOUS MELODIES
description: Effect: While a Beast of Nurgle in this Regiment of Renown is within 3" of this Regiment of Renown’s Sloppity Bilepiper, it can use the 'Attention Seekers' ability even if the other Beast of Nurgle in this Regiment of Renown has already used it this turn.
legend: Driven into blissful delirium by the farts and squelches emanating from Fetorlux’s gutpipes, these Beasts of Nurgle are ever eager to find new playmates.

name: Field Modifications
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HERO with in this unit’s combat range that has an emberstone-enhanced weapon to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. On a 2+, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made with the target’s emberstone-enhanced weapon for the rest of the turn.
legend: Wherever they their craft, this wanderer is an expert in enhancing realmstone-infused weaponry.

name: Arcane Sabotage
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that has an emberstone-enhanced weapon and is within 6" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3-5, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. On a 6, inflict D6 mortal damage on the target and its emberstone-enhanced weapon is destroyed. It can no longer be used in this battle and your opponent must remove it from their roster.
legend: Realmstone is the condensed stuff of magic, and just as magic can be perverted by Chaos, there are those skilled in unmaking its physical form.

name: 'Try Dis on Fer Size!'
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly HERO within this unit’s combat range that has an emberstone-enhanced weapon to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, for the rest of the turn:
  • Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the target’s emberstone-enhanced weapon.
  • For each unmodified hit roll of 1 for an attack made with the target’s emberstone-enhanced weapon, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target after the ATTACK ability has been resolved.
legend: This magic-meddling smith is more interested in creating deadly weapons than stable ones.

name: Magical Focus
description: Effect: The next time a friendly DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH unit uses a SPELL ability this phase, when picking targets for that spell, you can measure range and visibility from this terrain feature instead of from the caster, and your opponent can measure range and visibility to this terrain feature instead of to the caster for the purposes of the ‘Unbind’ ability.
legend: The Argent Shards act as channelling foci through which Tzeentch’s spellcasters can launch their devastating arcane bombardments.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: Sorcerous Duplication
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects:
  • If there is only 1 friendly Argent Shard on the battlefield, set up another Argent Shard wholly within 12" of this terrain feature, more than 1" from all other terrain features, more than 3" from all objectives and more than 9" from all enemy units.
  • Remove this terrain feature from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 1" from all other terrain features, more than 3" from all objectives and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: Argent Shards do not obey the laws of reality. They can phase into and out of existence and split apart into two identical copies.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: Lord of Fate
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made by friendly ARCANITE units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Tzeentch’s chosen disciples can affect the destiny of those around them.

name: Soulbound Shield
description: Effect: If this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 4+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per SPELL ability.
legend: This shield can shelter the wielder against even the most potent magical attacks.

name: SPLINTERS OF SORCERY
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly WIZARD in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible terrain feature within 12" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: If the target does not have the ‘Place of Power’ terrain ability, it gains that ability for the rest of the battle. If the target has the ‘Place of Power’ terrain ability, pick an enemy unit within 12" of it and roll 9 dice. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that enemy unit.
legend: Fragments of an Argent Shard embed themselves in surrounding terrain, unleashing deadly waves of magic.

name: BUBBLES OF UNREALITY
description:
Declare: Pick a terrain feature with the ‘Place of Power’ terrain ability to be the target.

Effect: The next time a friendly WIZARD in this Regiment of Renown uses a SUMMON SPELL ability this phase, you can measure the range and visibility of that SPELL ability from the target instead of from the caster.
legend: The Seekers make use of an Argent Shard’s unstable magic field to redirect their spells and evocations.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase

name: Vicious Protectors
description:
Effect: While there is a visible friendly ARCANITE HERO within this unit’s combat range:
  • Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target that friendly ARCANITE HERO.
  • Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s combat attacks.
legend: As the fiercest of their kind, Tzaangor Enlightened are often tasked with protecting the leaders of the Arcanite Cults. Not only do they excel at slaying those who threaten their charges, but the disturbingly insightful taunts they constantly crow fill their foes with doubt, robbing their strikes of conviction.

name: Masked in Plain Sight
description:
Declare: This unit must be deployed using this ability.

Effect: Set up this unit in reserve incognito. It has now been deployed.

Friendly incognito units are destroyed at the end of the fifth battle round and not at the start of the fourth battle round
legend: Few can see through the Changeling’s disguise.

name: Bait and Switch
description:
Declare: This unit can use this ability if it is incognito. Pick this unit and a friendly INFANTRY HERO to be the targets. One target must be incognito and the other must be on the battlefield.

Effect: Set up the incognito target wholly within 6" of the other target and not in combat. Then, remove the other target from the battlefield and set it up in reserve incognito.

If this unit is destroyed, before removing it from play, set up the friendly incognito unit wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and not in combat.
legend: The Changeling swaps places with a temporary ally

name: Forceful Command
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn:
  • The target cannot use MOVE abilities.
  • The target’s melee weapons have Anti-charge (+1 Rend).
legend: The Changeling imbues its orders with compelling enchantments so that none can disobey.

name: Lead the Charge
description: Effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for friendly LUMINETH REALM-LORDS units while they are wholly within 6" of this unit.
legend: Mounted Lord Regents are not passive strategists who command from positions of safety; they are bold tacticians who lead from the front, inspiring courage in those around them.

name: Purest Aetherquartz
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s attacks and subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit.
legend: Lord Regents carry a reserve of fine aetherquartz that burns with the brilliance of Hysh.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

name: CYCLE MANIFESTATION
description:
Declare: Pick the Scinari Calligrave in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick 1 of the friendly MANIFESTATIONS below that is not on the battlefield, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
  • Sanctum of Amyntok
  • Hyshian Twinstones
  • Rune of Petrification

Effect: If there is already a friendly MANIFESTATION from the list above on the battlefield, it is immediately banished. Then,
legend: With a deft gesture, the caster dismisses one manifestation and uses its power to summon another.

name: SWIFT ERASURE
description: Effect: Roll a dice for each friendly unit that was picked to be a target of that SPELL ability and that is wholly within 12" of the Scinari Calligrave in this Regiment of Renown. On a 4+, that SPELL ability has no effect on that unit.
legend: With a dismissive flourish, the Calligrave nullifies the inelegantly wrought spells of the foe.

name: ARCANE TAXONOMY
description: Effect: Remove the Scinari Calligrave in this Regiment of Renown from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a friendly MANIFESTATION and more than 7" from all enemy units.
legend: The Convocation’s master is never found far from the objects of their magical studies, compelled to take notes and record observations even as battle rages around them.
condition: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase

name: Scything Assault
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of the target.
legend: The War Chariot's incredible momentum sees it crash straight through the enemy front lines with shocking force.

name: Pinning Attacks
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+:
  • Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
  • The target cannot make pile-in moves for the rest of the turn.
legend: Whether by javelin, arrow or sheer terror, the victims of the Kavalos War Chariot find themselves rooted in place.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Balefire Braziers
description: Effect: This unit’s Balefire Braziers are tokens. There are 2 Balefire Braziers for every 10 models in this unit. After setting up this unit on the battlefield for the first time, place its Balefire Braziers next to it.
legend: These cauldrons are filled with tormented, blazing soul-matter with which the Triaxes augment their ammunition.

name: Cursed Flames
description: Effect: After that SHOOT ability has been resolved, if all of this unit’s attacks targeted the same enemy unit and this unit has any Balefire Braziers next to it, place 1 of those Balefire Braziers next to that enemy unit.
legend: As the Mortek Triaxes set foes ablaze, the tortured flames seek out other souls, and the panic spreads...
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a <ky>SHOOT</ky> ability for this unit

name: Atavistic Nightmares
description:
Effect: While any of this unit’s Balefire Braziers are next to an enemy unit, subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units within that enemy unit’s combat range.

If an ability would heal or return slain models to an enemy unit while any of this unit’s Balefire Braziers are next to it, that ability does not heal or return any slain models to it. Instead, place those Balefire Braziers next to this unit.
legend: The trauma of the burning soul-essence is so horrifying that those who witness it are paralysed by dread.

name: Necrocaches
description:
Declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Then, this unit can move 6". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.
legend: The Mortis Reapers hurl their necrocaches to the ground, releasing the flesh-withering grave-sand contained within and vanishing in the resulting cloud like phantoms.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: No Escaping the Tithe
description:
Declare: If there are no enemy units within 6" of this unit, pick a terrain feature within 3" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of the target and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Mortis Reapers are utterly unrelenting in their pursuit of those who would dare attempt to shirk the bone-tithe.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: Clinical Efficiency
description:
Effect: Pick a visible friendly Mortek Guard, Mortek Triaxes or Mortek Crawler unit that has not used an ATTACK ability this phase and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. Immediately after the FIGHT ability used by this unit has been resolved, the target can be picked to use either a SHOOT ability as if it were your shooting phase or a FIGHT ability. If it is picked to do so:
  • Add 1 to hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
  • The target’s ranged weapons (if any) have Shoot in Combat for t
legend: With a sharp gesture, the Liege-Mortek orders his cohorts to unleash a deadly assault.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a %000010870<ky>FIGHT</ky> ability% for this unit

name: Grind Them to Dust
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat, pick this unit and up to 2 visible friendly Kavalos War Chariots wholly within 12" of this unit and in combat to be the targets.

Effect: For each target:
  • Make a pile-in move.
  • Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with the target and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
legend: With a barked command, the Liege-Kavalos orders their fellow charioteers to press further into the melee and crush the foe beneath their wheels.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase

name: Masterful Charioteer
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat and has charged this turn, pick this unit and up to 2 visible friendly Kavalos War Chariots that have charged this turn, that are wholly within 12" of this unit and that are in combat to be the targets.

Effect: Each target has WARD (5+) for the rest of the turn.
legend: As they plough through the enemy's ranks, the Liege-Kavalos leads the War Chariots in complex manoeuvres that prevent the foe from landing telling blows.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Seeker of Truebone
description:
Effect: This unit can be picked to be the target of the ‘Immortal Elite’ ability as if it had the HERO keyword.

Each time a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit is destroyed, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit gains 1 portion of truebone. Each time a visible friendly non-BEAST OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit wholly within 12" of this unit is destroyed, this unit gains 1 portion of truebone.
legend: Thanatek is on a mission to source truebone, a material of surpassing quality for the creation, maintenance and reinforcement of the Bonereaper legions.

name: Truebone Mastery
description:
Effect: Spend any number of this unit’s portions of truebone. For each portion spent, pick 1 of the effects below. Each effect can be picked multiple times and the effects are cumulative.
  • Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn.
  • Add 1 to banishment rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn.
  • Gain 1 relentless discipline point.
  • Return 1 slain model to this unit
legend: If needed, Thanatek can make highly effective use of the truebone his warriors have gathered in battle.

name: THE DECREE OF NAGASH
description:
Declare: Pick the friendly Vokmortian in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, each time your opponent declares a FIGHT ability for the target, unless they spend 1 command point as a reaction, that FIGHT ability has no effect.

Designer’s Note: That FIGHT ability does not count as a command.
legend: With this revered artefact, imbued with magics of command and tyranny, Vokmortian's authority is such that he can cow enemy warriors into submission.

name: REINFORCE PAVISE
description:
Declare: If the Mortek Crawler in this Regiment of Renown is wholly within 12" of and visible to the friendly Mortisan Ossifector in this Regiment of Renown, pick that Mortisan Ossifector to cast this spell, pick that Mortek Crawler to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target has WARD (5+).
legend: Karahtet bolsters the shield attached to the front of the Mortek Crawler, providing his beloved creation with additional protection.

name: Delightful Brews, Splendid Restoratives
description:
Declare: Pick a visible unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: If the target is a friendly MAGGOTKIN OF NURGLE unit, Heal (D3) the target. If the target is an enemy unit, roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Festus relishes the chance to try out each of his new brews upon friends and foes, spreading bizarre and unnatural plagues swiftly through their ranks.

name: Scumboil Pox
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy WIZARD or PRIEST within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Subtract 1 from the target’s power level, to a minimum of 0, until the start of your next turn.
legend: Festus has mastered a spell that inflicts a choking curse upon a foe, their throat breaking out into oozing pustules and their tongues swelling to twice the size.

name: Hunter’s Endurance
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit while it is wholly within the creeping overgrowth.
legend: As the spirit-song intensifies and the magic of life surges across the battlefield, Kurnoth Hunters are gripped with a sacred fervour of the chase that sees them shrug off wounds.

name: Steady Aim
description: Effect: If this unit has not used a MOVE ability this turn and was not set up this turn, add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Bow-wielding Kurnoth Hunters are those of their kind who exhibit particular focus and patience. They take the time to carefully aim and line up a target before unleashing their arrows with deadly precision.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Hunter’s Endurance
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit while it is wholly within the creeping overgrowth.
legend: As the spirit-song intensifies and the magic of life surges across the battlefield, Kurnoth Hunters are gripped with a sacred fervour of the chase that sees them shrug off wounds.

name: Tanglethorn Thickets
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit that is in combat with the target. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Scythe-wielding Kurnoth Hunters have developed the technique of summoning carpets of thorned vines that snare and shred foes who approach without caution.

name: Soulshriek
description: Effect: Each time a model in a friendly non-HERO REVENANT unit wholly within 12" of and visible to this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a number of dice equal to the slain model’s Health characteristic. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Should a Revenant be slain in their presence, a Grove Guardian can trigger a spiritual backlash through the fallen’s lamentiri fuelled by the collective trauma of generations, stilling the heart of their killer in a sudden burst of soul-shock.

name: Regenesis
description:
Declare: Declare: Pick a friendly SYLVANETH unit that is wholly within the creeping overgrowth or that is visible to and wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: If the chanting roll was 6+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target. If a target is a REVENANT INFANTRY or Dryads unit, return up to D3 models to that target unit. Otherwise,
legend: Freshly grown forest spirits leap from the amniotic pods of the Grove Guardian’s genesis tree, ready to join the Everqueen’s war.

name: Hunter’s Endurance
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit while it is wholly within the creeping overgrowth.
legend: As the spirit-song intensifies and the magic of life surges across the battlefield, Kurnoth Hunters are gripped with a sacred fervour of the chase that sees them shrug off wounds.

name: Crashing Impact
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in this unit that is in combat with the target. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: On the charge, Kurnoth Hunters use their great size and durability as a weapon, delivering powerful strikes driven by their momentum and trampling smaller foes underfoot.

name: Clarion of the Forest Prince
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-WAR MACHINE unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target can move 3". It can move through and end that move within the combat ranges of enemy units that it was in combat with at the start of that move, but not those of other enemy units. It does not have to end the move in combat.
legend: Kelthannor’s war-horn blasts clear and loud as he controls the battle from afar.

name: Debilitating Shot
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that has no more than 1 model and that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: Kelthannor sends a steady stream of arrows whipping through the air to both maim and impede his quarry.

name: SEARCHING FOR REMEDIES
description: Effect: Remove each unit in this Regiment of Renown from the battlefield and set them up again wholly within 6" of a terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units.
legend: The Twisted Branch are often found scouting ahead of their allies, looking for any clue that might offer hope of a cure for their curse.

name: SOOTHING PULSE
description:
Declare: Pick the Branchwych in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: Heal (3) the target.
legend: The Branchwych who shepherds these cursed Sylvaneth magically soothes her paraspite-afflicted kin while they await a true cure to their ailments.

name: BITTER ROOTS
description: Effect: If they do not otherwise have one, terrain features have a friendly overgrown token while they are contested by a Spite-Revenants unit in this Regiment of Renown.
legend: Where Drycha’s Talons roam, thorned vines and strangling roots, grown fat on the gore spilled by the Outcasts, churn through the undergrowth with malign intent.

name: CONCEALED IN THE SHADOWS
description: Effect: While they are wholly within 3" of a terrain feature, the Spite-Revenants units in this Regiment of Renown are not visible to enemy units more than 12" away from them.
legend: The Talons hide in plain sight, waiting until their enemy is close before tearing them limb from limb.

name: Rituals of Prophecy
description:
Effect: Roll 6 dice:
  • For each 1, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
  • For each 3, add 1" to this unit’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn.
  • If any of the rolls are a 6, add 1 to save rolls for this unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: Though blind, the Crone Goddess Morai-Heg sees all. Gifted with a fragment of her oracular powers, the Knives of the Crone are able to navigate the vagaries of battle with uncanny perspicuity by reading fate in the spilled entrails of their foes.

name: Wicked Wardens
description: Effect: While this unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood, Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood or Shrine of Dark Tribute, this unit’s melee weapons have Anti-charge (+1 Rend).
legend: The Blood Hags take sadistic pride in keeping the war-shrines full to the brim with liquid gore that they violently drained from the veins of worthy enemies.

name: Crimson Offerings
description: Effect: If an enemy unit was destroyed by this unit’s combat attacks this turn, when resolving that ability, you can pick 2 blessings instead of 1.
legend: Cruel twists of the Blood Hags’ valthrai send fountains of blood gushing into the air – a generous tribute for the Murder God.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘%000021998Blessings of Khaine%’ ability

name: Call to Murder
description:
Effect: Pick a blessing from the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability that is active. That blessing is no longer active. Then, pick a blessing that is not active. That blessing is now active.

Designer’s Note: When you use this ability, you are not using the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability.
legend: The Shrine of Dark Tribute is a locus of sorcerous energy for the Daughters of Khaine and a keystone of their bloody rituals.

name: In Dark Communion
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE WIZARD or PRIEST within 3" of this terrain feature to be the target.

Effect: The target is in dark communion until this terrain feature uses this ability again or until this terrain feature is removed from the battlefield, whichever comes first. While the target is in dark communion, you can re-roll 1 casting roll or 1 chanting roll for the target each turn.
legend: Those Khainites who worship under the shadow of this fell shrine can hear the heartbeat of their merciless deity.

name: FIERCE COMPETITION
description:
Effect: Each time a unit in this Regiment of Renown uses an ability and any enemy models were slain by that ability, after that ability has been resolved, the unit that used that ability is pre-eminent and the other unit in this Regiment of Renown is overlooked.

Weapons used by an overlooked unit in this Regiment of Renown have Crit (Auto-wound).
legend: These Scáthborn are amongst the most cut-throat of their kind, endlessly seeking to outdo their peers as they compete for the attention of their murderous deity.

name: SITE OF SLAUGHTER
description: Effect: Pick an objective wholly outside friendly territory. That objective is considered by you to be the amphitheatre.
legend: The Crimson Lash choose the location of their gladiatorial bloodletting carefully, selecting sites from which their enemies will not easily escape.

name: FINISHING MOVES
description:
Effect: While each model in a unit in this Regiment of Renown is contesting the amphitheatre:
  • That unit’s melee weapons have Crit (Mortal).
  • If you control the amphitheatre, if the unmodified hit roll or wound roll for an attack that targets that unit is a 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: The Crimson Lash cavort about their chosen arena with effortless grace, avoiding enemy blows and responding with elaborately deadly strikes.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Sweeping Branches is 3.

name: Master of Assassins
description: Effect: Double the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for attacks that target an enemy HERO.
legend: Crixxit is one of the most feared assassins of the Clans Eshin, if not the realms entire.

name: Diversionary Assault
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly Gutter Runners unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add 2 to charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn
legend: At a swift signal, be it a twitch of his tail, a deft claw-swipe or a hissed threat, Crixxit directs a group of his agents to launch a blistering diversionary attack to distract the guard of his intended target.

name: Shadowblood Cloak
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly ESHIN unit that has 2 or more models and that is wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of the target. This unit can be set up in combat.
legend: Crixxit’s cloak grants him the ability to melt into the darkness and instantly strike wherever a pack of his many agents cast their slinking shadows.

name: Bomb Rats
description:
Declare: This unit’s Bomb Rats are tokens. If there are fewer than 2 friendly Bomb Rats next to enemy units, pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit that does not have a friendly Bomb Rat next to it to be the target.

Effect: Place this unit’s Bomb Rat next to the target.
legend: Bomb Rats skitter amidst the enemy lines, largely unnoticed in the confusion of battle.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Detonate
description:
Declare: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed. Pick each enemy unit that has a friendly Bomb Rat token to be a target.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each enemy unit within a target’s combat range. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll. Then, remove the target’s Bomb Rat.
legend: Many Gutter Runners are experts in the use of improvised explosives, deploying skittering Bomb Rats to rush the enemy and detonate amongst them in a burst of warpstone-fuelled fury.

name: Zephyrspites
description: Effect: After that SHOOT ability has been resolved, this unit can move up to D6". It cannot move into combat during any part of that move.
legend: These symbiotic winged spites offer their hosts unparalleled manoeuvrability, allowing them to swiftly reposition after loosing a deadly volley.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>SHOOT</ky> ability for this unit

name: Spiterider Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. Add 1 to the roll if the target is the enemy quarry. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Lance-armed Spiteriders train to inflict the greatest damage possible on the charge, destroying chosen targets in a series of blistering attacks.

name: Heartwood Hunting Horn
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, when determining which effects of the ‘Song of the Hunt’ ability apply to the target, you count as having 1 additional chord.
legend: Grown in the forests of Kurnotheal, this horn emits a bold note that sends the thrill of the hunt rushing through the veins of their warriors.

name: Deafening Drone
description:
Declare: If this unit did not charge this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: Revenant Seekers circle over the melee, cutting throats and piercing skulls with swipes of their sickles. The buzzing roar of their dragonspites’ wings soon disorientate enemies who engage them in protracted combat.

name: Deathrider Wedge
description:
Effect: The following effects apply this phase:
  • Models in this unit can pass across enemy INFANTRY models as if this unit had FLY.
  • After this unit has charged, you can pick an enemy unit that it passed across and roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.
legend: Kavalos Deathriders can charge in a deadly arrowhead formation that bursts through the enemy’s defences.

name: Signal the Advance
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: With a gesture of their blade, the Liege-Kavalos orders their warriors to ride forth.

name: Bone-deep Savagery
description: Effect: This unit can move 3". If it can move into combat, it must. If it was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.
legend: The impure materials used in the creation of the Teratic Cohort has lent them an innate savagery that is all but impossible to truly control in the heat of battle.

name: Gunhauler Overwatch
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: At the last moment, the Gunhauler’s crew loose a hasty fusillade at a charging group of foes.

name: Bewilderblast Rounds
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Subtract D6 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: These specialist rounds emit a riot of light and sound, severely disrupting the targets’ cohesion.
condition: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Shooting Phase

name: Cloudweaving Skyfarers
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: It is not only the Kharadron’s vessels that prowl the skies: one-duardin endrinsphere harnesses grant their wearers the power of flight, making them manoeuvrable troops indeed.

name: Endrinmaster Extraordinaire
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit with the FLY keyword that is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, Heal (X) the target where X is equal to the roll.
legend: This Endrinmaster’s rig bristles with tools and gizmos that allow them to perform battlefield repairs with great haste.

name: Stuff 'Em In Me Bag
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.

Effect: If the roll is at least double the target unit’s Health characteristic, 1 model in that unit is slain.
legend: Gargants are known to grab hapless warriors and stuff them screaming into their bags ‘for later’…

name: Timber!
description: Effect: If this model is slain, before removing it from the battlefield, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield up to 3" from this model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 2" of that point. This model is then removed from the battlefield.
legend: A dying gargant is a weapon of ruin in its own right, though it is anyone’s guess where – and on whom – their body will fall.

name: Unrivalled Velocity
description: Effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for this unit.
legend: Slickblade Seekers are obsessed with high-speed kills, tearing towards the foe with relentless haste.

name: Slaughter At Any Cost
description:
Declare: This unit can use this ability if any damage points were allocated to it this turn.

Effect: This unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: When stirred by the excesses of battle, Fiendbloods waste no time in hunting down their victims.

name: Light-footed Killers
description: Effect: This unit can use SHOOT abilities even if it used a RUN ability in the same turn.
legend: Blissbarb Archers can deliver pinpoint shots even while cavorting wildly across the battlefield.

name: Vision of Damnation
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, roll 6 dice. For each 4+, you receive 1 depravity point.
legend: The sorcerer conjures a vision of excess so intense that reality itself shimmers and distorts.

name: Expert Trackers
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: These soldiers are tasked with scouting ahead of the main advance.

name: Blazing Weapons
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (Mortal) until the start of your next turn.
legend: The weapons of the Warforger's allies glow red-hot with magical power.

name: Blackpowder Squire
description: Effect: While this unit has a Blackpowder Squire token, this unit’s ranged weapons have Shoot in Combat.
legend: When ammunition runs low, Blackpowder Squires bring fresh supplies to the line and relay orders.

name: Can't Stop!
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly Freeguild Fusiliers unit to be the target.

Effect: Remove this unit’s Blackpowder Squire token from the battlefield, then give it to the target.
legend: The Blackpowder Squire dashes to another unit amidst the mayhem of battle.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Mark Targets
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that was targeted by this unit’s shooting attacks this turn to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for shooting attacks made by friendly units that target that unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Experts in ballistics, Fusil-Majors can direct the fire of nearby Castelite formations to eliminate priority targets.

name: Scaled Protectors
description: Effect: While this unit includes a Sunblood, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit each phase and add 1 to this unit’s control score.
legend: The saurus bodyguard know no other purpose than to follow and protect their Sunblood leader until their dying breath.

name: Savage Bellow
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 3+, the target’s weapons have Crit (2 Hits) for the rest of the turn, including Companion weapons.
legend: The Sunblood looses a fearsome bellow, inspiring a fearsome savagery in his warriors.

name: Sun Acolytes
description: Effect: This unit has a crew of 3 Sun Acolytes that are tokens. Add 1 to this unit’s control score for each Sun Acolyte it has. If this unit has no Sun Acolytes, it has a maximum control score of 1. Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove 1 of its Sun Acolytes from the battlefield after the Attack ability has been resolved (the damage point is still inflicted).
legend: The Sun Acolytes that accompany a Spawn of Chotec carry out complex tasks upon the battlefield safe in the knowledge that the salamander serves as a deadly deterrent to would be attackers.

name: Ordered Cohorts
description: Effect: Add 1 to save rolls for this unit while it is contesting an objective you control.
legend: Devoted servants of the Old Ones, Saurus Warriors are as intractable in defence as they are relentless upon the attack.

name: Nerve-shredding Screeches
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: The shrill cries of a Terrawing flock can cause disarray across the enemy line.

name: Star-venom
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit’s Dartpipe to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: The blowdarts used by the Hunters of Huanchi are coated in deadly toxins.

name: Seething Swarm
description: Effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
legend: Sweeping forward in a chittering mass, Clanrats overwhelm their enemies with their seemingly limitless numbers, biting, stabbing, screeching and trampling their own fallen beneath their bloody claws.

name: Unleashed Warp-Fury
description: Effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit. Then, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its melee weapons this phase.
legend: The warpstone hammered into the flesh of these creatures crackles with volatile energies, driving them into a frenzy.
condition: Any Combat Phase, Once Per Battle

name: Will of the Horned Rat
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.

Effect: On a 3+, add the roll to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: None among the Skaven clans may defy the commands of a Grey Seer – openly, at least…

name: Wither
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Grey Seer hurls a glowing green globe of magical energy at the foe. Anyone touched by the globe starts to shrivel and wither away.

name: More-more Warp Energy!
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, set the Damage characteristic of its Warplock Musket to 3 this phase. On a 1, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.
legend: The Engineer overcharges their weapon with volatile energy.
condition: Reaction: You declared a <ky>SHOOT</ky> ability for this unit and it has not used a <ky>MOVE</ky> ability this turn

name: Cornered Rat
description: Effect: While this unit is damaged, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of its Warpforged Halberd.
legend: A Clawlord in fear for their life fights with rabid ferocity.

name: Unflagging Hunters
description: Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit.
legend: When blood is scented, nothing will keep a Flesh Hound from its prey.

name: Stalk the Prey
description: Effect: This unit can move D6". It cannot end that move in combat unless it was in combat at the start of that move and, if there is an enemy quarry on the battlefield, it must end that move closer to the quarry.
legend: Karanak's quarry is relentlessly and mercilessly run to the ground.

name: Pack Hunters
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with both this unit and a friendly Flesh Hounds unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, this unit’s combat attacks that target that enemy unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
legend: The howls of the Flesh Hounds sends these killers into a blood-mad frenzy.

name: No Respite
description: Effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain, you can pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit and roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that enemy unit.
legend: Dying as they lived, Blood Warriors devote even their final moments to killing.

name: Blood Boil
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 16" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Spitting ritualistic words of wrath into the air, the Slaughterpriest turns the blood coursing through the veins of the enemy red-hot, burning them from the inside out.

name: Blood Sacrifice
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target and you gain 1 blood tithe point.
legend: The Slaughterpriest answers their god’s call for blood by sacrificing one of their own.

name: Frenzied Devotion
description: Effect: If this unit is within 8" of your general, you can return D3 slain models to this unit.
legend: When fighting in the presence of their leaders, these warriors fight until the bitter end.

name: Brass Stampede
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target, then roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Nothing can stop the thunderous onset of Khorne’s Juggernauts once they have scented the blood of the foe.

name: Deliver Judgement
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly non-HERO unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: The target can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the phase.
legend: This warrior orders Sigmar’s wrath to be delivered unto their enemies.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Plan the Attack
description:
Declare: Pick an objective you do not control.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units that target enemy units contesting that objective.
legend: With honed tactical skill, the Lord-Vigilant orders a vital position to be taken.

name: Stalwart Defenders
description: Effect: Add 3 to this unit’s control score while it contests an objective wholly within friendly territory.
legend: Liberators fiercely guard the lands brought into Sigmar’s domain.

name: Sense Unholy Sorcery
description:
Effect: This unit’s Gryph-crow is a token. This unit has WARD (5+) while its Gryph-crow is on the battlefield.

If you make an unmodified ward roll of 1 for this unit, remove its Gryph-crow from the battlefield.
legend: Gryph-crows are sensitive to spiritual corruption and immediately alert their masters whenever unholy energies are nearby.

name: Cleansing Fires
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: On a 3+, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit.
legend: Erupting forth from the Lord-Veritant’s brazier, a torrent of holy fire engulfs the enemy.

name: Skirmishers
description: Effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".
legend: These warriors fight in a dispersed formation.

name: Heralds of Righteousness
description: Effect: When you make a charge roll for this unit, roll 1 additional dice.
legend: Prosecutors speed across the battlefield in blurs of light.

name: Great Snarlin' Howl
description:
Declare: Pick this unit and another friendly unit within this unit’s combat range to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic and the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ Companion melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The howls of this boss’s Snarlfang Alpha drive its pack into a frenzy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase

name: Careening Destruction
description:
Effect: This unit can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through other models and the combat ranges of enemy units, but it cannot end that move in combat. Then, pick up to 1 enemy INFANTRY unit that this unit passed across during that move to be the target. Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

Designer’s Note: This unit can use this ability even if it is in combat.
legend: Lurching uncontrollably across the battlefield at death-defying speed, Sunsteala Wheelas careen straight through their enemies leaving behind trails of devastation.

name: Frazzleburned Scrap
description: Effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST if it charged in the same turn.
legend: After the boss, Snarlpack Cavalry often get first dibs on loot, and they have an eye for the scrap and wotsits with the best light-absorbing properties. In battle, they have learned how to unleash these energies from their weapons at just the right moment, dazzling the enemy as their charge hits home.

name: I Got Dis, Boss
description: Effect: While a friendly Snarlboss is within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and that Snarlboss have WARD (5+).
legend: Wolfgitz look out for their Snarlboss in battle, if only because it makes knifin’ him later easier once he’s let his guard down.

name: Decisive Commander
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Freeguild Steelhelms unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, pick 1:

On Your Feet!: If the target unit is not in combat, you can return D3 slain models to it.

Yield No Quarter!: Add 3 to the target unit’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: In the face of the oncoming enemy, Freeguild Marshals employ rousing oratory to inspire their soldiers to stand strong in the name of Sigmar.

name: Shot and Shell
description: Effect: Each time this unit uses a SHOOT ability, choose either the Cannonball or Grapeshot weapon characteristics for all the attacks it makes with its Great Cannon. The Cannonball can only be chosen if this unit has not used a MOVE ability that turn.
legend: The engineers of the Ironweld Arsenal have developed different ammunition for the Great Cannon to fire.

name: Devastating Charge
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Thundering across the battlefield, the Cavaliers build up momentum before smashing deep into the enemy’s ranks, laying about themselves with blade, axe, hammer and flail.

name: Consecrate the Land
description:
Declare: If this unit is contesting an objective you control that is not contested by any enemy models, roll a dice.

Effect: On a 3+, that objective is considered by you to be consecrated. Friendly units have WARD (6+) while they are contesting a consecrated objective. If your opponent gains control of a consecrated objective, it is no longer consecrated.
legend: Bellowing Sigmarite hymns, the Battle Priest who accompanies the Steelhelms purges the taint of Chaos from the land and consecrates it in the name of the God-King.

name: Moonfire Flask
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit and that charged this turn to be the target, then roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The High Warden carries a flask filled with a burning silvery liquid that can be hurled at the incoming enemy.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Leap Into the Storm
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of the leeward battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: Windchargers can leap great heights and ride the winds to a more advantageous position.

name: Eye of the Storm
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly units while they are wholly within 6" of this unit.
legend: The Spirit of the Wind surrounds itself with a powerful cyclone that obscures nearby allies and disrupts the attacks of their enemies.

name: Hurricane Winds
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The arrows of the Spirits of the Wind are followed by a blast of wind, throwing enemies to the ground.

name: Windleap
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, for the rest of the turn:
  • The target can use RETREAT abilities and still use SHOOT and/or CHARGE abilities later in the turn.
  • No mortal damage is inflicted on the target by RETREAT abilities.
legend: The Hurakan Windmage calls upon the wind spirits to give nearby allies a helpful push in the right direction.

name: Royal Bodyguard
description: Effect: Add 1 to ward rolls for friendly HEROES that are wholly within this unit’s combat range.
legend: In battle, it falls to the tenacious Cryptguard to form a half-living shield for their vampiric overlords.

name: Predator's Pounce
description: Effect: This unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit when it uses RETREAT abilities.
legend: Though they lack the power of true flight, Nightshriekers can leap clean over obstacles and the heads of the foe, allowing Morbheg Knights to strike and disengage at will.

name: Deranged Transformation
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic and add 1 to wound rolls for its attacks.
legend: Wielding the power of their curse, the abhorrant causes the limbs of a nearby pack to bulge and lengthen, allowing the creatures to charge forwards at a furious pace.

name: Victory Feast
description: Effect: If any models were slain by this unit this turn, Heal (D6) this unit, and this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: A Varghulf rampages through the enemy’s ranks at will, its wounds sealing with unholy rapidity as it guzzles the flesh of the savaged foe.

name: Bone Harvest
description: Effect: Each time an enemy model in combat with this unit is slain, this unit gains 1 bone-tithe point. It can never have more than 6 bone-tithe points.
legend: As a Gothizzar Harvester fights, it works to amass a grisly stockpile of bones.

name: Repair Construct
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Mortek Guard unit within 6" of this unit to be the target. Then, roll a dice for each bone-tithe point this unit has.

Effect: For each 4+, you can return 1 slain model to the target unit. Then, reset this unit’s bone-tithe points to 0.
legend: The Harvester uses a portion of its morbid crop to restore the forms of fellow Ossiarchs.

name: Nadirite Assault
description: Effect: Until the end of the phase, this unit’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits).
legend: The weapons of the Ossiarch legions can siphon souls with a single cut, stealing the foe’s life force.

name: Drain Vitality
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: This cursed spell saps a foe’s strength, leaving them weak and vulnerable.

name: Reknit Construct
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit and that is not in combat to be the target.

Effect: Heal (D3) the target. If the target unit is not damaged, you can instead return a number of slain models to it that have a combined Health characteristic of D3 or less.
legend: This Mortisan has the power to remake and renew that which has been destroyed.

name: Boing! Boing! Boing!
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that any models in this unit passed across this phase to be the target, then roll a dice for each model in this unit that did so.

Effect: For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Squig Hoppers can cause considerable damage simply by bouncing on top of their foes as they make their way across the battlefield.

name: Netters
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit this phase.
legend: Moonclan grots use throwing nets to capture Cave Squigs and entangle their foes.

name: I'm Da Boss
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Moonclan Stabbas unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1:

Beckon the Loonatic Hordes: If the target unit is not in combat, you can return D6 slain models to it.

Stab ’Em Good!: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit until the start of your next turn.
legend: Loonbosses prefer to make their minions do all the fighting.

name: Regeneration
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Troggoths are able to regrow injured flesh almost as quickly as it is harmed.

name: The Scent of Gore
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made by this unit that target a damaged unit.
legend: The taste of hot blood on the tongue sends these abominations into a killing mania.

name: Skeleton Legion
description: Effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
legend: As necromantic energies blanket the battlefield, long-dead warriors stagger to their feet once more, eye sockets aglow with killing light.

name: Vile Transference
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, roll a number of dice equal to the target’s Health characteristic. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target and Heal (1) this unit.
legend: The Vampire Lord siphons the animus from nearby enemies and uses it to rejuvenate their ageless form.

name: Riders of Ruin
description: Effect: Models in this unit can pass across enemy INFANTRY models as if this unit had FLY.
legend: Blood Knights barge through lesser foes to strike at more worthy challengers.

name: Doomfire
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Doomfire Warlocks hurl bolts of blazing black flame at their foes.

name: All-Out Slaughter
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. You cannot pick this unit.

Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Melusai Ironscale exhorts their warriors to commit acts of terrible bloodshed.

name: Turned to Crystal
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of this unit to be the target and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The touch of an Ironscale can permanently transmute an enemy into a crystal statue.

name: Heartseekers
description: Effect: Shooting attacks made by this unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+ if this unit did not use a MOVE ability in the same turn.
legend: The bloodblessed arrows loosed by these Melusai unerringly seek out the enemy’s vital organs.

name: Frenzied Fervour
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons if it charged in the same turn.
legend: Witch Aelves hurl themselves at the enemy with no fear of death, cutting down foes in a whirlwind of blades.

name: Breath of the Mire-drakes
description:
Declare: Roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with this unit.

Effect: On a 1, nothing happens. On a 2-5, inflict 1 mortal damage on that enemy unit. On a 6, inflict D3 mortal damage on that unit.
legend: Belcha-bannas are typically built around the severed tongue of a mire-drake, creatures so vile that even after death, their remains belch forth clouds of soul-shrivelling gas.

name: Pick 'Em Off
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks if has not used a MOVE ability this turn.
legend: Boltboyz prefer to remain stationary to fire carefully aimed shots.

name: Scare Taktikz
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit this phase. This ability has no effect on attacks made by HEROES.
legend: Gutrippaz use all manner of means to unnerve and intimidate their foes.

name: Skewered
description: Effect: The Damage characteristic of this unit’s Beast-skewer Bolts is 6 instead of D6 if the target is a MONSTER.
legend: Beast-skewer bolts are designed to inflict horrendous wounds on monstrous quarry.

name: All Part of Da Plan
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 9" of this unit to be the target. You cannot pick this unit.

Effect: Add 3 to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: Kruleboyz tend to be very impressed by a Killaboss’s kunnin’ feats – so long as the boss has a plan, they are willing to face down even the most unlikely odds.

name: Envoys of the Everqueen
description: Effect: While this unit is contesting an objective, friendly units contesting that objective have WARD (6+).
legend: Kurnoth Hunters can channel a fraction of their goddess’s divine power through those sites that resonate with the realmroots.

name: Verdurous Harmony
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 7+, you can return 1 slain model to the target unit. If you picked a Tree-Revenants unit, you can return D3 slain models instead of 1.
legend: The wizard plucks reviving motes of magic from the air and uses them to renew the broken forms of fallen warriors.

name: Martial Memories
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply to this unit this phase:

Memories of War: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this unit.

Memories of Peace: Add 1 to save rolls for this unit.
legend: Tree-Revenants can draw on centuries of experience when they go to war.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Massive Impaling Talons is 1.

name: Groundshaker
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.

Effect: On a 4+, the target has STRIKE-LAST this phase.
legend: The earth quakes as the Treelord stamps down hard, shaking the enemy’s wits.

name: Deliver on Fate
description: Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit while you are the underdog.
legend: When on the back foot, the Enlightened use the knowledge they have of their enemy’s past battles to predict their movements, taking great satisfaction in running their destined prey to ground.

name: Mutative Aura
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 7+, until the start of your next turn, each time an unmodified hit roll for a combat attack made by the target is 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Those who strike a Tzaangor Shaman are oft reduced to bubbling pools of twisted flesh.

name: Destined Quarry
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.
legend: Skyfires often select a target to utterly obliterate and erase from the tapestry of fate.

name: Long-planned Strike
description: Effect: While this unit is wholly within enemy territory, its melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits).
legend: Tzaangors are fearsome agents of change on the attack, pushing their longplanned assault into enemy territory with impressive skill and strength.

name: Strike on the Move
description: Effect: This unit can use SHOOT abilities even if it used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn.
legend: Namarti Reavers are experts at running out from cover to unleash a hail of deadly arrows.

name: Biovoltaic Blast
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target, then roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in this unit.

Effect: For each 4-5, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. For each 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Add 1 to each roll if there are more models in the target unit than this unit.
legend: The biovoltaic energy produced by Fangmora Eels is stored by Morrsarr Guard, ready to be discharged as a bolt of force when the time is right.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Charge Phase

name: Biovoltaic Barrier
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target unit’s weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The biovoltaic energy produced by Fangmora Eels is channelled by Ishlaen Guard into a crackling luminescent energy field that protects them from harm.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Raiders' Resolve
description:
Declare: Pick another friendly unit wholly within this unit’s combat range to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to save rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Akhelian King orders the warriors under their command to stand firm in the face of the enemy.

name: Wave Rider
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: When an Akhelian King charges the foe, they hit with the power of a crashing wave.

name: Down to the Ironguts
description: Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to this unit’s control score.
legend: It is not often that a mawtribe’s battleline falters, but if it does, the Tyrant will call upon their Ironguts to turn the battle back in their favour.

name: Rain of Scrap
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any models slain this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.

Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: Salvaged weapons and shards of metal rain down upon the enemy, forcing them to take cover or dodge out of the way.

name: No Shortage of Volunteers
description: Effect: You can return D3 models to this unit.
