legend: When your choices are potentially dying at the hands of the enemy or being eaten alive by a hungry ogor, most Gnoblars are willing to take their chances with the enemy.

name: Staying Useful
description:
Effect: While any of this unit’s Gnoblar or Frost Sabre tokens are on the battlefield, this unit has WARD (5+).

Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, remove 1 of this unit’s tokens from the battlefield.

If this unit’s Frost Sabre token has been removed, it can no longer attack with its Frost Sabre’s Fangs.
legend: The Hunter's companions are handy spotters and trackers.

name: No Slacking!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit.

Effect: Roll a dice On a 3+, add the result to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Icebrow Hunter that leads the Mantrappers gets his followers in line with a menacing snort.

name: Another Link in the Chain
description: Effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if this unit is wholly within 12" of any friendly Spirit Torments. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: Chainghasts act as conduits for Spirit Torments, ensuring all nearby Nighthaunt are invigorated by deathly energies.

name: Harrowing Shrieks
description: Effect: Enemy units cannot be healed or have slain models returned to them while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: The chilling cries of the Dreadscythe Harridans drive all hope from the hearts of their foes.

name: Phantasmal Discorporation
description: Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: Dreadblade Harrows are able to disappear in a spectral mist.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: Captured Soul Energy
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Spirit Torment of a Cursed Shacklehorde uses the souls captured in their padlock to imbue their minions with deathly might.

name: Thrashing Desperation
description: Effect: While this unit contests an objective you control, enemy units cannot end a charge move within ½" of this unit unless the unmodified charge roll was 5 or more.
legend: Only the bravest and most determined of charges can get within striking range of the veritable wall of thrashing blades that are the Bladegheist Revenants.

name: King of Shambling Bones
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by the target for the rest of the turn.
legend: In the presence of their sovereign, the footsoldiers of the Deathrattle kingdoms assume a sliver of their former warlike vigour.

name: Cursed To Rise Once More
description: Effect: You can return 1 slain model to this unit.
legend: Necrotic flames wreathe the shattered remains of an undead knight, compelling them to rejoin the battle.

name: Guardians of the King
description: Effect: While your general is within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and your general have WARD (5+).
legend: The Barrow Guard stand alongside the liege lord to whom they are bound.

name: Strike the Gongs
description: Effect: This unit’s Gong Carrier (if any) is a token. You can remove its Gong Carrier from the battlefield and return D3 slain models to this unit.
legend: Borne by straining hobgrots, these gongs are holy relics to the servants of Hashut.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase

name: Daemonic Resilience
description:
Effect: Apply the effect below that corresponds with the number of daemonic power points (DPP) this unit has:

$000002962
legend: Spitting contempt from between their tusks, these duardin refuse to show the slightest shred of weakness.

name: Black-hearted Conqueror
description: Effect: While this unit has any daemonic power points, friendly units with 0 daemonic power points count as having 1 daemonic power point while they are wholly within 6" of and visible to this unit. For each daemonic power point this unit has, add 3" to the range of this ability.
legend: Those sworn to serve beneath a Despot must offer them conquest and tribute or suffer the consequences…

name: Daemonic Strength
description:
Effect: For each daemonic power point this unit has:
  • Add 1" to its Move characteristic.
  • Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its weapons.
legend: When empowered with a surplus of daemonic energy, Dominator Engines are made faster and deadlier still.

name: Calculated Trajectory
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks that target an enemy unit with 5 or more models that is more than 12" from this unit.
legend: The warhosts of the Chaos duardin revel in overwhelming their foes with excessive, punishing firepower.

name: Ruinous Bombardment
description:
Declare: If this unit used a SHOOT ability this turn and all of its attacks targeted the same enemy unit, that enemy unit is the target. Then, you can pick a number of enemy units within 6" of the target equal to the number of daemonic power points this unit has to be additional targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, subtract 3 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.
legend: Those who survive the initial unmaking wave of raw Chaos energy laid down by a Tormentor Bombard are left addled and disoriented.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase

name: Switch Aspects
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the turn:

Blade-parry Aspect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target this unit.

Destroyer Aspect: Ward rolls cannot be made for damage points inflicted by this unit’s combat attacks.
legend: Stalkers are imbued with a powerful skill by whichever of their skulls faces the foe, switching from defence to offence in the blink of an eye.

name: Refined Creations
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 5+, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) until the start of your next turn.
legend: Ossifectors are always looking to improve upon their work, wielding necrotic sorcery to augment their creations in battle.

name: Soulbound Protectors
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (5+) while they are within this unit’s combat range.
legend: Immortis Guard will use their own bodies to shield their rulers from harm.

name: Heralds of Nagash
description: Effect: Add 1 to discipline rolls for this unit while it is not wholly within 12" of your general.
legend: The Morghast are the embodiment of Nagash's will and require no commander to function with utmost efficacy as a result.

name: Bloodthirsty Predators
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s Allopex’s Ferocious Bite if it is within 6" of any damaged enemy units or if it is within 6" of any enemy units that have had any models slain in the same turn.
legend: Allopexes are drawn towards the scent of freshly spilt blood.

name: Sweeping Blows
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Lanmari for attacks that target an enemy MONSTER.
legend: Lanmari can cut through weaker opponents as an Allopex cuts through a shoal of Scryfish, or they can be used to inflict grievous wounds on larger enemies.

name: Ritual of the Creeping Mist
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.

Effect: On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target that unit.
legend: This ritual beckons the chilling fogs of the ethersea to blind the enemy.

name: Swift Attackers
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: As they close in on the enemy at frightening speed, these skilled horsemen are nigh impossible to hit with missile fire.

name: Visions of Glory
description: Effect: If this unit includes a Godspeaker, roll 8 dice. For each 4+, until the start of your next turn, you can re-roll 1 hit roll, 1 wound roll, 1 run roll or 1 save roll for this unit.
legend: Godspeakers use their powers of divination to scry the future and see what glory awaits their kin.

name: Oath of Supremacy
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the target.
legend: By the will of the gods, this warrior leads her barbarous horde into the lands of the enemy, allowing none to oppose them.

name: Glorious Death
description: Effect: Each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking model, roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.
legend: Ever keen to earn the favour of their tribe, when the eyes of the fiercest fighters are upon them, these warriors will not go down without a fight.

name: Cloud of Flies
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: Plaguebearer tallybands are surrounded at all times by blinding swarms of daemon-flies.

name: Relentless Attackers
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy INFANTRY unit in combat with this unit to be the target and roll a dice for each model in this unit that is within the target unit’s combat range.

Effect: For each roll that exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, inflict 1 mortal damage on it.
legend: Blightkings grind through the battlelines of lesser foes, shattering their morale and hacking down the stunned survivors with contemptuous ease.

name: Keep Counting, I'm Watching You
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Plaguebearers unit wholly within 14" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Pick 1 of the following. The effect lasts until the start of your next turn.

Tally of Blows: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target unit’s melee weapons.

Recorded Stamina: Add 1 to save rolls for the target unit.
legend: Spoilpox Scriveners are responsible for making sure that the Plaguebearers of the tallybands do not shirk their duties

name: Wrack and Ruin
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Mortal Maggotkin who ride Rot Flies act as brutal linebreakers, using their sheer bulk to smash enemy formations asunder.

name: Rhinox Charge
description: Effect: The Damage characteristic of this unit’s Rhinox’s Sharp Horns is 3 if it charged in the same turn.
legend: A rhinox’s double-horned skull can inflict considerable damage when the beast charges into the foe.

name: Driven by Hunger
description: Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit.
legend: Gutbusters cannot wait to meet and eat the enemy.

name: Firing from the Belly
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks if it has not used a MOVE ability this turn.
legend: An ogor’s sturdy frame easily absorbs the recoil of even cannon-sized weapons.

name: Bully of the First Degree
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. You cannot pick this unit.

Effect: Add 3 to the control score of the target until the start of your next turn.
legend: Tyrants use abrupt violence to help them maintain an iron rule over their warglutt.

name: Linebreakers
description: Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
legend: The thick hides of Mournfangs protect them from incoming missile fire as they charge headlong into the enemy’s battleline.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Carnosaur’s Massive Jaws is 1.

name: Ancient Warlord
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. You cannot pick this unit.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to charge rolls for the target.
legend: An Oldblood commands their saurian brethren with relentless focus and drive.

name: Brutal Blows
description: Effect: This unit’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) if the target unit has 5 or more models.
legend: Kroxigor swing their weapons in wide arcs, smashing aside a multitude of foes with each blow.

name: Sound the Pursuit!
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, when making charge rolls for the target, add 1 to the number of dice rolled, to a maximum of 3, then remove 1 dice of your choice and use the remaining dice as the charge roll.
legend: With a howl that echoes like a winding horn, the Gorewarden infuses their minions with a feverish desire to hunt and feast.

name: Holy Blades of Bone
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit and that charged this turn to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit.
legend: Crypt Horrors wield huge, monstrous femurs – as well as other grisly relics – as if they were blessed weapons.

name: Lie of the Land
description: Effect: If this unit is not in combat and is wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units
legend: The Beastflayers’ familiarity with their hunting grounds allows them to easily outflank their prey.

name: Unholy Chorus
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 10" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract an amount from the target’s control score equal to the number of damage points allocated to the target this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks.
legend: The shrieks of a Crypt Flayer pack leave their enemies disoriented and harrowed.

name: Bloody Incitement
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: If this unit is in combat, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (Auto-wound) for the rest of the turn.

If this unit is not in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (Auto-wound) for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Hag Queen drives her followers into a violent rage.

name: Consecrated Revulsion
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to save rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.
legend: The Slaughter Queen’s fanaticism is so intense that her deity provides protection for her followers from the attacks of heathens and weaklings.

name: Shadow Leap
description: Effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
legend: Shadowstalkers can vanish and reappear at will as they navigate the Umbral Web.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: Dance of Death
description: Effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move 2D6". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but must end that move in combat.
legend: Sisters of Slaughter delight in frustrating foes with acts of incredible acrobatics and martial skill.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Combat Phase

name: Exsanguinating Glare
description:
Declare: If this unit is in combat, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target. Otherwise, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. Then, if any enemy models were slain by that mortal damage, inflict an additional 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The Bloodwrack Medusa’s eyes blaze with pure hatred, and her victim's blood explodes violently from their every pore.

name: Icon of Grimnir
description: Effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The Battlesmith raises his icon of Grimnir, inspiring his allies so that they fight until the bitter end.

name: Plant the Icon
description: Effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units have WARD (5+) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: The Battlesmith slams the pommel of his icon into the earth, setting the urgold runes of nearby allies ablaze.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Hero Phase

name: Duty Unto Death
description: Effect: While your general is wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and your general have WARD (5+).
legend: Hearthguard Berzerkers are sworn to protect their lodge and its masters until their dying breath.

name: Whirlwind of Destruction
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons if it charged in the same turn.
legend: With the light of Grimnir burning in their eyes, these impetuous warriors hurl themselves into the fray.

name: You Messin'?
description: Effect: Enemy models with a Health characteristic of 1 or 2 cannot contest objectives while they are in combat with this unit.
legend: Most beings with half an ounce of common sense swiftly wither under the furious gaze of an orruk Brute who has marked their territory.

name: Get Stuck In, Ladz
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
legend: The roared commands issued by a Megaboss encourage the Ironjawz under their command to fight all the harder.

name: Unleashed Rage
description: Effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST if it charged in the same turn.
legend: Brute Ragerz waste no time in venting their pent-up rage when they get within striking distance of the foe.

name: Shield Bash
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Make a shield bash roll of D6 for each model in this unit that is within 3" of the target. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The shields carried by Ardboyz are great slabs of iron festooned with spikes and metal teeth, making them deadly weapons in their own right.

name: Bolt of Change
description:
Declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. If any models are slain by this ability, you can pick a friendly Tzaangors unit wholly within 18" of this unit and return 1 slain model to that Tzaangors unit.
legend: The Magister hurls a coruscating bolt of energy at the foe, causing their flesh to run like wax and remould into a form more pleasing to Tzeentch.

name: Slashing Fins
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that any models in this unit passed across this phase to be the target, then roll a dice for each model in this unit that did so.

Effect: For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Screamers swoop from discoloured skies to slash at their foes, performing fly-by attacks and effortless manoeuvres.

name: Capricious Wyrdflame
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this unit if the target unit has 5 or more models.
legend: The lurid fires of change spread as though they were possessed of a malign, mischievous sentience.

name: Gestalt Sorcery
description:
Declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Sorcerous Bolts this phase.
legend: Through combined worship, a cult of Acolytes can swell their arcane power to new levels of ferocity.

name: Bomb Rats
description:
Declare: You can only use this ability if this unit has a Bomb Rat token. Pick an enemy unit within 9" of this unit to be the target. Then, roll a dice.

Effect: On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. On a 1-2, remove this unit’s Bomb Rat token from the battlefield.
legend: Many Gutter Runners are experts in the use of improvised explosives, using skittering Bomb Rats to rush the enemy and detonate amongst them in a burst of warpstone-fuelled fury.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Charge Phase

name: Go-Go, Hunt Them Down
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly Gutter Runners unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. Then, roll a dice.

Effect: On a 3+, add 1 to charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn
legend: Crixxit dispatches his Gutter Runners to pounce on unsuspecting prey.

name: Smoke Bombs
description:
Declare: This unit can only use this ability if it is in combat. Roll a dice.

Effect: On a 4+, this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: The Clans Eshin use smoke bombs to cause confusion and disorientate the enemy.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

name: Shadowy Killers
description: Effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
legend: Ulguan illusions and other tools of misdirection shroud Deathmasters in perpetual darkness, keeping them from harm.

name: Champion of Sigmar
description: Effect: This unit has WARD (5+) this phase.
legend: Forged by Sigmar’s own hand, Yndrasta is protected by a divine aura so potent that swords and arrows simply rebound off her.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: Azyr Unleashed
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: The impact of a Stormstrike Chariot on the charge can obliterate even the most durable of shieldwalls.

name: Banner of the Reforged
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Heal (D3) the target. In addition, add 3 to that unit’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: When a Banner of Apotheosis is planted, its energies heal flesh and restore armour.

name: Lightning Strikes
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s Celestial Greatswords for attacks that target an enemy unit that has 5 or more models.
legend: Vanquishers utilise a stance that allows them to make a flurry of rapid strikes against a numerous foe.

name: Force of a Falling Star
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase and the unmodified charge roll was 8+, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST this turn.
legend: As Annihilators build up momentum, their charge turns the shockwave of their arrival into a deadly bludgeoning assault.

name: Shock Gauntlets
description: Effect: Each time an attack made with this unit’s Shock Gauntlets scores a critical hit, that attack scores D6 hits instead of 1 (make a wound roll for each hit).
legend: Sometimes the electrical discharge created by a pair of shock gauntlets triggers a series of linked explosions.

name: Warp Lightning Blast
description: Effect: Each attack made with this weapon in a single phase must target the same enemy unit. Each hit inflicts 1 mortal damage on the target and the attack sequence ends.
legend: A Warp Lightning Cannon fires massive bolts of warp lightning that disintegrate any who are struck by them.

name: Discorporate
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 9" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target has WARD (5+).
legend: This spectral overseer gives the order for their warriors to flicker between the realms of the living and dead.

name: Chilling Horde
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by this unit if it charged in the same turn.
legend: When the enemy is frozen in fear, the Chainrasps effortlessly drag to the underworlds any who face their assault.

name: Drawn to War
description: Effect: Your general has WARD (4+) while they are within 1" of this unit.
legend: When the champions of the Nighthaunt muster their processions for battle, Spirit Hosts flock to join their cause, serving as useful fodder for the enemy.

name: Reaped Like Corn
description: Effect: Combat attacks made by this unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+ if the target unit has 5 or more models.
legend: The scythes wielded by these ghostly warriors can be swung in great sweeping arcs, cutting down whole ranks of enemy warriors.

name: Consecrate the Land
description:
Declare: Pick an objective within 12" of this unit, then make a chanting roll of D6.

Effect: On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, friendly units have WARD (5+) while they are contesting that objective.
legend: Bellowing Sigmarite hymns, the priest purges the taint of Chaos from the land and consecrates it in the name of the God-King.

name: Cinder and Ash
description:
Declare: Pick up to 1 terrain feature contested by this unit and up to 1 objective contested by this unit, then pick any enemy units also contesting them to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Freeguild Grenadiers carry specialised gear to reduce dug-in enemies to a panicked, screaming bonfire of melting flesh and charred hair.
condition: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

name: Unbreachable Will
description:
Declare: If this unit has not charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of the target’s weapons for attacks that target this unit.
legend: Having each survived punishing trials, Freeguild Gallants break before no foe.

name: Veteran Skirmishers
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic but it cannot use RUN abilities.
legend: Kreel has trained his ragtag soldiers well, emphasising speed and surety of foot over headlong sprints.

name: Prowling Ash Panther
description:
Effect: If this unit has the Thexa token, give that token to an enemy unit within 6" of this unit.

If an enemy unit has the Thexa token, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit. Then, give this unit the Thexa token.
legend: Thexa prowls the shadows, waiting for the right moment to pounce.

name: Swift Death
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target and roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
legend: Chaos Chariots are at their most deadly on the charge, causing devastation with their bladed wheels and hurtling mass.

name: Favoured of the Pantheon
description: Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, you can roll on the Eye of the Gods table for this unit.
legend: The gods watch this warlord’s deeds particularly closely.

name: Iron-willed Champion
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target and roll a dice. You cannot pick this unit.

Effect: On a 2+, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit this phase.
legend: This champion of Chaos demands that their warriors give no quarter.

name: Bringers of Desolation
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by this unit that target an enemy unit that is contesting an objective you do not control.
legend: Paragons of the Dark Gods, Chaos Warriors cut a swathe through the enemy lines, leaving nothing but blood and ruin in their wake.

name: Impaling Charge
description: Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s Cursed Lances if it charged in the same turn.
legend: A charging Chaos Knight is capable of spitting several enemies at once with the point of their ensorcelled polearm.

name: Darkness of the Soul
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.

Effect: On a 3+, subtract D6 from the control score of the target unit this turn.
legend: Cathallars wield the negative energy locked in aetherquartz as a weapon.

name: Lofted Shots
description: Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s Auralan Bows but subtract 1 from hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks.
legend: To strike a distant target, these warriors point their bows to the sky before launching a volley up high.

name: Swordmasters
description:
Effect: Each time this unit uses a FIGHT ability, you must pick either the Perfect Strike or Flurry of Blows weapon characteristics for all the attacks it makes with its Sunmetal Greatblade. In addition:

Do not use the attack sequence for an attack made with Perfect Strike. Instead, roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit.
legend: Vanari Bladelords adopt different fighting styles depending upon the nature of their opponents.

name: Guardians
description: Effect: While your general is wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and your general have WARD (5+).
legend: Bladelords are tasked with protecting the Scinari from harm.

name: Timed Charges
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.

Effect: On a 2+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target, and this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
legend: Skywardens are practised at striking hard and then retreating quickly amidst timed explosions to cause massive damage.

name: Always Take What You Are Owed
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly Arkanaut Company unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Add D6 to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
legend: Following the decrees of the Code, the Admiral directs their fleet in the pursuit of profit and glory.

name: Battle Damaged
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Heavy Skyhook is 1.

name: Bomb Racks
description:
Declare: Pick an enemy unit that this unit passed across this phase to be the target.

Effect: Inflict D3+1 mortal damage on the target.
legend: This skyvessel carries a variety of bombs that can be dropped onto the battlefield below to obliterate ground targets.
condition: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase

name: Glory-Seekers
description: Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this unit that target a unit contesting an objective.
legend: All of the warriors that make up an Arkanaut Company are eager to win recognition for daring deeds.

name: Fleshy Abundance
description:
Declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: On a 6+, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target that friendly unit until the start of your next turn
legend: The sorcerer generously bestows a growth spurt of the most repulsive kind upon their allies, causing their bodies to bloat with great wobbling mounds of grey-green fat.

name: Endless Swarm
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: The presence of Nurglings in the realms continuously draws more of their number from the Grandfather’s Garden, making their swarms extremely hard to eradicate.

name: Attention Seekers
description:
Declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.

Effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
legend: Beasts of Nurgle seek out playmates with an enthusiasm that is rarely reciprocated by the horrified source of their fascination.

name: Bilewood Stilts
description: Effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on this unit when it uses RETREAT abilities.
legend: Rotmire Creed use their stilts to cover ground more quickly.

name: Wheel About
description: Effect: If this unit charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.
legend: The Kavalos Deathriders plunge through the enemy ranks, disengaging before the enemy can strike back.

name: Eldritch Raiders
description: Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for this unit’s attacks while it is wholly within enemy territory.
legend: Tzaangors plunge into enemy lands, desperately seeking the arcane trinkets and treasures they crave – as well as victims to be transformed in their own bird-like image.

name: BATTLE DAMAGED
description: Effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Crushing Appendages is 5.

name: IMPOSSIBLE PRECISION
description:
Effect: Pick 1 of the following weapon abilities for this unit’s melee weapons to have for the rest of the turn:
  • Anti-INFANTRY (+1 Rend)
  • Anti-CAVALRY (+1 Rend)
  • Anti-MONSTER (+1 Rend)
  • Anti-WAR MACHINE (+1 Rend)
  • Anti-BEAST (+1 Rend)
legend: This hero's soul-stuff is a blend of many skilled warriors, and each face on their war form's chassis allows them to focus those skills to terrifying effect.

name: UNLIVING REGENERATION
description: Effect: Heal (D3) this unit.
legend: Perhaps because of the inclusion of ancient troggoth bones in its frame, this war fo rm is able to repair itself without the aid of a Mortisan .

name: HASTY ADVANCE
description: Effect: This unit can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
legend: This war form enables the bone-tithe to be collected at a swift pace.

name: WELL OF STRENGTH
description: Effect: Heal (D6) this HERO.
legend: When faced with seemingly insurmountable odds, this warrior draws on hidden strength to rise to the challenge.
condition: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase

name: As Strong as an Ironoak (Heroic Trait)
description: Effect: Add 2 to this unit’s control score for each damage point it has.

name: Shard of the Necris (Relic of Power)
description: Effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4 and this unit did not charge in the same turn, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

name: Remorseless Conquerer
description: Effect: Add 2 to run rolls for visible friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPER units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.
legend: This Ossiarch is so determined to conquer all of creation that nearby troops are infected by their invigorating will.

name: COUNTER-STRIKE
description:
Declare: Pick any number of visible friendly units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.

Effect: Spend 1 relentless discipline point for each target. The targets’ melee weapons have Anti-charge (+1 Rend) for the rest of the turn.
legend: This leader orders nearby Ossiarchs to ready their weapons for an enemy assault.

name: SOUL-GUIDE
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS unit wholly within 12" of the caster to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

Effect: The target has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn.
legend: The Soulmason empowers and focuses the souls that animate a nearby regiment of Ossiarch warriors.

name: Wall of Blades
description: Effect: If this unit did not charge this turn and is in combat with an enemy unit that charged this turn, roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if that enemy unit is CAVALRY. On a 3+, this unit has Strike-first for the rest of the turn.
legend: When Auralan Wardens stand shoulder to shoulder, they present a bristling wall of pikes to the foe.

name: Marshal’s Orders
description:
Declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

Effect: Remove this unit’s Relic Envoy token from the battlefield, then give it to the target.
legend: The Relic Envoy rushes across the battlefield to hand-deliver a message.

name: Relic Envoy
description:
Effect: While a friendly unit other than this unit has the Relic Envoy token, add 1 to wound rolls for that unit’s combat attacks.

If this unit is destroyed, remove the Relic Envoy token from the battlefield.
legend: Relic Envoys relay orders from the Freeguild Marshal to the soldiers of the line.

name: Vessel of Sigmar
description:
Declare: Pick up to 3 visible friendly or enemy units to be the targets.

Effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
  • If it is a friendly target, it has Ward (5+) until the start of your next turn.
  • If it is an enemy target, inflict an amount of mortal damage on it equal to the roll.
legend: Channelling the divine might of the God-King, Pontifex Zenestra is a powerful beacon of faith who bolsters the righteous and smites the corrupt.

name: Forewarned is Forearmed
description: Effect: While it is your turn, this unit has Strike-first.
legend: The Whisperblade is both master spy and deadly assassin combined: the ultimate opportunist.

name: Talented Champions
description:
Effect: After that command has been resolved, return the card to your hand.

Designer’s Note: This allows you to either use the command a second time or score the battle tactic on that card as well.
legend: Each member of the Command Corps has their own special skills to be employed.
condition: Once Per Turn, Reaction: You used a %000023322command%

name: Fanatical Followers
description: Effect: Return 1 slain model to this unit.
legend: Such is the zealous frenzy that fills these warriors that even after suffering mortal wounds, they will drag themselves to their feet and continue to fight.
